View Code (19137 chars)
use std::io::{self, BufRead};
use std::time::{Instant, Duration};

const TIME_LIMIT_SECS: f64 = 285.0; // 4 minutes 45 seconds to be safe

#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
struct Point { x: f64, y: f64 }

#[derive(Clone, Debug)]
struct BoundingBox {
    min_x: f64, max_x: f64,
    min_y: f64, max_y: f64,
}

impl BoundingBox {
    fn from_points(points: &[Point]) -> Self {
        let mut min_x = f64::MAX; let mut max_x = f64::MIN;
        let mut min_y = f64::MAX; let mut max_y = f64::MIN;
        for p in points {
            if p.x < min_x { min_x = p.x; }
            if p.x > max_x { max_x = p.x; }
            if p.y < min_y { min_y = p.y; }
            if p.y > max_y { max_y = p.y; }
        }
        Self { min_x, max_x, min_y, max_y }
    }
    
    fn intersects(&self, other: &BoundingBox) -> bool {
        self.min_x <= other.max_x + 1e-6 &&
        self.max_x >= other.min_x - 1e-6 &&
        self.min_y <= other.max_y + 1e-6 &&
        self.max_y >= other.min_y - 1e-6
    }
    
    fn is_inside(&self, other: &BoundingBox) -> bool {
        self.min_x >= other.min_x - 1e-6 &&
        self.max_x <= other.max_x + 1e-6 &&
        self.min_y >= other.min_y - 1e-6 &&
        self.max_y <= other.max_y + 1e-6
    }
}

#[derive(Clone, Debug)]
struct Polygon {
    vertices: Vec<Point>,
    bb: BoundingBox,
}

impl Polygon {
    fn new(vertices: Vec<Point>) -> Self {
        let bb = BoundingBox::from_points(&vertices);
        Self { vertices, bb }
    }
    
    fn update_bounding_box(&mut self) {
        self.bb = BoundingBox::from_points(&self.vertices);
    }

    fn translate(&self, tx: f64, ty: f64) -> Self {
        let vertices = self.vertices.iter().map(|p| Point { x: p.x + tx, y: p.y + ty }).collect();
        let mut bb = self.bb.clone();
        bb.min_x += tx; bb.max_x += tx;
        bb.min_y += ty; bb.max_y += ty;
        Self { vertices, bb }
    }
}

fn calculate_area(vertices: &[Point]) -> f64 {
    let mut area = 0.0;
    let n = vertices.len();
    for i in 0..n {
        let j = (i + 1) % n;
        area += vertices[i].x * vertices[j].y;
        area -= vertices[j].x * vertices[i].y;
    }
    (area / 2.0).abs()
}

fn polygon_centroid(vertices: &[Point]) -> Point {
    let mut cx = 0.0;
    let mut cy = 0.0;
    let mut area = 0.0;
    let n = vertices.len();
    for i in 0..n {
        let j = (i + 1) % n;
        let cross = vertices[i].x * vertices[j].y - vertices[j].x * vertices[i].y;
        cx += (vertices[i].x + vertices[j].x) * cross;
        cy += (vertices[i].y + vertices[j].y) * cross;
        area += cross;
    }
    area *= 0.5;
    if area.abs() < 1e-9 {
        let mut sum_x = 0.0;
        let mut sum_y = 0.0;
        for p in vertices {
            sum_x += p.x;
            sum_y += p.y;
        }
        return Point { x: sum_x / n as f64, y: sum_y / n as f64 };
    }
    cx /= 6.0 * area;
    cy /= 6.0 * area;
    Point { x: cx, y: cy }
}

fn shrink_polygon(poly: &mut Polygon, factor: f64) {
    let c = polygon_centroid(&poly.vertices);
    for p in &mut poly.vertices {
        p.x = c.x + (p.x - c.x) * factor;
        p.y = c.y + (p.y - c.y) * factor;
    }
    poly.update_bounding_box();
}

fn rotate_polygon(points: &[Point], angle: f64) -> Vec<Point> {
    let cos_a = angle.cos();
    let sin_a = angle.sin();
    points.iter().map(|p| Point {
        x: p.x * cos_a - p.y * sin_a,
        y: p.x * sin_a + p.y * cos_a,
    }).collect()
}

fn cross_product(p1: Point, p2: Point, p3: Point) -> f64 {
    (p2.x - p1.x) * (p3.y - p1.y) - (p2.y - p1.y) * (p3.x - p1.x)
}

fn on_segment(p: Point, q: Point, r: Point) -> bool {
    q.x <= p.x.max(r.x) + 1e-9 && q.x >= p.x.min(r.x) - 1e-9 &&
    q.y <= p.y.max(r.y) + 1e-9 && q.y >= p.y.min(r.y) - 1e-9
}

fn segments_intersect(p1: Point, q1: Point, p2: Point, q2: Point) -> bool {
    let d1 = cross_product(p2, q2, p1);
    let d2 = cross_product(p2, q2, q1);
    let d3 = cross_product(p1, q1, p2);
    let d4 = cross_product(p1, q1, q2);

    if ((d1 > 1e-9 && d2 < -1e-9) || (d1 < -1e-9 && d2 > 1e-9)) &&
       ((d3 > 1e-9 && d4 < -1e-9) || (d3 < -1e-9 && d4 > 1e-9)) {
        return true;
    }

    if d1.abs() <= 1e-9 && on_segment(p2, p1, q2) { return true; }
    if d2.abs() <= 1e-9 && on_segment(p2, q1, q2) { return true; }
    if d3.abs() <= 1e-9 && on_segment(p1, p2, q1) { return true; }
    if d4.abs() <= 1e-9 && on_segment(p1, q2, q1) { return true; }

    false
}

fn is_point_inside_polygon(p: Point, poly: &Polygon) -> bool {
    let mut inside = false;
    let mut j = poly.vertices.len() - 1;
    for i in 0..poly.vertices.len() {
        let vi = poly.vertices[i];
        let vj = poly.vertices[j];
        
        let intersect = ((vi.y > p.y) != (vj.y > p.y)) &&
                        (p.x < (vj.x - vi.x) * (p.y - vi.y) / (vj.y - vi.y) + vi.x);
        if intersect {
            inside = !inside;
        }
        j = i;
    }
    inside
}

fn is_polygon_inside(piece: &Polygon, stock: &Polygon) -> bool {
    if !piece.bb.is_inside(&stock.bb) {
        return false;
    }
    
    for i in 0..piece.vertices.len() {
        let e1_1 = piece.vertices[i];
        let e1_2 = piece.vertices[(i+1)%piece.vertices.len()];
        for j in 0..stock.vertices.len() {
            let e2_1 = stock.vertices[j];
            let e2_2 = stock.vertices[(j+1)%stock.vertices.len()];
            if segments_intersect(e1_1, e1_2, e2_1, e2_2) {
                return false;
            }
        }
    }
    
    if !is_point_inside_polygon(piece.vertices[0], stock) {
        return false;
    }
    true
}

fn do_polygons_intersect(p1: &Polygon, p2: &Polygon) -> bool {
    if !p1.bb.intersects(&p2.bb) {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..p1.vertices.len() {
        let e1_1 = p1.vertices[i];
        let e1_2 = p1.vertices[(i+1)%p1.vertices.len()];
        for j in 0..p2.vertices.len() {
            let e2_1 = p2.vertices[j];
            let e2_2 = p2.vertices[(j+1)%p2.vertices.len()];
            if segments_intersect(e1_1, e1_2, e2_1, e2_2) {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    if is_point_inside_polygon(p1.vertices[0], p2) { return true; }
    if is_point_inside_polygon(p2.vertices[0], p1) { return true; }
    false
}

struct SpatialGrid {
    min_x: f64, min_y: f64,
    cell_w: f64, cell_h: f64,
    cols: usize, rows: usize,
    cells: Vec<Vec<usize>>,
}

impl SpatialGrid {
    fn new(bb: &BoundingBox, cols: usize, rows: usize) -> Self {
        let mut cell_w = (bb.max_x - bb.min_x) / cols as f64;
        let mut cell_h = (bb.max_y - bb.min_y) / rows as f64;
        if cell_w < 1e-6 { cell_w = 1.0; }
        if cell_h < 1e-6 { cell_h = 1.0; }
        Self {
            min_x: bb.min_x,
            min_y: bb.min_y,
            cell_w,
            cell_h,
            cols,
            rows,
            cells: vec![vec![]; cols * rows],
        }
    }
    
    fn insert(&mut self, piece_idx: usize, bb: &BoundingBox) {
        let start_col = ((bb.min_x - self.min_x) / self.cell_w).floor() as isize;
        let end_col = ((bb.max_x - self.min_x) / self.cell_w).ceil() as isize;
        let start_row = ((bb.min_y - self.min_y) / self.cell_h).floor() as isize;
        let end_row = ((bb.max_y - self.min_y) / self.cell_h).ceil() as isize;

        let start_col = start_col.clamp(0, self.cols as isize - 1) as usize;
        let end_col = end_col.clamp(0, self.cols as isize - 1) as usize;
        let start_row = start_row.clamp(0, self.rows as isize - 1) as usize;
        let end_row = end_row.clamp(0, self.rows as isize - 1) as usize;

        for r in start_row..=end_row {
            for c in start_col..=end_col {
                self.cells[r * self.cols + c].push(piece_idx);
            }
        }
    }
    
    fn get_candidates(&self, bb: &BoundingBox, res: &mut Vec<usize>) {
        res.clear();
        let start_col = ((bb.min_x - self.min_x) / self.cell_w).floor() as isize;
        let end_col = ((bb.max_x - self.min_x) / self.cell_w).ceil() as isize;
        let start_row = ((bb.min_y - self.min_y) / self.cell_h).floor() as isize;
        let end_row = ((bb.max_y - self.min_y) / self.cell_h).ceil() as isize;

        let start_col = start_col.clamp(0, self.cols as isize - 1) as usize;
        let end_col = end_col.clamp(0, self.cols as isize - 1) as usize;
        let start_row = start_row.clamp(0, self.rows as isize - 1) as usize;
        let end_row = end_row.clamp(0, self.rows as isize - 1) as usize;

        for r in start_row..=end_row {
            for c in start_col..=end_col {
                res.extend(&self.cells[r * self.cols + c]);
            }
        }
        res.sort_unstable();
        res.dedup();
    }
}

struct PlacedPiece {
    id: usize,
    poly: Polygon,
    tx: f64, ty: f64, rot: f64,
}

struct StockState {
    placed_pieces: Vec<PlacedPiece>,
    grid: SpatialGrid,
    stock_bb: BoundingBox,
    placed_area: f64,
}

impl StockState {
    fn new(stock_bb: BoundingBox) -> Self {
        Self {
            placed_pieces: Vec::new(),
            grid: SpatialGrid::new(&stock_bb, 20, 20),
            stock_bb,
            placed_area: 0.0,
        }
    }
    
    fn add_piece(&mut self, id: usize, poly: Polygon, tx: f64, ty: f64, rot: f64, area: f64) {
        self.grid.insert(self.placed_pieces.len(), &poly.bb);
        self.placed_pieces.push(PlacedPiece { id, poly, tx, ty, rot });
        self.placed_area += area;
    }
    
    fn is_valid_placement(&self, piece: &Polygon, stock_poly: &Polygon, candidates_buf: &mut Vec<usize>) -> bool {
        if !is_polygon_inside(piece, stock_poly) {
            return false;
        }
        
        self.grid.get_candidates(&piece.bb, candidates_buf);
        for &idx in candidates_buf.iter() {
            if do_polygons_intersect(piece, &self.placed_pieces[idx].poly) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        true
    }
}

struct Piece {
    id: usize,
    vertices: Vec<Point>,
    area: f64,
}

struct RotatedPiece {
    rot: f64,
    shrunk_poly: Polygon,
    original_poly: Polygon,
}

fn main() {
    let stdin = io::stdin();
    let mut lines = stdin.lock().lines().map(|l| l.unwrap());
    
    let first_line = lines.next().unwrap();
    let mut parts = first_line.split_whitespace();
    let sv: usize = parts.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let np: usize = parts.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    
    let mut stock_vertices = Vec::with_capacity(sv);
    for _ in 0..sv {
        let line = lines.next().unwrap();
        let mut parts = line.split_whitespace();
        let x: f64 = parts.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
        let y: f64 = parts.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
        stock_vertices.push(Point { x, y });
    }
    
    let base_stock_poly = Polygon::new(stock_vertices);
    
    let mut pieces = Vec::with_capacity(np);
    for i in 0..np {
        let line = lines.next().unwrap();
        let pv: usize = line.trim().parse().unwrap();
        let mut vertices = Vec::with_capacity(pv);
        for _ in 0..pv {
            let line = lines.next().unwrap();
            let mut parts = line.split_whitespace();
            let x: f64 = parts.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
            let y: f64 = parts.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
            vertices.push(Point { x, y });
        }
        let area = calculate_area(&vertices);
        pieces.push(Piece { id: i, vertices, area });
    }
    
    pieces.sort_by(|a, b| b.area.partial_cmp(&a.area).unwrap());
    
    let mut stocks: Vec<StockState> = Vec::new();
    let start_time = Instant::now();
    let rotations = [0.0, std::f64::consts::PI / 2.0, std::f64::consts::PI, 3.0 * std::f64::consts::PI / 2.0];
    
    let mut candidates_buf = Vec::new();
    
    for (piece_idx, piece) in pieces.iter().enumerate() {
        let elapsed = start_time.elapsed().as_secs_f64();
        let remaining_time = (TIME_LIMIT_SECS - elapsed).max(0.01);
        let remaining_pieces = (np - piece_idx) as f64;
        let time_for_this_piece = remaining_time / remaining_pieces;
        
        let piece_start = Instant::now();
        
        let mut rotated_pieces = Vec::new();
        for rot in rotations.iter() {
            let original_poly = Polygon::new(rotate_polygon(&piece.vertices, *rot));
            let mut shrunk_poly = original_poly.clone();
            shrink_polygon(&mut shrunk_poly, 0.99999);
            rotated_pieces.push(RotatedPiece {
                rot: *rot,
                shrunk_poly,
                original_poly,
            });
        }
        
        let mut stock_order: Vec<usize> = (0..stocks.len()).collect();
        stock_order.sort_by(|&a, &b| stocks[b].placed_area.partial_cmp(&stocks[a].placed_area).unwrap());
        stock_order.push(stocks.len()); // Option for new stock
        
        let mut best_global_placement = None;
        let mut best_global_score = f64::MAX;
        
        let grid_size = 40;
        
        'stock_loop: for &stock_idx in &stock_order {
            let is_new_stock = stock_idx == stocks.len();
            let penalty = if is_new_stock { 1000000.0 } else { 0.0 };
            let stock_bb = if is_new_stock { &base_stock_poly.bb } else { &stocks[stock_idx].stock_bb };
            
            for rp in &rotated_pieces {
                let min_tx = stock_bb.min_x - rp.original_poly.bb.min_x;
                let max_tx = stock_bb.max_x - rp.original_poly.bb.max_x;
                let min_ty = stock_bb.min_y - rp.original_poly.bb.min_y;
                let max_ty = stock_bb.max_y - rp.original_poly.bb.max_y;
                
                if min_tx > max_tx || min_ty > max_ty {
                    continue;
                }
                
                let mut candidates = Vec::with_capacity((grid_size + 1) * (grid_size + 1));
                for y_step in 0..=grid_size {
                    let ty = min_ty + (max_ty - min_ty) * (y_step as f64 / grid_size as f64);
                    for x_step in 0..=grid_size {
                        let tx = min_tx + (max_tx - min_tx) * (x_step as f64 / grid_size as f64);
                        let score = ty + tx * 0.1;
                        candidates.push((score, tx, ty));
                    }
                }
                candidates.sort_by(|a, b| a.0.partial_cmp(&b.0).unwrap());
                
                let mut loops = 0;
                for (score, tx, ty) in candidates {
                    loops += 1;
                    if loops % 100 == 0 {
                        if piece_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64() > time_for_this_piece {
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    
                    let total_score = score + penalty;
                    if total_score >= best_global_score {
                        break; 
                    }
                    
                    let test_poly = rp.shrunk_poly.translate(tx, ty);
                    let valid = if is_new_stock {
                        is_polygon_inside(&test_poly, &base_stock_poly)
                    } else {
                        stocks[stock_idx].is_valid_placement(&test_poly, &base_stock_poly, &mut candidates_buf)
                    };
                    
                    if valid {
                        best_global_score = total_score;
                        best_global_placement = Some((stock_idx, tx, ty, rp.rot, rp.original_poly.translate(tx, ty)));
                        break; 
                    }
                }
            }
            
            if is_new_stock && best_global_placement.is_some() {
                break;
            }
        }
        
        if best_global_placement.is_none() {
            let mut rng_seed = 12345 + piece.id as u32;
            fn next_rand(seed: &mut u32) -> f64 {
                *seed = seed.wrapping_mul(1664525).wrapping_add(1013904223);
                (*seed as f64) / (u32::MAX as f64)
            }
        
            let mut attempts = 0;
            'fallback: loop {
                attempts += 1;
                let stock_idx = if next_rand(&mut rng_seed) < 0.2 && !stocks.is_empty() {
                    (next_rand(&mut rng_seed) * stocks.len() as f64) as usize
                } else {
                    stocks.len()
                };
                
                let is_new_stock = stock_idx == stocks.len();
                let stock_bb = if is_new_stock { &base_stock_poly.bb } else { &stocks[stock_idx].stock_bb };
                
                let rp_idx = (next_rand(&mut rng_seed) * rotated_pieces.len() as f64) as usize;
                let rp = &rotated_pieces[rp_idx];
                
                let min_tx = stock_bb.min_x - rp.original_poly.bb.min_x;
                let max_tx = stock_bb.max_x - rp.original_poly.bb.max_x;
                let min_ty = stock_bb.min_y - rp.original_poly.bb.min_y;
                let max_ty = stock_bb.max_y - rp.original_poly.bb.max_y;
                
                if min_tx > max_tx || min_ty > max_ty {
                    if attempts > 10000 { break; }
                    continue;
                }
                
                let tx = min_tx + next_rand(&mut rng_seed) * (max_tx - min_tx);
                let ty = min_ty + next_rand(&mut rng_seed) * (max_ty - min_ty);
                
                let test_poly = rp.shrunk_poly.translate(tx, ty);
                
                let valid = if is_new_stock {
                    is_polygon_inside(&test_poly, &base_stock_poly)
                } else {
                    stocks[stock_idx].is_valid_placement(&test_poly, &base_stock_poly, &mut candidates_buf)
                };
                
                if valid {
                    best_global_placement = Some((stock_idx, tx, ty, rp.rot, rp.original_poly.translate(tx, ty)));
                    break 'fallback;
                }
                
                if attempts > 50000 {
                    best_global_placement = Some((stocks.len(), 0.0, 0.0, rp.rot, rp.original_poly.translate(0.0, 0.0)));
                    break 'fallback;
                }
            }
        }
        
        if let Some((stock_idx, tx, ty, rot, final_poly)) = best_global_placement {
            if stock_idx == stocks.len() {
                let mut new_stock = StockState::new(base_stock_poly.bb.clone());
                new_stock.add_piece(piece.id, final_poly, tx, ty, rot, piece.area);
                stocks.push(new_stock);
            } else {
                stocks[stock_idx].add_piece(piece.id, final_poly, tx, ty, rot, piece.area);
            }
        }
    }
    
    println!("{}", stocks.len());
    let mut output = vec![None; np];
    for (stock_idx, stock) in stocks.iter().enumerate() {
        for placed in &stock.placed_pieces {
            output[placed.id] = Some((stock_idx, placed.tx, placed.ty, placed.rot));
        }
    }
    
    for i in 0..np {
        if let Some((s, x, y, r)) = output[i] {
            println!("{} {} {} {}", s, x, y, r);
        } else {
            println!("0 0.0 0.0 0.0");
        }
    }
}

Subpass 2
Subpass configurationView exact prompt

View Code (19137 chars)
use std::io::{self, BufRead};
use std::time::{Instant, Duration};

const TIME_LIMIT_SECS: f64 = 285.0; // 4 minutes 45 seconds to be safe

#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
struct Point { x: f64, y: f64 }

#[derive(Clone, Debug)]
struct BoundingBox {
    min_x: f64, max_x: f64,
    min_y: f64, max_y: f64,
}

impl BoundingBox {
    fn from_points(points: &[Point]) -> Self {
        let mut min_x = f64::MAX; let mut max_x = f64::MIN;
        let mut min_y = f64::MAX; let mut max_y = f64::MIN;
        for p in points {
            if p.x < min_x { min_x = p.x; }
            if p.x > max_x { max_x = p.x; }
            if p.y < min_y { min_y = p.y; }
            if p.y > max_y { max_y = p.y; }
        }
        Self { min_x, max_x, min_y, max_y }
    }
    
    fn intersects(&self, other: &BoundingBox) -> bool {
        self.min_x <= other.max_x + 1e-6 &&
        self.max_x >= other.min_x - 1e-6 &&
        self.min_y <= other.max_y + 1e-6 &&
        self.max_y >= other.min_y - 1e-6
    }
    
    fn is_inside(&self, other: &BoundingBox) -> bool {
        self.min_x >= other.min_x - 1e-6 &&
        self.max_x <= other.max_x + 1e-6 &&
        self.min_y >= other.min_y - 1e-6 &&
        self.max_y <= other.max_y + 1e-6
    }
}

#[derive(Clone, Debug)]
struct Polygon {
    vertices: Vec<Point>,
    bb: BoundingBox,
}

impl Polygon {
    fn new(vertices: Vec<Point>) -> Self {
        let bb = BoundingBox::from_points(&vertices);
        Self { vertices, bb }
    }
    
    fn update_bounding_box(&mut self) {
        self.bb = BoundingBox::from_points(&self.vertices);
    }

    fn translate(&self, tx: f64, ty: f64) -> Self {
        let vertices = self.vertices.iter().map(|p| Point { x: p.x + tx, y: p.y + ty }).collect();
        let mut bb = self.bb.clone();
        bb.min_x += tx; bb.max_x += tx;
        bb.min_y += ty; bb.max_y += ty;
        Self { vertices, bb }
    }
}

fn calculate_area(vertices: &[Point]) -> f64 {
    let mut area = 0.0;
    let n = vertices.len();
    for i in 0..n {
        let j = (i + 1) % n;
        area += vertices[i].x * vertices[j].y;
        area -= vertices[j].x * vertices[i].y;
    }
    (area / 2.0).abs()
}

fn polygon_centroid(vertices: &[Point]) -> Point {
    let mut cx = 0.0;
    let mut cy = 0.0;
    let mut area = 0.0;
    let n = vertices.len();
    for i in 0..n {
        let j = (i + 1) % n;
        let cross = vertices[i].x * vertices[j].y - vertices[j].x * vertices[i].y;
        cx += (vertices[i].x + vertices[j].x) * cross;
        cy += (vertices[i].y + vertices[j].y) * cross;
        area += cross;
    }
    area *= 0.5;
    if area.abs() < 1e-9 {
        let mut sum_x = 0.0;
        let mut sum_y = 0.0;
        for p in vertices {
            sum_x += p.x;
            sum_y += p.y;
        }
        return Point { x: sum_x / n as f64, y: sum_y / n as f64 };
    }
    cx /= 6.0 * area;
    cy /= 6.0 * area;
    Point { x: cx, y: cy }
}

fn shrink_polygon(poly: &mut Polygon, factor: f64) {
    let c = polygon_centroid(&poly.vertices);
    for p in &mut poly.vertices {
        p.x = c.x + (p.x - c.x) * factor;
        p.y = c.y + (p.y - c.y) * factor;
    }
    poly.update_bounding_box();
}

fn rotate_polygon(points: &[Point], angle: f64) -> Vec<Point> {
    let cos_a = angle.cos();
    let sin_a = angle.sin();
    points.iter().map(|p| Point {
        x: p.x * cos_a - p.y * sin_a,
        y: p.x * sin_a + p.y * cos_a,
    }).collect()
}

fn cross_product(p1: Point, p2: Point, p3: Point) -> f64 {
    (p2.x - p1.x) * (p3.y - p1.y) - (p2.y - p1.y) * (p3.x - p1.x)
}

fn on_segment(p: Point, q: Point, r: Point) -> bool {
    q.x <= p.x.max(r.x) + 1e-9 && q.x >= p.x.min(r.x) - 1e-9 &&
    q.y <= p.y.max(r.y) + 1e-9 && q.y >= p.y.min(r.y) - 1e-9
}

fn segments_intersect(p1: Point, q1: Point, p2: Point, q2: Point) -> bool {
    let d1 = cross_product(p2, q2, p1);
    let d2 = cross_product(p2, q2, q1);
    let d3 = cross_product(p1, q1, p2);
    let d4 = cross_product(p1, q1, q2);

    if ((d1 > 1e-9 && d2 < -1e-9) || (d1 < -1e-9 && d2 > 1e-9)) &&
       ((d3 > 1e-9 && d4 < -1e-9) || (d3 < -1e-9 && d4 > 1e-9)) {
        return true;
    }

    if d1.abs() <= 1e-9 && on_segment(p2, p1, q2) { return true; }
    if d2.abs() <= 1e-9 && on_segment(p2, q1, q2) { return true; }
    if d3.abs() <= 1e-9 && on_segment(p1, p2, q1) { return true; }
    if d4.abs() <= 1e-9 && on_segment(p1, q2, q1) { return true; }

    false
}

fn is_point_inside_polygon(p: Point, poly: &Polygon) -> bool {
    let mut inside = false;
    let mut j = poly.vertices.len() - 1;
    for i in 0..poly.vertices.len() {
        let vi = poly.vertices[i];
        let vj = poly.vertices[j];
        
        let intersect = ((vi.y > p.y) != (vj.y > p.y)) &&
                        (p.x < (vj.x - vi.x) * (p.y - vi.y) / (vj.y - vi.y) + vi.x);
        if intersect {
            inside = !inside;
        }
        j = i;
    }
    inside
}

fn is_polygon_inside(piece: &Polygon, stock: &Polygon) -> bool {
    if !piece.bb.is_inside(&stock.bb) {
        return false;
    }
    
    for i in 0..piece.vertices.len() {
        let e1_1 = piece.vertices[i];
        let e1_2 = piece.vertices[(i+1)%piece.vertices.len()];
        for j in 0..stock.vertices.len() {
            let e2_1 = stock.vertices[j];
            let e2_2 = stock.vertices[(j+1)%stock.vertices.len()];
            if segments_intersect(e1_1, e1_2, e2_1, e2_2) {
                return false;
            }
        }
    }
    
    if !is_point_inside_polygon(piece.vertices[0], stock) {
        return false;
    }
    true
}

fn do_polygons_intersect(p1: &Polygon, p2: &Polygon) -> bool {
    if !p1.bb.intersects(&p2.bb) {
        return false;
    }
    for i in 0..p1.vertices.len() {
        let e1_1 = p1.vertices[i];
        let e1_2 = p1.vertices[(i+1)%p1.vertices.len()];
        for j in 0..p2.vertices.len() {
            let e2_1 = p2.vertices[j];
            let e2_2 = p2.vertices[(j+1)%p2.vertices.len()];
            if segments_intersect(e1_1, e1_2, e2_1, e2_2) {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    if is_point_inside_polygon(p1.vertices[0], p2) { return true; }
    if is_point_inside_polygon(p2.vertices[0], p1) { return true; }
    false
}

struct SpatialGrid {
    min_x: f64, min_y: f64,
    cell_w: f64, cell_h: f64,
    cols: usize, rows: usize,
    cells: Vec<Vec<usize>>,
}

impl SpatialGrid {
    fn new(bb: &BoundingBox, cols: usize, rows: usize) -> Self {
        let mut cell_w = (bb.max_x - bb.min_x) / cols as f64;
        let mut cell_h = (bb.max_y - bb.min_y) / rows as f64;
        if cell_w < 1e-6 { cell_w = 1.0; }
        if cell_h < 1e-6 { cell_h = 1.0; }
        Self {
            min_x: bb.min_x,
            min_y: bb.min_y,
            cell_w,
            cell_h,
            cols,
            rows,
            cells: vec![vec![]; cols * rows],
        }
    }
    
    fn insert(&mut self, piece_idx: usize, bb: &BoundingBox) {
        let start_col = ((bb.min_x - self.min_x) / self.cell_w).floor() as isize;
        let end_col = ((bb.max_x - self.min_x) / self.cell_w).ceil() as isize;
        let start_row = ((bb.min_y - self.min_y) / self.cell_h).floor() as isize;
        let end_row = ((bb.max_y - self.min_y) / self.cell_h).ceil() as isize;

        let start_col = start_col.clamp(0, self.cols as isize - 1) as usize;
        let end_col = end_col.clamp(0, self.cols as isize - 1) as usize;
        let start_row = start_row.clamp(0, self.rows as isize - 1) as usize;
        let end_row = end_row.clamp(0, self.rows as isize - 1) as usize;

        for r in start_row..=end_row {
            for c in start_col..=end_col {
                self.cells[r * self.cols + c].push(piece_idx);
            }
        }
    }
    
    fn get_candidates(&self, bb: &BoundingBox, res: &mut Vec<usize>) {
        res.clear();
        let start_col = ((bb.min_x - self.min_x) / self.cell_w).floor() as isize;
        let end_col = ((bb.max_x - self.min_x) / self.cell_w).ceil() as isize;
        let start_row = ((bb.min_y - self.min_y) / self.cell_h).floor() as isize;
        let end_row = ((bb.max_y - self.min_y) / self.cell_h).ceil() as isize;

        let start_col = start_col.clamp(0, self.cols as isize - 1) as usize;
        let end_col = end_col.clamp(0, self.cols as isize - 1) as usize;
        let start_row = start_row.clamp(0, self.rows as isize - 1) as usize;
        let end_row = end_row.clamp(0, self.rows as isize - 1) as usize;

        for r in start_row..=end_row {
            for c in start_col..=end_col {
                res.extend(&self.cells[r * self.cols + c]);
            }
        }
        res.sort_unstable();
        res.dedup();
    }
}

struct PlacedPiece {
    id: usize,
    poly: Polygon,
    tx: f64, ty: f64, rot: f64,
}

struct StockState {
    placed_pieces: Vec<PlacedPiece>,
    grid: SpatialGrid,
    stock_bb: BoundingBox,
    placed_area: f64,
}

impl StockState {
    fn new(stock_bb: BoundingBox) -> Self {
        Self {
            placed_pieces: Vec::new(),
            grid: SpatialGrid::new(&stock_bb, 20, 20),
            stock_bb,
            placed_area: 0.0,
        }
    }
    
    fn add_piece(&mut self, id: usize, poly: Polygon, tx: f64, ty: f64, rot: f64, area: f64) {
        self.grid.insert(self.placed_pieces.len(), &poly.bb);
        self.placed_pieces.push(PlacedPiece { id, poly, tx, ty, rot });
        self.placed_area += area;
    }
    
    fn is_valid_placement(&self, piece: &Polygon, stock_poly: &Polygon, candidates_buf: &mut Vec<usize>) -> bool {
        if !is_polygon_inside(piece, stock_poly) {
            return false;
        }
        
        self.grid.get_candidates(&piece.bb, candidates_buf);
        for &idx in candidates_buf.iter() {
            if do_polygons_intersect(piece, &self.placed_pieces[idx].poly) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        true
    }
}

struct Piece {
    id: usize,
    vertices: Vec<Point>,
    area: f64,
}

struct RotatedPiece {
    rot: f64,
    shrunk_poly: Polygon,
    original_poly: Polygon,
}

fn main() {
    let stdin = io::stdin();
    let mut lines = stdin.lock().lines().map(|l| l.unwrap());
    
    let first_line = lines.next().unwrap();
    let mut parts = first_line.split_whitespace();
    let sv: usize = parts.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let np: usize = parts.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    
    let mut stock_vertices = Vec::with_capacity(sv);
    for _ in 0..sv {
        let line = lines.next().unwrap();
        let mut parts = line.split_whitespace();
        let x: f64 = parts.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
        let y: f64 = parts.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
        stock_vertices.push(Point { x, y });
    }
    
    let base_stock_poly = Polygon::new(stock_vertices);
    
    let mut pieces = Vec::with_capacity(np);
    for i in 0..np {
        let line = lines.next().unwrap();
        let pv: usize = line.trim().parse().unwrap();
        let mut vertices = Vec::with_capacity(pv);
        for _ in 0..pv {
            let line = lines.next().unwrap();
            let mut parts = line.split_whitespace();
            let x: f64 = parts.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
            let y: f64 = parts.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
            vertices.push(Point { x, y });
        }
        let area = calculate_area(&vertices);
        pieces.push(Piece { id: i, vertices, area });
    }
    
    pieces.sort_by(|a, b| b.area.partial_cmp(&a.area).unwrap());
    
    let mut stocks: Vec<StockState> = Vec::new();
    let start_time = Instant::now();
    let rotations = [0.0, std::f64::consts::PI / 2.0, std::f64::consts::PI, 3.0 * std::f64::consts::PI / 2.0];
    
    let mut candidates_buf = Vec::new();
    
    for (piece_idx, piece) in pieces.iter().enumerate() {
        let elapsed = start_time.elapsed().as_secs_f64();
        let remaining_time = (TIME_LIMIT_SECS - elapsed).max(0.01);
        let remaining_pieces = (np - piece_idx) as f64;
        let time_for_this_piece = remaining_time / remaining_pieces;
        
        let piece_start = Instant::now();
        
        let mut rotated_pieces = Vec::new();
        for rot in rotations.iter() {
            let original_poly = Polygon::new(rotate_polygon(&piece.vertices, *rot));
            let mut shrunk_poly = original_poly.clone();
            shrink_polygon(&mut shrunk_poly, 0.99999);
            rotated_pieces.push(RotatedPiece {
                rot: *rot,
                shrunk_poly,
                original_poly,
            });
        }
        
        let mut stock_order: Vec<usize> = (0..stocks.len()).collect();
        stock_order.sort_by(|&a, &b| stocks[b].placed_area.partial_cmp(&stocks[a].placed_area).unwrap());
        stock_order.push(stocks.len()); // Option for new stock
        
        let mut best_global_placement = None;
        let mut best_global_score = f64::MAX;
        
        let grid_size = 40;
        
        'stock_loop: for &stock_idx in &stock_order {
            let is_new_stock = stock_idx == stocks.len();
            let penalty = if is_new_stock { 1000000.0 } else { 0.0 };
            let stock_bb = if is_new_stock { &base_stock_poly.bb } else { &stocks[stock_idx].stock_bb };
            
            for rp in &rotated_pieces {
                let min_tx = stock_bb.min_x - rp.original_poly.bb.min_x;
                let max_tx = stock_bb.max_x - rp.original_poly.bb.max_x;
                let min_ty = stock_bb.min_y - rp.original_poly.bb.min_y;
                let max_ty = stock_bb.max_y - rp.original_poly.bb.max_y;
                
                if min_tx > max_tx || min_ty > max_ty {
                    continue;
                }
                
                let mut candidates = Vec::with_capacity((grid_size + 1) * (grid_size + 1));
                for y_step in 0..=grid_size {
                    let ty = min_ty + (max_ty - min_ty) * (y_step as f64 / grid_size as f64);
                    for x_step in 0..=grid_size {
                        let tx = min_tx + (max_tx - min_tx) * (x_step as f64 / grid_size as f64);
                        let score = ty + tx * 0.1;
                        candidates.push((score, tx, ty));
                    }
                }
                candidates.sort_by(|a, b| a.0.partial_cmp(&b.0).unwrap());
                
                let mut loops = 0;
                for (score, tx, ty) in candidates {
                    loops += 1;
                    if loops % 100 == 0 {
                        if piece_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64() > time_for_this_piece {
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    
                    let total_score = score + penalty;
                    if total_score >= best_global_score {
                        break; 
                    }
                    
                    let test_poly = rp.shrunk_poly.translate(tx, ty);
                    let valid = if is_new_stock {
                        is_polygon_inside(&test_poly, &base_stock_poly)
                    } else {
                        stocks[stock_idx].is_valid_placement(&test_poly, &base_stock_poly, &mut candidates_buf)
                    };
                    
                    if valid {
                        best_global_score = total_score;
                        best_global_placement = Some((stock_idx, tx, ty, rp.rot, rp.original_poly.translate(tx, ty)));
                        break; 
                    }
                }
            }
            
            if is_new_stock && best_global_placement.is_some() {
                break;
            }
        }
        
        if best_global_placement.is_none() {
            let mut rng_seed = 12345 + piece.id as u32;
            fn next_rand(seed: &mut u32) -> f64 {
                *seed = seed.wrapping_mul(1664525).wrapping_add(1013904223);
                (*seed as f64) / (u32::MAX as f64)
            }
        
            let mut attempts = 0;
            'fallback: loop {
                attempts += 1;
                let stock_idx = if next_rand(&mut rng_seed) < 0.2 && !stocks.is_empty() {
                    (next_rand(&mut rng_seed) * stocks.len() as f64) as usize
                } else {
                    stocks.len()
                };
                
                let is_new_stock = stock_idx == stocks.len();
                let stock_bb = if is_new_stock { &base_stock_poly.bb } else { &stocks[stock_idx].stock_bb };
                
                let rp_idx = (next_rand(&mut rng_seed) * rotated_pieces.len() as f64) as usize;
                let rp = &rotated_pieces[rp_idx];
                
                let min_tx = stock_bb.min_x - rp.original_poly.bb.min_x;
                let max_tx = stock_bb.max_x - rp.original_poly.bb.max_x;
                let min_ty = stock_bb.min_y - rp.original_poly.bb.min_y;
                let max_ty = stock_bb.max_y - rp.original_poly.bb.max_y;
                
                if min_tx > max_tx || min_ty > max_ty {
                    if attempts > 10000 { break; }
                    continue;
                }
                
                let tx = min_tx + next_rand(&mut rng_seed) * (max_tx - min_tx);
                let ty = min_ty + next_rand(&mut rng_seed) * (max_ty - min_ty);
                
                let test_poly = rp.shrunk_poly.translate(tx, ty);
                
                let valid = if is_new_stock {
                    is_polygon_inside(&test_poly, &base_stock_poly)
                } else {
                    stocks[stock_idx].is_valid_placement(&test_poly, &base_stock_poly, &mut candidates_buf)
                };
                
                if valid {
                    best_global_placement = Some((stock_idx, tx, ty, rp.rot, rp.original_poly.translate(tx, ty)));
                    break 'fallback;
                }
                
                if attempts > 50000 {
                    best_global_placement = Some((stocks.len(), 0.0, 0.0, rp.rot, rp.original_poly.translate(0.0, 0.0)));
                    break 'fallback;
                }
            }
        }
        
        if let Some((stock_idx, tx, ty, rot, final_poly)) = best_global_placement {
            if stock_idx == stocks.len() {
                let mut new_stock = StockState::new(base_stock_poly.bb.clone());
                new_stock.add_piece(piece.id, final_poly, tx, ty, rot, piece.area);
                stocks.push(new_stock);
            } else {
                stocks[stock_idx].add_piece(piece.id, final_poly, tx, ty, rot, piece.area);
            }
        }
    }
    
    println!("{}", stocks.len());
    let mut output = vec![None; np];
    for (stock_idx, stock) in stocks.iter().enumerate() {
        for placed in &stock.placed_pieces {
            output[placed.id] = Some((stock_idx, placed.tx, placed.ty, placed.rot));
        }
    }
    
    for i in 0..np {
        if let Some((s, x, y, r)) = output[i] {
            println!("{} {} {} {}", s, x, y, r);
        } else {
            println!("0 0.0 0.0 0.0");
        }
    }
}

Test 12: 3D Bin Packing - Polyhedra in Box (C#) Score: 0.00 / 11
Typical Prompt:
You are solving a 3D Bin Packing problem in C#.

You must write a C# solver that can handle ANY problem size from trivial to ludicrous scale:
- **Trivial**: Small containers (5x5x5), simple polyhedra
- **Medium**: Medium containers (10x10x10-20x20x20)
- **Large**: Large containers (50x50x50-100x100x100)
- **Extreme**: Massive containers (200x200x200-500x500x500)

**Input format (stdin):**
Line 1: V F (vertex/face count of the polyhedron)
Next V lines: x y z (polyhedron vertices)
Next F lines: a b c (polyhedron face indices)
Last line: W H D (container width, height, depth)
Container origin at (0,0,0), extends to (W,H,D).

**Output format (stdout):**
Line 1: count (number of polyhedra packed)
Next count lines: tx ty tz qw qx qy qz
tx,ty,tz: translation
qw,qx,qy,qz: rotation quaternion (w is scalar part)

**Quaternion Rotation Reference:**
- Identity (no rotation): 1 0 0 0
- 90° around Z: 0.707 0 0 0.707
- To rotate a point: p' = q * p * q^(-1)

**Critical Requirements:**
1. **Scalability**: Your algorithm must adapt based on container size and polyhedron complexity
2. **Performance**: Must complete within 5 minutes even for massive containers
3. **Quality**: Maximize packing count while ensuring valid placements

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: AMD64 Family 23 Model 8 Stepping 2, AuthenticAMD
Core count: 64
Memory: 127.87 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler:**
C# (csc.exe 5.5.0-2.26208.13 (3dc781932f83b0792b0d1717a68db3f9604a2cb1)) | max LangVersion 14

Write complete, compilable C# code with a static void Main method.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on problem scale.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Pack as many copies of an irregular 3D shape into a box as possible, without any overlaps or pieces poking outside. The shapes can be rotated freely, so finding the best orientations is part of the puzzle.

The AI must handle 3D collision detection and spatial reasoning. Subpasses use increasingly awkward shapes that resist neat stacking. The baseline uses a simple grid placement without rotation optimisation.

 0.0000
[2x2x2 boxes in 10x10x10 container] Execution timed out after 30 seconds

3D Bin Packing - 2x2x2 boxes in 10x10x10 container

View Code (22132 chars)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.IO;
using System.Text;
using System.Globalization;
using System.Threading;

class Program
{
    struct Vector2 {
        public double X, Y;
        public Vector2(double x, double y) { X = x; Y = y; }
    }

    struct Vector3 {
        public double X, Y, Z;
        public Vector3(double x, double y, double z) { X = x; Y = y; Z = z; }
        public double this[int i] {
            get { return i == 0 ? X : i == 1 ? Y : Z; }
        }
    }

    struct Quat {
        public double W, X, Y, Z;
        public Quat(double w, double x, double y, double z) { W = w; X = x; Y = y; Z = z; }
        public static Quat Multiply(Quat q1, Quat q2) {
            return new Quat(
                q1.W * q2.W - q1.X * q2.X - q1.Y * q2.Y - q1.Z * q2.Z,
                q1.W * q2.X + q1.X * q2.W + q1.Y * q2.Z - q1.Z * q2.Y,
                q1.W * q2.Y - q1.X * q2.Z + q1.Y * q2.W + q1.Z * q2.X,
                q1.W * q2.Z + q1.X * q2.Y - q1.Y * q2.X + q1.Z * q2.W
            );
        }
    }

    class FastScanner {
        Stream stream;
        byte[] buffer = new byte[65536];
        int head, tail;
        public FastScanner(Stream s) { stream = s; }
        public int Read() {
            if (head >= tail) {
                head = 0;
                tail = stream.Read(buffer, 0, buffer.Length);
                if (tail == 0) return -1;
            }
            return buffer[head++];
        }
        public string NextToken() {
            int c = Read();
            while (c <= 32) {
                if (c == -1) return null;
                c = Read();
            }
            StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
            while (c > 32) {
                sb.Append((char)c);
                c = Read();
            }
            return sb.ToString();
        }
        public double NextDouble() {
            string t = NextToken();
            if (t == null) return 0;
            return double.Parse(t, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
        }
        public int NextInt() {
            string t = NextToken();
            if (t == null) return 0;
            return int.Parse(t);
        }
    }

    class RotationScore : IComparable<RotationScore> {
        public Quat Q;
        public long EstCount;
        public double W, H, D;
        public int CompareTo(RotationScore other) => other.EstCount.CompareTo(EstCount);
    }

    static Vector3 Rotate(Vector3 v, Quat q) {
        double tx = 2 * (q.Y * v.Z - q.Z * v.Y);
        double ty = 2 * (q.Z * v.X - q.X * v.Z);
        double tz = 2 * (q.X * v.Y - q.Y * v.X);
        return new Vector3(
            v.X + q.W * tx + q.Y * tz - q.Z * ty,
            v.Y + q.W * ty + q.Z * tx - q.X * tz,
            v.Z + q.W * tz + q.X * ty - q.Y * tx
        );
    }

    static List<Quat> GenerateOrtho() {
        List<Quat> ortho = new List<Quat>();
        ortho.Add(new Quat(1, 0, 0, 0));
        Quat qx = new Quat(0.7071067811865476, 0.7071067811865476, 0, 0);
        Quat qy = new Quat(0.7071067811865476, 0, 0.7071067811865476, 0);
        Quat qz = new Quat(0.7071067811865476, 0, 0, 0.7071067811865476);
        Queue<Quat> q = new Queue<Quat>();
        q.Enqueue(ortho[0]);
        while(q.Count > 0) {
            Quat curr = q.Dequeue();
            Quat[] nexts = new Quat[] { Quat.Multiply(curr, qx), Quat.Multiply(curr, qy), Quat.Multiply(curr, qz) };
            foreach(var n in nexts) {
                bool exists = false;
                foreach(var o in ortho) {
                    double dot = n.W * o.W + n.X * o.X + n.Y * o.Y + n.Z * o.Z;
                    if (Math.Abs(dot) > 0.999) { exists = true; break; }
                }
                if (!exists) {
                    ortho.Add(n);
                    q.Enqueue(n);
                }
            }
        }
        return ortho;
    }

    static bool Intersect2D(Vector2 p1, Vector2 p2, Vector2 p3, Vector2 p4, out Vector2 intersection) {
        intersection = new Vector2(0, 0);
        double d = (p1.X - p2.X) * (p3.Y - p4.Y) - (p1.Y - p2.Y) * (p3.X - p4.X);
        if (Math.Abs(d) < 1e-9) return false;
        double t = ((p1.X - p3.X) * (p3.Y - p4.Y) - (p1.Y - p3.Y) * (p3.X - p4.X)) / d;
        double u = ((p1.X - p3.X) * (p1.Y - p2.Y) - (p1.Y - p3.Y) * (p1.X - p2.X)) / d;
        if (t >= 0 && t <= 1 && u >= 0 && u <= 1) {
            intersection.X = p1.X + t * (p2.X - p1.X);
            intersection.Y = p1.Y + t * (p2.Y - p1.Y);
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    static double FastS(Vector3[] verts, int[] faces, int axis, int res, double minU, double maxU, double minV, double maxV) {
        int iX = axis, iY = (axis+1)%3, iZ = (axis+2)%3;
        double maxT = 0;
        double stepU = (maxU - minU) / res;
        double stepV = (maxV - minV) / res;
        if (stepU < 1e-6 || stepV < 1e-6) return 0;
        
        double[] tMinU = new double[faces.Length/3];
        double[] tMaxU = new double[faces.Length/3];
        double[] tMinV = new double[faces.Length/3];
        double[] tMaxV = new double[faces.Length/3];
        for(int i=0; i<faces.Length; i+=3) {
            int idx = i/3;
            double u0 = verts[faces[i]][iY], v0 = verts[faces[i]][iZ];
            double u1 = verts[faces[i+1]][iY], v1 = verts[faces[i+1]][iZ];
            double u2 = verts[faces[i+2]][iY], v2 = verts[faces[i+2]][iZ];
            tMinU[idx] = Math.Min(u0, Math.Min(u1, u2));
            tMaxU[idx] = Math.Max(u0, Math.Max(u1, u2));
            tMinV[idx] = Math.Min(v0, Math.Min(v1, v2));
            tMaxV[idx] = Math.Max(v0, Math.Max(v1, v2));
        }
        
        for(int iu=0; iu<=res; iu++) {
            double u = minU + iu * stepU;
            for(int iv=0; iv<=res; iv++) {
                double v = minV + iv * stepV;
                double minH = double.MaxValue, maxH = double.MinValue;
                bool hit = false;
                
                for(int i=0; i<faces.Length; i+=3) {
                    int idx = i/3;
                    if (u < tMinU[idx] || u > tMaxU[idx] || v < tMinV[idx] || v > tMaxV[idx]) continue;
                    
                    Vector3 p0 = verts[faces[i]], p1 = verts[faces[i+1]], p2 = verts[faces[i+2]];
                    double p0u = p0[iY], p0v = p0[iZ], p0w = p0[iX];
                    double p1u = p1[iY], p1v = p1[iZ], p1w = p1[iX];
                    double p2u = p2[iY], p2v = p2[iZ], p2w = p2[iX];
                    
                    double e0 = (p1u - p0u) * (v - p0v) - (p1v - p0v) * (u - p0u);
                    double e1 = (p2u - p1u) * (v - p1v) - (p2v - p1v) * (u - p1u);
                    double e2 = (p0u - p2u) * (v - p2v) - (p0v - p2v) * (u - p2u);
                    
                    bool hasNeg = (e0 < -1e-7) || (e1 < -1e-7) || (e2 < -1e-7);
                    bool hasPos = (e0 > 1e-7) || (e1 > 1e-7) || (e2 > 1e-7);
                    
                    if (!(hasNeg && hasPos)) {
                        double nu = (p1v - p0v) * (p2w - p0w) - (p1w - p0w) * (p2v - p0v);
                        double nv = (p1w - p0w) * (p2u - p0u) - (p1u - p0u) * (p2w - p0w);
                        double nw = (p1u - p0u) * (p2v - p0v) - (p1v - p0v) * (p2u - p0u);
                        
                        if (Math.Abs(nw) > 1e-7) {
                            double hitW = p0w - (nu * (u - p0u) + nv * (v - p0v)) / nw;
                            if (hitW < minH) minH = hitW;
                            if (hitW > maxH) maxH = hitW;
                            hit = true;
                        }
                    }
                }
                if (hit) {
                    double th = maxH - minH;
                    if (th > maxT) maxT = th;
                }
            }
        }
        return maxT;
    }

    static double CalculateExactS(Vector3[] verts, int[] faces, int axis, double aabbW) {
        int iX = axis, iY = (axis + 1) % 3, iZ = (axis + 2) % 3;
        
        HashSet<long> edgeSet = new HashSet<long>();
        for(int i=0; i<faces.Length; i+=3) {
            int v0 = faces[i], v1 = faces[i+1], v2 = faces[i+2];
            if (v0 > v1) { int t=v0; v0=v1; v1=t; }
            edgeSet.Add(((long)v0 << 32) | (uint)v1);
            
            v0 = faces[i+1]; v1 = faces[i+2];
            if (v0 > v1) { int t=v0; v0=v1; v1=t; }
            edgeSet.Add(((long)v0 << 32) | (uint)v1);
            
            v0 = faces[i+2]; v1 = faces[i];
            if (v0 > v1) { int t=v0; v0=v1; v1=t; }
            edgeSet.Add(((long)v0 << 32) | (uint)v1);
        }
        
        List<Vector2> eStart = new List<Vector2>();
        List<Vector2> eEnd = new List<Vector2>();
        foreach(long e in edgeSet) {
            int v0 = (int)(e >> 32);
            int v1 = (int)(e & 0xFFFFFFFF);
            eStart.Add(new Vector2(verts[v0][iY], verts[v0][iZ]));
            eEnd.Add(new Vector2(verts[v1][iY], verts[v1][iZ]));
        }
        
        List<Vector2> pts = new List<Vector2>();
        foreach(var v in verts) pts.Add(new Vector2(v[iY], v[iZ]));
        
        long intersectionPairs = (long)eStart.Count * (eStart.Count - 1) / 2;
        if (intersectionPairs * (faces.Length/3) > 100_000_000) {
            return aabbW; 
        }
        
        for(int i=0; i<eStart.Count; i++) {
            for(int j=i+1; j<eStart.Count; j++) {
                if (Intersect2D(eStart[i], eEnd[i], eStart[j], eEnd[j], out Vector2 p)) {
                    pts.Add(p);
                }
            }
        }
        
        if ((long)pts.Count * (faces.Length/3) > 200_000_000) {
            return aabbW; 
        }
        
        double maxT = 0;
        double[] tMinY = new double[faces.Length/3];
        double[] tMaxY = new double[faces.Length/3];
        double[] tMinZ = new double[faces.Length/3];
        double[] tMaxZ = new double[faces.Length/3];
        for(int i=0; i<faces.Length; i+=3) {
            int idx = i/3;
            double y0 = verts[faces[i]][iY], z0 = verts[faces[i]][iZ];
            double y1 = verts[faces[i+1]][iY], z1 = verts[faces[i+1]][iZ];
            double y2 = verts[faces[i+2]][iY], z2 = verts[faces[i+2]][iZ];
            tMinY[idx] = Math.Min(y0, Math.Min(y1, y2));
            tMaxY[idx] = Math.Max(y0, Math.Max(y1, y2));
            tMinZ[idx] = Math.Min(z0, Math.Min(z1, z2));
            tMaxZ[idx] = Math.Max(z0, Math.Max(z1, z2));
        }
        
        foreach(var pt in pts) {
            double u = pt.X, v = pt.Y;
            double minH = double.MaxValue, maxH = double.MinValue;
            bool hit = false;
            
            for(int i=0; i<faces.Length; i+=3) {
                int idx = i/3;
                if (u < tMinY[idx]-1e-6 || u > tMaxY[idx]+1e-6 || v < tMinZ[idx]-1e-6 || v > tMaxZ[idx]+1e-6) continue;
                
                Vector3 p0 = verts[faces[i]], p1 = verts[faces[i+1]], p2 = verts[faces[i+2]];
                double p0u = p0[iY], p0v = p0[iZ], p0w = p0[iX];
                double p1u = p1[iY], p1v = p1[iZ], p1w = p1[iX];
                double p2u = p2[iY], p2v = p2[iZ], p2w = p2[iX];
                
                double e0 = (p1u - p0u) * (v - p0v) - (p1v - p0v) * (u - p0u);
                double e1 = (p2u - p1u) * (v - p1v) - (p2v - p1v) * (u - p1u);
                double e2 = (p0u - p2u) * (v - p2v) - (p0v - p2v) * (u - p2u);
                
                bool hasNeg = (e0 < -1e-6) || (e1 < -1e-6) || (e2 < -1e-6);
                bool hasPos = (e0 > 1e-6) || (e1 > 1e-6) || (e2 > 1e-6);
                
                if (!(hasNeg && hasPos)) {
                    double nu = (p1v - p0v) * (p2w - p0w) - (p1w - p0w) * (p2v - p0v);
                    double nv = (p1w - p0w) * (p2u - p0u) - (p1u - p0u) * (p2w - p0w);
                    double nw = (p1u - p0u) * (p2v - p0v) - (p1v - p0v) * (p2u - p0u);
                    
                    if (Math.Abs(nw) > 1e-9) {
                        double hitW = p0w - (nu * (u - p0u) + nv * (v - p0v)) / nw;
                        if (hitW < minH) minH = hitW;
                        if (hitW > maxH) maxH = hitW;
                        hit = true;
                    }
                }
            }
            if (hit) {
                double th = maxH - minH;
                if (th > maxT) maxT = th;
            }
        }
        return Math.Min(maxT + 1e-6, aabbW);
    }

    static void Main() {
        Thread.CurrentThread.CurrentCulture = CultureInfo.InvariantCulture;
        FastScanner sc = new FastScanner(Console.OpenStandardInput());
        
        string vToken = sc.NextToken();
        if (vToken == null) return;
        int V = int.Parse(vToken);
        int F = sc.NextInt();
        
        Vector3[] verts = new Vector3[V];
        for(int i=0; i<V; i++) {
            verts[i] = new Vector3(sc.NextDouble(), sc.NextDouble(), sc.NextDouble());
        }
        
        int[] faces = new int[F * 3];
        for(int i=0; i<F; i++) {
            faces[i*3] = sc.NextInt();
            faces[i*3+1] = sc.NextInt();
            faces[i*3+2] = sc.NextInt();
        }
        
        double W = sc.NextDouble();
        double H = sc.NextDouble();
        double D = sc.NextDouble();

        if (W <= 0 || H <= 0 || D <= 0) {
            Console.WriteLine(0);
            return;
        }

        Stopwatch sw = Stopwatch.StartNew();
        List<Quat> ortho = GenerateOrtho();
        List<RotationScore> scores = new List<RotationScore>();

        Random rnd = new Random(42);
        int rotIdx = 0;

        while(sw.ElapsedMilliseconds < 200000) { 
            Quat q;
            if (rotIdx < ortho.Count) q = ortho[rotIdx];
            else {
                double u1 = rnd.NextDouble();
                double u2 = rnd.NextDouble();
                double u3 = rnd.NextDouble();
                double sq1 = Math.Sqrt(1 - u1);
                double sq2 = Math.Sqrt(u1);
                double theta1 = 2 * Math.PI * u2;
                double theta2 = 2 * Math.PI * u3;
                q = new Quat(sq2 * Math.Cos(theta2), sq1 * Math.Sin(theta1), sq1 * Math.Cos(theta1), sq2 * Math.Sin(theta2));
            }
            
            Vector3[] rotVerts = new Vector3[V];
            for(int i=0; i<V; i++) rotVerts[i] = Rotate(verts[i], q);
            
            double minX = double.MaxValue, maxX = double.MinValue;
            double minY = double.MaxValue, maxY = double.MinValue;
            double minZ = double.MaxValue, maxZ = double.MinValue;
            for(int i=0; i<V; i++) {
                if (rotVerts[i].X < minX) minX = rotVerts[i].X;
                if (rotVerts[i].X > maxX) maxX = rotVerts[i].X;
                if (rotVerts[i].Y < minY) minY = rotVerts[i].Y;
                if (rotVerts[i].Y > maxY) maxY = rotVerts[i].Y;
                if (rotVerts[i].Z < minZ) minZ = rotVerts[i].Z;
                if (rotVerts[i].Z > maxZ) maxZ = rotVerts[i].Z;
            }
            double w = maxX - minX, h = maxY - minY, d = maxZ - minZ;
            
            if (w <= W && h <= H && d <= D) {
                long estCount = (long)(W/w) * (long)(H/h) * (long)(D/d);
                if (V < 2000) {
                    double sx = FastS(rotVerts, faces, 0, 10, minY, maxY, minZ, maxZ);
                    double sy = FastS(rotVerts, faces, 1, 10, minZ, maxZ, minX, maxX);
                    double sz = FastS(rotVerts, faces, 2, 10, minX, maxX, minY, maxY);
                    if (sx < 1e-6) sx = w;
                    if (sy < 1e-6) sy = h;
                    if (sz < 1e-6) sz = d;
                    long cx = (long)((W - w) / sx + 1) * (long)(H/h) * (long)(D/d);
                    long cy = (long)(W/w) * (long)((H - h) / sy + 1) * (long)(D/d);
                    long cz = (long)(W/w) * (long)(H/h) * (long)((D - d) / sz + 1);
                    estCount = Math.Max(estCount, Math.Max(cx, Math.Max(cy, cz)));
                }
                scores.Add(new RotationScore { Q = q, EstCount = estCount, W=w, H=h, D=d });
            }
            
            rotIdx++;
            if (rotIdx % 50 == 0 && sw.ElapsedMilliseconds > 200000) break;
        }

        scores.Sort();
        int topK = Math.Min(10, scores.Count);

        long bestFinalCount = 0;
        Quat bestQ = new Quat(1,0,0,0);
        int bestStrategy = 0; 
        double bestSx = 0, bestSy = 0, bestSz = 0;
        Vector3 bestMin = new Vector3();
        double bestW=0, bestH=0, bestD=0;

        for(int i=0; i<topK; i++) {
            Quat q = scores[i].Q;
            Vector3[] rotVerts = new Vector3[V];
            for(int j=0; j<V; j++) rotVerts[j] = Rotate(verts[j], q);
            
            double minX = double.MaxValue, maxX = double.MinValue;
            double minY = double.MaxValue, maxY = double.MinValue;
            double minZ = double.MaxValue, maxZ = double.MinValue;
            for(int j=0; j<V; j++) {
                if (rotVerts[j].X < minX) minX = rotVerts[j].X;
                if (rotVerts[j].X > maxX) maxX = rotVerts[j].X;
                if (rotVerts[j].Y < minY) minY = rotVerts[j].Y;
                if (rotVerts[j].Y > maxY) maxY = rotVerts[j].Y;
                if (rotVerts[j].Z < minZ) minZ = rotVerts[j].Z;
                if (rotVerts[j].Z > maxZ) maxZ = rotVerts[j].Z;
            }
            double w = maxX - minX, h = maxY - minY, d = maxZ - minZ;
            
            long c0 = (long)(W/w) * (long)(H/h) * (long)(D/d);
            if (c0 > bestFinalCount) {
                bestFinalCount = c0; bestQ = q; bestStrategy = 0;
                bestMin = new Vector3(minX, minY, minZ);
                bestW = w; bestH = h; bestD = d;
            }
            
            double sx = CalculateExactS(rotVerts, faces, 0, w);
            if (sx < 1e-6) sx = w;
            long c1 = (long)((W - w) / sx + 1) * (long)(H/h) * (long)(D/d);
            if (c1 > bestFinalCount) {
                bestFinalCount = c1; bestQ = q; bestStrategy = 1; bestSx = sx;
                bestMin = new Vector3(minX, minY, minZ);
                bestW = w; bestH = h; bestD = d;
            }
            
            double sy = CalculateExactS(rotVerts, faces, 1, h);
            if (sy < 1e-6) sy = h;
            long c2 = (long)(W/w) * (long)((H - h) / sy + 1) * (long)(D/d);
            if (c2 > bestFinalCount) {
                bestFinalCount = c2; bestQ = q; bestStrategy = 2; bestSy = sy;
                bestMin = new Vector3(minX, minY, minZ);
                bestW = w; bestH = h; bestD = d;
            }
            
            double sz = CalculateExactS(rotVerts, faces, 2, d);
            if (sz < 1e-6) sz = d;
            long c3 = (long)(W/w) * (long)(H/h) * (long)((D - d) / sz + 1);
            if (c3 > bestFinalCount) {
                bestFinalCount = c3; bestQ = q; bestStrategy = 3; bestSz = sz;
                bestMin = new Vector3(minX, minY, minZ);
                bestW = w; bestH = h; bestD = d;
            }
        }

        using (StreamWriter swOut = new StreamWriter(Console.OpenStandardOutput(), new UTF8Encoding(false), 1048576)) {
            swOut.WriteLine(bestFinalCount);
            if (bestFinalCount == 0) return;

            string qStr = $"{bestQ.W:0.00000} {bestQ.X:0.00000} {bestQ.Y:0.00000} {bestQ.Z:0.00000}";
            double rx = -bestMin.X;
            double ry = -bestMin.Y;
            double rz = -bestMin.Z;

            if (bestStrategy == 0) {
                long nx = (long)(W / bestW);
                long ny = (long)(H / bestH);
                long nz = (long)(D / bestD);
                for(long i=0; i<nx; i++) {
                    for(long j=0; j<ny; j++) {
                        for(long k=0; k<nz; k++) {
                            double tx = rx + i * bestW;
                            double ty = ry + j * bestH;
                            double tz = rz + k * bestD;
                            swOut.WriteLine($"{tx:0.00000} {ty:0.00000} {tz:0.00000} {qStr}");
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            else if (bestStrategy == 1) {
                long nx = (long)((W - bestW) / bestSx) + 1;
                long ny = (long)(H / bestH);
                long nz = (long)(D / bestD);
                for(long i=0; i<nx; i++) {
                    for(long j=0; j<ny; j++) {
                        for(long k=0; k<nz; k++) {
                            double tx = rx + i * bestSx;
                            double ty = ry + j * bestH;
                            double tz = rz + k * bestD;
                            swOut.WriteLine($"{tx:0.00000} {ty:0.00000} {tz:0.00000} {qStr}");
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            else if (bestStrategy == 2) {
                long nx = (long)(W / bestW);
                long ny = (long)((H - bestH) / bestSy) + 1;
                long nz = (long)(D / bestD);
                for(long i=0; i<nx; i++) {
                    for(long j=0; j<ny; j++) {
                        for(long k=0; k<nz; k++) {
                            double tx = rx + i * bestW;
                            double ty = ry + j * bestSy;
                            double tz = rz + k * bestD;
                            swOut.WriteLine($"{tx:0.00000} {ty:0.00000} {tz:0.00000} {qStr}");
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            else if (bestStrategy == 3) {
                long nx = (long)(W / bestW);
                long ny = (long)(H / bestH);
                long nz = (long)((D - bestD) / bestSz) + 1;
                for(long i=0; i<nx; i++) {
                    for(long j=0; j<ny; j++) {
                        for(long k=0; k<nz; k++) {
                            double tx = rx + i * bestW;
                            double ty = ry + j * bestH;
                            double tz = rz + k * bestSz;
                            swOut.WriteLine($"{tx:0.00000} {ty:0.00000} {tz:0.00000} {qStr}");
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

Test 13: Longest Common Substring (C++) Score: 0.00 / 12
Typical Prompt:
You are solving the Longest Common Substring problem in C++.

You must write a C++ solver that can handle ANY problem size from trivial to ludicrous scale:
- **Trivial**: 2-3 short strings (10-50 chars each)
- **Medium**: 3-5 medium strings (100-500 chars each)
- **Large**: 5-10 long strings (1000-5000 chars each)
- **Extreme**: 100 very long strings (10MB+ each), massive search space

**Input format (stdin):**
Line 1: N (number of strings)
Next N lines: one string per line

**Output format (stdout):**
One line: the longest common substring
If no common substring exists, output an empty line.

**Example:**
Input:
3
abcdef
xbcdey
zbcdew

Output:
bcde

**Critical Requirements:**
1. **Scalability**: Your algorithm must adapt based on number and length of strings
2. **Performance**: Must complete within 300 seconds even for very long strings
3. **Correctness**: Must find the actual longest common substring

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: AMD64 Family 23 Model 8 Stepping 2, AuthenticAMD
Core count: 64
Memory: 127.87 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C++ Compiler:**
MSVC cl 19.50.35730 | std=c++20 (/std:c++20)

Be sure that any deviation from the C++ standard library is supported by the given compiler,
as referencing the wrong intrinsics or non-standard header like 'bits/stdc++.h' could fail your submission.

Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on problem scale.

Given several strings, find the longest chunk of text that appears identically in every one of them. For example, if the strings are “abcdef” and “xbcdey”, the answer is “bcde”.

Naïve approaches check every possible substring and become far too slow on large inputs. Subpasses increase the string lengths into the millions, so the AI must use efficient data structures or hashing. The baseline uses a simple library call that times out on the bigger cases.

Longest Common Substring - 3 short strings (7 chars)

View Code (6252 chars)
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <algorithm>
#include <future>
#include <cstring>

using namespace std;

struct HashPos {
    uint64_t h1, h2;
    int pos;
};

int main() {
    // Optimize standard I/O operations for performance
    ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(NULL);

    int n;
    if (!(cin >> n)) return 0;
    string line;
    getline(cin, line); // consume newline

    vector<string> strings;
    strings.reserve(n);
    for(int i = 0; i < n; ++i){
        string s;
        getline(cin, s);
        // Safely handle carriage return for Windows inputs
        if(!s.empty() && s.back() == '\r') s.pop_back();
        strings.push_back(move(s));
    }

    if(n == 0){
        cout << "\n";
        return 0;
    }

    if(n == 1){
        cout << strings[0] << "\n";
        return 0;
    }

    // Sort strings by length, shortest first to minimize search space
    sort(strings.begin(), strings.end(), [](const string& a, const string& b){
        return a.size() < b.size();
    });

    int min_len = (int)strings[0].size();
    if(min_len == 0){
        cout << "\n";
        return 0;
    }

    // Two different large primes for base to compute a 128-bit rolling hash
    uint64_t B1 = 1000000007ULL;
    uint64_t B2 = 1000000009ULL;

    vector<uint64_t> power1(min_len + 1);
    vector<uint64_t> power2(min_len + 1);
    power1[0] = 1; power2[0] = 1;
    for(int i = 1; i <= min_len; ++i){
        power1[i] = power1[i-1] * B1;
        power2[i] = power2[i-1] * B2;
    }

    int M_max = min_len;
    vector<int> head;
    vector<int> next_node;
    vector<HashPos> valid;
    vector<vector<uint8_t>> present_arrays(n);

    // Preallocate presence tracking arrays for thread safety and speed
    for(int k = 1; k < n; ++k) {
        present_arrays[k].resize(M_max + 1);
    }

    // Function to check if a common substring of length L exists
    auto check = [&](int L) -> vector<int> {
        if(L == 0) return {0};
        int M = min_len - L + 1;
        int table_size = 1;
        while(table_size < M * 3) table_size *= 2; // Optimal load factor

        head.resize(table_size);
        memset(head.data(), 0xff, table_size * sizeof(int));
        next_node.resize(M + 1);
        valid.clear();
        valid.reserve(M + 1);

        const string& S0 = strings[0];
        uint64_t h1 = 0, h2 = 0;
        for(int i = 0; i < L; ++i){
            h1 = h1 * B1 + (uint8_t)S0[i];
            h2 = h2 * B2 + (uint8_t)S0[i];
        }

        uint64_t BL1 = power1[L];
        uint64_t BL2 = power2[L];
        int mask = table_size - 1;

        auto add_hash = [&](uint64_t ch1, uint64_t ch2, int pos) {
            uint64_t comb = ch1 ^ (ch2 * 0x9e3779b97f4a7c15ULL);
            int bucket = comb & mask;
            int idx = head[bucket];
            bool found = false;
            while(idx != -1){
                if(valid[idx].h1 == ch1 && valid[idx].h2 == ch2){
                    found = true;
                    break;
                }
                idx = next_node[idx];
            }
            if(!found){
                int new_idx = (int)valid.size();
                valid.push_back({ch1, ch2, pos});
                next_node[new_idx] = head[bucket];
                head[bucket] = new_idx;
            }
        };

        add_hash(h1, h2, 0);
        for(int i = L; i < (int)S0.size(); ++i){
            h1 = h1 * B1 + (uint8_t)S0[i] - (uint8_t)S0[i-L] * BL1;
            h2 = h2 * B2 + (uint8_t)S0[i] - (uint8_t)S0[i-L] * BL2;
            add_hash(h1, h2, i - L + 1);
        }

        // Reset presence array for actual checked length
        for(int k = 1; k < n; ++k){
            memset(present_arrays[k].data(), 0, valid.size());
        }

        vector<future<void>> futures;
        for(int k = 1; k < n; ++k){
            // Process other strings concurrently
            futures.push_back(async(launch::async | launch::deferred, [&, k]() {
                const string& S = strings[k];
                if((int)S.size() < L) return;
                uint8_t* present = present_arrays[k].data();
                uint64_t lh1 = 0, lh2 = 0;
                for(int i = 0; i < L; ++i){
                    lh1 = lh1 * B1 + (uint8_t)S[i];
                    lh2 = lh2 * B2 + (uint8_t)S[i];
                }
                
                auto check_hash = [&](uint64_t ch1, uint64_t ch2) {
                    uint64_t comb = ch1 ^ (ch2 * 0x9e3779b97f4a7c15ULL);
                    int bucket = comb & mask;
                    int idx = head[bucket];
                    while(idx != -1){
                        if(valid[idx].h1 == ch1 && valid[idx].h2 == ch2){
                            present[idx] = 1;
                            break;
                        }
                        idx = next_node[idx];
                    }
                };

                check_hash(lh1, lh2);
                for(int i = L; i < (int)S.size(); ++i){
                    lh1 = lh1 * B1 + (uint8_t)S[i] - (uint8_t)S[i-L] * BL1;
                    lh2 = lh2 * B2 + (uint8_t)S[i] - (uint8_t)S[i-L] * BL2;
                    check_hash(lh1, lh2);
                }
            }));
        }

        for(auto& f : futures) f.get();

        vector<int> res;
        for(int i = 0; i < (int)valid.size(); ++i){
            bool ok = true;
            for(int k = 1; k < n; ++k){
                if(!present_arrays[k][i]){
                    ok = false;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if(ok) res.push_back(valid[i].pos);
        }
        return res;
    };

    // Binary search to find the maximum valid length
    int low = 1, high = min_len;
    int best_L = 0;
    int best_pos = -1;

    while(low <= high){
        int mid = low + (high - low) / 2;
        vector<int> res = check(mid);
        if(!res.empty()){
            best_L = mid;
            best_pos = res[0];
            low = mid + 1; // Try finding a longer common substring
        } else {
            high = mid - 1; // Try a shorter common substring
        }
    }

    if(best_L > 0 && best_pos != -1){
        cout << strings[0].substr(best_pos, best_L) << "\n";
    } else {
        cout << "\n";
    }

    return 0;
}

Test 14: Minesweeper Solver (C#) Score: 0.00 / 10
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a Minesweeper solver in C# that must handle ANY board complexity from trivial to ludicrous scale.

- **Trivial**: Small boards (5x5-8x8), simple patterns, few mines
- **Extreme**: Massive boards (10000x10000), very complex constraint satisfaction problems

**Input format (stdin):**
Line 1: H W (height and width)
Next H lines: the board row strings (each W characters)

**Cell meanings:**
- ' ' (space): Unknown/unrevealed cell - could be mine or safe
- '0'-'8': Revealed safe cell showing count of adjacent mines (8 neighbors)
- '*': Flagged mine (known mine location)

**Output format (stdout):**
Line 1: N (number of safe cells found)
Next N lines: x y (column row, 0-indexed)
Only output cells that are currently unknown (' ') and provably safe.
Do NOT guess - only return cells you can prove are safe.

**Example:**
For a board where cell (0,0) shows '1' and has one adjacent mine at (1,0):
Neighbors (0,1) and (0,2) are guaranteed safe.

**Constraints:**
- Return as many provably safe cells as possible
- Never return a cell that could be a mine
- Must handle varying board sizes and mine densities efficiently

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: AMD64 Family 23 Model 8 Stepping 2, AuthenticAMD
Core count: 64
Memory: 127.87 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler:**
C# (csc.exe 5.5.0-2.26208.13 (3dc781932f83b0792b0d1717a68db3f9604a2cb1)) | max LangVersion 14

Write complete, compilable C# code with a static void Main method.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on board complexity.

Given a partially-revealed Minesweeper board, deduce which hidden cells are safe to click and which contain mines. Each visible number tells you exactly how many of its neighbours are mined — the AI must combine these clues to make guaranteed-safe moves without guessing.

Larger boards and denser mine layouts make the logic harder. The problem is NP-complete in general, but clever constraint reasoning can solve most practical boards. The baseline uses only the simplest single-cell deduction rules.

 0.0000

C:\Users\Ash\AppData\Local\Temp\tmp6gdsfn6c.cs(12,36): error CS1729: 'StreamReader' does not contain a constructor that takes 2 arguments
