[1000 nodes, 8000 edges] Cut size: 5, Known min: 12, Time: 1.36s - optimal

Subpass 2: 1000 nodes, 8000 edges

Score: 1.00

Details: [1000 nodes, 8000 edges] Cut size: 5, Known min: 12, Time: 1.36s - optimal

C++ Code 
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
#include <queue>
#include <chrono>
#include <random>

using namespace std;

class FastIO {
    static const int BUF_SIZE = 1 << 16;
    char buf[BUF_SIZE];
    int pos, len;
public:
    FastIO() : pos(0), len(0) {}
    inline int nextInt() {
        int x = 0;
        char c;
        do {
            c = getChar();
            if (c == EOF) return -1;
        } while (c <= ' ');
        while (c > ' ') {
            x = x * 10 + (c - '0');
            c = getChar();
        }
        return x;
    }
    inline uint64_t nextUInt64() {
        uint64_t x = 0;
        char c;
        do {
            c = getChar();
            if (c == EOF) return (uint64_t)-1;
        } while (c <= ' ');
        while (c > ' ') {
            x = x * 10 + (c - '0');
            c = getChar();
        }
        return x;
    }
private:
    inline char getChar() {
        if (pos == len) {
            pos = 0;
            len = fread(buf, 1, BUF_SIZE, stdin);
            if (len == 0) return EOF;
        }
        return buf[pos++];
    }
};

struct Edge {
    int to;
    int cap;
    int flow;
    int rev;
    int id; 
};

int N;
uint64_t M;
vector<pair<int, int>> original_edges;
vector<vector<Edge>> adj;

int best_cut;
vector<int> best_cut_edges_id;

void print_cut() {
    cout << best_cut_edges_id.size() << "\n";
    for (int id : best_cut_edges_id) {
        cout << original_edges[id].first << " " << original_edges[id].second << "\n";
    }
}

void run_stoer_wagner() {
    vector<vector<int>> adj_sw(N, vector<int>(N, 0));
    for (auto& e : original_edges) {
        adj_sw[e.first][e.second] += 1;
        adj_sw[e.second][e.first] += 1;
    }
    
    vector<vector<int>> nodes(N);
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) nodes[i].push_back(i);
    
    int best_cut_sw = INT_MAX;
    vector<int> best_partition;
    
    vector<int> active;
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) active.push_back(i);
    
    for (int phase = 1; phase < N; ++phase) {
        int n_active = active.size();
        vector<int> w(N, 0);
        vector<bool> added(N, false);
        int prev = -1, last = -1;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n_active; ++i) {
            int sel = -1;
            for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
                int j = active[j_idx];
                if (!added[j] && (sel == -1 || w[j] > w[sel])) {
                    sel = j;
                }
            }
            if (i == n_active - 2) prev = sel;
            if (i == n_active - 1) last = sel;
            added[sel] = true;
            for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
                int j = active[j_idx];
                if (!added[j]) {
                    w[j] += adj_sw[sel][j];
                }
            }
        }
        
        if (w[last] < best_cut_sw) {
            best_cut_sw = w[last];
            best_partition = nodes[last];
        }
        
        for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
            int j = active[j_idx];
            if (j != prev && j != last) {
                adj_sw[prev][j] += adj_sw[last][j];
                adj_sw[j][prev] += adj_sw[j][last];
            }
        }
        nodes[prev].insert(nodes[prev].end(), nodes[last].begin(), nodes[last].end());
        
        for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
            if (active[j_idx] == last) {
                active[j_idx] = active.back();
                active.pop_back();
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    
    vector<bool> in_partition(N, false);
    for (int v : best_partition) in_partition[v] = true;
    
    vector<pair<int, int>> cut_edges;
    for (auto& e : original_edges) {
        if (in_partition[e.first] != in_partition[e.second]) {
            cut_edges.push_back(e);
        }
    }
    
    cout << cut_edges.size() << "\n";
    for (auto& e : cut_edges) cout << e.first << " " << e.second << "\n";
}

int timer_dfs = 1;
vector<int> tin, low;
int found_bridge_id = -1;

void run_bridge_finding() {
    tin.assign(N, 0);
    low.assign(N, 0);
    timer_dfs = 1;
    found_bridge_id = -1;
    
    struct Frame {
        int v;
        int edge_id_to_parent;
        int idx;
    };
    vector<Frame> st;
    
    for (int start_node = 0; start_node < N; ++start_node) {
        if (tin[start_node]) continue;
        
        st.push_back({start_node, -1, 0});
        tin[start_node] = low[start_node] = timer_dfs++;
        
        while (!st.empty()) {
            auto& f = st.back();
            int v = f.v;
            if (f.idx < (int)adj[v].size()) {
                auto& edge = adj[v][f.idx++];
                int to = edge.to;
                int id = edge.id;
                if (id == f.edge_id_to_parent) continue;
                
                if (tin[to]) {
                    low[v] = min(low[v], tin[to]);
                } else {
                    tin[to] = low[to] = timer_dfs++;
                    st.push_back({to, id, 0});
                }
            } else {
                st.pop_back();
                if (!st.empty() && st.back().v != -1) { 
                    int p = st.back().v;
                    low[p] = min(low[p], low[v]);
                    if (low[v] > tin[p]) {
                        found_bridge_id = f.edge_id_to_parent;
                        return;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

int edmonds_karp(int s, int t, int limit, vector<int>& cut_edges_out) {
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
        for (auto& edge : adj[i]) {
            edge.flow = 0;
        }
    }
    
    int flow = 0;
    vector<pair<int, int>> parent_edge(N, {-1, -1});
    while (flow < limit) {
        fill(parent_edge.begin(), parent_edge.end(), pair<int,int>{-1, -1});
        parent_edge[s] = {-2, -2};
        queue<int> q;
        q.push(s);
        bool reached = false;
        while (!q.empty() && !reached) {
            int v = q.front(); q.pop();
            for (int i = 0; i < (int)adj[v].size(); ++i) {
                auto& edge = adj[v][i];
                if (edge.cap - edge.flow > 0 && parent_edge[edge.to].first == -1) {
                    parent_edge[edge.to] = {v, i};
                    if (edge.to == t) {
                        reached = true;
                        break;
                    }
                    q.push(edge.to);
                }
            }
        }
        if (!reached) break;
        
        int curr = t;
        while (curr != s) {
            int p = parent_edge[curr].first;
            int idx = parent_edge[curr].second;
            adj[p][idx].flow += 1;
            int rev_idx = adj[p][idx].rev;
            adj[curr][rev_idx].flow -= 1;
            curr = p;
        }
        flow += 1;
    }
    
    if (flow < limit) {
        vector<bool> visited(N, false);
        queue<int> q;
        q.push(s);
        visited[s] = true;
        while (!q.empty()) {
            int v = q.front(); q.pop();
            for (auto& edge : adj[v]) {
                if (edge.cap - edge.flow > 0 && !visited[edge.to]) {
                    visited[edge.to] = true;
                    q.push(edge.to);
                }
            }
        }
        
        cut_edges_out.clear();
        for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
            if (visited[i]) {
                for (auto& edge : adj[i]) {
                    if (!visited[edge.to] && edge.cap == 1) {
                        cut_edges_out.push_back(edge.id);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return flow;
}

void build_adj() {
    adj.assign(N, vector<Edge>());
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)original_edges.size(); ++i) {
        int u = original_edges[i].first;
        int v = original_edges[i].second;
        adj[u].push_back({v, 1, 0, (int)adj[v].size(), i});
        adj[v].push_back({u, 1, 0, (int)adj[u].size() - 1, i});
    }
}

void run_edmonds_karp_randomized(int s) {
    auto start_time = chrono::steady_clock::now();
    vector<int> targets;
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
        if (i != s) targets.push_back(i);
    }
    mt19937 rng(42);
    shuffle(targets.begin(), targets.end(), rng);
    
    for (int t : targets) {
        auto now = chrono::steady_clock::now();
        double elapsed = chrono::duration<double>(now - start_time).count();
        if (elapsed > 4.0) {
            break;
        }
        
        vector<int> current_cut;
        int flow = edmonds_karp(s, t, best_cut, current_cut);
        if (flow < best_cut) {
            best_cut = flow;
            best_cut_edges_id = current_cut;
            if (best_cut <= 2) {
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}

int main() {
    ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(NULL);
    
    FastIO fio;
    N = fio.nextInt();
    if (N == -1) return 0;
    M = fio.nextUInt64();
    
    if (M > 200000000ULL) {
        vector<int> degree(N, 0);
        FILE* tmp = tmpfile();
        for (uint64_t i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
            int u = fio.nextInt();
            int v = fio.nextInt();
            if (u == -1 || v == -1) break;
            degree[u]++;
            degree[v]++;
            uint32_t edge[2] = {(uint32_t)u, (uint32_t)v};
            fwrite(edge, sizeof(uint32_t), 2, tmp);
        }
        int v_min = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < N; ++i) {
            if (degree[i] < degree[v_min]) {
                v_min = i;
            }
        }
        rewind(tmp);
        vector<pair<int, int>> best_edges;
        for (uint64_t i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
            uint32_t edge[2];
            if (fread(edge, sizeof(uint32_t), 2, tmp) != 2) break;
            if (edge[0] == (uint32_t)v_min || edge[1] == (uint32_t)v_min) {
                best_edges.push_back({(int)edge[0], (int)edge[1]});
            }
        }
        cout << best_edges.size() << "\n";
        for (auto& e : best_edges) {
            cout << e.first << " " << e.second << "\n";
        }
        return 0;
    }
    
    original_edges.reserve(M);
    vector<int> degree(N, 0);
    for (uint64_t i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
        int u = fio.nextInt();
        int v = fio.nextInt();
        if (u == -1 || v == -1) break;
        original_edges.push_back({u, v});
        degree[u]++;
        degree[v]++;
    }
    
    if (N <= 1500) {
        run_stoer_wagner();
        return 0;
    }
    
    int v_min = 0, v_max = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i < N; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] < degree[v_min]) v_min = i;
        if (degree[i] > degree[v_max]) v_max = i;
    }
    
    best_cut = degree[v_min];
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)original_edges.size(); ++i) {
        if (original_edges[i].first == v_min || original_edges[i].second == v_min) {
            best_cut_edges_id.push_back(i);
        }
    }
    
    if (best_cut == 1) {
        print_cut();
        return 0;
    }
    
    build_adj();
    
    run_bridge_finding();
    if (found_bridge_id != -1) {
        best_cut = 1;
        best_cut_edges_id = {found_bridge_id};
        print_cut();
        return 0;
    }
    
    if (best_cut > 2) {
        run_edmonds_karp_randomized(v_max);
    }
    
    print_cut();
    return 0;
}

Subpass configurationView exact prompt

C++ Code 
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
#include <queue>
#include <chrono>
#include <random>

using namespace std;

class FastIO {
    static const int BUF_SIZE = 1 << 16;
    char buf[BUF_SIZE];
    int pos, len;
public:
    FastIO() : pos(0), len(0) {}
    inline int nextInt() {
        int x = 0;
        char c;
        do {
            c = getChar();
            if (c == EOF) return -1;
        } while (c <= ' ');
        while (c > ' ') {
            x = x * 10 + (c - '0');
            c = getChar();
        }
        return x;
    }
    inline uint64_t nextUInt64() {
        uint64_t x = 0;
        char c;
        do {
            c = getChar();
            if (c == EOF) return (uint64_t)-1;
        } while (c <= ' ');
        while (c > ' ') {
            x = x * 10 + (c - '0');
            c = getChar();
        }
        return x;
    }
private:
    inline char getChar() {
        if (pos == len) {
            pos = 0;
            len = fread(buf, 1, BUF_SIZE, stdin);
            if (len == 0) return EOF;
        }
        return buf[pos++];
    }
};

struct Edge {
    int to;
    int cap;
    int flow;
    int rev;
    int id; 
};

int N;
uint64_t M;
vector<pair<int, int>> original_edges;
vector<vector<Edge>> adj;

int best_cut;
vector<int> best_cut_edges_id;

void print_cut() {
    cout << best_cut_edges_id.size() << "\n";
    for (int id : best_cut_edges_id) {
        cout << original_edges[id].first << " " << original_edges[id].second << "\n";
    }
}

void run_stoer_wagner() {
    vector<vector<int>> adj_sw(N, vector<int>(N, 0));
    for (auto& e : original_edges) {
        adj_sw[e.first][e.second] += 1;
        adj_sw[e.second][e.first] += 1;
    }
    
    vector<vector<int>> nodes(N);
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) nodes[i].push_back(i);
    
    int best_cut_sw = INT_MAX;
    vector<int> best_partition;
    
    vector<int> active;
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) active.push_back(i);
    
    for (int phase = 1; phase < N; ++phase) {
        int n_active = active.size();
        vector<int> w(N, 0);
        vector<bool> added(N, false);
        int prev = -1, last = -1;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n_active; ++i) {
            int sel = -1;
            for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
                int j = active[j_idx];
                if (!added[j] && (sel == -1 || w[j] > w[sel])) {
                    sel = j;
                }
            }
            if (i == n_active - 2) prev = sel;
            if (i == n_active - 1) last = sel;
            added[sel] = true;
            for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
                int j = active[j_idx];
                if (!added[j]) {
                    w[j] += adj_sw[sel][j];
                }
            }
        }
        
        if (w[last] < best_cut_sw) {
            best_cut_sw = w[last];
            best_partition = nodes[last];
        }
        
        for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
            int j = active[j_idx];
            if (j != prev && j != last) {
                adj_sw[prev][j] += adj_sw[last][j];
                adj_sw[j][prev] += adj_sw[j][last];
            }
        }
        nodes[prev].insert(nodes[prev].end(), nodes[last].begin(), nodes[last].end());
        
        for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
            if (active[j_idx] == last) {
                active[j_idx] = active.back();
                active.pop_back();
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    
    vector<bool> in_partition(N, false);
    for (int v : best_partition) in_partition[v] = true;
    
    vector<pair<int, int>> cut_edges;
    for (auto& e : original_edges) {
        if (in_partition[e.first] != in_partition[e.second]) {
            cut_edges.push_back(e);
        }
    }
    
    cout << cut_edges.size() << "\n";
    for (auto& e : cut_edges) cout << e.first << " " << e.second << "\n";
}

int timer_dfs = 1;
vector<int> tin, low;
int found_bridge_id = -1;

void run_bridge_finding() {
    tin.assign(N, 0);
    low.assign(N, 0);
    timer_dfs = 1;
    found_bridge_id = -1;
    
    struct Frame {
        int v;
        int edge_id_to_parent;
        int idx;
    };
    vector<Frame> st;
    
    for (int start_node = 0; start_node < N; ++start_node) {
        if (tin[start_node]) continue;
        
        st.push_back({start_node, -1, 0});
        tin[start_node] = low[start_node] = timer_dfs++;
        
        while (!st.empty()) {
            auto& f = st.back();
            int v = f.v;
            if (f.idx < (int)adj[v].size()) {
                auto& edge = adj[v][f.idx++];
                int to = edge.to;
                int id = edge.id;
                if (id == f.edge_id_to_parent) continue;
                
                if (tin[to]) {
                    low[v] = min(low[v], tin[to]);
                } else {
                    tin[to] = low[to] = timer_dfs++;
                    st.push_back({to, id, 0});
                }
            } else {
                st.pop_back();
                if (!st.empty() && st.back().v != -1) { 
                    int p = st.back().v;
                    low[p] = min(low[p], low[v]);
                    if (low[v] > tin[p]) {
                        found_bridge_id = f.edge_id_to_parent;
                        return;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

int edmonds_karp(int s, int t, int limit, vector<int>& cut_edges_out) {
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
        for (auto& edge : adj[i]) {
            edge.flow = 0;
        }
    }
    
    int flow = 0;
    vector<pair<int, int>> parent_edge(N, {-1, -1});
    while (flow < limit) {
        fill(parent_edge.begin(), parent_edge.end(), pair<int,int>{-1, -1});
        parent_edge[s] = {-2, -2};
        queue<int> q;
        q.push(s);
        bool reached = false;
        while (!q.empty() && !reached) {
            int v = q.front(); q.pop();
            for (int i = 0; i < (int)adj[v].size(); ++i) {
                auto& edge = adj[v][i];
                if (edge.cap - edge.flow > 0 && parent_edge[edge.to].first == -1) {
                    parent_edge[edge.to] = {v, i};
                    if (edge.to == t) {
                        reached = true;
                        break;
                    }
                    q.push(edge.to);
                }
            }
        }
        if (!reached) break;
        
        int curr = t;
        while (curr != s) {
            int p = parent_edge[curr].first;
            int idx = parent_edge[curr].second;
            adj[p][idx].flow += 1;
            int rev_idx = adj[p][idx].rev;
            adj[curr][rev_idx].flow -= 1;
            curr = p;
        }
        flow += 1;
    }
    
    if (flow < limit) {
        vector<bool> visited(N, false);
        queue<int> q;
        q.push(s);
        visited[s] = true;
        while (!q.empty()) {
            int v = q.front(); q.pop();
            for (auto& edge : adj[v]) {
                if (edge.cap - edge.flow > 0 && !visited[edge.to]) {
                    visited[edge.to] = true;
                    q.push(edge.to);
                }
            }
        }
        
        cut_edges_out.clear();
        for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
            if (visited[i]) {
                for (auto& edge : adj[i]) {
                    if (!visited[edge.to] && edge.cap == 1) {
                        cut_edges_out.push_back(edge.id);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return flow;
}

void build_adj() {
    adj.assign(N, vector<Edge>());
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)original_edges.size(); ++i) {
        int u = original_edges[i].first;
        int v = original_edges[i].second;
        adj[u].push_back({v, 1, 0, (int)adj[v].size(), i});
        adj[v].push_back({u, 1, 0, (int)adj[u].size() - 1, i});
    }
}

void run_edmonds_karp_randomized(int s) {
    auto start_time = chrono::steady_clock::now();
    vector<int> targets;
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
        if (i != s) targets.push_back(i);
    }
    mt19937 rng(42);
    shuffle(targets.begin(), targets.end(), rng);
    
    for (int t : targets) {
        auto now = chrono::steady_clock::now();
        double elapsed = chrono::duration<double>(now - start_time).count();
        if (elapsed > 4.0) {
            break;
        }
        
        vector<int> current_cut;
        int flow = edmonds_karp(s, t, best_cut, current_cut);
        if (flow < best_cut) {
            best_cut = flow;
            best_cut_edges_id = current_cut;
            if (best_cut <= 2) {
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}

int main() {
    ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(NULL);
    
    FastIO fio;
    N = fio.nextInt();
    if (N == -1) return 0;
    M = fio.nextUInt64();
    
    if (M > 200000000ULL) {
        vector<int> degree(N, 0);
        FILE* tmp = tmpfile();
        for (uint64_t i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
            int u = fio.nextInt();
            int v = fio.nextInt();
            if (u == -1 || v == -1) break;
            degree[u]++;
            degree[v]++;
            uint32_t edge[2] = {(uint32_t)u, (uint32_t)v};
            fwrite(edge, sizeof(uint32_t), 2, tmp);
        }
        int v_min = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < N; ++i) {
            if (degree[i] < degree[v_min]) {
                v_min = i;
            }
        }
        rewind(tmp);
        vector<pair<int, int>> best_edges;
        for (uint64_t i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
            uint32_t edge[2];
            if (fread(edge, sizeof(uint32_t), 2, tmp) != 2) break;
            if (edge[0] == (uint32_t)v_min || edge[1] == (uint32_t)v_min) {
                best_edges.push_back({(int)edge[0], (int)edge[1]});
            }
        }
        cout << best_edges.size() << "\n";
        for (auto& e : best_edges) {
            cout << e.first << " " << e.second << "\n";
        }
        return 0;
    }
    
    original_edges.reserve(M);
    vector<int> degree(N, 0);
    for (uint64_t i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
        int u = fio.nextInt();
        int v = fio.nextInt();
        if (u == -1 || v == -1) break;
        original_edges.push_back({u, v});
        degree[u]++;
        degree[v]++;
    }
    
    if (N <= 1500) {
        run_stoer_wagner();
        return 0;
    }
    
    int v_min = 0, v_max = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i < N; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] < degree[v_min]) v_min = i;
        if (degree[i] > degree[v_max]) v_max = i;
    }
    
    best_cut = degree[v_min];
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)original_edges.size(); ++i) {
        if (original_edges[i].first == v_min || original_edges[i].second == v_min) {
            best_cut_edges_id.push_back(i);
        }
    }
    
    if (best_cut == 1) {
        print_cut();
        return 0;
    }
    
    build_adj();
    
    run_bridge_finding();
    if (found_bridge_id != -1) {
        best_cut = 1;
        best_cut_edges_id = {found_bridge_id};
        print_cut();
        return 0;
    }
    
    if (best_cut > 2) {
        run_edmonds_karp_randomized(v_max);
    }
    
    print_cut();
    return 0;
}

View raw AI output
View chain of thought

[100000 nodes, 5000000 edges] Cut size: 25, Known min: 25, Time: 5.41s - optimal

Subpass 4: 100000 nodes, 5000000 edges

Score: 1.00

Details: [100000 nodes, 5000000 edges] Cut size: 25, Known min: 25, Time: 5.41s - optimal

C++ Code 
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
#include <queue>
#include <chrono>
#include <random>

using namespace std;

class FastIO {
    static const int BUF_SIZE = 1 << 16;
    char buf[BUF_SIZE];
    int pos, len;
public:
    FastIO() : pos(0), len(0) {}
    inline int nextInt() {
        int x = 0;
        char c;
        do {
            c = getChar();
            if (c == EOF) return -1;
        } while (c <= ' ');
        while (c > ' ') {
            x = x * 10 + (c - '0');
            c = getChar();
        }
        return x;
    }
    inline uint64_t nextUInt64() {
        uint64_t x = 0;
        char c;
        do {
            c = getChar();
            if (c == EOF) return (uint64_t)-1;
        } while (c <= ' ');
        while (c > ' ') {
            x = x * 10 + (c - '0');
            c = getChar();
        }
        return x;
    }
private:
    inline char getChar() {
        if (pos == len) {
            pos = 0;
            len = fread(buf, 1, BUF_SIZE, stdin);
            if (len == 0) return EOF;
        }
        return buf[pos++];
    }
};

struct Edge {
    int to;
    int cap;
    int flow;
    int rev;
    int id; 
};

int N;
uint64_t M;
vector<pair<int, int>> original_edges;
vector<vector<Edge>> adj;

int best_cut;
vector<int> best_cut_edges_id;

void print_cut() {
    cout << best_cut_edges_id.size() << "\n";
    for (int id : best_cut_edges_id) {
        cout << original_edges[id].first << " " << original_edges[id].second << "\n";
    }
}

void run_stoer_wagner() {
    vector<vector<int>> adj_sw(N, vector<int>(N, 0));
    for (auto& e : original_edges) {
        adj_sw[e.first][e.second] += 1;
        adj_sw[e.second][e.first] += 1;
    }
    
    vector<vector<int>> nodes(N);
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) nodes[i].push_back(i);
    
    int best_cut_sw = INT_MAX;
    vector<int> best_partition;
    
    vector<int> active;
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) active.push_back(i);
    
    for (int phase = 1; phase < N; ++phase) {
        int n_active = active.size();
        vector<int> w(N, 0);
        vector<bool> added(N, false);
        int prev = -1, last = -1;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n_active; ++i) {
            int sel = -1;
            for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
                int j = active[j_idx];
                if (!added[j] && (sel == -1 || w[j] > w[sel])) {
                    sel = j;
                }
            }
            if (i == n_active - 2) prev = sel;
            if (i == n_active - 1) last = sel;
            added[sel] = true;
            for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
                int j = active[j_idx];
                if (!added[j]) {
                    w[j] += adj_sw[sel][j];
                }
            }
        }
        
        if (w[last] < best_cut_sw) {
            best_cut_sw = w[last];
            best_partition = nodes[last];
        }
        
        for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
            int j = active[j_idx];
            if (j != prev && j != last) {
                adj_sw[prev][j] += adj_sw[last][j];
                adj_sw[j][prev] += adj_sw[j][last];
            }
        }
        nodes[prev].insert(nodes[prev].end(), nodes[last].begin(), nodes[last].end());
        
        for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
            if (active[j_idx] == last) {
                active[j_idx] = active.back();
                active.pop_back();
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    
    vector<bool> in_partition(N, false);
    for (int v : best_partition) in_partition[v] = true;
    
    vector<pair<int, int>> cut_edges;
    for (auto& e : original_edges) {
        if (in_partition[e.first] != in_partition[e.second]) {
            cut_edges.push_back(e);
        }
    }
    
    cout << cut_edges.size() << "\n";
    for (auto& e : cut_edges) cout << e.first << " " << e.second << "\n";
}

int timer_dfs = 1;
vector<int> tin, low;
int found_bridge_id = -1;

void run_bridge_finding() {
    tin.assign(N, 0);
    low.assign(N, 0);
    timer_dfs = 1;
    found_bridge_id = -1;
    
    struct Frame {
        int v;
        int edge_id_to_parent;
        int idx;
    };
    vector<Frame> st;
    
    for (int start_node = 0; start_node < N; ++start_node) {
        if (tin[start_node]) continue;
        
        st.push_back({start_node, -1, 0});
        tin[start_node] = low[start_node] = timer_dfs++;
        
        while (!st.empty()) {
            auto& f = st.back();
            int v = f.v;
            if (f.idx < (int)adj[v].size()) {
                auto& edge = adj[v][f.idx++];
                int to = edge.to;
                int id = edge.id;
                if (id == f.edge_id_to_parent) continue;
                
                if (tin[to]) {
                    low[v] = min(low[v], tin[to]);
                } else {
                    tin[to] = low[to] = timer_dfs++;
                    st.push_back({to, id, 0});
                }
            } else {
                st.pop_back();
                if (!st.empty() && st.back().v != -1) { 
                    int p = st.back().v;
                    low[p] = min(low[p], low[v]);
                    if (low[v] > tin[p]) {
                        found_bridge_id = f.edge_id_to_parent;
                        return;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

int edmonds_karp(int s, int t, int limit, vector<int>& cut_edges_out) {
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
        for (auto& edge : adj[i]) {
            edge.flow = 0;
        }
    }
    
    int flow = 0;
    vector<pair<int, int>> parent_edge(N, {-1, -1});
    while (flow < limit) {
        fill(parent_edge.begin(), parent_edge.end(), pair<int,int>{-1, -1});
        parent_edge[s] = {-2, -2};
        queue<int> q;
        q.push(s);
        bool reached = false;
        while (!q.empty() && !reached) {
            int v = q.front(); q.pop();
            for (int i = 0; i < (int)adj[v].size(); ++i) {
                auto& edge = adj[v][i];
                if (edge.cap - edge.flow > 0 && parent_edge[edge.to].first == -1) {
                    parent_edge[edge.to] = {v, i};
                    if (edge.to == t) {
                        reached = true;
                        break;
                    }
                    q.push(edge.to);
                }
            }
        }
        if (!reached) break;
        
        int curr = t;
        while (curr != s) {
            int p = parent_edge[curr].first;
            int idx = parent_edge[curr].second;
            adj[p][idx].flow += 1;
            int rev_idx = adj[p][idx].rev;
            adj[curr][rev_idx].flow -= 1;
            curr = p;
        }
        flow += 1;
    }
    
    if (flow < limit) {
        vector<bool> visited(N, false);
        queue<int> q;
        q.push(s);
        visited[s] = true;
        while (!q.empty()) {
            int v = q.front(); q.pop();
            for (auto& edge : adj[v]) {
                if (edge.cap - edge.flow > 0 && !visited[edge.to]) {
                    visited[edge.to] = true;
                    q.push(edge.to);
                }
            }
        }
        
        cut_edges_out.clear();
        for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
            if (visited[i]) {
                for (auto& edge : adj[i]) {
                    if (!visited[edge.to] && edge.cap == 1) {
                        cut_edges_out.push_back(edge.id);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return flow;
}

void build_adj() {
    adj.assign(N, vector<Edge>());
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)original_edges.size(); ++i) {
        int u = original_edges[i].first;
        int v = original_edges[i].second;
        adj[u].push_back({v, 1, 0, (int)adj[v].size(), i});
        adj[v].push_back({u, 1, 0, (int)adj[u].size() - 1, i});
    }
}

void run_edmonds_karp_randomized(int s) {
    auto start_time = chrono::steady_clock::now();
    vector<int> targets;
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
        if (i != s) targets.push_back(i);
    }
    mt19937 rng(42);
    shuffle(targets.begin(), targets.end(), rng);
    
    for (int t : targets) {
        auto now = chrono::steady_clock::now();
        double elapsed = chrono::duration<double>(now - start_time).count();
        if (elapsed > 4.0) {
            break;
        }
        
        vector<int> current_cut;
        int flow = edmonds_karp(s, t, best_cut, current_cut);
        if (flow < best_cut) {
            best_cut = flow;
            best_cut_edges_id = current_cut;
            if (best_cut <= 2) {
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}

int main() {
    ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(NULL);
    
    FastIO fio;
    N = fio.nextInt();
    if (N == -1) return 0;
    M = fio.nextUInt64();
    
    if (M > 200000000ULL) {
        vector<int> degree(N, 0);
        FILE* tmp = tmpfile();
        for (uint64_t i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
            int u = fio.nextInt();
            int v = fio.nextInt();
            if (u == -1 || v == -1) break;
            degree[u]++;
            degree[v]++;
            uint32_t edge[2] = {(uint32_t)u, (uint32_t)v};
            fwrite(edge, sizeof(uint32_t), 2, tmp);
        }
        int v_min = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < N; ++i) {
            if (degree[i] < degree[v_min]) {
                v_min = i;
            }
        }
        rewind(tmp);
        vector<pair<int, int>> best_edges;
        for (uint64_t i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
            uint32_t edge[2];
            if (fread(edge, sizeof(uint32_t), 2, tmp) != 2) break;
            if (edge[0] == (uint32_t)v_min || edge[1] == (uint32_t)v_min) {
                best_edges.push_back({(int)edge[0], (int)edge[1]});
            }
        }
        cout << best_edges.size() << "\n";
        for (auto& e : best_edges) {
            cout << e.first << " " << e.second << "\n";
        }
        return 0;
    }
    
    original_edges.reserve(M);
    vector<int> degree(N, 0);
    for (uint64_t i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
        int u = fio.nextInt();
        int v = fio.nextInt();
        if (u == -1 || v == -1) break;
        original_edges.push_back({u, v});
        degree[u]++;
        degree[v]++;
    }
    
    if (N <= 1500) {
        run_stoer_wagner();
        return 0;
    }
    
    int v_min = 0, v_max = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i < N; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] < degree[v_min]) v_min = i;
        if (degree[i] > degree[v_max]) v_max = i;
    }
    
    best_cut = degree[v_min];
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)original_edges.size(); ++i) {
        if (original_edges[i].first == v_min || original_edges[i].second == v_min) {
            best_cut_edges_id.push_back(i);
        }
    }
    
    if (best_cut == 1) {
        print_cut();
        return 0;
    }
    
    build_adj();
    
    run_bridge_finding();
    if (found_bridge_id != -1) {
        best_cut = 1;
        best_cut_edges_id = {found_bridge_id};
        print_cut();
        return 0;
    }
    
    if (best_cut > 2) {
        run_edmonds_karp_randomized(v_max);
    }
    
    print_cut();
    return 0;
}

C++ Code 
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
#include <queue>
#include <chrono>
#include <random>

using namespace std;

class FastIO {
    static const int BUF_SIZE = 1 << 16;
    char buf[BUF_SIZE];
    int pos, len;
public:
    FastIO() : pos(0), len(0) {}
    inline int nextInt() {
        int x = 0;
        char c;
        do {
            c = getChar();
            if (c == EOF) return -1;
        } while (c <= ' ');
        while (c > ' ') {
            x = x * 10 + (c - '0');
            c = getChar();
        }
        return x;
    }
    inline uint64_t nextUInt64() {
        uint64_t x = 0;
        char c;
        do {
            c = getChar();
            if (c == EOF) return (uint64_t)-1;
        } while (c <= ' ');
        while (c > ' ') {
            x = x * 10 + (c - '0');
            c = getChar();
        }
        return x;
    }
private:
    inline char getChar() {
        if (pos == len) {
            pos = 0;
            len = fread(buf, 1, BUF_SIZE, stdin);
            if (len == 0) return EOF;
        }
        return buf[pos++];
    }
};

struct Edge {
    int to;
    int cap;
    int flow;
    int rev;
    int id; 
};

int N;
uint64_t M;
vector<pair<int, int>> original_edges;
vector<vector<Edge>> adj;

int best_cut;
vector<int> best_cut_edges_id;

void print_cut() {
    cout << best_cut_edges_id.size() << "\n";
    for (int id : best_cut_edges_id) {
        cout << original_edges[id].first << " " << original_edges[id].second << "\n";
    }
}

void run_stoer_wagner() {
    vector<vector<int>> adj_sw(N, vector<int>(N, 0));
    for (auto& e : original_edges) {
        adj_sw[e.first][e.second] += 1;
        adj_sw[e.second][e.first] += 1;
    }
    
    vector<vector<int>> nodes(N);
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) nodes[i].push_back(i);
    
    int best_cut_sw = INT_MAX;
    vector<int> best_partition;
    
    vector<int> active;
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) active.push_back(i);
    
    for (int phase = 1; phase < N; ++phase) {
        int n_active = active.size();
        vector<int> w(N, 0);
        vector<bool> added(N, false);
        int prev = -1, last = -1;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < n_active; ++i) {
            int sel = -1;
            for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
                int j = active[j_idx];
                if (!added[j] && (sel == -1 || w[j] > w[sel])) {
                    sel = j;
                }
            }
            if (i == n_active - 2) prev = sel;
            if (i == n_active - 1) last = sel;
            added[sel] = true;
            for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
                int j = active[j_idx];
                if (!added[j]) {
                    w[j] += adj_sw[sel][j];
                }
            }
        }
        
        if (w[last] < best_cut_sw) {
            best_cut_sw = w[last];
            best_partition = nodes[last];
        }
        
        for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
            int j = active[j_idx];
            if (j != prev && j != last) {
                adj_sw[prev][j] += adj_sw[last][j];
                adj_sw[j][prev] += adj_sw[j][last];
            }
        }
        nodes[prev].insert(nodes[prev].end(), nodes[last].begin(), nodes[last].end());
        
        for (int j_idx = 0; j_idx < n_active; ++j_idx) {
            if (active[j_idx] == last) {
                active[j_idx] = active.back();
                active.pop_back();
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    
    vector<bool> in_partition(N, false);
    for (int v : best_partition) in_partition[v] = true;
    
    vector<pair<int, int>> cut_edges;
    for (auto& e : original_edges) {
        if (in_partition[e.first] != in_partition[e.second]) {
            cut_edges.push_back(e);
        }
    }
    
    cout << cut_edges.size() << "\n";
    for (auto& e : cut_edges) cout << e.first << " " << e.second << "\n";
}

int timer_dfs = 1;
vector<int> tin, low;
int found_bridge_id = -1;

void run_bridge_finding() {
    tin.assign(N, 0);
    low.assign(N, 0);
    timer_dfs = 1;
    found_bridge_id = -1;
    
    struct Frame {
        int v;
        int edge_id_to_parent;
        int idx;
    };
    vector<Frame> st;
    
    for (int start_node = 0; start_node < N; ++start_node) {
        if (tin[start_node]) continue;
        
        st.push_back({start_node, -1, 0});
        tin[start_node] = low[start_node] = timer_dfs++;
        
        while (!st.empty()) {
            auto& f = st.back();
            int v = f.v;
            if (f.idx < (int)adj[v].size()) {
                auto& edge = adj[v][f.idx++];
                int to = edge.to;
                int id = edge.id;
                if (id == f.edge_id_to_parent) continue;
                
                if (tin[to]) {
                    low[v] = min(low[v], tin[to]);
                } else {
                    tin[to] = low[to] = timer_dfs++;
                    st.push_back({to, id, 0});
                }
            } else {
                st.pop_back();
                if (!st.empty() && st.back().v != -1) { 
                    int p = st.back().v;
                    low[p] = min(low[p], low[v]);
                    if (low[v] > tin[p]) {
                        found_bridge_id = f.edge_id_to_parent;
                        return;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

int edmonds_karp(int s, int t, int limit, vector<int>& cut_edges_out) {
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
        for (auto& edge : adj[i]) {
            edge.flow = 0;
        }
    }
    
    int flow = 0;
    vector<pair<int, int>> parent_edge(N, {-1, -1});
    while (flow < limit) {
        fill(parent_edge.begin(), parent_edge.end(), pair<int,int>{-1, -1});
        parent_edge[s] = {-2, -2};
        queue<int> q;
        q.push(s);
        bool reached = false;
        while (!q.empty() && !reached) {
            int v = q.front(); q.pop();
            for (int i = 0; i < (int)adj[v].size(); ++i) {
                auto& edge = adj[v][i];
                if (edge.cap - edge.flow > 0 && parent_edge[edge.to].first == -1) {
                    parent_edge[edge.to] = {v, i};
                    if (edge.to == t) {
                        reached = true;
                        break;
                    }
                    q.push(edge.to);
                }
            }
        }
        if (!reached) break;
        
        int curr = t;
        while (curr != s) {
            int p = parent_edge[curr].first;
            int idx = parent_edge[curr].second;
            adj[p][idx].flow += 1;
            int rev_idx = adj[p][idx].rev;
            adj[curr][rev_idx].flow -= 1;
            curr = p;
        }
        flow += 1;
    }
    
    if (flow < limit) {
        vector<bool> visited(N, false);
        queue<int> q;
        q.push(s);
        visited[s] = true;
        while (!q.empty()) {
            int v = q.front(); q.pop();
            for (auto& edge : adj[v]) {
                if (edge.cap - edge.flow > 0 && !visited[edge.to]) {
                    visited[edge.to] = true;
                    q.push(edge.to);
                }
            }
        }
        
        cut_edges_out.clear();
        for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
            if (visited[i]) {
                for (auto& edge : adj[i]) {
                    if (!visited[edge.to] && edge.cap == 1) {
                        cut_edges_out.push_back(edge.id);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return flow;
}

void build_adj() {
    adj.assign(N, vector<Edge>());
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)original_edges.size(); ++i) {
        int u = original_edges[i].first;
        int v = original_edges[i].second;
        adj[u].push_back({v, 1, 0, (int)adj[v].size(), i});
        adj[v].push_back({u, 1, 0, (int)adj[u].size() - 1, i});
    }
}

void run_edmonds_karp_randomized(int s) {
    auto start_time = chrono::steady_clock::now();
    vector<int> targets;
    for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
        if (i != s) targets.push_back(i);
    }
    mt19937 rng(42);
    shuffle(targets.begin(), targets.end(), rng);
    
    for (int t : targets) {
        auto now = chrono::steady_clock::now();
        double elapsed = chrono::duration<double>(now - start_time).count();
        if (elapsed > 4.0) {
            break;
        }
        
        vector<int> current_cut;
        int flow = edmonds_karp(s, t, best_cut, current_cut);
        if (flow < best_cut) {
            best_cut = flow;
            best_cut_edges_id = current_cut;
            if (best_cut <= 2) {
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}

int main() {
    ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(NULL);
    
    FastIO fio;
    N = fio.nextInt();
    if (N == -1) return 0;
    M = fio.nextUInt64();
    
    if (M > 200000000ULL) {
        vector<int> degree(N, 0);
        FILE* tmp = tmpfile();
        for (uint64_t i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
            int u = fio.nextInt();
            int v = fio.nextInt();
            if (u == -1 || v == -1) break;
            degree[u]++;
            degree[v]++;
            uint32_t edge[2] = {(uint32_t)u, (uint32_t)v};
            fwrite(edge, sizeof(uint32_t), 2, tmp);
        }
        int v_min = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < N; ++i) {
            if (degree[i] < degree[v_min]) {
                v_min = i;
            }
        }
        rewind(tmp);
        vector<pair<int, int>> best_edges;
        for (uint64_t i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
            uint32_t edge[2];
            if (fread(edge, sizeof(uint32_t), 2, tmp) != 2) break;
            if (edge[0] == (uint32_t)v_min || edge[1] == (uint32_t)v_min) {
                best_edges.push_back({(int)edge[0], (int)edge[1]});
            }
        }
        cout << best_edges.size() << "\n";
        for (auto& e : best_edges) {
            cout << e.first << " " << e.second << "\n";
        }
        return 0;
    }
    
    original_edges.reserve(M);
    vector<int> degree(N, 0);
    for (uint64_t i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
        int u = fio.nextInt();
        int v = fio.nextInt();
        if (u == -1 || v == -1) break;
        original_edges.push_back({u, v});
        degree[u]++;
        degree[v]++;
    }
    
    if (N <= 1500) {
        run_stoer_wagner();
        return 0;
    }
    
    int v_min = 0, v_max = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i < N; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] < degree[v_min]) v_min = i;
        if (degree[i] > degree[v_max]) v_max = i;
    }
    
    best_cut = degree[v_min];
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)original_edges.size(); ++i) {
        if (original_edges[i].first == v_min || original_edges[i].second == v_min) {
            best_cut_edges_id.push_back(i);
        }
    }
    
    if (best_cut == 1) {
        print_cut();
        return 0;
    }
    
    build_adj();
    
    run_bridge_finding();
    if (found_bridge_id != -1) {
        best_cut = 1;
        best_cut_edges_id = {found_bridge_id};
        print_cut();
        return 0;
    }
    
    if (best_cut > 2) {
        run_edmonds_karp_randomized(v_max);
    }
    
    print_cut();
    return 0;
}

Test 19: 3D Voxel Mining (C#) Score: 0.00 / 13
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a C# program to solve a mining problem in a simplified 3D voxel space.

**Constraints:**
1. Can only dig dirt that is exposed from above or a side.
2. Dug dirt must be dumped somewhere - at a location not blocking future digging
3. Maximum uphill slope - 1 Z voxel per X/Y voxel.
4. Dumped dirt becomes a new obstacle (plan carefully!)
5. Goal is to get valuable ore to a processing plant located at x=0, y=0
6. Ground is stable and solid, and you can dig under any voxel without fear of it collapsing
so long as it's connected to the earth. If you disconnect a voxel(s), it will collapse.

The voxel grid size has 10x more precision in Z than X/Y. So 10x10x100 is a cube.

**Input header format (stdin - space delimited. Ends with newline):**
```
XVoxelCount YVoxelCount ZVoxelCount XBlockSize YBlockSize ZBlockSize
```
Counts are human readable integers. BlockSize are human readable decimal numbers.

After the newline, voxels then follow in bytes, like this python psuedocode:
```
for x in range(XVoxelCount):
for y in range(YVoxelCount):
for z in range(ZVoxelCount):
d = readByte(stdin)
massInTonnes = d % 16
valuePerTonne = d // 16
addVoxel(d)
```

Each peice of dirt needs to be moved to its new location - you need to trace the
path in X and Y (4-connected / manhatten steps) and ensure that the path doesn't climb uphill
or downhill more than 1 Z voxel for every X/Y voxel.

**Output format (stdout / newline seperated):**
```
M (number of operations)
N digX digY digZ stepX1 stepY1 stepX2 stepY2 (N steps) destX destY (for each operation)
```

If dumping valuable ore at the processing plant, the voxel ceases to exist. If a voxel is
dumped elsewhere, it is dumped on top of the ground, raising the ground by 1 voxel. It can
be dug again and moved later if required.

Every unit of mass requires $1 of fuel to move one voxel in X or Y when flat, or $5 of fuel
to go up a 10% slope. Downhill is free.

Getting valuable ore to your processing plant pays $1000 per unit of mass per unit of value.
The most valuable ore (#15) pays $15,000 per ton, so the most a single dump truck load can gross
is $225,000.

(Dumping junk ore at the processing plant causes damage to the plant, costing $1000 per ton.)

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with .NET/csc
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. World size could be anything from 10x10x10 to 5000x5000x5000, your code should handle both extremes.
4. Your code should complete in under 5 minutes
5. Maximize profit.

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: AMD64 Family 23 Model 8 Stepping 2, AuthenticAMD
Core count: 64
Memory: 127.87 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler:**
C# (csc.exe 5.5.0-2.26208.13 (3dc781932f83b0792b0d1717a68db3f9604a2cb1)) | max LangVersion 14


Write complete, compilable C# code with a Main method.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on problem scale.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0

View chain of thought

Plan an open-pit mine in a 3D block model. Each block has a value (ore worth money, waste costs money to move) and you can only dig a block once the blocks above it have been removed. The goal is to maximise profit by choosing which blocks to extract and where to dump the waste.

The AI must balance revenue against haulage costs, respect slope constraints for road access, and avoid dumping waste where it blocks future digging. Subpasses increase the pit size and complexity.

 0.0000
[10×10 tiny pit (10 KB)] Ops: 0, Profit: $0, Revenue: $0 / $1,937,000 max, Gen: 0.0s, Run: 0.1s — Score: 0.000

3D Voxel Mining - 10×10 tiny pit (10 KB)

Results: Profit: $0, Revenue: $0 / $1,937,000 theoretical max, Operations: 0, Score: 0.000

View C# Code (7979 chars)
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Collections.Generic;

class Program {
    static void SkipFast(long count, Stream stream, byte[] buffer, ref int bufLen, ref int bufPos) {
        while (count > 0) {
            int avail = bufLen - bufPos;
            if (avail == 0) {
                bufLen = stream.Read(buffer, 0, buffer.Length);
                bufPos = 0;
                if (bufLen == 0) return;
                avail = bufLen;
            }
            long toSkip = Math.Min(count, avail);
            bufPos += (int)toSkip;
            count -= toSkip;
        }
    }

    static void ReadExactly(byte[] dest, long offset, int count, Stream stream, byte[] buffer, ref int bufLen, ref int bufPos) {
        while (count > 0) {
            int avail = bufLen - bufPos;
            if (avail == 0) {
                bufLen = stream.Read(buffer, 0, buffer.Length);
                bufPos = 0;
                if (bufLen == 0) return;
                avail = bufLen;
            }
            int toRead = Math.Min(count, avail);
            Array.Copy(buffer, bufPos, dest, (int)offset, toRead);
            bufPos += toRead;
            offset += toRead;
            count -= toRead;
        }
    }

    static void Main() {
        var stopwatch = System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch.StartNew();
        
        Stream stdin = Console.OpenStandardInput();
        string header = "";
        int b;
        while ((b = stdin.ReadByte()) != -1) {
            char c = (char)b;
            if (c == '\n') break;
            header += c;
        }
        string[] parts = header.Trim().Split(new char[]{' ', '\t'}, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
        if (parts.Length < 6) return;
        
        int XVoxelCount = int.Parse(parts[0]);
        int YVoxelCount = int.Parse(parts[1]);
        int ZVoxelCount = int.Parse(parts[2]);
        
        long xyArea = (long)XVoxelCount * YVoxelCount;
        int storeDepth = (int)Math.Min((long)ZVoxelCount, 2_000_000_000L / xyArea);
        if (storeDepth < 1) storeDepth = 1;
        
        byte[] topLayers = new byte[xyArea * storeDepth];
        
        byte[] buffer = new byte[1024 * 1024];
        int bufLen = 0;
        int bufPos = 0;
        
        for (int x = 0; x < XVoxelCount; x++) {
            for (int y = 0; y < YVoxelCount; y++) {
                long toSkip = ZVoxelCount - storeDepth;
                if (toSkip > 0) {
                    SkipFast(toSkip, stdin, buffer, ref bufLen, ref bufPos);
                }
                long offset = ((long)x * YVoxelCount + y) * storeDepth;
                ReadExactly(topLayers, offset, storeDepth, stdin, buffer, ref bufLen, ref bufPos);
            }
        }
        
        int[,] height = new int[XVoxelCount, YVoxelCount];
        for (int x = 0; x < XVoxelCount; x++) {
            for (int y = 0; y < YVoxelCount; y++) {
                height[x, y] = ZVoxelCount - 1;
            }
        }
        
        string tempFile = Path.GetTempFileName();
        int opCount = 0;
        
        using (var sw = new StreamWriter(new BufferedStream(new FileStream(tempFile, FileMode.Create), 65536))) {
            bool changed = true;
            // Leave 20 seconds for output flush
            while (changed && stopwatch.ElapsedMilliseconds < 280_000) {
                changed = false;
                for (int x = 0; x < XVoxelCount; x++) {
                    for (int y = 0; y < YVoxelCount; y++) {
                        int h = height[x, y];
                        if (h < 0) continue;
                        
                        int z_local = h - (ZVoxelCount - storeDepth);
                        if (z_local < 0) continue;
                        
                        if (x > 0 && height[x-1, y] > h) continue;
                        if (x < XVoxelCount - 1 && height[x+1, y] > h) continue;
                        if (y > 0 && height[x, y-1] > h) continue;
                        if (y < YVoxelCount - 1 && height[x, y+1] > h) continue;
                        
                        long offset = ((long)x * YVoxelCount + y) * storeDepth + z_local;
                        byte voxel = topLayers[(int)offset];
                        int mass = voxel % 16;
                        int value = voxel / 16;
                        
                        if (mass == 0 || value == 0) continue;
                        
                        List<int> path1 = new List<int>((x + y) * 2);
                        long cost1 = 0;
                        int currX = x; int currY = y; int currentH = h - 1;
                        
                        while(currX > 0) {
                            int nextX = currX - 1; int nextY = currY;
                            int nextH = height[nextX, nextY];
                            if (nextH > currentH) cost1 += 5 * mass;
                            else if (nextH == currentH) cost1 += 1 * mass;
                            path1.Add(nextX); path1.Add(nextY);
                            currX = nextX; currentH = nextH;
                        }
                        while(currY > 0) {
                            int nextX = currX; int nextY = currY - 1;
                            int nextH = height[nextX, nextY];
                            if (nextH > currentH) cost1 += 5 * mass;
                            else if (nextH == currentH) cost1 += 1 * mass;
                            path1.Add(nextX); path1.Add(nextY);
                            currX = nextX; currentH = nextH;
                        }
                        
                        List<int> path2 = new List<int>((x + y) * 2);
                        long cost2 = 0;
                        currX = x; currY = y; currentH = h - 1;
                        
                        while(currY > 0) {
                            int nextX = currX; int nextY = currY - 1;
                            int nextH = height[nextX, nextY];
                            if (nextH > currentH) cost2 += 5 * mass;
                            else if (nextH == currentH) cost2 += 1 * mass;
                            path2.Add(nextX); path2.Add(nextY);
                            currX = nextX; currentH = nextH;
                        }
                        while(currX > 0) {
                            int nextX = currX - 1; int nextY = currY;
                            int nextH = height[nextX, nextY];
                            if (nextH > currentH) cost2 += 5 * mass;
                            else if (nextH == currentH) cost2 += 1 * mass;
                            path2.Add(nextX); path2.Add(nextY);
                            currX = nextX; currentH = nextH;
                        }
                        
                        long revenue = 1000L * mass * value;
                        long bestCost = cost1 <= cost2 ? cost1 : cost2;
                        List<int> bestPath = cost1 <= cost2 ? path1 : path2;
                        
                        if (revenue > bestCost) {
                            height[x, y]--;
                            changed = true;
                            opCount++;
                            
                            sw.Write($"{bestPath.Count / 2} {x} {y} {h}");
                            for (int i = 0; i < bestPath.Count; i++) {
                                sw.Write($" {bestPath[i]}");
                            }
                            sw.Write(" 0 0\n");
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        Console.WriteLine(opCount);
        using (var sr = new StreamReader(new BufferedStream(new FileStream(tempFile, FileMode.Open), 65536))) {
            char[] buf = new char[65536];
            int read;
            while ((read = sr.Read(buf, 0, buf.Length)) > 0) {
                Console.Out.Write(buf, 0, read);
            }
        }
        
        try { File.Delete(tempFile); } catch {}
    }
}

Test 20: Drillhole Data Validation (Rust) Score: 0.00 / 14
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a Rust program to validate drillhole assay data.


**The Challenge:**
Your Rust program will be tested with drillhole datasets ranging from small exploration projects to
massive mining surveys. The same program must work efficiently across ALL scales from 10 holes to
200,000 holes.

**Problem:**
Given drillhole data from a mining exploration project, identify samples that likely contain typos or
measurement errors. These outliers don't correlate well with spatially neighboring data points.

**Target environment specs**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: AMD64 Family 23 Model 8 Stepping 2, AuthenticAMD
Core count: 64
Memory: 127.87 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**Rust Compiler information**
rustc 1.92.0 (ded5c06cf 2025-12-08) | edition=2024 | host: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc

**Drillhole Data:**
- Each hole has a 3D path: start point (x,y,z) + direction vector + length
- Samples are taken at intervals along each hole
- Each sample has measurements for multiple properties

**Input format (stdin):**
```
num_holes num_properties
property_name_1 property_name_2 ...
hole_id start_x start_y start_z dir_x dir_y dir_z length num_samples
depth prop1 prop2 ...
depth prop1 prop2 ...
etc.
hole_id start_x start_y start_z dir_x dir_y dir_z length num_samples
```

**Output format (stdout):**
```
M (number of suspect entries found)
hole_id sample_idx property_name confidence (for each suspect, sorted by confidence desc)
```

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with rustc and only the standard rust library.
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. Handle up to thousands of holes with thousands of samples each
4. Complete within 5 minutes
5. Report at least the most obvious outliers
6. Confidence score should reflect how anomalous the value is
7. Must handle varying dataset sizes efficiently

Write complete, compilable Rust code with a main function.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on dataset scale.

The program should be robust enough to handle edge cases like missing data, duplicate entries, and varying data distributions.

Given a set of mining drillholes — each a 3D path with measurements taken at intervals along its length — identify the data entries that are most likely to be errors (typos, instrument glitches, or transcription mistakes).

The AI must compare each measurement against its spatial neighbours: a reading that disagrees with nearby drillholes is suspect. Subpasses increase the number of drillholes and properties, requiring efficient spatial reasoning at scale.

Test 21: N-Dimensional Snake Game (C++) Score: 3.00 / 11
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C++ code to play an N-Dimensional Snake Game.

You must write a C++ solver that can handle ANY dimensional complexity from trivial to ludicrous scale:
- **Trivial**: 2D games (eg 8x8), few obstacles, basic pathfinding
- **Medium**: 3D-4D games (eg 6x6x6 to 8x8x8x8), moderate obstacles, intermediate planning
- **Large**: 6D-8D games (eg 4x4x4x4x4x4 to 6x6x6x6x6x6x6x6), many obstacles, complex pathfinding
- **Extreme**: 10D-20D games (eg 3x3x3... to 4x4x4...)

**The Challenge:**
Your C++ snake player will be tested with games ranging from simple 2D boards to massive 20D hypercubes.
The same algorithm must work efficiently across ALL dimensionalities.

**Problem:**
Like classic Nokia snake, but generalized to arbitrary dimensions. The snake occupies a series of
connected integer grid points in N-D space, moves one step per turn along one axis (+1 or -1),
grows when eating food, and dies if it hits an obstacle or itself.

**Input format (stdin, whitespace / newline seperated):**
```
D max_turns (D = number of dimensions, max_turns = turn limit)
bounds (D integers: size of space in each dimension)
snake_length start_pos (length, then D integers for head position)
F (number of food items)
F lines: food positions (D integers each)
O (number of obstacles)
O lines: obstacle positions (D integers each)
```

**Output format (stdout):**
Each turn, output: axis direction
- axis: 0 to D-1 (which dimension to move along)
- direction: -1 or +1 (which way to move)

**Game ends when:**
- Snake eats all food (win)
- Snake hits obstacle or itself (lose)
- Max turns reached

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: AMD64 Family 23 Model 8 Stepping 2, AuthenticAMD
Core count: 64
Memory: 127.87 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C++ Compiler:**
MSVC cl 19.50.35730 | std=c++20 (/std:c++20)

Be sure that any deviation from the C++ standard library is supported by the given compiler,
as referencing the wrong intrinsics or non-standard header like 'bits/stdc++.h' could fail your submission.

Write complete, compilable C++ code with a main() function.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Play the classic Snake game, but in more than two dimensions. The snake moves through an N-dimensional grid, eating food to grow while avoiding its own body and the walls. In higher dimensions the grid is enormous but self-collision becomes far trickier to reason about.

Subpasses increase the number of dimensions, making the state space explode. The AI must write a strategy that plans a safe path to food without boxing itself in.

 1.0000
[2D 20x20, 5 food, 10 obstacles] Food: 5/5, Turns: 31, End: won, Time: 0.03s

N-Dimensional Snake - 2D 20x20, 5 food, 10 obstacles

View C++ Code (7723 chars)
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <deque>
#include <unordered_set>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <queue>
#include <tuple>
#include <cmath>
#include <algorithm>

int D;

struct Point {
    int coords[20];
    bool operator==(const Point& o) const {
        for(int i = 0; i < D; ++i) if(coords[i] != o.coords[i]) return false;
        return true;
    }
    bool operator!=(const Point& o) const { return !(*this == o); }
};

struct PointHash {
    size_t operator()(const Point& p) const {
        size_t res = 0;
        for(int i = 0; i < D; ++i) {
            res ^= std::hash<int>()(p.coords[i]) + 0x9e3779b9 + (res << 6) + (res >> 2);
        }
        return res;
    }
};

int max_turns;
std::vector<int> bounds;
int snake_length;
Point start_pos;
int F;
std::unordered_set<Point, PointHash> foods;
int O;
std::unordered_set<Point, PointHash> obstacles;

int growth_counter;
std::deque<Point> snake_body;

int get_h(const Point& p) {
    if (foods.empty()) return 0;
    int min_h = 1e9;
    for (const auto& f : foods) {
        int h = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < D; ++i) {
            h += std::abs(p.coords[i] - f.coords[i]);
        }
        if (h < min_h) min_h = h;
    }
    return min_h;
}

struct AStarNode {
    Point p;
    int g;
    int f;
    bool operator>(const AStarNode& o) const {
        return f > o.f;
    }
};

std::vector<std::pair<int, int>> find_path() {
    std::unordered_map<Point, int, PointHash> old_body_block;
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)snake_body.size(); ++i) {
        int block_until = (int)snake_body.size() - 1 - i + growth_counter;
        if (old_body_block.find(snake_body[i]) == old_body_block.end()) {
            old_body_block[snake_body[i]] = block_until;
        } else {
            old_body_block[snake_body[i]] = std::max(old_body_block[snake_body[i]], block_until);
        }
    }

    std::priority_queue<AStarNode, std::vector<AStarNode>, std::greater<AStarNode>> pq;
    std::unordered_map<Point, int, PointHash> g_map;
    std::unordered_map<Point, std::tuple<Point, int, int>, PointHash> parent_map;

    Point start = snake_body.front();
    pq.push({start, 0, get_h(start)});
    g_map[start] = 0;

    Point target_found;
    bool found = false;

    while (!pq.empty()) {
        auto [curr, g, f] = pq.top();
        pq.pop();

        if (g_map[curr] < g) continue;

        if (foods.count(curr)) {
            target_found = curr;
            found = true;
            break;
        }

        for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
            for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
                Point next = curr;
                next.coords[axis] += dir;

                if (next.coords[axis] < 0 || next.coords[axis] >= bounds[axis]) continue;
                if (obstacles.count(next)) continue;
                if (g == 0 && snake_body.size() > 1 && next == snake_body[1]) continue;

                int next_g = g + 1;
                if (old_body_block.count(next) && next_g <= old_body_block[next]) continue;

                if (g_map.find(next) == g_map.end() || next_g < g_map[next]) {
                    g_map[next] = next_g;
                    parent_map[next] = {curr, axis, dir};
                    pq.push({next, next_g, next_g + get_h(next)});
                }
            }
        }
    }

    std::vector<std::pair<int, int>> path;
    if (found) {
        Point curr = target_found;
        while (curr != start) {
            auto [p, axis, dir] = parent_map[curr];
            path.push_back({axis, dir});
            curr = p;
        }
        std::reverse(path.begin(), path.end());
    }
    return path;
}

int evaluate_survival_move(Point start_p, const std::unordered_map<Point, int, PointHash>& old_body_block) {
    std::unordered_set<Point, PointHash> visited;
    std::queue<std::pair<Point, int>> q;
    q.push({start_p, 1});
    visited.insert(start_p);
    
    int score = 0;
    while (!q.empty() && score < 1000) {
        auto [curr, dist] = q.front();
        q.pop();
        score++;
        
        for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
            for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
                Point next = curr;
                next.coords[axis] += dir;

                if (next.coords[axis] < 0 || next.coords[axis] >= bounds[axis]) continue;
                if (obstacles.count(next)) continue;
                if (old_body_block.count(next) && dist + 1 <= old_body_block.at(next)) continue;

                if (visited.find(next) == visited.end()) {
                    visited.insert(next);
                    q.push({next, dist + 1});
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return score;
}

std::pair<int, int> find_survival_move() {
    std::unordered_map<Point, int, PointHash> old_body_block;
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)snake_body.size(); ++i) {
        int block_until = (int)snake_body.size() - 1 - i + growth_counter;
        if (old_body_block.find(snake_body[i]) == old_body_block.end()) {
            old_body_block[snake_body[i]] = block_until;
        } else {
            old_body_block[snake_body[i]] = std::max(old_body_block[snake_body[i]], block_until);
        }
    }

    std::pair<int, int> best_move = {0, 1};
    int max_score = -1;

    for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
        for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
            Point next = snake_body.front();
            next.coords[axis] += dir;

            if (next.coords[axis] < 0 || next.coords[axis] >= bounds[axis]) continue;
            if (obstacles.count(next)) continue;
            if (snake_body.size() > 1 && next == snake_body[1]) continue;

            if (old_body_block.count(next) && 1 <= old_body_block[next]) continue;

            int score = evaluate_survival_move(next, old_body_block);
            if (score > max_score) {
                max_score = score;
                best_move = {axis, dir};
            }
        }
    }
    return best_move;
}

void update_game_state(std::pair<int, int> move) {
    int axis = move.first;
    int dir = move.second;
    
    Point next_head = snake_body.front();
    next_head.coords[axis] += dir;
    
    snake_body.push_front(next_head);
    
    if (foods.count(next_head)) {
        foods.erase(next_head);
        growth_counter++;
    }
    
    if (growth_counter > 0) {
        growth_counter--;
    } else {
        snake_body.pop_back();
    }
}

int main() {
    std::ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(NULL);

    if (!(std::cin >> D >> max_turns)) return 0;

    bounds.resize(D);
    for (int i = 0; i < D; ++i) {
        std::cin >> bounds[i];
    }

    std::cin >> snake_length;
    for (int i = 0; i < D; ++i) {
        std::cin >> start_pos.coords[i];
    }

    std::cin >> F;
    for (int i = 0; i < F; ++i) {
        Point p;
        for (int j = 0; j < D; ++j) {
            std::cin >> p.coords[j];
        }
        foods.insert(p);
    }

    std::cin >> O;
    for (int i = 0; i < O; ++i) {
        Point p;
        for (int j = 0; j < D; ++j) {
            std::cin >> p.coords[j];
        }
        obstacles.insert(p);
    }

    growth_counter = snake_length - 1;
    snake_body.push_back(start_pos);

    std::vector<std::pair<int, int>> current_plan;

    int turn = 0;
    while (turn < max_turns && !foods.empty()) {
        if (current_plan.empty()) {
            current_plan = find_path();
            if (current_plan.empty()) {
                current_plan.push_back(find_survival_move());
            }
        }
        
        auto move = current_plan.front();
        current_plan.erase(current_plan.begin());
        
        std::cout << move.first << " " << move.second << "\n";
        
        update_game_state(move);
        turn++;
    }

    return 0;
}
Subpass 1
Subpass configurationView exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

}

    }

N-Dimensional Snake - 3D 15x15x15, 10 food, 30 obstacles

#include <unordered_set>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <queue>
#include <tuple>

#include <algorithm>

int D;

struct Point {
    int coords[20];
    bool operator==(const Point& o) const {
        for(int i = 0; i < D; ++i) if(coords[i] != o.coords[i]) return false;
        return true;
    }
    bool operator!=(const Point& o) const { return !(*this == o); }
};

    size_t operator()(const Point& p) const {

            res ^= std::hash<int>()(p.coords[i]) + 0x9e3779b9 + (res << 6) + (res >> 2);
        }

    }
};

std::vector<int> bounds;
int snake_length;
Point start_pos;
int F;
std::unordered_set<Point, PointHash> foods;
int O;
std::unordered_set<Point, PointHash> obstacles;

}

std::pair<int, int> find_survival_move() {
    std::unordered_map<Point, int, PointHash> old_body_block;
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)snake_body.size(); ++i) {
        int block_until = (int)snake_body.size() - 1 - i + growth_counter;
        if (old_body_block.find(snake_body[i]) == old_body_block.end()) {
            old_body_block[snake_body[i]] = block_until;
        } else {
            old_body_block[snake_body[i]] = std::max(old_body_block[snake_body[i]], block_until);
        }
    }

    std::pair<int, int> best_move = {0, 1};
    int max_score = -1;

    for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
        for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
            Point next = snake_body.front();
            next.coords[axis] += dir;

            if (next.coords[axis] < 0 || next.coords[axis] >= bounds[axis]) continue;
            if (obstacles.count(next)) continue;
            if (snake_body.size() > 1 && next == snake_body[1]) continue;

            if (old_body_block.count(next) && 1 <= old_body_block[next]) continue;

            int score = evaluate_survival_move(next, old_body_block);
            if (score > max_score) {
                max_score = score;
                best_move = {axis, dir};
            }
        }
    }
    return best_move;
}

void update_game_state(std::pair<int, int> move) {
    int axis = move.first;
    int dir = move.second;
    
    Point next_head = snake_body.front();
    next_head.coords[axis] += dir;
    
    snake_body.push_front(next_head);
    
    if (foods.count(next_head)) {
        foods.erase(next_head);
        growth_counter++;
    }
    
    if (growth_counter > 0) {
        growth_counter--;
    } else {
        snake_body.pop_back();
    }
}

int main() {
    std::ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(NULL);

    if (!(std::cin >> D >> max_turns)) return 0;

    bounds.resize(D);
    for (int i = 0; i < D; ++i) {
        std::cin >> bounds[i];
    }

    std::cin >> snake_length;
    for (int i = 0; i < D; ++i) {
        std::cin >> start_pos.coords[i];
    }

    std::cin >> F;
    for (int i = 0; i < F; ++i) {
        Point p;
        for (int j = 0; j < D; ++j) {
            std::cin >> p.coords[j];
        }
        foods.insert(p);
    }

    std::cin >> O;
    for (int i = 0; i < O; ++i) {
        Point p;
        for (int j = 0; j < D; ++j) {
            std::cin >> p.coords[j];
        }
        obstacles.insert(p);
    }

    growth_counter = snake_length - 1;
    snake_body.push_back(start_pos);

    std::vector<std::pair<int, int>> current_plan;

    int turn = 0;
    while (turn < max_turns && !foods.empty()) {
        if (current_plan.empty()) {
            current_plan = find_path();
            if (current_plan.empty()) {
                current_plan.push_back(find_survival_move());
            }
        }
        
        auto move = current_plan.front();
        current_plan.erase(current_plan.begin());
        
        std::cout << move.first << " " << move.second << "\n";
        
        update_game_state(move);
        turn++;
    }

    return 0;
}
