[3D 25x25x25, 20 food, 100 obstacles] Food: 0/20, Turns: 0, End: Hit self, Time: 0.03s

N-Dimensional Snake - 3D 25x25x25, 20 food, 100 obstacles

View C++ Code (7723 chars)
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <deque>
#include <unordered_set>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <queue>
#include <tuple>
#include <cmath>
#include <algorithm>

int D;

struct Point {
    int coords[20];
    bool operator==(const Point& o) const {
        for(int i = 0; i < D; ++i) if(coords[i] != o.coords[i]) return false;
        return true;
    }
    bool operator!=(const Point& o) const { return !(*this == o); }
};

struct PointHash {
    size_t operator()(const Point& p) const {
        size_t res = 0;
        for(int i = 0; i < D; ++i) {
            res ^= std::hash<int>()(p.coords[i]) + 0x9e3779b9 + (res << 6) + (res >> 2);
        }
        return res;
    }
};

int max_turns;
std::vector<int> bounds;
int snake_length;
Point start_pos;
int F;
std::unordered_set<Point, PointHash> foods;
int O;
std::unordered_set<Point, PointHash> obstacles;

int growth_counter;
std::deque<Point> snake_body;

int get_h(const Point& p) {
    if (foods.empty()) return 0;
    int min_h = 1e9;
    for (const auto& f : foods) {
        int h = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < D; ++i) {
            h += std::abs(p.coords[i] - f.coords[i]);
        }
        if (h < min_h) min_h = h;
    }
    return min_h;
}

struct AStarNode {
    Point p;
    int g;
    int f;
    bool operator>(const AStarNode& o) const {
        return f > o.f;
    }
};

std::vector<std::pair<int, int>> find_path() {
    std::unordered_map<Point, int, PointHash> old_body_block;
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)snake_body.size(); ++i) {
        int block_until = (int)snake_body.size() - 1 - i + growth_counter;
        if (old_body_block.find(snake_body[i]) == old_body_block.end()) {
            old_body_block[snake_body[i]] = block_until;
        } else {
            old_body_block[snake_body[i]] = std::max(old_body_block[snake_body[i]], block_until);
        }
    }

    std::priority_queue<AStarNode, std::vector<AStarNode>, std::greater<AStarNode>> pq;
    std::unordered_map<Point, int, PointHash> g_map;
    std::unordered_map<Point, std::tuple<Point, int, int>, PointHash> parent_map;

    Point start = snake_body.front();
    pq.push({start, 0, get_h(start)});
    g_map[start] = 0;

    Point target_found;
    bool found = false;

    while (!pq.empty()) {
        auto [curr, g, f] = pq.top();
        pq.pop();

        if (g_map[curr] < g) continue;

        if (foods.count(curr)) {
            target_found = curr;
            found = true;
            break;
        }

        for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
            for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
                Point next = curr;
                next.coords[axis] += dir;

                if (next.coords[axis] < 0 || next.coords[axis] >= bounds[axis]) continue;
                if (obstacles.count(next)) continue;
                if (g == 0 && snake_body.size() > 1 && next == snake_body[1]) continue;

                int next_g = g + 1;
                if (old_body_block.count(next) && next_g <= old_body_block[next]) continue;

                if (g_map.find(next) == g_map.end() || next_g < g_map[next]) {
                    g_map[next] = next_g;
                    parent_map[next] = {curr, axis, dir};
                    pq.push({next, next_g, next_g + get_h(next)});
                }
            }
        }
    }

    std::vector<std::pair<int, int>> path;
    if (found) {
        Point curr = target_found;
        while (curr != start) {
            auto [p, axis, dir] = parent_map[curr];
            path.push_back({axis, dir});
            curr = p;
        }
        std::reverse(path.begin(), path.end());
    }
    return path;
}

int evaluate_survival_move(Point start_p, const std::unordered_map<Point, int, PointHash>& old_body_block) {
    std::unordered_set<Point, PointHash> visited;
    std::queue<std::pair<Point, int>> q;
    q.push({start_p, 1});
    visited.insert(start_p);
    
    int score = 0;
    while (!q.empty() && score < 1000) {
        auto [curr, dist] = q.front();
        q.pop();
        score++;
        
        for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
            for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
                Point next = curr;
                next.coords[axis] += dir;

                if (next.coords[axis] < 0 || next.coords[axis] >= bounds[axis]) continue;
                if (obstacles.count(next)) continue;
                if (old_body_block.count(next) && dist + 1 <= old_body_block.at(next)) continue;

                if (visited.find(next) == visited.end()) {
                    visited.insert(next);
                    q.push({next, dist + 1});
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return score;
}

std::pair<int, int> find_survival_move() {
    std::unordered_map<Point, int, PointHash> old_body_block;
    for (int i = 0; i < (int)snake_body.size(); ++i) {
        int block_until = (int)snake_body.size() - 1 - i + growth_counter;
        if (old_body_block.find(snake_body[i]) == old_body_block.end()) {
            old_body_block[snake_body[i]] = block_until;
        } else {
            old_body_block[snake_body[i]] = std::max(old_body_block[snake_body[i]], block_until);
        }
    }

    std::pair<int, int> best_move = {0, 1};
    int max_score = -1;

    for (int axis = 0; axis < D; ++axis) {
        for (int dir : {-1, 1}) {
            Point next = snake_body.front();
            next.coords[axis] += dir;

            if (next.coords[axis] < 0 || next.coords[axis] >= bounds[axis]) continue;
            if (obstacles.count(next)) continue;
            if (snake_body.size() > 1 && next == snake_body[1]) continue;

            if (old_body_block.count(next) && 1 <= old_body_block[next]) continue;

            int score = evaluate_survival_move(next, old_body_block);
            if (score > max_score) {
                max_score = score;
                best_move = {axis, dir};
            }
        }
    }
    return best_move;
}

void update_game_state(std::pair<int, int> move) {
    int axis = move.first;
    int dir = move.second;
    
    Point next_head = snake_body.front();
    next_head.coords[axis] += dir;
    
    snake_body.push_front(next_head);
    
    if (foods.count(next_head)) {
        foods.erase(next_head);
        growth_counter++;
    }
    
    if (growth_counter > 0) {
        growth_counter--;
    } else {
        snake_body.pop_back();
    }
}

int main() {
    std::ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(NULL);

    if (!(std::cin >> D >> max_turns)) return 0;

    bounds.resize(D);
    for (int i = 0; i < D; ++i) {
        std::cin >> bounds[i];
    }

    std::cin >> snake_length;
    for (int i = 0; i < D; ++i) {
        std::cin >> start_pos.coords[i];
    }

    std::cin >> F;
    for (int i = 0; i < F; ++i) {
        Point p;
        for (int j = 0; j < D; ++j) {
            std::cin >> p.coords[j];
        }
        foods.insert(p);
    }

    std::cin >> O;
    for (int i = 0; i < O; ++i) {
        Point p;
        for (int j = 0; j < D; ++j) {
            std::cin >> p.coords[j];
        }
        obstacles.insert(p);
    }

    growth_counter = snake_length - 1;
    snake_body.push_back(start_pos);

    std::vector<std::pair<int, int>> current_plan;

    int turn = 0;
    while (turn < max_turns && !foods.empty()) {
        if (current_plan.empty()) {
            current_plan = find_path();
            if (current_plan.empty()) {
                current_plan.push_back(find_survival_move());
            }
        }
        
        auto move = current_plan.front();
        current_plan.erase(current_plan.begin());
        
        std::cout << move.first << " " << move.second << "\n";
        
        update_game_state(move);
        turn++;
    }

    return 0;
}

Test 22: Tetris Game (C#) Score: 1.00 / 11
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C# code to play Tetris optimally.

Your C# Tetris player will be tested with games ranging from short practice sessions to marathon games.

**Problem:**
Standard Tetris rules apply - variable width board (typically 10-20 columns),
pieces fall from top, clear lines by filling them completely, game over when pieces stack to the top.
The program receives pieces one at a time and must decide optimal placement.

**Input format (stdin, whitespace seperated decimal integers):**
```
width height num_pieces
For each piece:
Line: piece_type (I, O, T, S, Z, J, L)
Program outputs: rotation column
Then receives: result (ok, cleared_N, gameover)
```

**Output format (stdout, 1 line per piece, whitespace seperated decimal integers):**
rotation column
- rotation: 0-3 (number of 90° clockwise rotations)
- column: 0 to width-1 (leftmost column of piece)

**Piece Types:**
- I: 4x1 line piece
- O: 2x2 square piece
- T: T-shaped piece
- S: S-shaped piece (right-leaning)
- Z: Z-shaped piece (left-leaning)
- J: L-shaped piece (left-leaning)
- L: L-shaped piece (right-leaning)

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with .NET/csc
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. Handle variable board widths and long game sequences
4. Must place a peice within 5 seconds of it being written to STDIN.

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: AMD64 Family 23 Model 8 Stepping 2, AuthenticAMD
Core count: 64
Memory: 127.87 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler:**
C# (csc.exe 5.5.0-2.26208.13 (3dc781932f83b0792b0d1717a68db3f9604a2cb1)) | max LangVersion 14


Write complete, compilable C# code with a Main method.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on game complexity.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0

Write an AI that plays Tetris. Given the current board state and the next piece, choose where to place it to survive as long as possible and clear as many lines as you can. Good play means keeping the board flat, avoiding buried holes, and setting up multi-line clears.

Subpasses increase the board size and speed, demanding smarter lookahead and evaluation. The AI must balance short-term survival with long-term board health.

Tetris AI - 20 pieces

Approach: Here is the complete, compilable C# code for the optimal Tetris player. It implements an adaptive strategy based on Pierre Dellacherie's algorithm. For standard heights, it uses a slightly tweaked "Aggressive" strategy that attempts to leave the rightmost column open to score 4-line Tetrises. When the stack reaches above 50% of the board height, it switches to a "Marathon" strategy with standard...

View C# Code (13278 chars)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Text;

class Program
{
    public struct Point
    {
        public int x, y;
        public Point(int x, int y) { this.x = x; this.y = y; }
    }

    public class Piece
    {
        public string Name;
        public Point[][] Rotations;
        public int[][] Bottoms;
        public int[] Widths;
    }

    static Dictionary<string, Piece> Pieces = new Dictionary<string, Piece>();

    static Piece MakePiece(string name, Point[][] rots)
    {
        Piece p = new Piece { Name = name, Rotations = rots };
        p.Widths = new int[4];
        p.Bottoms = new int[4][];
        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
        {
            int max_x = 0;
            foreach (var pt in rots[i]) if (pt.x > max_x) max_x = pt.x;
            p.Widths[i] = max_x + 1;
            p.Bottoms[i] = new int[p.Widths[i]];
            for (int x = 0; x < p.Widths[i]; x++)
            {
                int min_y = 999;
                foreach (var pt in rots[i])
                {
                    if (pt.x == x && pt.y < min_y) min_y = pt.y;
                }
                p.Bottoms[i][x] = min_y;
            }
        }
        return p;
    }

    static void InitPieces()
    {
        Pieces["I"] = MakePiece("I", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (3,0) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (0,2), new (0,3) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (3,0) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (0,2), new (0,3) }
        });
        Pieces["O"] = MakePiece("O", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) }
        });
        Pieces["T"] = MakePiece("T", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (0,2), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (1,2) }
        });
        Pieces["S"] = MakePiece("S", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (0,2) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (0,2) }
        });
        Pieces["Z"] = MakePiece("Z", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (2,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (1,2) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (2,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (1,2) }
        });
        Pieces["J"] = MakePiece("J", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (0,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (0,2), new (1,2) },
            new Point[] { new (2,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (1,1), new (1,2) }
        });
        Pieces["L"] = MakePiece("L", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (0,2) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (1,1), new (0,2), new (1,2) }
        });
    }

    public class BoardState
    {
        public bool[,] grid;
        public int width, height;
        public int[] columnHeights;

        public BoardState(int w, int h)
        {
            width = w;
            height = h;
            grid = new bool[w, h];
            columnHeights = new int[w];
        }
    }

    struct MoveResult
    {
        public BoardState board;
        public double score;
        public bool valid;
    }

    static MoveResult EvaluateMove(BoardState board, Piece p, int rot, int col, bool aggressive)
    {
        int dropY = 0;
        int[] bottoms = p.Bottoms[rot];

        for (int dx = 0; dx < p.Widths[rot]; dx++)
        {
            int x = col + dx;
            int y = board.columnHeights[x] - bottoms[dx];
            if (y > dropY) dropY = y;
        }

        Point[] blocks = p.Rotations[rot];
        bool[,] newGrid = new bool[board.width, board.height];
        Array.Copy(board.grid, newGrid, board.grid.Length);

        bool gameover = false;
        foreach (var pt in blocks)
        {
            int x = col + pt.x;
            int y = dropY + pt.y;
            if (y >= board.height)
            {
                gameover = true;
            }
            else
            {
                newGrid[x, y] = true;
            }
        }

        if (gameover) return new MoveResult { valid = false, score = -1e9 };

        int cleared = 0;
        int pieceCellsEliminated = 0;
        bool[] lineCleared = new bool[board.height];

        for (int y = dropY; y < dropY + 4 && y < board.height; y++)
        {
            bool full = true;
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                if (!newGrid[x, y])
                {
                    full = false;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (full)
            {
                cleared++;
                lineCleared[y] = true;
            }
        }

        bool[,] finalGrid;
        int[] finalHeights = new int[board.width];

        if (cleared > 0)
        {
            foreach (var pt in blocks)
            {
                int y = dropY + pt.y;
                if (y < board.height && lineCleared[y])
                {
                    pieceCellsEliminated++;
                }
            }

            finalGrid = new bool[board.width, board.height];
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                int shift = 0;
                int highest = 0;
                for (int y = 0; y < board.height; y++)
                {
                    if (lineCleared[y])
                    {
                        shift++;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        if (newGrid[x, y])
                        {
                            finalGrid[x, y - shift] = true;
                            highest = y - shift + 1;
                        }
                    }
                }
                finalHeights[x] = highest;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            finalGrid = newGrid;
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                int highest = board.columnHeights[x];
                for (int y = board.height - 1; y >= 0; y--)
                {
                    if (finalGrid[x, y])
                    {
                        highest = y + 1;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                finalHeights[x] = highest;
            }
        }

        int rowTrans = 0, colTrans = 0, holes = 0, wells = 0;
        int maxHeight = 0;
        for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
        {
            if (finalHeights[x] > maxHeight) maxHeight = finalHeights[x];
        }

        for (int y = 0; y < maxHeight; y++)
        {
            bool last = true;
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                bool current = finalGrid[x, y];
                if (current != last) rowTrans++;
                last = current;
            }
            if (!last) rowTrans++;
        }

        for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
        {
            bool last = true;
            for (int y = 0; y <= finalHeights[x]; y++)
            {
                bool current = y < board.height ? finalGrid[x, y] : false;
                if (y == finalHeights[x]) current = false;
                if (current != last) colTrans++;
                last = current;
            }

            for (int y = 0; y < finalHeights[x]; y++)
            {
                if (!finalGrid[x, y]) holes++;
            }
        }

        for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
        {
            if (aggressive && x == board.width - 1) continue;
            int wellDepth = 0;
            for (int y = maxHeight; y >= 0; y--)
            {
                if (y >= board.height) continue;
                bool left = (x == 0) || finalGrid[x - 1, y];
                bool right = (x == board.width - 1) || finalGrid[x + 1, y];
                bool current = finalGrid[x, y];

                if (!current && left && right)
                {
                    wellDepth++;
                    wells += wellDepth;
                }
                else
                {
                    wellDepth = 0;
                }
            }
        }

        double score = 0;
        if (aggressive)
        {
            score += -4.5 * dropY;
            score += (cleared * 3.4) + (cleared == 4 ? 10.0 : 0.0);
            score += -3.2 * rowTrans;
            score += -9.3 * colTrans;
            score += -7.9 * holes;
            score += -3.4 * wells;
        }
        else
        {
            // Standard Dellacherie Weights
            score += -4.500158 * dropY;
            score += 3.418126 * (cleared * pieceCellsEliminated);
            score += -3.217888 * rowTrans;
            score += -9.348695 * colTrans;
            score += -7.899265 * holes;
            score += -3.385597 * wells;
        }

        BoardState nextBoard = new BoardState(board.width, board.height);
        nextBoard.grid = finalGrid;
        nextBoard.columnHeights = finalHeights;
        return new MoveResult { valid = true, score = score, board = nextBoard };
    }

    static string ReadNextToken()
    {
        int c;
        while ((c = Console.Read()) != -1 && char.IsWhiteSpace((char)c)) ;
        if (c == -1) return null;
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.Append((char)c);
        while ((c = Console.Read()) != -1 && !char.IsWhiteSpace((char)c))
        {
            sb.Append((char)c);
        }
        return sb.ToString();
    }

    static void Main(string[] args)
    {
        InitPieces();

        string w_str = ReadNextToken();
        if (w_str == null) return;
        string h_str = ReadNextToken();
        string n_str = ReadNextToken();

        int width = int.Parse(w_str);
        int height = int.Parse(h_str);
        int num_pieces = int.Parse(n_str);

        BoardState board = new BoardState(width, height);

        for (int i = 0; i < num_pieces; i++)
        {
            string pName = null;
            while (true)
            {
                string token = ReadNextToken();
                if (token == null) return;
                if (Pieces.ContainsKey(token))
                {
                    pName = token;
                    break;
                }
            }

            bool aggressive = false;
            int maxHeight = 0;
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                if (board.columnHeights[x] > maxHeight) maxHeight = board.columnHeights[x];
            }
            if (maxHeight < board.height * 0.5)
            {
                aggressive = true;
            }

            Piece p = Pieces[pName];
            double bestScore = -double.MaxValue;
            int bestRot = 0;
            int bestCol = 0;
            BoardState bestBoard = null;

            for (int rot = 0; rot < 4; rot++)
            {
                int pieceWidth = p.Widths[rot];
                for (int col = 0; col <= board.width - pieceWidth; col++)
                {
                    var result = EvaluateMove(board, p, rot, col, aggressive);
                    if (result.valid)
                    {
                        double tieBreaker = (col * 0.0001) - (rot * 0.00001);
                        double finalScore = result.score + tieBreaker;

                        if (finalScore > bestScore)
                        {
                            bestScore = finalScore;
                            bestRot = rot;
                            bestCol = col;
                            bestBoard = result.board;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            if (bestBoard == null)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("0 0");
                Console.Out.Flush();
            }
            else
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"{bestRot} {bestCol}");
                Console.Out.Flush();
                board = bestBoard;
            }

            string res = null;
            while (true)
            {
                string token = ReadNextToken();
                if (token == null) return;
                if (token == "ok" || token.StartsWith("cleared_") || token == "gameover")
                {
                    res = token;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (res == "gameover") break;
        }
    }
}

Tetris AI - 50 pieces

Approach: Here is the complete, compilable C# code for the optimal Tetris player. It implements an adaptive strategy based on Pierre Dellacherie's algorithm. For standard heights, it uses a slightly tweaked "Aggressive" strategy that attempts to leave the rightmost column open to score 4-line Tetrises. When the stack reaches above 50% of the board height, it switches to a "Marathon" strategy with standard...

View C# Code (13278 chars)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Text;

class Program
{
    public struct Point
    {
        public int x, y;
        public Point(int x, int y) { this.x = x; this.y = y; }
    }

    public class Piece
    {
        public string Name;
        public Point[][] Rotations;
        public int[][] Bottoms;
        public int[] Widths;
    }

    static Dictionary<string, Piece> Pieces = new Dictionary<string, Piece>();

    static Piece MakePiece(string name, Point[][] rots)
    {
        Piece p = new Piece { Name = name, Rotations = rots };
        p.Widths = new int[4];
        p.Bottoms = new int[4][];
        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
        {
            int max_x = 0;
            foreach (var pt in rots[i]) if (pt.x > max_x) max_x = pt.x;
            p.Widths[i] = max_x + 1;
            p.Bottoms[i] = new int[p.Widths[i]];
            for (int x = 0; x < p.Widths[i]; x++)
            {
                int min_y = 999;
                foreach (var pt in rots[i])
                {
                    if (pt.x == x && pt.y < min_y) min_y = pt.y;
                }
                p.Bottoms[i][x] = min_y;
            }
        }
        return p;
    }

    static void InitPieces()
    {
        Pieces["I"] = MakePiece("I", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (3,0) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (0,2), new (0,3) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (3,0) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (0,2), new (0,3) }
        });
        Pieces["O"] = MakePiece("O", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) }
        });
        Pieces["T"] = MakePiece("T", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (0,2), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (1,2) }
        });
        Pieces["S"] = MakePiece("S", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (0,2) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (0,2) }
        });
        Pieces["Z"] = MakePiece("Z", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (2,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (1,2) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (2,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (1,2) }
        });
        Pieces["J"] = MakePiece("J", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (0,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (0,2), new (1,2) },
            new Point[] { new (2,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (1,1), new (1,2) }
        });
        Pieces["L"] = MakePiece("L", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (0,2) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (1,1), new (0,2), new (1,2) }
        });
    }

    public class BoardState
    {
        public bool[,] grid;
        public int width, height;
        public int[] columnHeights;

        public BoardState(int w, int h)
        {
            width = w;
            height = h;
            grid = new bool[w, h];
            columnHeights = new int[w];
        }
    }

    struct MoveResult
    {
        public BoardState board;
        public double score;
        public bool valid;
    }

    static MoveResult EvaluateMove(BoardState board, Piece p, int rot, int col, bool aggressive)
    {
        int dropY = 0;
        int[] bottoms = p.Bottoms[rot];

        for (int dx = 0; dx < p.Widths[rot]; dx++)
        {
            int x = col + dx;
            int y = board.columnHeights[x] - bottoms[dx];
            if (y > dropY) dropY = y;
        }

        Point[] blocks = p.Rotations[rot];
        bool[,] newGrid = new bool[board.width, board.height];
        Array.Copy(board.grid, newGrid, board.grid.Length);

        bool gameover = false;
        foreach (var pt in blocks)
        {
            int x = col + pt.x;
            int y = dropY + pt.y;
            if (y >= board.height)
            {
                gameover = true;
            }
            else
            {
                newGrid[x, y] = true;
            }
        }

        if (gameover) return new MoveResult { valid = false, score = -1e9 };

        int cleared = 0;
        int pieceCellsEliminated = 0;
        bool[] lineCleared = new bool[board.height];

        for (int y = dropY; y < dropY + 4 && y < board.height; y++)
        {
            bool full = true;
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                if (!newGrid[x, y])
                {
                    full = false;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (full)
            {
                cleared++;
                lineCleared[y] = true;
            }
        }

        bool[,] finalGrid;
        int[] finalHeights = new int[board.width];

        if (cleared > 0)
        {
            foreach (var pt in blocks)
            {
                int y = dropY + pt.y;
                if (y < board.height && lineCleared[y])
                {
                    pieceCellsEliminated++;
                }
            }

            finalGrid = new bool[board.width, board.height];
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                int shift = 0;
                int highest = 0;
                for (int y = 0; y < board.height; y++)
                {
                    if (lineCleared[y])
                    {
                        shift++;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        if (newGrid[x, y])
                        {
                            finalGrid[x, y - shift] = true;
                            highest = y - shift + 1;
                        }
                    }
                }
                finalHeights[x] = highest;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            finalGrid = newGrid;
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                int highest = board.columnHeights[x];
                for (int y = board.height - 1; y >= 0; y--)
                {
                    if (finalGrid[x, y])
                    {
                        highest = y + 1;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                finalHeights[x] = highest;
            }
        }

        int rowTrans = 0, colTrans = 0, holes = 0, wells = 0;
        int maxHeight = 0;
        for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
        {
            if (finalHeights[x] > maxHeight) maxHeight = finalHeights[x];
        }

        for (int y = 0; y < maxHeight; y++)
        {
            bool last = true;
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                bool current = finalGrid[x, y];
                if (current != last) rowTrans++;
                last = current;
            }
            if (!last) rowTrans++;
        }

        for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
        {
            bool last = true;
            for (int y = 0; y <= finalHeights[x]; y++)
            {
                bool current = y < board.height ? finalGrid[x, y] : false;
                if (y == finalHeights[x]) current = false;
                if (current != last) colTrans++;
                last = current;
            }

            for (int y = 0; y < finalHeights[x]; y++)
            {
                if (!finalGrid[x, y]) holes++;
            }
        }

        for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
        {
            if (aggressive && x == board.width - 1) continue;
            int wellDepth = 0;
            for (int y = maxHeight; y >= 0; y--)
            {
                if (y >= board.height) continue;
                bool left = (x == 0) || finalGrid[x - 1, y];
                bool right = (x == board.width - 1) || finalGrid[x + 1, y];
                bool current = finalGrid[x, y];

                if (!current && left && right)
                {
                    wellDepth++;
                    wells += wellDepth;
                }
                else
                {
                    wellDepth = 0;
                }
            }
        }

        double score = 0;
        if (aggressive)
        {
            score += -4.5 * dropY;
            score += (cleared * 3.4) + (cleared == 4 ? 10.0 : 0.0);
            score += -3.2 * rowTrans;
            score += -9.3 * colTrans;
            score += -7.9 * holes;
            score += -3.4 * wells;
        }
        else
        {
            // Standard Dellacherie Weights
            score += -4.500158 * dropY;
            score += 3.418126 * (cleared * pieceCellsEliminated);
            score += -3.217888 * rowTrans;
            score += -9.348695 * colTrans;
            score += -7.899265 * holes;
            score += -3.385597 * wells;
        }

        BoardState nextBoard = new BoardState(board.width, board.height);
        nextBoard.grid = finalGrid;
        nextBoard.columnHeights = finalHeights;
        return new MoveResult { valid = true, score = score, board = nextBoard };
    }

    static string ReadNextToken()
    {
        int c;
        while ((c = Console.Read()) != -1 && char.IsWhiteSpace((char)c)) ;
        if (c == -1) return null;
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.Append((char)c);
        while ((c = Console.Read()) != -1 && !char.IsWhiteSpace((char)c))
        {
            sb.Append((char)c);
        }
        return sb.ToString();
    }

    static void Main(string[] args)
    {
        InitPieces();

        string w_str = ReadNextToken();
        if (w_str == null) return;
        string h_str = ReadNextToken();
        string n_str = ReadNextToken();

        int width = int.Parse(w_str);
        int height = int.Parse(h_str);
        int num_pieces = int.Parse(n_str);

        BoardState board = new BoardState(width, height);

        for (int i = 0; i < num_pieces; i++)
        {
            string pName = null;
            while (true)
            {
                string token = ReadNextToken();
                if (token == null) return;
                if (Pieces.ContainsKey(token))
                {
                    pName = token;
                    break;
                }
            }

            bool aggressive = false;
            int maxHeight = 0;
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                if (board.columnHeights[x] > maxHeight) maxHeight = board.columnHeights[x];
            }
            if (maxHeight < board.height * 0.5)
            {
                aggressive = true;
            }

            Piece p = Pieces[pName];
            double bestScore = -double.MaxValue;
            int bestRot = 0;
            int bestCol = 0;
            BoardState bestBoard = null;

            for (int rot = 0; rot < 4; rot++)
            {
                int pieceWidth = p.Widths[rot];
                for (int col = 0; col <= board.width - pieceWidth; col++)
                {
                    var result = EvaluateMove(board, p, rot, col, aggressive);
                    if (result.valid)
                    {
                        double tieBreaker = (col * 0.0001) - (rot * 0.00001);
                        double finalScore = result.score + tieBreaker;

                        if (finalScore > bestScore)
                        {
                            bestScore = finalScore;
                            bestRot = rot;
                            bestCol = col;
                            bestBoard = result.board;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            if (bestBoard == null)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("0 0");
                Console.Out.Flush();
            }
            else
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"{bestRot} {bestCol}");
                Console.Out.Flush();
                board = bestBoard;
            }

            string res = null;
            while (true)
            {
                string token = ReadNextToken();
                if (token == null) return;
                if (token == "ok" || token.StartsWith("cleared_") || token == "gameover")
                {
                    res = token;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (res == "gameover") break;
        }
    }
}

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Text;

class Program
{
    public struct Point
    {
        public int x, y;
        public Point(int x, int y) { this.x = x; this.y = y; }
    }

    public class Piece
    {
        public string Name;
        public Point[][] Rotations;
        public int[][] Bottoms;
        public int[] Widths;
    }

    static Dictionary<string, Piece> Pieces = new Dictionary<string, Piece>();

    static Piece MakePiece(string name, Point[][] rots)
    {
        Piece p = new Piece { Name = name, Rotations = rots };
        p.Widths = new int[4];
        p.Bottoms = new int[4][];
        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
        {
            int max_x = 0;
            foreach (var pt in rots[i]) if (pt.x > max_x) max_x = pt.x;
            p.Widths[i] = max_x + 1;
            p.Bottoms[i] = new int[p.Widths[i]];
            for (int x = 0; x < p.Widths[i]; x++)
            {
                int min_y = 999;
                foreach (var pt in rots[i])
                {
                    if (pt.x == x && pt.y < min_y) min_y = pt.y;
                }
                p.Bottoms[i][x] = min_y;
            }
        }
        return p;
    }

    static void InitPieces()
    {
        Pieces["I"] = MakePiece("I", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (3,0) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (0,2), new (0,3) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (3,0) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (0,2), new (0,3) }
        });
        Pieces["O"] = MakePiece("O", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) }
        });
        Pieces["T"] = MakePiece("T", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (0,2), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (1,2) }
        });
        Pieces["S"] = MakePiece("S", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (0,2) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (0,2) }
        });
        Pieces["Z"] = MakePiece("Z", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (2,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (1,2) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (2,0), new (0,1), new (1,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (1,2) }
        });
        Pieces["J"] = MakePiece("J", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (0,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (0,2), new (1,2) },
            new Point[] { new (2,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (1,1), new (1,2) }
        });
        Pieces["L"] = MakePiece("L", new Point[][] {
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (2,0), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (1,0), new (0,1), new (0,2) },
            new Point[] { new (0,0), new (0,1), new (1,1), new (2,1) },
            new Point[] { new (1,0), new (1,1), new (0,2), new (1,2) }
        });
    }

    public class BoardState
    {
        public bool[,] grid;
        public int width, height;
        public int[] columnHeights;

        public BoardState(int w, int h)
        {
            width = w;
            height = h;
            grid = new bool[w, h];
            columnHeights = new int[w];
        }
    }

    struct MoveResult
    {
        public BoardState board;
        public double score;
        public bool valid;
    }

    static MoveResult EvaluateMove(BoardState board, Piece p, int rot, int col, bool aggressive)
    {
        int dropY = 0;
        int[] bottoms = p.Bottoms[rot];

        for (int dx = 0; dx < p.Widths[rot]; dx++)
        {
            int x = col + dx;
            int y = board.columnHeights[x] - bottoms[dx];
            if (y > dropY) dropY = y;
        }

        Point[] blocks = p.Rotations[rot];
        bool[,] newGrid = new bool[board.width, board.height];
        Array.Copy(board.grid, newGrid, board.grid.Length);

        bool gameover = false;
        foreach (var pt in blocks)
        {
            int x = col + pt.x;
            int y = dropY + pt.y;
            if (y >= board.height)
            {
                gameover = true;
            }
            else
            {
                newGrid[x, y] = true;
            }
        }

        if (gameover) return new MoveResult { valid = false, score = -1e9 };

        int cleared = 0;
        int pieceCellsEliminated = 0;
        bool[] lineCleared = new bool[board.height];

        for (int y = dropY; y < dropY + 4 && y < board.height; y++)
        {
            bool full = true;
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                if (!newGrid[x, y])
                {
                    full = false;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (full)
            {
                cleared++;
                lineCleared[y] = true;
            }
        }

        bool[,] finalGrid;
        int[] finalHeights = new int[board.width];

        if (cleared > 0)
        {
            foreach (var pt in blocks)
            {
                int y = dropY + pt.y;
                if (y < board.height && lineCleared[y])
                {
                    pieceCellsEliminated++;
                }
            }

            finalGrid = new bool[board.width, board.height];
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                int shift = 0;
                int highest = 0;
                for (int y = 0; y < board.height; y++)
                {
                    if (lineCleared[y])
                    {
                        shift++;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        if (newGrid[x, y])
                        {
                            finalGrid[x, y - shift] = true;
                            highest = y - shift + 1;
                        }
                    }
                }
                finalHeights[x] = highest;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            finalGrid = newGrid;
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                int highest = board.columnHeights[x];
                for (int y = board.height - 1; y >= 0; y--)
                {
                    if (finalGrid[x, y])
                    {
                        highest = y + 1;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                finalHeights[x] = highest;
            }
        }

        int rowTrans = 0, colTrans = 0, holes = 0, wells = 0;
        int maxHeight = 0;
        for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
        {
            if (finalHeights[x] > maxHeight) maxHeight = finalHeights[x];
        }

        for (int y = 0; y < maxHeight; y++)
        {
            bool last = true;
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                bool current = finalGrid[x, y];
                if (current != last) rowTrans++;
                last = current;
            }
            if (!last) rowTrans++;
        }

        for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
        {
            bool last = true;
            for (int y = 0; y <= finalHeights[x]; y++)
            {
                bool current = y < board.height ? finalGrid[x, y] : false;
                if (y == finalHeights[x]) current = false;
                if (current != last) colTrans++;
                last = current;
            }

            for (int y = 0; y < finalHeights[x]; y++)
            {
                if (!finalGrid[x, y]) holes++;
            }
        }

        for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
        {
            if (aggressive && x == board.width - 1) continue;
            int wellDepth = 0;
            for (int y = maxHeight; y >= 0; y--)
            {
                if (y >= board.height) continue;
                bool left = (x == 0) || finalGrid[x - 1, y];
                bool right = (x == board.width - 1) || finalGrid[x + 1, y];
                bool current = finalGrid[x, y];

                if (!current && left && right)
                {
                    wellDepth++;
                    wells += wellDepth;
                }
                else
                {
                    wellDepth = 0;
                }
            }
        }

        double score = 0;
        if (aggressive)
        {
            score += -4.5 * dropY;
            score += (cleared * 3.4) + (cleared == 4 ? 10.0 : 0.0);
            score += -3.2 * rowTrans;
            score += -9.3 * colTrans;
            score += -7.9 * holes;
            score += -3.4 * wells;
        }
        else
        {
            // Standard Dellacherie Weights
            score += -4.500158 * dropY;
            score += 3.418126 * (cleared * pieceCellsEliminated);
            score += -3.217888 * rowTrans;
            score += -9.348695 * colTrans;
            score += -7.899265 * holes;
            score += -3.385597 * wells;
        }

        BoardState nextBoard = new BoardState(board.width, board.height);
        nextBoard.grid = finalGrid;
        nextBoard.columnHeights = finalHeights;
        return new MoveResult { valid = true, score = score, board = nextBoard };
    }

    static string ReadNextToken()
    {
        int c;
        while ((c = Console.Read()) != -1 && char.IsWhiteSpace((char)c)) ;
        if (c == -1) return null;
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.Append((char)c);
        while ((c = Console.Read()) != -1 && !char.IsWhiteSpace((char)c))
        {
            sb.Append((char)c);
        }
        return sb.ToString();
    }

    static void Main(string[] args)
    {
        InitPieces();

        string w_str = ReadNextToken();
        if (w_str == null) return;
        string h_str = ReadNextToken();
        string n_str = ReadNextToken();

        int width = int.Parse(w_str);
        int height = int.Parse(h_str);
        int num_pieces = int.Parse(n_str);

        BoardState board = new BoardState(width, height);

        for (int i = 0; i < num_pieces; i++)
        {
            string pName = null;
            while (true)
            {
                string token = ReadNextToken();
                if (token == null) return;
                if (Pieces.ContainsKey(token))
                {
                    pName = token;
                    break;
                }
            }

            bool aggressive = false;
            int maxHeight = 0;
            for (int x = 0; x < board.width; x++)
            {
                if (board.columnHeights[x] > maxHeight) maxHeight = board.columnHeights[x];
            }
            if (maxHeight < board.height * 0.5)
            {
                aggressive = true;
            }

            Piece p = Pieces[pName];
            double bestScore = -double.MaxValue;
            int bestRot = 0;
            int bestCol = 0;
            BoardState bestBoard = null;

            for (int rot = 0; rot < 4; rot++)
            {
                int pieceWidth = p.Widths[rot];
                for (int col = 0; col <= board.width - pieceWidth; col++)
                {
                    var result = EvaluateMove(board, p, rot, col, aggressive);
                    if (result.valid)
                    {
                        double tieBreaker = (col * 0.0001) - (rot * 0.00001);
                        double finalScore = result.score + tieBreaker;

                        if (finalScore > bestScore)
                        {
                            bestScore = finalScore;
                            bestRot = rot;
                            bestCol = col;
                            bestBoard = result.board;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            if (bestBoard == null)
            {
                Console.WriteLine("0 0");
                Console.Out.Flush();
            }
            else
            {
                Console.WriteLine($"{bestRot} {bestCol}");
                Console.Out.Flush();
                board = bestBoard;
            }

            string res = null;
            while (true)
            {
                string token = ReadNextToken();
                if (token == null) return;
                if (token == "ok" || token.StartsWith("cleared_") || token == "gameover")
                {
                    res = token;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (res == "gameover") break;
        }
    }
}

Test 23: Lunar Lander Game Score: 0.00 / 11
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Rust code to play Lunar Lander in real-time.

Your Rust lunar lander controller will be tested with scenarios ranging from simple
training environments to very complex landing sites.

Control a lunar lander to safely land on a target pad.
The program receives a 2D voxel map and continuous state updates, and must output thrust/turn
commands to land safely on the target.

Data is streamed to stdin in real time, and you must write to stdout in real time. If your code
doesn't read from stdin fast enough and the io buffer fills up, the ship will likely crash.

Be very careful if writing single threaded / blocking code, this has many failure modes that
async code doesn't have. Multithreaded / asyncio code is HIGHLY recommended.

**Physics:**
- Gravity pulls lander down constantly
- Thrust applies force in lander's facing direction
- Fuel is limited
- Must land softly on target (low velocity)

**Input format (stdin, whitespace seperated decimal numbers):**
Initial map:
```
width height gravity max_thrust fuel
start_x start_y target_x target_y
map rows (. = empty, # = obstacle, S = start, T = target, L = landing zone)
```

Then you recieve continuous state updates (every 0.1 seconds):
```
x y vx vy angle angular_vel fuel_remaining
```
x and y are in meters, from the worlds top left, and y increases downward.
vx and vy are in m/s.
angle is in radians, 0 is facing up.
angular_vel is in radians per second. + is clockwise, - is counterclockwise.
fuel_remaining is seconds at max_thrust.

**Output format (stdout):**
Your code needs to output the following instructions at a frequency of at least 20hz:
```
thrust turn
```
- thrust: 0.0 to 1.0 (fraction of max thrust)
- turn: -1.0 to 1.0 (turning rate, negative = left, positive = right)

To be crystal clear: that's two decimal numbers seperated by a space, followed by a newline.

If your code stalls / freezes for 100ms or more (so it misses 2 consecutive updates), the engine
will automatically cut power. A long freeze and eventually the lander will crash.

Map size can vary from 100x50 to multi-gb maps, so be efficient with memory and processing.

Thrust and gravity are in m/s/s. 100% engine burn burns 1 unit of fuel per second.

Lander size is approximatly 1x1m, and the 2D map grid size is 1m x 1m.

Turn is in radians per second. The lander can not rotate fully around and will clamp rotation to
facing down if attempted.

Y increases downward. Positive vy means moving downward. Gravity is +g.

**Success Conditions:**
- Land on target with |velocity| < 2m/s
- Stay within landing zone boundaries
- Complete landing within time limit

**Failure Conditions:**
- Crash into obstacle or ground too hard
- Run out of fuel
- Exceed time limit

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: AMD64 Family 23 Model 8 Stepping 2, AuthenticAMD
Core count: 64
Memory: 127.87 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**Rust Compiler:**
rustc 1.92.0 (ded5c06cf 2025-12-08) | edition=2024 | host: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc

Write complete, compilable Rust code with a main function. Assume only the standard library is available.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)

Subpasses vary the starting altitude, velocity, and terrain. The AI must handle 2D physics, fuel management, and real-time control to achieve a safe landing.

Lunar Lander - 100x50 - simple landing

View Rust Code (8467 chars)
use std::io::{self, BufRead, Write};
use std::sync::{Arc, Mutex};
use std::thread;
use std::time::Duration;
use std::f64::consts::PI;

#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug, Default)]
struct LanderState {
    x: f64,
    y: f64,
    vx: f64,
    vy: f64,
    angle: f64,
    angular_vel: f64,
}

fn next_word(stdin: &mut impl BufRead) -> Option<String> {
    let mut word = String::new();
    let mut in_word = false;
    loop {
        let buf = stdin.fill_buf().ok()?;
        if buf.is_empty() {
            break;
        }
        let mut consumed = 0;
        for &b in buf {
            if b.is_ascii_whitespace() {
                if in_word {
                    break;
                }
            } else {
                in_word = true;
                word.push(b as char);
            }
            consumed += 1;
        }
        stdin.consume(consumed);
        if in_word && consumed < buf.len() {
            break;
        }
    }
    if word.is_empty() { None } else { Some(word) }
}

fn main() {
    let stdin = io::stdin();
    let mut stdin_lock = stdin.lock();

    let width: usize = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let height: usize = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let gravity: f64 = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let max_thrust: f64 = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let _fuel: f64 = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let _start_x: f64 = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let _start_y: f64 = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let target_x: f64 = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let target_y: f64 = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();

    // 0 means no obstacle. We store `height - y` so higher values = higher altitude.
    // This avoids `memset` delay for gigantic maps because vec![0; N] uses calloc.
    let mut highest_obstacle_alt = vec![0usize; width];

    let mut map_idx = 0;
    let total_cells = width * height;
    
    // Parse the map quickly
    loop {
        let buf = stdin_lock.fill_buf().unwrap();
        if buf.is_empty() || map_idx == total_cells {
            break;
        }
        let mut consumed = 0;
        for &b in buf {
            if b == b'.' || b == b'#' || b == b'S' || b == b'T' || b == b'L' {
                if b == b'#' || b == b'T' || b == b'L' {
                    let x = map_idx % width;
                    let y = map_idx / width;
                    let alt = height - y;
                    if alt > highest_obstacle_alt[x] {
                        highest_obstacle_alt[x] = alt;
                    }
                }
                map_idx += 1;
            }
            consumed += 1;
            if map_idx == total_cells {
                break;
            }
        }
        stdin_lock.consume(consumed);
        if map_idx == total_cells {
            break; // ensure we break out
        }
    }

    let shared_state = Arc::new(Mutex::new(None));
    let col_clone = Arc::new(highest_obstacle_alt);
    let state_clone = Arc::clone(&shared_state);

    thread::spawn(move || {
        let out = io::stdout();
        let mut out_lock = out.lock();
        let mut landing_phase = false;

        loop {
            thread::sleep(Duration::from_millis(25)); // 40Hz output

            let state_opt = {
                let lock = state_clone.lock().unwrap();
                *lock
            };

            if let Some(state) = state_opt {
                let padding = 8;
                let min_x_idx = (state.x.min(target_x) as isize - padding).max(0) as usize;
                let max_x_idx = (state.x.max(target_x) as isize + padding).min(width as isize - 1) as usize;

                let mut max_alt = 0;
                for i in min_x_idx..=max_x_idx {
                    if col_clone[i] > max_alt {
                        max_alt = col_clone[i];
                    }
                }

                let highest_obstacle_y = if max_alt == 0 { height as f64 } else { (height - max_alt) as f64 };
                let safe_y = (highest_obstacle_y - 20.0).max(5.0);

                let dist_x = (target_x - state.x).abs();
                if dist_x < 2.0 && state.y <= safe_y + 10.0 {
                    landing_phase = true;
                }
                if dist_x > 8.0 {
                    landing_phase = false;
                }

                let mut base_safe_y = safe_y.min(target_y - 30.0);
                if base_safe_y < 5.0 {
                    base_safe_y = 5.0;
                }

                let wp_x = target_x;
                let wp_y = if landing_phase {
                    target_y
                } else {
                    base_safe_y
                };

                let dx = wp_x - state.x;
                let dy = wp_y - state.y;
                let dist = (dx.powi(2) + dy.powi(2)).sqrt();

                let max_speed = if landing_phase {
                    if dist < 8.0 {
                        1.5
                    } else {
                        (dist * 0.2).clamp(2.5, 10.0)
                    }
                } else {
                    (dist * 0.3).clamp(2.0, 35.0)
                };

                let speed_factor = if dist > 0.1 { max_speed / dist } else { 0.0 };
                let vx_target = dx * speed_factor;
                let vy_target = dy * speed_factor;

                let e_vx = vx_target - state.vx;
                let e_vy = vy_target - state.vy;

                let k_p_v = 1.5;
                let a_x_req = e_vx * k_p_v;
                let a_y_req = e_vy * k_p_v;

                let t_req_x = a_x_req;
                let t_req_y = a_y_req - gravity;

                let theta_req = t_req_x.atan2(-t_req_y).clamp(-1.5, 1.5);

                let mut e_theta = (theta_req - state.angle) % (2.0 * PI);
                if e_theta > PI { e_theta -= 2.0 * PI; }
                if e_theta < -PI { e_theta += 2.0 * PI; }

                let turn_p = 4.0;
                let turn_d = 1.5;
                let turn_cmd = (e_theta * turn_p - state.angular_vel * turn_d).clamp(-1.0, 1.0);

                let heading_x = state.angle.sin();
                let heading_y = -state.angle.cos();
                let dot = t_req_x * heading_x + t_req_y * heading_y;

                let mut thrust_cmd = 0.0;
                if dot > 0.0 {
                    thrust_cmd = (dot / max_thrust).clamp(0.0, 1.0);
                }

                // Emergency override: prevent crashing into ground underneath us
                let my_col = state.x.clamp(0.0, width as f64 - 1.0) as usize;
                let alt_below = col_clone[my_col];
                let ground_y = if alt_below == 0 { height as f64 } else { (height - alt_below) as f64 };
                let alt = ground_y - state.y;
                if alt < 15.0 && state.vy > 5.0 {
                    thrust_cmd = 1.0;
                }

                if let Err(_) = writeln!(out_lock, "{:.4} {:.4}", thrust_cmd, turn_cmd) {
                    break;
                }
                let _ = out_lock.flush();
            } else {
                let hover = (gravity / max_thrust).clamp(0.0, 1.0);
                if let Err(_) = writeln!(out_lock, "{:.4} 0.0", hover) {
                    break;
                }
                let _ = out_lock.flush();
            }
        }
    });

    // Read continuous state updates
    loop {
        let x_str = match next_word(&mut stdin_lock) { Some(s) => s, None => break };
        let x: f64 = x_str.parse().unwrap_or(0.0);
        let y: f64 = match next_word(&mut stdin_lock) { Some(s) => s.parse().unwrap_or(0.0), None => break };
        let vx: f64 = match next_word(&mut stdin_lock) { Some(s) => s.parse().unwrap_or(0.0), None => break };
        let vy: f64 = match next_word(&mut stdin_lock) { Some(s) => s.parse().unwrap_or(0.0), None => break };
        let angle: f64 = match next_word(&mut stdin_lock) { Some(s) => s.parse().unwrap_or(0.0), None => break };
        let angular_vel: f64 = match next_word(&mut stdin_lock) { Some(s) => s.parse().unwrap_or(0.0), None => break };
        let _fuel: f64 = match next_word(&mut stdin_lock) { Some(s) => s.parse().unwrap_or(0.0), None => break };

        let mut lock = shared_state.lock().unwrap();
        *lock = Some(LanderState { x, y, vx, vy, angle, angular_vel });
    }
}

View Rust Code (8467 chars)
use std::io::{self, BufRead, Write};
use std::sync::{Arc, Mutex};
use std::thread;
use std::time::Duration;
use std::f64::consts::PI;

#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug, Default)]
struct LanderState {
    x: f64,
    y: f64,
    vx: f64,
    vy: f64,
    angle: f64,
    angular_vel: f64,
}

fn next_word(stdin: &mut impl BufRead) -> Option<String> {
    let mut word = String::new();
    let mut in_word = false;
    loop {
        let buf = stdin.fill_buf().ok()?;
        if buf.is_empty() {
            break;
        }
        let mut consumed = 0;
        for &b in buf {
            if b.is_ascii_whitespace() {
                if in_word {
                    break;
                }
            } else {
                in_word = true;
                word.push(b as char);
            }
            consumed += 1;
        }
        stdin.consume(consumed);
        if in_word && consumed < buf.len() {
            break;
        }
    }
    if word.is_empty() { None } else { Some(word) }
}

fn main() {
    let stdin = io::stdin();
    let mut stdin_lock = stdin.lock();

    let width: usize = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let height: usize = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let gravity: f64 = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let max_thrust: f64 = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let _fuel: f64 = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let _start_x: f64 = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let _start_y: f64 = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let target_x: f64 = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let target_y: f64 = next_word(&mut stdin_lock).unwrap().parse().unwrap();

    // 0 means no obstacle. We store `height - y` so higher values = higher altitude.
    // This avoids `memset` delay for gigantic maps because vec![0; N] uses calloc.
    let mut highest_obstacle_alt = vec![0usize; width];

    let mut map_idx = 0;
    let total_cells = width * height;
    
    // Parse the map quickly
    loop {
        let buf = stdin_lock.fill_buf().unwrap();
        if buf.is_empty() || map_idx == total_cells {
            break;
        }
        let mut consumed = 0;
        for &b in buf {
            if b == b'.' || b == b'#' || b == b'S' || b == b'T' || b == b'L' {
                if b == b'#' || b == b'T' || b == b'L' {
                    let x = map_idx % width;
                    let y = map_idx / width;
                    let alt = height - y;
                    if alt > highest_obstacle_alt[x] {
                        highest_obstacle_alt[x] = alt;
                    }
                }
                map_idx += 1;
            }
            consumed += 1;
            if map_idx == total_cells {
                break;
            }
        }
        stdin_lock.consume(consumed);
        if map_idx == total_cells {
            break; // ensure we break out
        }
    }

    let shared_state = Arc::new(Mutex::new(None));
    let col_clone = Arc::new(highest_obstacle_alt);
    let state_clone = Arc::clone(&shared_state);

    thread::spawn(move || {
        let out = io::stdout();
        let mut out_lock = out.lock();
        let mut landing_phase = false;

        loop {
            thread::sleep(Duration::from_millis(25)); // 40Hz output

            let state_opt = {
                let lock = state_clone.lock().unwrap();
                *lock
            };

            if let Some(state) = state_opt {
                let padding = 8;
                let min_x_idx = (state.x.min(target_x) as isize - padding).max(0) as usize;
                let max_x_idx = (state.x.max(target_x) as isize + padding).min(width as isize - 1) as usize;

                let mut max_alt = 0;
                for i in min_x_idx..=max_x_idx {
                    if col_clone[i] > max_alt {
                        max_alt = col_clone[i];
                    }
                }

                let highest_obstacle_y = if max_alt == 0 { height as f64 } else { (height - max_alt) as f64 };
                let safe_y = (highest_obstacle_y - 20.0).max(5.0);

                let dist_x = (target_x - state.x).abs();
                if dist_x < 2.0 && state.y <= safe_y + 10.0 {
                    landing_phase = true;
                }
                if dist_x > 8.0 {
                    landing_phase = false;
                }

                let mut base_safe_y = safe_y.min(target_y - 30.0);
                if base_safe_y < 5.0 {
                    base_safe_y = 5.0;
                }

                let wp_x = target_x;
                let wp_y = if landing_phase {
                    target_y
                } else {
                    base_safe_y
                };

                let dx = wp_x - state.x;
                let dy = wp_y - state.y;
                let dist = (dx.powi(2) + dy.powi(2)).sqrt();

                let max_speed = if landing_phase {
                    if dist < 8.0 {
                        1.5
                    } else {
                        (dist * 0.2).clamp(2.5, 10.0)
                    }
                } else {
                    (dist * 0.3).clamp(2.0, 35.0)
                };

                let speed_factor = if dist > 0.1 { max_speed / dist } else { 0.0 };
                let vx_target = dx * speed_factor;
                let vy_target = dy * speed_factor;

                let e_vx = vx_target - state.vx;
                let e_vy = vy_target - state.vy;

                let k_p_v = 1.5;
                let a_x_req = e_vx * k_p_v;
                let a_y_req = e_vy * k_p_v;

                let t_req_x = a_x_req;
                let t_req_y = a_y_req - gravity;

                let theta_req = t_req_x.atan2(-t_req_y).clamp(-1.5, 1.5);

                let mut e_theta = (theta_req - state.angle) % (2.0 * PI);
                if e_theta > PI { e_theta -= 2.0 * PI; }
                if e_theta < -PI { e_theta += 2.0 * PI; }

                let turn_p = 4.0;
                let turn_d = 1.5;
                let turn_cmd = (e_theta * turn_p - state.angular_vel * turn_d).clamp(-1.0, 1.0);

                let heading_x = state.angle.sin();
                let heading_y = -state.angle.cos();
                let dot = t_req_x * heading_x + t_req_y * heading_y;

                let mut thrust_cmd = 0.0;
                if dot > 0.0 {
                    thrust_cmd = (dot / max_thrust).clamp(0.0, 1.0);
                }

                // Emergency override: prevent crashing into ground underneath us
                let my_col = state.x.clamp(0.0, width as f64 - 1.0) as usize;
                let alt_below = col_clone[my_col];
                let ground_y = if alt_below == 0 { height as f64 } else { (height - alt_below) as f64 };
                let alt = ground_y - state.y;
                if alt < 15.0 && state.vy > 5.0 {
                    thrust_cmd = 1.0;
                }

                if let Err(_) = writeln!(out_lock, "{:.4} {:.4}", thrust_cmd, turn_cmd) {
                    break;
                }
                let _ = out_lock.flush();
            } else {
                let hover = (gravity / max_thrust).clamp(0.0, 1.0);
                if let Err(_) = writeln!(out_lock, "{:.4} 0.0", hover) {
                    break;
                }
                let _ = out_lock.flush();
            }
        }
    });

    // Read continuous state updates
    loop {
        let x_str = match next_word(&mut stdin_lock) { Some(s) => s, None => break };
        let x: f64 = x_str.parse().unwrap_or(0.0);
        let y: f64 = match next_word(&mut stdin_lock) { Some(s) => s.parse().unwrap_or(0.0), None => break };
        let vx: f64 = match next_word(&mut stdin_lock) { Some(s) => s.parse().unwrap_or(0.0), None => break };
        let vy: f64 = match next_word(&mut stdin_lock) { Some(s) => s.parse().unwrap_or(0.0), None => break };
        let angle: f64 = match next_word(&mut stdin_lock) { Some(s) => s.parse().unwrap_or(0.0), None => break };
        let angular_vel: f64 = match next_word(&mut stdin_lock) { Some(s) => s.parse().unwrap_or(0.0), None => break };
        let _fuel: f64 = match next_word(&mut stdin_lock) { Some(s) => s.parse().unwrap_or(0.0), None => break };

        let mut lock = shared_state.lock().unwrap();
        *lock = Some(LanderState { x, y, vx, vy, angle, angular_vel });
    }
}

Test 24: 3D Lunar Lander Game (C++) Score: 0.00 / 10
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C++ code to play a 3D Lunar Lander game in real-time.

Your C++ controller will be tested with scenarios ranging from tiny (100m) to huge (100km).
The same code must work for all scales.

Control a lunar lander in full 3D space to safely land on a target pad.
The program receives a terrain file path and continuous state updates via stdin, and must
output thrust/rotation commands to stdout in real-time.

Data is streamed to stdin in real time, and you must write to stdout in real time.
If your code doesn't read from stdin fast enough and the IO buffer fills up, the ship
will likely crash.

Be very careful if writing single threaded / blocking code, this has many failure modes
that async code doesn't have. Multithreaded code is HIGHLY recommended.

**Coordinate System:**
- X: horizontal (East), Y: horizontal (North), Z: UP.
- Gravity acts in the -Z direction.
- All positions are in meters. Velocities in m/s. Angles in radians.

**Physics:**
- Gravity = 1.62 m/s² (lunar) in -Z direction.
- Thrust is along the lander's local "up" axis. When pitch=0 and yaw=0, thrust is
straight up (+Z). Tilting via pitch/yaw redirects thrust.
- Pitch: tilts the lander. +pitch tilts forward, redirecting thrust partially into -X.
Pitch is clamped to [-pi/2, pi/2].
- Yaw: rotates heading around Z.
- Roll: rolls around the thrust axis (cosmetic only, does not affect thrust direction).
- Rotation dynamics: commands apply angular acceleration (2 rad/s² per unit).
Angular rates are damped by 0.95 per tick.
- Fuel: 100% thrust burns 1 unit of fuel per second.

**Input format (stdin):**
Initial header (whitespace separated decimal numbers, except terrain path):
```
width depth height gravity max_thrust fuel
start_x start_y start_z target_x target_y target_z
terrain_file_path
STATE
```

The terrain_file_path is on its own line (the path may contain spaces).
Read the entire line with getline() or equivalent.

**Terrain file format (binary):**
The terrain file defines the 3D world as a binary file. It is a sequence of
uint16_t triplets (little-endian), one per (x, y) cell, stored in row-major order:

```cpp
for (int x = 0; x < width; x++) {
for (int y = 0; y < depth; y++) {
uint16_t a = read_uint16_le(); // ground rock top
uint16_t b = read_uint16_le(); // floating rock bottom
uint16_t c = read_uint16_le(); // floating rock top
}
}
```

For each column (x, y), the vertical structure is:
- z < a: SOLID ROCK (ground)
- a <= z < b: OPEN AIR
- b <= z < c: SOLID ROCK (floating terrain feature, overhang, arch, etc.)
- c <= z: OPEN AIR

If b == c, there is no floating rock in that column (just ground + open sky).
The file size is exactly width * depth * 6 bytes.

You have a startup grace period to parse this file before state updates begin.
The grace period is 5 seconds plus 10 seconds per gigabyte of terrain file.
For a 100x100 map this is ~5s. For a 100000x10000 map (~6GB) this is ~65s.
You may continue parsing in a background thread after the simulation begins,
but you MUST be reading stdin and writing stdout by then to avoid a crash.

Then continuous state updates (every 0.1 seconds, whitespace separated):
```
x y z vx vy vz pitch yaw roll pitch_rate yaw_rate roll_rate fuel_remaining
```

**Output format (stdout):**
Your code needs to output the following at a frequency of at least 10hz:
```
thrust pitch_cmd yaw_cmd roll_cmd
```
- thrust: 0.0 to 1.0 (fraction of max_thrust)
- pitch_cmd: -1.0 to 1.0 (pitch angular acceleration command)
- yaw_cmd: -1.0 to 1.0 (yaw angular acceleration command)
- roll_cmd: -1.0 to 1.0 (roll angular acceleration command)

To be crystal clear: four decimal numbers separated by spaces, followed by a newline.

If your code stalls / freezes for 100ms or more (misses 2 consecutive updates), the
engine will cut thrust automatically. A long freeze and eventually the lander will crash.

**Landing:**
- The target is at (target_x, target_y, target_z) which is just above the terrain.
- You must land within a small radius of the target with total speed < 3 m/s.
- Landing zone radius is approximately max(5, min(width,depth)*0.02) meters.

**Terrain collisions:**
- You collide if you enter any solid cell as defined by the terrain file.
- Out of bounds (x<0, x>=width, y<0, y>=depth, z<0, z>=height) is also a collision.

**Success Conditions:**
- Land on target with |velocity| < 3 m/s
- Stay within landing zone boundaries

**Failure Conditions:**
- Crash into terrain or ground too hard
- Run out of fuel
- Exceed simulation time limit

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: AMD64 Family 23 Model 8 Stepping 2, AuthenticAMD
Core count: 64
Memory: 127.87 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C++ Compiler:**
MSVC cl 19.50.35730 | std=c++20 (/std:c++20)

Write complete, compilable C++ code with a main() function.

Be sure that any deviation from the C++ standard library is supported by the given compiler,
as referencing the wrong intrinsics or non-standard header like 'bits/stdc++.h' could fail your submission.

 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)

View chain of thought

Land a spacecraft on a 3D lunar surface with full attitude control. Unlike the 2D version, the lander can pitch, yaw, and roll, and the terrain is a detailed 3D heightmap with floating rock obstacles. The AI must parse a binary terrain file and navigate to a safe touchdown.

Subpasses vary the terrain complexity, starting conditions, and obstacle density. The AI must handle 6-degree-of-freedom physics and real-time control in three dimensions.

C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\VC\Tools\MSVC\14.50.35717\include\utility(85): note: could be '_Ty std::max(std::initializer_list<_Elem>)'
C:\Users\Ash\AppData\Local\Temp\tmprdzjfxio.cpp(89): note: '_Ty std::max(std::initializer_list<_Elem>)': expects 1 arguments - 2 provided
