3D Lunar Lander - 100x100x50 - simple 3D landing

View C++ Code (17067 chars)
#include <iostream>
#include <string>
#include <thread>
#include <atomic>
#include <vector>
#include <cmath>
#include <mutex>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstdlib>
#include <cstdio>
#include <ctime>

#define NOMINMAX
#define WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN
#include <windows.h>

#ifndef M_PI
#define M_PI 3.14159265358979323846
#endif

struct Point3D {
    float x, y, z;
};

struct State {
    float x, y, z;
    float vx, vy, vz;
    float pitch, yaw, roll;
    float pitch_rate, yaw_rate, roll_rate;
    float fuel;
};

std::atomic<bool> path_ready{false};
std::mutex path_mutex;
std::vector<Point3D> shared_waypoints;

bool is_safe(float x, float y, float z, const uint16_t* terrain_data, float width, float depth, float height) {
    if (!terrain_data) return true;
    if (x < 0 || x >= width || y < 0 || y >= depth || z < 0 || z >= height) return false;
    int ix = (int)x;
    int iy = (int)y;
    if (ix < 0) ix = 0; if (ix >= width) ix = width - 1;
    if (iy < 0) iy = 0; if (iy >= depth) iy = depth - 1;

    size_t idx = ((size_t)ix * (size_t)depth + (size_t)iy) * 3;
    uint16_t a = terrain_data[idx];
    uint16_t b = terrain_data[idx+1];
    uint16_t c = terrain_data[idx+2];

    if (z < a) return false;
    if (z >= a && z < b) return true;
    if (z >= b && z < c) return false;
    if (z >= c) return true;
    return false;
}

bool is_safe_margin(float x, float y, float z, const uint16_t* terrain_data, float width, float depth, float height) {
    float margin = 2.0f;
    for (float dx = -margin; dx <= margin + 0.01f; dx += margin) {
        for (float dy = -margin; dy <= margin + 0.01f; dy += margin) {
            for (float dz = -margin; dz <= margin + 0.01f; dz += margin) {
                if (!is_safe(x + dx, y + dy, z + dz, terrain_data, width, depth, height)) return false;
            }
        }
    }
    return true;
}

bool check_line(float x1, float y1, float z1, float x2, float y2, float z2, const uint16_t* terrain_data, float width, float depth, float height) {
    float dx = x2 - x1;
    float dy = y2 - y1;
    float dz = z2 - z1;
    float dist = sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz);
    int steps = std::ceil(dist / 2.0f);
    if (steps == 0) return true;
    for (int i = 0; i <= steps; ++i) {
        float t = (float)i / steps;
        if (!is_safe_margin(x1 + t*dx, y1 + t*dy, z1 + t*dz, terrain_data, width, depth, height)) return false;
    }
    return true;
}

struct RRTNode {
    float x, y, z;
    int parent;
};

std::vector<Point3D> rrt_connect(Point3D start, Point3D target, const uint16_t* terrain, float width, float depth, float height) {
    float step_size = std::max(20.0f, sqrt(pow(start.x-target.x, 2) + pow(start.y-target.y, 2))/100.0f);
    
    std::vector<RRTNode> treeA, treeB;
    treeA.push_back({start.x, start.y, start.z, -1});
    treeB.push_back({target.x, target.y, target.z, -1});
    bool a_is_start = true;
    
    float min_x = std::max(0.0f, std::min(start.x, target.x) - 1000.0f);
    float max_x = std::min(width, std::max(start.x, target.x) + 1000.0f);
    float min_y = std::max(0.0f, std::min(start.y, target.y) - 1000.0f);
    float max_y = std::min(depth, std::max(start.y, target.y) + 1000.0f);
    
    for (int iter = 0; iter < 50000; ++iter) {
        float qx, qy, qz;
        if (rand() % 100 < 20) {
            qx = treeB.back().x; qy = treeB.back().y; qz = treeB.back().z;
        } else {
            qx = min_x + (max_x - min_x) * ((float)rand() / RAND_MAX);
            qy = min_y + (max_y - min_y) * ((float)rand() / RAND_MAX);
            qz = height * ((float)rand() / RAND_MAX);
        }
        
        float min_d = 1e9f; int nearestA = -1;
        for (size_t i=0; i<treeA.size(); ++i) {
            float dx = treeA[i].x - qx;
            float dy = treeA[i].y - qy;
            float dz = treeA[i].z - qz;
            float d = dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz;
            if (d < min_d) { min_d = d; nearestA = i; }
        }
        
        float nx = treeA[nearestA].x, ny = treeA[nearestA].y, nz = treeA[nearestA].z;
        float dx = qx - nx, dy = qy - ny, dz = qz - nz;
        float d = sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz);
        if (d > step_size) { dx = dx/d * step_size; dy = dy/d * step_size; dz = dz/d * step_size; }
        
        float new_x = nx + dx, new_y = ny + dy, new_z = nz + dz;
        if (check_line(nx, ny, nz, new_x, new_y, new_z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
            treeA.push_back({new_x, new_y, new_z, nearestA});
            int addedA = treeA.size() - 1;
            
            float min_dB = 1e9f; int nearestB = -1;
            for (size_t i=0; i<treeB.size(); ++i) {
                float bdx = treeB[i].x - new_x;
                float bdy = treeB[i].y - new_y;
                float bdz = treeB[i].z - new_z;
                float dist_sq = bdx*bdx + bdy*bdy + bdz*bdz;
                if (dist_sq < min_dB) { min_dB = dist_sq; nearestB = i; }
            }
            
            float bx = treeB[nearestB].x, by = treeB[nearestB].y, bz = treeB[nearestB].z;
            int currentB = nearestB;
            bool connected = false;
            
            while (true) {
                float bdx = new_x - bx, bdy = new_y - by, bdz = new_z - bz;
                float bd = sqrt(bdx*bdx + bdy*bdy + bdz*bdz);
                if (bd < 0.1f) { connected = true; break; }
                
                float bstep = std::min(step_size, bd);
                float step_x = bx + bdx/bd * bstep;
                float step_y = by + bdy/bd * bstep;
                float step_z = bz + bdz/bd * bstep;
                
                if (check_line(bx, by, bz, step_x, step_y, step_z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
                    treeB.push_back({step_x, step_y, step_z, currentB});
                    currentB = treeB.size() - 1;
                    bx = step_x; by = step_y; bz = step_z;
                } else {
                    break;
                }
            }
            
            if (connected) {
                std::vector<Point3D> pathA, pathB;
                int c = addedA; while (c != -1) { pathA.push_back({treeA[c].x, treeA[c].y, treeA[c].z}); c = treeA[c].parent; }
                c = currentB; while (c != -1) { pathB.push_back({treeB[c].x, treeB[c].y, treeB[c].z}); c = treeB[c].parent; }
                
                std::vector<Point3D> final_path;
                if (a_is_start) {
                    for (int i = pathA.size()-1; i >= 0; --i) final_path.push_back(pathA[i]);
                    for (size_t i = 0; i < pathB.size(); ++i) final_path.push_back(pathB[i]);
                } else {
                    for (int i = pathB.size()-1; i >= 0; --i) final_path.push_back(pathB[i]);
                    for (size_t i = 0; i < pathA.size(); ++i) final_path.push_back(pathA[i]);
                }
                return final_path;
            }
        }
        std::swap(treeA, treeB);
        a_is_start = !a_is_start;
    }

    return {start, target};
}

std::vector<Point3D> find_path(Point3D start, Point3D target, const uint16_t* terrain, float width, float depth, float height) {
    if (check_line(start.x, start.y, start.z, target.x, target.y, target.z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
        return {start, target};
    }
    
    for (float fly_z = height - 10.0f; fly_z >= std::max(start.z, target.z) + 10.0f; fly_z -= 50.0f) {
        if (check_line(start.x, start.y, start.z, start.x, start.y, fly_z, terrain, width, depth, height) &&
            check_line(start.x, start.y, fly_z, target.x, target.y, fly_z, terrain, width, depth, height) &&
            check_line(target.x, target.y, fly_z, target.x, target.y, target.z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
            return {start, {start.x, start.y, fly_z}, {target.x, target.y, fly_z}, target};
        }
    }

    float fly_z = height - 10.0f;
    Point3D s_up = {start.x, start.y, fly_z};
    Point3D t_up = {target.x, target.y, fly_z};
    bool s_escape = false, t_escape = false;

    for (float r = 0; r <= 500; r += 50) {
        for (float ang = 0; ang < 2 * M_PI; ang += M_PI / 4) {
            if (!s_escape) {
                Point3D cand = {start.x + r * cos(ang), start.y + r * sin(ang), fly_z};
                if (check_line(start.x, start.y, start.z, cand.x, cand.y, cand.z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
                    s_up = cand; s_escape = true;
                }
            }
            if (!t_escape) {
                Point3D cand = {target.x + r * cos(ang), target.y + r * sin(ang), fly_z};
                if (check_line(target.x, target.y, target.z, cand.x, cand.y, cand.z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
                    t_up = cand; t_escape = true;
                }
            }
        }
        if (s_escape && t_escape) break;
    }

    if (s_escape && t_escape && check_line(s_up.x, s_up.y, s_up.z, t_up.x, t_up.y, t_up.z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
        return {start, s_up, t_up, target};
    }

    return rrt_connect(start, target, terrain, width, depth, height);
}

std::vector<Point3D> smooth_path(const std::vector<Point3D>& path, const uint16_t* terrain, float width, float depth, float height) {
    if (path.size() <= 2) return path;
    std::vector<Point3D> smoothed;
    smoothed.push_back(path[0]);
    int curr = 0;
    while (curr < (int)path.size() - 1) {
        int furthest = curr + 1;
        for (int i = path.size() - 1; i > curr + 1; --i) {
            if (check_line(path[curr].x, path[curr].y, path[curr].z, path[i].x, path[i].y, path[i].z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
                furthest = i;
                break;
            }
        }
        smoothed.push_back(path[furthest]);
        curr = furthest;
    }
    return smoothed;
}

void compute_control(const State& st, Point3D target_pos, Point3D target_vel, float max_v, float gravity, float max_thrust, float& thrust_cmd, float& pitch_cmd, float& yaw_cmd, float& roll_cmd) {
    float Kp_pos = 0.2f, Kd_pos = 1.0f;
    float desired_vx = Kp_pos * (target_pos.x - st.x);
    float desired_vy = Kp_pos * (target_pos.y - st.y);
    float desired_vz = Kp_pos * (target_pos.z - st.z);
    
    float v_mag = sqrt(desired_vx*desired_vx + desired_vy*desired_vy + desired_vz*desired_vz);
    if (v_mag > max_v) {
        desired_vx = desired_vx / v_mag * max_v;
        desired_vy = desired_vy / v_mag * max_v;
        desired_vz = desired_vz / v_mag * max_v;
    }
    
    desired_vx += target_vel.x;
    desired_vy += target_vel.y;
    desired_vz += target_vel.z;

    float ax = Kd_pos * (desired_vx - st.vx);
    float ay = Kd_pos * (desired_vy - st.vy);
    float az = Kd_pos * (desired_vz - st.vz) + gravity;

    if (az < 0.1f) az = 0.1f;

    if (az > max_thrust) {
        az = max_thrust;
        ax = 0; ay = 0;
    } else {
        float max_xy_acc = sqrt(max_thrust*max_thrust - az*az);
        float xy_acc = sqrt(ax*ax + ay*ay);
        if (xy_acc > max_xy_acc) {
            ax = ax / xy_acc * max_xy_acc;
            ay = ay / xy_acc * max_xy_acc;
        }
    }

    float acc_len = sqrt(ax*ax + ay*ay + az*az);
    thrust_cmd = acc_len / max_thrust;

    float Dx = ax, Dy = ay, Dz = az;
    if (acc_len > 0.001f) {
        Dx /= acc_len; Dy /= acc_len; Dz /= acc_len;
    } else {
        Dx = 0; Dy = 0; Dz = 1;
    }

    float p1 = atan2(-sqrt(Dx*Dx + Dy*Dy), Dz);
    float y1 = atan2(Dy, Dx);

    float p2 = -p1;
    float y2 = y1 + M_PI;
    if (y2 > M_PI) y2 -= 2 * M_PI;

    auto get_err = [](float tgt, float curr) {
        float e = tgt - curr;
        while (e > M_PI) e -= 2 * M_PI;
        while (e < -M_PI) e += 2 * M_PI;
        return e;
    };

    float dy1 = get_err(y1, st.yaw);
    float dp1 = p1 - st.pitch;
    float dist1 = dy1*dy1 + dp1*dp1;

    float dy2 = get_err(y2, st.yaw);
    float dp2 = p2 - st.pitch;
    float dist2 = dy2*dy2 + dp2*dp2;

    float target_pitch = (dist1 < dist2) ? p1 : p2;
    float target_yaw   = (dist1 < dist2) ? y1 : y2;

    float Kp_ang = 5.0f, Kd_ang = 3.0f;
    pitch_cmd = Kp_ang * get_err(target_pitch, st.pitch) - Kd_ang * st.pitch_rate;
    yaw_cmd = Kp_ang * get_err(target_yaw, st.yaw) - Kd_ang * st.yaw_rate;
    roll_cmd = Kp_ang * get_err(0.0f, st.roll) - Kd_ang * st.roll_rate;

    auto clamp = [](float v) { return v > 1.0f ? 1.0f : (v < -1.0f ? -1.0f : v); };
    pitch_cmd = clamp(pitch_cmd);
    yaw_cmd = clamp(yaw_cmd);
    roll_cmd = clamp(roll_cmd);
    thrust_cmd = thrust_cmd > 1.0f ? 1.0f : (thrust_cmd < 0.0f ? 0.0f : thrust_cmd);
}

int main() {
    std::srand((unsigned)time(NULL));
    std::ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(NULL);

    float width, depth, height, gravity, max_thrust, fuel;
    if (!(std::cin >> width >> depth >> height >> gravity >> max_thrust >> fuel)) return 0;

    Point3D start, target;
    std::cin >> start.x >> start.y >> start.z >> target.x >> target.y >> target.z;

    std::string dummy;
    std::getline(std::cin, dummy);
    
    std::string terrain_file;
    std::getline(std::cin, terrain_file);
    size_t first_non_space = terrain_file.find_first_not_of(" \t\r\n");
    if (first_non_space != std::string::npos) {
        terrain_file = terrain_file.substr(first_non_space);
    } else {
        terrain_file = "";
    }
    while (!terrain_file.empty() && (terrain_file.back() == '\r' || terrain_file.back() == '\n' || terrain_file.back() == ' ' || terrain_file.back() == '\t')) {
        terrain_file.pop_back();
    }
    
    HANDLE hFile = CreateFileA(terrain_file.c_str(), GENERIC_READ, FILE_SHARE_READ, NULL, OPEN_EXISTING, FILE_ATTRIBUTE_NORMAL, NULL);
    const uint16_t* terrain_data = nullptr;
    if (hFile != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE) {
        HANDLE hMap = CreateFileMappingA(hFile, NULL, PAGE_READONLY, 0, 0, NULL);
        if (hMap) {
            terrain_data = (const uint16_t*)MapViewOfFile(hMap, FILE_MAP_READ, 0, 0, 0);
        }
    }

    std::thread path_thread([&]() {
        auto path = find_path(start, target, terrain_data, width, depth, height);
        path = smooth_path(path, terrain_data, width, depth, height);
        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(path_mutex);
        shared_waypoints = path;
        path_ready = true;
    });

    size_t current_wp = 1;
    std::string line;
    while (std::getline(std::cin, line)) {
        if (line.empty()) continue;
        State st;
        if (sscanf(line.c_str(), "%f %f %f %f %f %f %f %f %f %f %f %f %f",
            &st.x, &st.y, &st.z, &st.vx, &st.vy, &st.vz,
            &st.pitch, &st.yaw, &st.roll,
            &st.pitch_rate, &st.yaw_rate, &st.roll_rate, &st.fuel) != 13) {
            continue;
        }

        std::vector<Point3D> waypoints;
        bool has_path = false;
        {
            std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(path_mutex);
            if (path_ready) {
                waypoints = shared_waypoints;
                has_path = true;
            }
        }

        float thrust_cmd = 0, pitch_cmd = 0, yaw_cmd = 0, roll_cmd = 0;

        if (has_path && waypoints.size() > 1) {
            if (current_wp >= waypoints.size()) current_wp = waypoints.size() - 1;
            Point3D target_pos = waypoints[current_wp];
            
            float dist_to_wp = sqrt(pow(st.x - target_pos.x, 2) + pow(st.y - target_pos.y, 2) + pow(st.z - target_pos.z, 2));
            if (dist_to_wp < 15.0f && current_wp < waypoints.size() - 1) {
                current_wp++;
                target_pos = waypoints[current_wp];
            }

            Point3D target_vel = {0, 0, 0};
            if (current_wp < waypoints.size() - 1) {
                Point3D next_wp = waypoints[current_wp + 1];
                float dx = next_wp.x - target_pos.x;
                float dy = next_wp.y - target_pos.y;
                float dz = next_wp.z - target_pos.z;
                float len = sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz);
                if (len > 0.001f) {
                    float speed = 15.0f;
                    target_vel = {dx/len * speed, dy/len * speed, dz/len * speed};
                }
            }

            float max_v = 20.0f;
            if (current_wp == waypoints.size() - 1) {
                float dist_to_final = sqrt(pow(target.x - st.x, 2) + pow(target.y - st.y, 2) + pow(target.z - st.z, 2));
                max_v = std::min(20.0f, std::max(1.5f, sqrt(dist_to_final) * 0.8f));
                
                float dist_xy = sqrt(pow(target.x - st.x, 2) + pow(target.y - st.y, 2));
                if (dist_xy < 5.0f && st.z - target.z < 5.0f) {
                    target_pos.z = target.z - 5.0f; // target slightly into ground for firm touchdown
                    max_v = 2.0f;
                }
            }

            compute_control(st, target_pos, target_vel, max_v, gravity, max_thrust, thrust_cmd, pitch_cmd, yaw_cmd, roll_cmd);
        } else {
            compute_control(st, start, {0,0,0}, 2.0f, gravity, max_thrust, thrust_cmd, pitch_cmd, yaw_cmd, roll_cmd);
        }

        std::cout << thrust_cmd << " " << pitch_cmd << " " << yaw_cmd << " " << roll_cmd << "\n";
        std::cout.flush();
    }

    path_thread.join();
    return 0;
}

#include <iostream>
#include <string>
#include <thread>
#include <atomic>
#include <vector>
#include <cmath>
#include <mutex>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstdlib>
#include <cstdio>
#include <ctime>

#define NOMINMAX
#define WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN
#include <windows.h>

#ifndef M_PI
#define M_PI 3.14159265358979323846
#endif

struct Point3D {
    float x, y, z;
};

struct State {
    float x, y, z;
    float vx, vy, vz;
    float pitch, yaw, roll;
    float pitch_rate, yaw_rate, roll_rate;
    float fuel;
};

std::atomic<bool> path_ready{false};
std::mutex path_mutex;
std::vector<Point3D> shared_waypoints;

bool is_safe(float x, float y, float z, const uint16_t* terrain_data, float width, float depth, float height) {
    if (!terrain_data) return true;
    if (x < 0 || x >= width || y < 0 || y >= depth || z < 0 || z >= height) return false;
    int ix = (int)x;
    int iy = (int)y;
    if (ix < 0) ix = 0; if (ix >= width) ix = width - 1;
    if (iy < 0) iy = 0; if (iy >= depth) iy = depth - 1;

    size_t idx = ((size_t)ix * (size_t)depth + (size_t)iy) * 3;
    uint16_t a = terrain_data[idx];
    uint16_t b = terrain_data[idx+1];
    uint16_t c = terrain_data[idx+2];

    if (z < a) return false;
    if (z >= a && z < b) return true;
    if (z >= b && z < c) return false;
    if (z >= c) return true;
    return false;
}

bool is_safe_margin(float x, float y, float z, const uint16_t* terrain_data, float width, float depth, float height) {
    float margin = 2.0f;
    for (float dx = -margin; dx <= margin + 0.01f; dx += margin) {
        for (float dy = -margin; dy <= margin + 0.01f; dy += margin) {
            for (float dz = -margin; dz <= margin + 0.01f; dz += margin) {
                if (!is_safe(x + dx, y + dy, z + dz, terrain_data, width, depth, height)) return false;
            }
        }
    }
    return true;
}

bool check_line(float x1, float y1, float z1, float x2, float y2, float z2, const uint16_t* terrain_data, float width, float depth, float height) {
    float dx = x2 - x1;
    float dy = y2 - y1;
    float dz = z2 - z1;
    float dist = sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz);
    int steps = std::ceil(dist / 2.0f);
    if (steps == 0) return true;
    for (int i = 0; i <= steps; ++i) {
        float t = (float)i / steps;
        if (!is_safe_margin(x1 + t*dx, y1 + t*dy, z1 + t*dz, terrain_data, width, depth, height)) return false;
    }
    return true;
}

struct RRTNode {
    float x, y, z;
    int parent;
};

std::vector<Point3D> rrt_connect(Point3D start, Point3D target, const uint16_t* terrain, float width, float depth, float height) {
    float step_size = std::max(20.0f, sqrt(pow(start.x-target.x, 2) + pow(start.y-target.y, 2))/100.0f);
    
    std::vector<RRTNode> treeA, treeB;
    treeA.push_back({start.x, start.y, start.z, -1});
    treeB.push_back({target.x, target.y, target.z, -1});
    bool a_is_start = true;
    
    float min_x = std::max(0.0f, std::min(start.x, target.x) - 1000.0f);
    float max_x = std::min(width, std::max(start.x, target.x) + 1000.0f);
    float min_y = std::max(0.0f, std::min(start.y, target.y) - 1000.0f);
    float max_y = std::min(depth, std::max(start.y, target.y) + 1000.0f);
    
    for (int iter = 0; iter < 50000; ++iter) {
        float qx, qy, qz;
        if (rand() % 100 < 20) {
            qx = treeB.back().x; qy = treeB.back().y; qz = treeB.back().z;
        } else {
            qx = min_x + (max_x - min_x) * ((float)rand() / RAND_MAX);
            qy = min_y + (max_y - min_y) * ((float)rand() / RAND_MAX);
            qz = height * ((float)rand() / RAND_MAX);
        }
        
        float min_d = 1e9f; int nearestA = -1;
        for (size_t i=0; i<treeA.size(); ++i) {
            float dx = treeA[i].x - qx;
            float dy = treeA[i].y - qy;
            float dz = treeA[i].z - qz;
            float d = dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz;
            if (d < min_d) { min_d = d; nearestA = i; }
        }
        
        float nx = treeA[nearestA].x, ny = treeA[nearestA].y, nz = treeA[nearestA].z;
        float dx = qx - nx, dy = qy - ny, dz = qz - nz;
        float d = sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz);
        if (d > step_size) { dx = dx/d * step_size; dy = dy/d * step_size; dz = dz/d * step_size; }
        
        float new_x = nx + dx, new_y = ny + dy, new_z = nz + dz;
        if (check_line(nx, ny, nz, new_x, new_y, new_z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
            treeA.push_back({new_x, new_y, new_z, nearestA});
            int addedA = treeA.size() - 1;
            
            float min_dB = 1e9f; int nearestB = -1;
            for (size_t i=0; i<treeB.size(); ++i) {
                float bdx = treeB[i].x - new_x;
                float bdy = treeB[i].y - new_y;
                float bdz = treeB[i].z - new_z;
                float dist_sq = bdx*bdx + bdy*bdy + bdz*bdz;
                if (dist_sq < min_dB) { min_dB = dist_sq; nearestB = i; }
            }
            
            float bx = treeB[nearestB].x, by = treeB[nearestB].y, bz = treeB[nearestB].z;
            int currentB = nearestB;
            bool connected = false;
            
            while (true) {
                float bdx = new_x - bx, bdy = new_y - by, bdz = new_z - bz;
                float bd = sqrt(bdx*bdx + bdy*bdy + bdz*bdz);
                if (bd < 0.1f) { connected = true; break; }
                
                float bstep = std::min(step_size, bd);
                float step_x = bx + bdx/bd * bstep;
                float step_y = by + bdy/bd * bstep;
                float step_z = bz + bdz/bd * bstep;
                
                if (check_line(bx, by, bz, step_x, step_y, step_z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
                    treeB.push_back({step_x, step_y, step_z, currentB});
                    currentB = treeB.size() - 1;
                    bx = step_x; by = step_y; bz = step_z;
                } else {
                    break;
                }
            }
            
            if (connected) {
                std::vector<Point3D> pathA, pathB;
                int c = addedA; while (c != -1) { pathA.push_back({treeA[c].x, treeA[c].y, treeA[c].z}); c = treeA[c].parent; }
                c = currentB; while (c != -1) { pathB.push_back({treeB[c].x, treeB[c].y, treeB[c].z}); c = treeB[c].parent; }
                
                std::vector<Point3D> final_path;
                if (a_is_start) {
                    for (int i = pathA.size()-1; i >= 0; --i) final_path.push_back(pathA[i]);
                    for (size_t i = 0; i < pathB.size(); ++i) final_path.push_back(pathB[i]);
                } else {
                    for (int i = pathB.size()-1; i >= 0; --i) final_path.push_back(pathB[i]);
                    for (size_t i = 0; i < pathA.size(); ++i) final_path.push_back(pathA[i]);
                }
                return final_path;
            }
        }
        std::swap(treeA, treeB);
        a_is_start = !a_is_start;
    }

    return {start, target};
}

std::vector<Point3D> find_path(Point3D start, Point3D target, const uint16_t* terrain, float width, float depth, float height) {
    if (check_line(start.x, start.y, start.z, target.x, target.y, target.z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
        return {start, target};
    }
    
    for (float fly_z = height - 10.0f; fly_z >= std::max(start.z, target.z) + 10.0f; fly_z -= 50.0f) {
        if (check_line(start.x, start.y, start.z, start.x, start.y, fly_z, terrain, width, depth, height) &&
            check_line(start.x, start.y, fly_z, target.x, target.y, fly_z, terrain, width, depth, height) &&
            check_line(target.x, target.y, fly_z, target.x, target.y, target.z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
            return {start, {start.x, start.y, fly_z}, {target.x, target.y, fly_z}, target};
        }
    }

    float fly_z = height - 10.0f;
    Point3D s_up = {start.x, start.y, fly_z};
    Point3D t_up = {target.x, target.y, fly_z};
    bool s_escape = false, t_escape = false;

    for (float r = 0; r <= 500; r += 50) {
        for (float ang = 0; ang < 2 * M_PI; ang += M_PI / 4) {
            if (!s_escape) {
                Point3D cand = {start.x + r * cos(ang), start.y + r * sin(ang), fly_z};
                if (check_line(start.x, start.y, start.z, cand.x, cand.y, cand.z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
                    s_up = cand; s_escape = true;
                }
            }
            if (!t_escape) {
                Point3D cand = {target.x + r * cos(ang), target.y + r * sin(ang), fly_z};
                if (check_line(target.x, target.y, target.z, cand.x, cand.y, cand.z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
                    t_up = cand; t_escape = true;
                }
            }
        }
        if (s_escape && t_escape) break;
    }

    if (s_escape && t_escape && check_line(s_up.x, s_up.y, s_up.z, t_up.x, t_up.y, t_up.z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
        return {start, s_up, t_up, target};
    }

    return rrt_connect(start, target, terrain, width, depth, height);
}

std::vector<Point3D> smooth_path(const std::vector<Point3D>& path, const uint16_t* terrain, float width, float depth, float height) {
    if (path.size() <= 2) return path;
    std::vector<Point3D> smoothed;
    smoothed.push_back(path[0]);
    int curr = 0;
    while (curr < (int)path.size() - 1) {
        int furthest = curr + 1;
        for (int i = path.size() - 1; i > curr + 1; --i) {
            if (check_line(path[curr].x, path[curr].y, path[curr].z, path[i].x, path[i].y, path[i].z, terrain, width, depth, height)) {
                furthest = i;
                break;
            }
        }
        smoothed.push_back(path[furthest]);
        curr = furthest;
    }
    return smoothed;
}

void compute_control(const State& st, Point3D target_pos, Point3D target_vel, float max_v, float gravity, float max_thrust, float& thrust_cmd, float& pitch_cmd, float& yaw_cmd, float& roll_cmd) {
    float Kp_pos = 0.2f, Kd_pos = 1.0f;
    float desired_vx = Kp_pos * (target_pos.x - st.x);
    float desired_vy = Kp_pos * (target_pos.y - st.y);
    float desired_vz = Kp_pos * (target_pos.z - st.z);
    
    float v_mag = sqrt(desired_vx*desired_vx + desired_vy*desired_vy + desired_vz*desired_vz);
    if (v_mag > max_v) {
        desired_vx = desired_vx / v_mag * max_v;
        desired_vy = desired_vy / v_mag * max_v;
        desired_vz = desired_vz / v_mag * max_v;
    }
    
    desired_vx += target_vel.x;
    desired_vy += target_vel.y;
    desired_vz += target_vel.z;

    float ax = Kd_pos * (desired_vx - st.vx);
    float ay = Kd_pos * (desired_vy - st.vy);
    float az = Kd_pos * (desired_vz - st.vz) + gravity;

    if (az < 0.1f) az = 0.1f;

    if (az > max_thrust) {
        az = max_thrust;
        ax = 0; ay = 0;
    } else {
        float max_xy_acc = sqrt(max_thrust*max_thrust - az*az);
        float xy_acc = sqrt(ax*ax + ay*ay);
        if (xy_acc > max_xy_acc) {
            ax = ax / xy_acc * max_xy_acc;
            ay = ay / xy_acc * max_xy_acc;
        }
    }

    float acc_len = sqrt(ax*ax + ay*ay + az*az);
    thrust_cmd = acc_len / max_thrust;

    float Dx = ax, Dy = ay, Dz = az;
    if (acc_len > 0.001f) {
        Dx /= acc_len; Dy /= acc_len; Dz /= acc_len;
    } else {
        Dx = 0; Dy = 0; Dz = 1;
    }

    float p1 = atan2(-sqrt(Dx*Dx + Dy*Dy), Dz);
    float y1 = atan2(Dy, Dx);

    float p2 = -p1;
    float y2 = y1 + M_PI;
    if (y2 > M_PI) y2 -= 2 * M_PI;

    auto get_err = [](float tgt, float curr) {
        float e = tgt - curr;
        while (e > M_PI) e -= 2 * M_PI;
        while (e < -M_PI) e += 2 * M_PI;
        return e;
    };

    float dy1 = get_err(y1, st.yaw);
    float dp1 = p1 - st.pitch;
    float dist1 = dy1*dy1 + dp1*dp1;

    float dy2 = get_err(y2, st.yaw);
    float dp2 = p2 - st.pitch;
    float dist2 = dy2*dy2 + dp2*dp2;

    float target_pitch = (dist1 < dist2) ? p1 : p2;
    float target_yaw   = (dist1 < dist2) ? y1 : y2;

    float Kp_ang = 5.0f, Kd_ang = 3.0f;
    pitch_cmd = Kp_ang * get_err(target_pitch, st.pitch) - Kd_ang * st.pitch_rate;
    yaw_cmd = Kp_ang * get_err(target_yaw, st.yaw) - Kd_ang * st.yaw_rate;
    roll_cmd = Kp_ang * get_err(0.0f, st.roll) - Kd_ang * st.roll_rate;

    auto clamp = [](float v) { return v > 1.0f ? 1.0f : (v < -1.0f ? -1.0f : v); };
    pitch_cmd = clamp(pitch_cmd);
    yaw_cmd = clamp(yaw_cmd);
    roll_cmd = clamp(roll_cmd);
    thrust_cmd = thrust_cmd > 1.0f ? 1.0f : (thrust_cmd < 0.0f ? 0.0f : thrust_cmd);
}

int main() {
    std::srand((unsigned)time(NULL));
    std::ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(NULL);

    float width, depth, height, gravity, max_thrust, fuel;
    if (!(std::cin >> width >> depth >> height >> gravity >> max_thrust >> fuel)) return 0;

    Point3D start, target;
    std::cin >> start.x >> start.y >> start.z >> target.x >> target.y >> target.z;

    std::string dummy;
    std::getline(std::cin, dummy);
    
    std::string terrain_file;
    std::getline(std::cin, terrain_file);
    size_t first_non_space = terrain_file.find_first_not_of(" \t\r\n");
    if (first_non_space != std::string::npos) {
        terrain_file = terrain_file.substr(first_non_space);
    } else {
        terrain_file = "";
    }
    while (!terrain_file.empty() && (terrain_file.back() == '\r' || terrain_file.back() == '\n' || terrain_file.back() == ' ' || terrain_file.back() == '\t')) {
        terrain_file.pop_back();
    }
    
    HANDLE hFile = CreateFileA(terrain_file.c_str(), GENERIC_READ, FILE_SHARE_READ, NULL, OPEN_EXISTING, FILE_ATTRIBUTE_NORMAL, NULL);
    const uint16_t* terrain_data = nullptr;
    if (hFile != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE) {
        HANDLE hMap = CreateFileMappingA(hFile, NULL, PAGE_READONLY, 0, 0, NULL);
        if (hMap) {
            terrain_data = (const uint16_t*)MapViewOfFile(hMap, FILE_MAP_READ, 0, 0, 0);
        }
    }

    std::thread path_thread([&]() {
        auto path = find_path(start, target, terrain_data, width, depth, height);
        path = smooth_path(path, terrain_data, width, depth, height);
        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(path_mutex);
        shared_waypoints = path;
        path_ready = true;
    });

    size_t current_wp = 1;
    std::string line;
    while (std::getline(std::cin, line)) {
        if (line.empty()) continue;
        State st;
        if (sscanf(line.c_str(), "%f %f %f %f %f %f %f %f %f %f %f %f %f",
            &st.x, &st.y, &st.z, &st.vx, &st.vy, &st.vz,
            &st.pitch, &st.yaw, &st.roll,
            &st.pitch_rate, &st.yaw_rate, &st.roll_rate, &st.fuel) != 13) {
            continue;
        }

        std::vector<Point3D> waypoints;
        bool has_path = false;
        {
            std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(path_mutex);
            if (path_ready) {
                waypoints = shared_waypoints;
                has_path = true;
            }
        }

        float thrust_cmd = 0, pitch_cmd = 0, yaw_cmd = 0, roll_cmd = 0;

        if (has_path && waypoints.size() > 1) {
            if (current_wp >= waypoints.size()) current_wp = waypoints.size() - 1;
            Point3D target_pos = waypoints[current_wp];
            
            float dist_to_wp = sqrt(pow(st.x - target_pos.x, 2) + pow(st.y - target_pos.y, 2) + pow(st.z - target_pos.z, 2));
            if (dist_to_wp < 15.0f && current_wp < waypoints.size() - 1) {
                current_wp++;
                target_pos = waypoints[current_wp];
            }

            Point3D target_vel = {0, 0, 0};
            if (current_wp < waypoints.size() - 1) {
                Point3D next_wp = waypoints[current_wp + 1];
                float dx = next_wp.x - target_pos.x;
                float dy = next_wp.y - target_pos.y;
                float dz = next_wp.z - target_pos.z;
                float len = sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz);
                if (len > 0.001f) {
                    float speed = 15.0f;
                    target_vel = {dx/len * speed, dy/len * speed, dz/len * speed};
                }
            }

            float max_v = 20.0f;
            if (current_wp == waypoints.size() - 1) {
                float dist_to_final = sqrt(pow(target.x - st.x, 2) + pow(target.y - st.y, 2) + pow(target.z - st.z, 2));
                max_v = std::min(20.0f, std::max(1.5f, sqrt(dist_to_final) * 0.8f));
                
                float dist_xy = sqrt(pow(target.x - st.x, 2) + pow(target.y - st.y, 2));
                if (dist_xy < 5.0f && st.z - target.z < 5.0f) {
                    target_pos.z = target.z - 5.0f; // target slightly into ground for firm touchdown
                    max_v = 2.0f;
                }
            }

            compute_control(st, target_pos, target_vel, max_v, gravity, max_thrust, thrust_cmd, pitch_cmd, yaw_cmd, roll_cmd);
        } else {
            compute_control(st, start, {0,0,0}, 2.0f, gravity, max_thrust, thrust_cmd, pitch_cmd, yaw_cmd, roll_cmd);
        }

        std::cout << thrust_cmd << " " << pitch_cmd << " " << yaw_cmd << " " << roll_cmd << "\n";
        std::cout.flush();
    }

    path_thread.join();
    return 0;
}

Test 25: Asteroid Interception (C#) Score: 0.00 / 11
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C# code to calculate an asteroid interception trajectory.

You must write a C# solver that can handle an interception and redirection scenarios, from
short warning times (1-2 years), large impactors, generous delta-v, simple trajectories to
very long warning times (30-50 years), very small impactors, very tight delta-v,
advanced trajectory optimization with multi-flyby maneuvers and gravitational assist sequences required.

**Problem:**
Calculate a spacecraft trajectory to intercept and deflect an asteroid on collision course
with Earth using kinetic impact.

**The solver must output:**
1. Launch window and initial trajectory
2. Mid-course correction burn(s)
3. Final approach for kinetic impact

**Input format (stdin, whitespace seperated decimal/scientific notation numbers):**
```
num_bodies warning_days impactor_mass delta_v_budget asteroid_mass t0_unix_utc
body_name mass x y z vx vy vz (for each body)
de421.bsp_file_path
```

All values are in SI units unless otherwise specified. Eg mass of earth is 5.972e24 kg.
All positions + velocities are relative to solar system barycenter.
Delta_v budget is in m/s.

The body name for the asteriod is "Asteroid". The body name for where your spacecraft originates
and you must redirect the asteroid to avoid is "Earth".

**Output format (stdout):**
```
num_burns
launch_time burn_dv_x burn_dv_y burn_dv_z
correction_time1 burn_dv_x burn_dv_y burn_dv_z
...
impact_time impact_dv_x impact_dv_y impact_dv_z
```

**Time units:**
- All times are in **days since scenario start (t=0 at the provided initial state)**.
- The **launch window is [0, warning_days]** (inclusive).
- **t0_unix_utc** is the UTC time of the provided initial state (t=0).

The simulation uses the JPL DE421 model of the solar system with Sun, Earth, Moon, and major planets,
and a KDK integrator to calculate trajectories. The path to the DE421 model is provided in the input
so your code can precisely match the simulation at extreme precision.

**Success Criteria:**
- Spacecraft intercepts asteroid before Earth impact (within 1000km)
- Kinetic impact transfers enough momentum to deflect asteroid sufficiently to miss Earth
- Total delta-v usage stays within budget
- Launch occurs within specified window

**Simulation host environment**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: AMD64 Family 23 Model 8 Stepping 2, AuthenticAMD
Core count: 64
Memory: 127.87 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C# Compiler**
C# (csc.exe 5.5.0-2.26208.13 (3dc781932f83b0792b0d1717a68db3f9604a2cb1)) | max LangVersion 14

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with C# .NET/csc
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. Handle variable warning times and delta-v budgets
4. Complete analysis within 5 minutes
5. Must handle varying mission complexities efficiently

Write complete, compilable C# code with a static void Main method.

Harder subpasses give less warning time or tighter fuel budgets, potentially requiring planetary gravity assists (slingshots) to reach the asteroid. The AI must implement orbital mechanics and trajectory optimisation from scratch.

Test 26: 3D Point Clustering (Rust) Score: 4.00 / 11
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Rust code to cluster 3D points into exactly N clusters.

You must write a Rust solver that can handle ANY clustering scenario from trivial to ludicrous scale:
- **Trivial**: Small datasets (1M points, 10 clusters), basic k-means, memory-friendly
- **Medium**: Moderate datasets (10M points, 100 clusters), optimized k-means, streaming
- **Large**: Large datasets (100M points, 1000 clusters), mini-batch k-means, memory constraints
- **Extreme**: Massive datasets (1B-10B points, 10000 clusters), streaming algorithms, very tight memory

**The Challenge:**
Your Rust clustering algorithm will be tested with datasets ranging from millions to billions of 3D points. The same algorithm must work efficiently across ALL scales while respecting memory constraints.

**Problem:**
Given millions to billions of 3D points, partition them into exactly N clusters minimizing within-cluster variance (k-means objective). Points are provided as binary float32 triples for efficiency.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
num_points num_clusters
[x y z] (as binary float32 triples, num_points total)
```

**Output format (stdout):**
```
[cluster_index] (as binary uint32, one per point)
```

**Critical Requirements:**
1. **Scalability**: Your algorithm must adapt based on point count and cluster count
2. **Performance**: Must complete within 5 minutes even for massive datasets
3. **Memory**: Must handle streaming input for datasets that don't fit in memory
4. **Quality**: Minimize within-cluster variance while producing exactly N clusters

**Algorithm Strategy Recommendations:**
- **Small datasets (≤10M points)**: Can use standard k-means with full data in memory
- **Medium datasets (10M-100M points)**: Mini-batch k-means, streaming updates
- **Large datasets (100M-1B points)**: Streaming k-means with limited memory buffers
- **Very Large datasets (>1B points)**: Very fast streaming, approximate clustering

**Key Techniques:**
- **Streaming algorithms**: Process points in batches without storing all data
- **Mini-batch k-means**: Update centroids incrementally
- **Memory management**: Use fixed-size buffers for large datasets
- **Binary I/O**: Efficient reading/writing of binary data
- **Convergence detection**: Monitor when clustering stabilizes

**Implementation Hints:**
- Detect dataset size and choose appropriate clustering algorithm
- Use efficient binary I/O (std::io::BufReader/BufWriter)
- Implement streaming updates for large datasets
- For very large datasets, use approximation algorithms
- Handle edge cases: empty clusters, convergence issues
- Use fast random access for centroid updates

**Binary Format Details:**
- Input: Points as little-endian f32 triples (12 bytes per point)
- Output: Cluster indices as little-endian u32 (4 bytes per point)
- Total input size: num_points × 12 bytes
- Total output size: num_points × 4 bytes

**Memory Constraints:**
- Small datasets: Can load all points into memory
- Medium datasets: Use streaming with moderate buffers
- Large datasets: Streaming with minimal memory footprint
- Very Large datasets: Extremely memory-efficient streaming

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with rustc (edition 2021)
2. Read binary input from stdin, write binary output to stdout
3. Handle variable point counts and cluster numbers
4. Complete within 5 minutes
5. Must handle varying dataset sizes efficiently
6. Produce exactly N clusters

Write complete, compilable Rust code with a main function.
Include adaptive logic that chooses different strategies based on clustering complexity.
 Prompt Changes:

Given a cloud of 3D points, group them into clusters so that points in the same cluster are close together and points in different clusters are far apart. Think of sorting a jar of mixed beads by colour when all you can see is their position.

The AI must decide how many clusters exist and assign every point to one. Subpasses increase the number of points and make the clusters harder to separate. Scoring is based on how well the AI’s clusters match the true groupings.

 1.0000
[10K points, 10 clusters] Clusters used: 10/10, WCSS: 1.81e+09, Time: 0.04s

3D Point Clustering - 10K points, 10 clusters

View Rust Code (12214 chars)
use std::io::{BufRead, BufReader, BufWriter, Read, Write};

#[inline(always)]
fn sq_dist(a: &[f32; 3], b: &[f32; 3]) -> f32 {
    let dx = a[0] - b[0];
    let dy = a[1] - b[1];
    let dz = a[2] - b[2];
    dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz
}

#[derive(Clone, Default)]
struct KdNode {
    centroid_idx: usize,
    point: [f32; 3],
    left: usize,
    right: usize,
}

fn build_kd_tree(centroids: &[[f32; 3]]) -> (Vec<KdNode>, usize) {
    let mut nodes = vec![KdNode::default(); centroids.len()];
    let mut indices: Vec<usize> = (0..centroids.len()).collect();
    
    fn build(indices: &mut [usize], centroids: &[[f32; 3]], nodes: &mut [KdNode], depth: usize) -> usize {
        if indices.is_empty() { return usize::MAX; }
        let axis = depth % 3;
        
        indices.sort_unstable_by(|&a, &b| centroids[a][axis].partial_cmp(&centroids[b][axis]).unwrap_or(std::cmp::Ordering::Equal));
        let mid = indices.len() / 2;
        let centroid_idx = indices[mid];
        
        let left = build(&mut indices[..mid], centroids, nodes, depth + 1);
        let right = build(&mut indices[mid + 1..], centroids, nodes, depth + 1);
        
        nodes[centroid_idx] = KdNode {
            centroid_idx,
            point: centroids[centroid_idx],
            left,
            right,
        };
        
        centroid_idx
    }
    
    let root = build(&mut indices, centroids, &mut nodes, 0);
    (nodes, root)
}

fn search_kd_tree(kd_tree: &[KdNode], root: usize, query: &[f32; 3], best_idx: &mut usize, best_dist: &mut f32) {
    let mut stack = [(0usize, 0usize); 64];
    let mut stack_ptr = 0;
    
    stack[stack_ptr] = (root, 0);
    stack_ptr += 1;
    
    while stack_ptr > 0 {
        stack_ptr -= 1;
        let (mut node_idx, mut depth) = stack[stack_ptr];
        
        while node_idx != usize::MAX {
            let node = &kd_tree[node_idx];
            let axis = depth % 3;
            
            let dist = sq_dist(&node.point, query);
            if dist < *best_dist {
                *best_dist = dist;
                *best_idx = node.centroid_idx;
            }
            
            let diff = query[axis] - node.point[axis];
            let (first, second) = if diff < 0.0 {
                (node.left, node.right)
            } else {
                (node.right, node.left)
            };
            
            if second != usize::MAX && diff * diff < *best_dist {
                stack[stack_ptr] = (second, depth + 1);
                stack_ptr += 1;
            }
            
            node_idx = first;
            depth += 1;
        }
    }
}

fn k_means(points: &[[f32; 3]], num_clusters: usize, max_iters: usize) -> (Vec<[f32; 3]>, Vec<u32>) {
    let n = points.len();
    let k = num_clusters.min(n);
    if k == 0 { return (Vec::new(), Vec::new()); }
    
    let mut centroids = Vec::with_capacity(k);
    for i in 0..k {
        let idx = (i as u64 * n as u64 / k as u64) as usize;
        centroids.push(points[idx]);
    }
    
    let mut assignments = vec![0u32; n];
    let mut counts = vec![0u32; k];
    let mut sums = vec![[0.0f64; 3]; k];
    
    for _iter in 0..max_iters {
        let mut changed = 0;
        counts.fill(0);
        sums.fill([0.0, 0.0, 0.0]);
        
        let (tree, root) = if k > 100 {
            build_kd_tree(&centroids)
        } else {
            (Vec::new(), usize::MAX)
        };
        
        for (i, p) in points.iter().enumerate() {
            let best_idx = if k > 100 {
                let mut best_idx = 0;
                let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
                search_kd_tree(&tree, root, p, &mut best_idx, &mut best_dist);
                best_idx
            } else {
                let mut best_idx = 0;
                let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
                for (c_idx, c) in centroids.iter().enumerate() {
                    let d = sq_dist(p, c);
                    if d < best_dist {
                        best_dist = d;
                        best_idx = c_idx;
                    }
                }
                best_idx
            };
            
            if assignments[i] != best_idx as u32 {
                changed += 1;
                assignments[i] = best_idx as u32;
            }
            
            counts[best_idx] += 1;
            sums[best_idx][0] += p[0] as f64;
            sums[best_idx][1] += p[1] as f64;
            sums[best_idx][2] += p[2] as f64;
        }
        
        if changed == 0 && _iter > 0 {
            break;
        }
        
        for c in 0..k {
            if counts[c] > 0 {
                centroids[c][0] = (sums[c][0] / counts[c] as f64) as f32;
                centroids[c][1] = (sums[c][1] / counts[c] as f64) as f32;
                centroids[c][2] = (sums[c][2] / counts[c] as f64) as f32;
            } else {
                let seed = c.wrapping_mul(1337).wrapping_add(_iter) % n;
                centroids[c] = points[seed];
                changed += 1;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Final assignment pass to ensure exact match with returned centroids
    let (tree, root) = if k > 100 {
        build_kd_tree(&centroids)
    } else {
        (Vec::new(), usize::MAX)
    };
    
    for (i, p) in points.iter().enumerate() {
        let best_idx = if k > 100 {
            let mut best_idx = 0;
            let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
            search_kd_tree(&tree, root, p, &mut best_idx, &mut best_dist);
            best_idx
        } else {
            let mut best_idx = 0;
            let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
            for (c_idx, c) in centroids.iter().enumerate() {
                let d = sq_dist(p, c);
                if d < best_dist {
                    best_dist = d;
                    best_idx = c_idx;
                }
            }
            best_idx
        };
        assignments[i] = best_idx as u32;
    }
    
    // To strictly satisfy "produce exactly N clusters" even in adversarial cases,
    // ensure each index 0..k-1 is present. If missing, force assignment.
    let mut final_counts = vec![0u32; k];
    for &a in &assignments {
        final_counts[a as usize] += 1;
    }
    for c in 0..k {
        if final_counts[c] == 0 && c < n {
            assignments[c] = c as u32;
        }
    }
    
    (centroids, assignments)
}

struct PointReader<R: Read> {
    reader: R,
    byte_buf: Vec<u8>,
}

impl<R: Read> PointReader<R> {
    fn new(reader: R, max_count: usize) -> Self {
        Self {
            reader,
            byte_buf: vec![0u8; max_count * 12],
        }
    }
    
    fn read_points(&mut self, chunk: &mut [[f32; 3]], count: usize) -> bool {
        if count == 0 { return true; }
        let buf = &mut self.byte_buf[..count * 12];
        if self.reader.read_exact(buf).is_err() {
            return false;
        }
        for i in 0..count {
            let offset = i * 12;
            let x = f32::from_le_bytes(buf[offset..offset+4].try_into().unwrap());
            let y = f32::from_le_bytes(buf[offset+4..offset+8].try_into().unwrap());
            let z = f32::from_le_bytes(buf[offset+8..offset+12].try_into().unwrap());
            chunk[i] = [x, y, z];
        }
        true
    }
}

struct AssignmentWriter<W: Write> {
    writer: W,
    byte_buf: Vec<u8>,
}

impl<W: Write> AssignmentWriter<W> {
    fn new(writer: W, max_count: usize) -> Self {
        Self {
            writer,
            byte_buf: vec![0u8; max_count * 4],
        }
    }
    
    fn write_assignments(&mut self, assignments: &[u32]) {
        let count = assignments.len();
        let buf = &mut self.byte_buf[..count * 4];
        for i in 0..count {
            let bytes = assignments[i].to_le_bytes();
            let offset = i * 4;
            buf[offset] = bytes[0];
            buf[offset+1] = bytes[1];
            buf[offset+2] = bytes[2];
            buf[offset+3] = bytes[3];
        }
        self.writer.write_all(buf).unwrap();
    }
}

fn main() {
    let stdin = std::io::stdin();
    let mut reader = BufReader::with_capacity(16 * 1024 * 1024, stdin.lock());
    
    let mut line = String::new();
    if reader.read_line(&mut line).is_err() || line.trim().is_empty() {
        return;
    }
    let parts: Vec<&str> = line.trim().split_whitespace().collect();
    if parts.len() < 2 { return; }
    let num_points: usize = parts[0].parse().unwrap();
    let num_clusters: usize = parts[1].parse().unwrap();
    
    if num_points == 0 || num_clusters == 0 { return; }
    
    let stdout = std::io::stdout();
    let writer = BufWriter::with_capacity(16 * 1024 * 1024, stdout.lock());
    
    const BATCH_SIZE: usize = 5_000_000;
    
    let mut assign_writer = AssignmentWriter::new(writer, BATCH_SIZE);
    let mut pt_reader = PointReader::new(reader, BATCH_SIZE);
    
    let initial_count = num_points.min(BATCH_SIZE);
    let mut initial_points = vec![[0.0; 3]; initial_count];
    if !pt_reader.read_points(&mut initial_points, initial_count) {
        return;
    }
    
    let (mut centroids, initial_assignments) = k_means(&initial_points, num_clusters, 15);
    assign_writer.write_assignments(&initial_assignments);
    
    let remaining_points = num_points - initial_count;
    if remaining_points > 0 {
        let mut total_counts = vec![0u64; num_clusters];
        for &a in &initial_assignments {
            total_counts[a as usize] += 1;
        }
        
        drop(initial_points);
        drop(initial_assignments);
        
        const CHUNK_SIZE: usize = 1_000_000;
        let mut chunk = vec![[0.0; 3]; CHUNK_SIZE];
        let mut chunk_assignments = vec![0u32; CHUNK_SIZE];
        
        let mut points_read = 0;
        while points_read < remaining_points {
            let to_read = (remaining_points - points_read).min(CHUNK_SIZE);
            if !pt_reader.read_points(&mut chunk, to_read) {
                break;
            }
            
            let (tree, root) = if num_clusters > 100 {
                build_kd_tree(&centroids)
            } else {
                (Vec::new(), usize::MAX)
            };
            
            let mut chunk_counts = vec![0u32; num_clusters];
            let mut chunk_sums = vec![[0.0f64; 3]; num_clusters];
            
            for i in 0..to_read {
                let p = &chunk[i];
                let best_idx = if num_clusters > 100 {
                    let mut best_idx = 0;
                    let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
                    search_kd_tree(&tree, root, p, &mut best_idx, &mut best_dist);
                    best_idx
                } else {
                    let mut best_idx = 0;
                    let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
                    for (c_idx, c) in centroids.iter().enumerate() {
                        let d = sq_dist(p, c);
                        if d < best_dist {
                            best_dist = d;
                            best_idx = c_idx;
                        }
                    }
                    best_idx
                };
                
                chunk_assignments[i] = best_idx as u32;
                chunk_counts[best_idx] += 1;
                chunk_sums[best_idx][0] += p[0] as f64;
                chunk_sums[best_idx][1] += p[1] as f64;
                chunk_sums[best_idx][2] += p[2] as f64;
            }
            
            assign_writer.write_assignments(&chunk_assignments[..to_read]);
            
            for c in 0..num_clusters {
                if chunk_counts[c] > 0 {
                    let t_count = total_counts[c] as f64;
                    let c_count = chunk_counts[c] as f64;
                    let total = t_count + c_count;
                    
                    centroids[c][0] = ((centroids[c][0] as f64 * t_count + chunk_sums[c][0]) / total) as f32;
                    centroids[c][1] = ((centroids[c][1] as f64 * t_count + chunk_sums[c][1]) / total) as f32;
                    centroids[c][2] = ((centroids[c][2] as f64 * t_count + chunk_sums[c][2]) / total) as f32;
                    
                    total_counts[c] += chunk_counts[c] as u64;
                }
            }
            
            points_read += to_read;
        }
    }
}

[100K points, 25 clusters] Clusters used: 25/25, WCSS: 3.06e+10, Time: 0.09s

3D Point Clustering - 100K points, 25 clusters

View Rust Code (12214 chars)
use std::io::{BufRead, BufReader, BufWriter, Read, Write};

#[inline(always)]
fn sq_dist(a: &[f32; 3], b: &[f32; 3]) -> f32 {
    let dx = a[0] - b[0];
    let dy = a[1] - b[1];
    let dz = a[2] - b[2];
    dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz
}

#[derive(Clone, Default)]
struct KdNode {
    centroid_idx: usize,
    point: [f32; 3],
    left: usize,
    right: usize,
}

fn build_kd_tree(centroids: &[[f32; 3]]) -> (Vec<KdNode>, usize) {
    let mut nodes = vec![KdNode::default(); centroids.len()];
    let mut indices: Vec<usize> = (0..centroids.len()).collect();
    
    fn build(indices: &mut [usize], centroids: &[[f32; 3]], nodes: &mut [KdNode], depth: usize) -> usize {
        if indices.is_empty() { return usize::MAX; }
        let axis = depth % 3;
        
        indices.sort_unstable_by(|&a, &b| centroids[a][axis].partial_cmp(&centroids[b][axis]).unwrap_or(std::cmp::Ordering::Equal));
        let mid = indices.len() / 2;
        let centroid_idx = indices[mid];
        
        let left = build(&mut indices[..mid], centroids, nodes, depth + 1);
        let right = build(&mut indices[mid + 1..], centroids, nodes, depth + 1);
        
        nodes[centroid_idx] = KdNode {
            centroid_idx,
            point: centroids[centroid_idx],
            left,
            right,
        };
        
        centroid_idx
    }
    
    let root = build(&mut indices, centroids, &mut nodes, 0);
    (nodes, root)
}

fn search_kd_tree(kd_tree: &[KdNode], root: usize, query: &[f32; 3], best_idx: &mut usize, best_dist: &mut f32) {
    let mut stack = [(0usize, 0usize); 64];
    let mut stack_ptr = 0;
    
    stack[stack_ptr] = (root, 0);
    stack_ptr += 1;
    
    while stack_ptr > 0 {
        stack_ptr -= 1;
        let (mut node_idx, mut depth) = stack[stack_ptr];
        
        while node_idx != usize::MAX {
            let node = &kd_tree[node_idx];
            let axis = depth % 3;
            
            let dist = sq_dist(&node.point, query);
            if dist < *best_dist {
                *best_dist = dist;
                *best_idx = node.centroid_idx;
            }
            
            let diff = query[axis] - node.point[axis];
            let (first, second) = if diff < 0.0 {
                (node.left, node.right)
            } else {
                (node.right, node.left)
            };
            
            if second != usize::MAX && diff * diff < *best_dist {
                stack[stack_ptr] = (second, depth + 1);
                stack_ptr += 1;
            }
            
            node_idx = first;
            depth += 1;
        }
    }
}

fn k_means(points: &[[f32; 3]], num_clusters: usize, max_iters: usize) -> (Vec<[f32; 3]>, Vec<u32>) {
    let n = points.len();
    let k = num_clusters.min(n);
    if k == 0 { return (Vec::new(), Vec::new()); }
    
    let mut centroids = Vec::with_capacity(k);
    for i in 0..k {
        let idx = (i as u64 * n as u64 / k as u64) as usize;
        centroids.push(points[idx]);
    }
    
    let mut assignments = vec![0u32; n];
    let mut counts = vec![0u32; k];
    let mut sums = vec![[0.0f64; 3]; k];
    
    for _iter in 0..max_iters {
        let mut changed = 0;
        counts.fill(0);
        sums.fill([0.0, 0.0, 0.0]);
        
        let (tree, root) = if k > 100 {
            build_kd_tree(&centroids)
        } else {
            (Vec::new(), usize::MAX)
        };
        
        for (i, p) in points.iter().enumerate() {
            let best_idx = if k > 100 {
                let mut best_idx = 0;
                let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
                search_kd_tree(&tree, root, p, &mut best_idx, &mut best_dist);
                best_idx
            } else {
                let mut best_idx = 0;
                let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
                for (c_idx, c) in centroids.iter().enumerate() {
                    let d = sq_dist(p, c);
                    if d < best_dist {
                        best_dist = d;
                        best_idx = c_idx;
                    }
                }
                best_idx
            };
            
            if assignments[i] != best_idx as u32 {
                changed += 1;
                assignments[i] = best_idx as u32;
            }
            
            counts[best_idx] += 1;
            sums[best_idx][0] += p[0] as f64;
            sums[best_idx][1] += p[1] as f64;
            sums[best_idx][2] += p[2] as f64;
        }
        
        if changed == 0 && _iter > 0 {
            break;
        }
        
        for c in 0..k {
            if counts[c] > 0 {
                centroids[c][0] = (sums[c][0] / counts[c] as f64) as f32;
                centroids[c][1] = (sums[c][1] / counts[c] as f64) as f32;
                centroids[c][2] = (sums[c][2] / counts[c] as f64) as f32;
            } else {
                let seed = c.wrapping_mul(1337).wrapping_add(_iter) % n;
                centroids[c] = points[seed];
                changed += 1;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Final assignment pass to ensure exact match with returned centroids
    let (tree, root) = if k > 100 {
        build_kd_tree(&centroids)
    } else {
        (Vec::new(), usize::MAX)
    };
    
    for (i, p) in points.iter().enumerate() {
        let best_idx = if k > 100 {
            let mut best_idx = 0;
            let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
            search_kd_tree(&tree, root, p, &mut best_idx, &mut best_dist);
            best_idx
        } else {
            let mut best_idx = 0;
            let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
            for (c_idx, c) in centroids.iter().enumerate() {
                let d = sq_dist(p, c);
                if d < best_dist {
                    best_dist = d;
                    best_idx = c_idx;
                }
            }
            best_idx
        };
        assignments[i] = best_idx as u32;
    }
    
    // To strictly satisfy "produce exactly N clusters" even in adversarial cases,
    // ensure each index 0..k-1 is present. If missing, force assignment.
    let mut final_counts = vec![0u32; k];
    for &a in &assignments {
        final_counts[a as usize] += 1;
    }
    for c in 0..k {
        if final_counts[c] == 0 && c < n {
            assignments[c] = c as u32;
        }
    }
    
    (centroids, assignments)
}

struct PointReader<R: Read> {
    reader: R,
    byte_buf: Vec<u8>,
}

impl<R: Read> PointReader<R> {
    fn new(reader: R, max_count: usize) -> Self {
        Self {
            reader,
            byte_buf: vec![0u8; max_count * 12],
        }
    }
    
    fn read_points(&mut self, chunk: &mut [[f32; 3]], count: usize) -> bool {
        if count == 0 { return true; }
        let buf = &mut self.byte_buf[..count * 12];
        if self.reader.read_exact(buf).is_err() {
            return false;
        }
        for i in 0..count {
            let offset = i * 12;
            let x = f32::from_le_bytes(buf[offset..offset+4].try_into().unwrap());
            let y = f32::from_le_bytes(buf[offset+4..offset+8].try_into().unwrap());
            let z = f32::from_le_bytes(buf[offset+8..offset+12].try_into().unwrap());
            chunk[i] = [x, y, z];
        }
        true
    }
}

struct AssignmentWriter<W: Write> {
    writer: W,
    byte_buf: Vec<u8>,
}

impl<W: Write> AssignmentWriter<W> {
    fn new(writer: W, max_count: usize) -> Self {
        Self {
            writer,
            byte_buf: vec![0u8; max_count * 4],
        }
    }
    
    fn write_assignments(&mut self, assignments: &[u32]) {
        let count = assignments.len();
        let buf = &mut self.byte_buf[..count * 4];
        for i in 0..count {
            let bytes = assignments[i].to_le_bytes();
            let offset = i * 4;
            buf[offset] = bytes[0];
            buf[offset+1] = bytes[1];
            buf[offset+2] = bytes[2];
            buf[offset+3] = bytes[3];
        }
        self.writer.write_all(buf).unwrap();
    }
}

fn main() {
    let stdin = std::io::stdin();
    let mut reader = BufReader::with_capacity(16 * 1024 * 1024, stdin.lock());
    
    let mut line = String::new();
    if reader.read_line(&mut line).is_err() || line.trim().is_empty() {
        return;
    }
    let parts: Vec<&str> = line.trim().split_whitespace().collect();
    if parts.len() < 2 { return; }
    let num_points: usize = parts[0].parse().unwrap();
    let num_clusters: usize = parts[1].parse().unwrap();
    
    if num_points == 0 || num_clusters == 0 { return; }
    
    let stdout = std::io::stdout();
    let writer = BufWriter::with_capacity(16 * 1024 * 1024, stdout.lock());
    
    const BATCH_SIZE: usize = 5_000_000;
    
    let mut assign_writer = AssignmentWriter::new(writer, BATCH_SIZE);
    let mut pt_reader = PointReader::new(reader, BATCH_SIZE);
    
    let initial_count = num_points.min(BATCH_SIZE);
    let mut initial_points = vec![[0.0; 3]; initial_count];
    if !pt_reader.read_points(&mut initial_points, initial_count) {
        return;
    }
    
    let (mut centroids, initial_assignments) = k_means(&initial_points, num_clusters, 15);
    assign_writer.write_assignments(&initial_assignments);
    
    let remaining_points = num_points - initial_count;
    if remaining_points > 0 {
        let mut total_counts = vec![0u64; num_clusters];
        for &a in &initial_assignments {
            total_counts[a as usize] += 1;
        }
        
        drop(initial_points);
        drop(initial_assignments);
        
        const CHUNK_SIZE: usize = 1_000_000;
        let mut chunk = vec![[0.0; 3]; CHUNK_SIZE];
        let mut chunk_assignments = vec![0u32; CHUNK_SIZE];
        
        let mut points_read = 0;
        while points_read < remaining_points {
            let to_read = (remaining_points - points_read).min(CHUNK_SIZE);
            if !pt_reader.read_points(&mut chunk, to_read) {
                break;
            }
            
            let (tree, root) = if num_clusters > 100 {
                build_kd_tree(&centroids)
            } else {
                (Vec::new(), usize::MAX)
            };
            
            let mut chunk_counts = vec![0u32; num_clusters];
            let mut chunk_sums = vec![[0.0f64; 3]; num_clusters];
            
            for i in 0..to_read {
                let p = &chunk[i];
                let best_idx = if num_clusters > 100 {
                    let mut best_idx = 0;
                    let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
                    search_kd_tree(&tree, root, p, &mut best_idx, &mut best_dist);
                    best_idx
                } else {
                    let mut best_idx = 0;
                    let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
                    for (c_idx, c) in centroids.iter().enumerate() {
                        let d = sq_dist(p, c);
                        if d < best_dist {
                            best_dist = d;
                            best_idx = c_idx;
                        }
                    }
                    best_idx
                };
                
                chunk_assignments[i] = best_idx as u32;
                chunk_counts[best_idx] += 1;
                chunk_sums[best_idx][0] += p[0] as f64;
                chunk_sums[best_idx][1] += p[1] as f64;
                chunk_sums[best_idx][2] += p[2] as f64;
            }
            
            assign_writer.write_assignments(&chunk_assignments[..to_read]);
            
            for c in 0..num_clusters {
                if chunk_counts[c] > 0 {
                    let t_count = total_counts[c] as f64;
                    let c_count = chunk_counts[c] as f64;
                    let total = t_count + c_count;
                    
                    centroids[c][0] = ((centroids[c][0] as f64 * t_count + chunk_sums[c][0]) / total) as f32;
                    centroids[c][1] = ((centroids[c][1] as f64 * t_count + chunk_sums[c][1]) / total) as f32;
                    centroids[c][2] = ((centroids[c][2] as f64 * t_count + chunk_sums[c][2]) / total) as f32;
                    
                    total_counts[c] += chunk_counts[c] as u64;
                }
            }
            
            points_read += to_read;
        }
    }
}

3D Point Clustering - 1M points, 50 clusters (~12MB)

View Rust Code (12214 chars)
use std::io::{BufRead, BufReader, BufWriter, Read, Write};

#[inline(always)]
fn sq_dist(a: &[f32; 3], b: &[f32; 3]) -> f32 {
    let dx = a[0] - b[0];
    let dy = a[1] - b[1];
    let dz = a[2] - b[2];
    dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz
}

#[derive(Clone, Default)]
struct KdNode {
    centroid_idx: usize,
    point: [f32; 3],
    left: usize,
    right: usize,
}

fn build_kd_tree(centroids: &[[f32; 3]]) -> (Vec<KdNode>, usize) {
    let mut nodes = vec![KdNode::default(); centroids.len()];
    let mut indices: Vec<usize> = (0..centroids.len()).collect();
    
    fn build(indices: &mut [usize], centroids: &[[f32; 3]], nodes: &mut [KdNode], depth: usize) -> usize {
        if indices.is_empty() { return usize::MAX; }
        let axis = depth % 3;
        
        indices.sort_unstable_by(|&a, &b| centroids[a][axis].partial_cmp(&centroids[b][axis]).unwrap_or(std::cmp::Ordering::Equal));
        let mid = indices.len() / 2;
        let centroid_idx = indices[mid];
        
        let left = build(&mut indices[..mid], centroids, nodes, depth + 1);
        let right = build(&mut indices[mid + 1..], centroids, nodes, depth + 1);
        
        nodes[centroid_idx] = KdNode {
            centroid_idx,
            point: centroids[centroid_idx],
            left,
            right,
        };
        
        centroid_idx
    }
    
    let root = build(&mut indices, centroids, &mut nodes, 0);
    (nodes, root)
}

fn search_kd_tree(kd_tree: &[KdNode], root: usize, query: &[f32; 3], best_idx: &mut usize, best_dist: &mut f32) {
    let mut stack = [(0usize, 0usize); 64];
    let mut stack_ptr = 0;
    
    stack[stack_ptr] = (root, 0);
    stack_ptr += 1;
    
    while stack_ptr > 0 {
        stack_ptr -= 1;
        let (mut node_idx, mut depth) = stack[stack_ptr];
        
        while node_idx != usize::MAX {
            let node = &kd_tree[node_idx];
            let axis = depth % 3;
            
            let dist = sq_dist(&node.point, query);
            if dist < *best_dist {
                *best_dist = dist;
                *best_idx = node.centroid_idx;
            }
            
            let diff = query[axis] - node.point[axis];
            let (first, second) = if diff < 0.0 {
                (node.left, node.right)
            } else {
                (node.right, node.left)
            };
            
            if second != usize::MAX && diff * diff < *best_dist {
                stack[stack_ptr] = (second, depth + 1);
                stack_ptr += 1;
            }
            
            node_idx = first;
            depth += 1;
        }
    }
}

fn k_means(points: &[[f32; 3]], num_clusters: usize, max_iters: usize) -> (Vec<[f32; 3]>, Vec<u32>) {
    let n = points.len();
    let k = num_clusters.min(n);
    if k == 0 { return (Vec::new(), Vec::new()); }
    
    let mut centroids = Vec::with_capacity(k);
    for i in 0..k {
        let idx = (i as u64 * n as u64 / k as u64) as usize;
        centroids.push(points[idx]);
    }
    
    let mut assignments = vec![0u32; n];
    let mut counts = vec![0u32; k];
    let mut sums = vec![[0.0f64; 3]; k];
    
    for _iter in 0..max_iters {
        let mut changed = 0;
        counts.fill(0);
        sums.fill([0.0, 0.0, 0.0]);
        
        let (tree, root) = if k > 100 {
            build_kd_tree(&centroids)
        } else {
            (Vec::new(), usize::MAX)
        };
        
        for (i, p) in points.iter().enumerate() {
            let best_idx = if k > 100 {
                let mut best_idx = 0;
                let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
                search_kd_tree(&tree, root, p, &mut best_idx, &mut best_dist);
                best_idx
            } else {
                let mut best_idx = 0;
                let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
                for (c_idx, c) in centroids.iter().enumerate() {
                    let d = sq_dist(p, c);
                    if d < best_dist {
                        best_dist = d;
                        best_idx = c_idx;
                    }
                }
                best_idx
            };
            
            if assignments[i] != best_idx as u32 {
                changed += 1;
                assignments[i] = best_idx as u32;
            }
            
            counts[best_idx] += 1;
            sums[best_idx][0] += p[0] as f64;
            sums[best_idx][1] += p[1] as f64;
            sums[best_idx][2] += p[2] as f64;
        }
        
        if changed == 0 && _iter > 0 {
            break;
        }
        
        for c in 0..k {
            if counts[c] > 0 {
                centroids[c][0] = (sums[c][0] / counts[c] as f64) as f32;
                centroids[c][1] = (sums[c][1] / counts[c] as f64) as f32;
                centroids[c][2] = (sums[c][2] / counts[c] as f64) as f32;
            } else {
                let seed = c.wrapping_mul(1337).wrapping_add(_iter) % n;
                centroids[c] = points[seed];
                changed += 1;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Final assignment pass to ensure exact match with returned centroids
    let (tree, root) = if k > 100 {
        build_kd_tree(&centroids)
    } else {
        (Vec::new(), usize::MAX)
    };
    
    for (i, p) in points.iter().enumerate() {
        let best_idx = if k > 100 {
            let mut best_idx = 0;
            let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
            search_kd_tree(&tree, root, p, &mut best_idx, &mut best_dist);
            best_idx
        } else {
            let mut best_idx = 0;
            let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
            for (c_idx, c) in centroids.iter().enumerate() {
                let d = sq_dist(p, c);
                if d < best_dist {
                    best_dist = d;
                    best_idx = c_idx;
                }
            }
            best_idx
        };
        assignments[i] = best_idx as u32;
    }
    
    // To strictly satisfy "produce exactly N clusters" even in adversarial cases,
    // ensure each index 0..k-1 is present. If missing, force assignment.
    let mut final_counts = vec![0u32; k];
    for &a in &assignments {
        final_counts[a as usize] += 1;
    }
    for c in 0..k {
        if final_counts[c] == 0 && c < n {
            assignments[c] = c as u32;
        }
    }
    
    (centroids, assignments)
}

struct PointReader<R: Read> {
    reader: R,
    byte_buf: Vec<u8>,
}

impl<R: Read> PointReader<R> {
    fn new(reader: R, max_count: usize) -> Self {
        Self {
            reader,
            byte_buf: vec![0u8; max_count * 12],
        }
    }
    
    fn read_points(&mut self, chunk: &mut [[f32; 3]], count: usize) -> bool {
        if count == 0 { return true; }
        let buf = &mut self.byte_buf[..count * 12];
        if self.reader.read_exact(buf).is_err() {
            return false;
        }
        for i in 0..count {
            let offset = i * 12;
            let x = f32::from_le_bytes(buf[offset..offset+4].try_into().unwrap());
            let y = f32::from_le_bytes(buf[offset+4..offset+8].try_into().unwrap());
            let z = f32::from_le_bytes(buf[offset+8..offset+12].try_into().unwrap());
            chunk[i] = [x, y, z];
        }
        true
    }
}

struct AssignmentWriter<W: Write> {
    writer: W,
    byte_buf: Vec<u8>,
}

impl<W: Write> AssignmentWriter<W> {
    fn new(writer: W, max_count: usize) -> Self {
        Self {
            writer,
            byte_buf: vec![0u8; max_count * 4],
        }
    }
    
    fn write_assignments(&mut self, assignments: &[u32]) {
        let count = assignments.len();
        let buf = &mut self.byte_buf[..count * 4];
        for i in 0..count {
            let bytes = assignments[i].to_le_bytes();
            let offset = i * 4;
            buf[offset] = bytes[0];
            buf[offset+1] = bytes[1];
            buf[offset+2] = bytes[2];
            buf[offset+3] = bytes[3];
        }
        self.writer.write_all(buf).unwrap();
    }
}

fn main() {
    let stdin = std::io::stdin();
    let mut reader = BufReader::with_capacity(16 * 1024 * 1024, stdin.lock());
    
    let mut line = String::new();
    if reader.read_line(&mut line).is_err() || line.trim().is_empty() {
        return;
    }
    let parts: Vec<&str> = line.trim().split_whitespace().collect();
    if parts.len() < 2 { return; }
    let num_points: usize = parts[0].parse().unwrap();
    let num_clusters: usize = parts[1].parse().unwrap();
    
    if num_points == 0 || num_clusters == 0 { return; }
    
    let stdout = std::io::stdout();
    let writer = BufWriter::with_capacity(16 * 1024 * 1024, stdout.lock());
    
    const BATCH_SIZE: usize = 5_000_000;
    
    let mut assign_writer = AssignmentWriter::new(writer, BATCH_SIZE);
    let mut pt_reader = PointReader::new(reader, BATCH_SIZE);
    
    let initial_count = num_points.min(BATCH_SIZE);
    let mut initial_points = vec![[0.0; 3]; initial_count];
    if !pt_reader.read_points(&mut initial_points, initial_count) {
        return;
    }
    
    let (mut centroids, initial_assignments) = k_means(&initial_points, num_clusters, 15);
    assign_writer.write_assignments(&initial_assignments);
    
    let remaining_points = num_points - initial_count;
    if remaining_points > 0 {
        let mut total_counts = vec![0u64; num_clusters];
        for &a in &initial_assignments {
            total_counts[a as usize] += 1;
        }
        
        drop(initial_points);
        drop(initial_assignments);
        
        const CHUNK_SIZE: usize = 1_000_000;
        let mut chunk = vec![[0.0; 3]; CHUNK_SIZE];
        let mut chunk_assignments = vec![0u32; CHUNK_SIZE];
        
        let mut points_read = 0;
        while points_read < remaining_points {
            let to_read = (remaining_points - points_read).min(CHUNK_SIZE);
            if !pt_reader.read_points(&mut chunk, to_read) {
                break;
            }
            
            let (tree, root) = if num_clusters > 100 {
                build_kd_tree(&centroids)
            } else {
                (Vec::new(), usize::MAX)
            };
            
            let mut chunk_counts = vec![0u32; num_clusters];
            let mut chunk_sums = vec![[0.0f64; 3]; num_clusters];
            
            for i in 0..to_read {
                let p = &chunk[i];
                let best_idx = if num_clusters > 100 {
                    let mut best_idx = 0;
                    let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
                    search_kd_tree(&tree, root, p, &mut best_idx, &mut best_dist);
                    best_idx
                } else {
                    let mut best_idx = 0;
                    let mut best_dist = f32::MAX;
                    for (c_idx, c) in centroids.iter().enumerate() {
                        let d = sq_dist(p, c);
                        if d < best_dist {
                            best_dist = d;
                            best_idx = c_idx;
                        }
                    }
                    best_idx
                };
                
                chunk_assignments[i] = best_idx as u32;
                chunk_counts[best_idx] += 1;
                chunk_sums[best_idx][0] += p[0] as f64;
                chunk_sums[best_idx][1] += p[1] as f64;
                chunk_sums[best_idx][2] += p[2] as f64;
            }
            
            assign_writer.write_assignments(&chunk_assignments[..to_read]);
            
            for c in 0..num_clusters {
                if chunk_counts[c] > 0 {
                    let t_count = total_counts[c] as f64;
                    let c_count = chunk_counts[c] as f64;
                    let total = t_count + c_count;
                    
                    centroids[c][0] = ((centroids[c][0] as f64 * t_count + chunk_sums[c][0]) / total) as f32;
                    centroids[c][1] = ((centroids[c][1] as f64 * t_count + chunk_sums[c][1]) / total) as f32;
                    centroids[c][2] = ((centroids[c][2] as f64 * t_count + chunk_sums[c][2]) / total) as f32;
                    
                    total_counts[c] += chunk_counts[c] as u64;
                }
            }
            
            points_read += to_read;
        }
    }
}
📊 Clustering Diagram
Subpass 3
Subpass configurationView exact prompt
