View C# Code (14826 chars)
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Threading;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;

class Program {
    static volatile bool timeout = false;
    static Stopwatch sw = Stopwatch.StartNew();
    
    static int N, M;
    static int[][] adj;
    
    static volatile int best_clique_size = 0;
    static int[] best_clique = new int[0];
    static object best_clique_lock = new object();

    static class FastIO {
        static byte[] buffer = new byte[1024 * 1024];
        static int pos = 0;
        static int len = 0;
        static Stream stream;

        public static void Init(Stream s) {
            stream = s;
        }

        [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
        static void ReadMore() {
            if (pos >= len) {
                len = stream.Read(buffer, 0, buffer.Length);
                pos = 0;
            }
        }

        [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
        public static int NextInt() {
            ReadMore();
            if (len == 0) return -1;
            while (buffer[pos] < '0' || buffer[pos] > '9') {
                pos++;
                ReadMore();
                if (len == 0) return -1;
            }
            int res = 0;
            while (pos < len && buffer[pos] >= '0' && buffer[pos] <= '9') {
                res = res * 10 + (buffer[pos] - '0');
                pos++;
                if (pos >= len) ReadMore();
            }
            return res;
        }
    }

    class ThreadState {
        public int[] gen;
        public int current_gen;
        public int[] color_mark;
        public int color_mark_gen;
        public int[] color_count;
        public int[] color_start;
        public int[] stack_P;
        public int[] stack_colors;
        public int[] stack_P_sorted;
        public int[] stack_colors_sorted;

        public ThreadState(int N) {
            gen = new int[N];
            color_mark = new int[N + 2];
            color_count = new int[N + 2];
            color_start = new int[N + 2];
            stack_P = new int[1024];
            stack_colors = new int[1024];
            stack_P_sorted = new int[1024];
            stack_colors_sorted = new int[1024];
        }

        public void EnsureCapacity(int required) {
            if (stack_P.Length < required) {
                int newSize = Math.Max(required, stack_P.Length * 2);
                Array.Resize(ref stack_P, newSize);
                Array.Resize(ref stack_colors, newSize);
                Array.Resize(ref stack_P_sorted, newSize);
                Array.Resize(ref stack_colors_sorted, newSize);
            }
        }
    }

    static void Search(int[] C, int c_len, int p_offset, int p_len, ThreadState state, int current_offset) {
        if (timeout) return;
        if (c_len > best_clique_size) {
            lock (best_clique_lock) {
                if (c_len > best_clique_size) {
                    best_clique_size = c_len;
                    best_clique = new int[c_len];
                    Array.Copy(C, best_clique, c_len);
                }
            }
        }
        if (p_len == 0) return;

        state.EnsureCapacity(current_offset + p_len);

        int max_color = 0;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < p_len; i++) {
            int v = state.stack_P[p_offset + i];
            
            if (state.current_gen >= 2000000000) {
                Array.Clear(state.gen, 0, state.gen.Length);
                state.current_gen = 0;
            }
            state.current_gen++;
            foreach (int u in adj[v]) {
                state.gen[u] = state.current_gen;
            }

            if (state.color_mark_gen >= 2000000000) {
                Array.Clear(state.color_mark, 0, state.color_mark.Length);
                state.color_mark_gen = 0;
            }
            state.color_mark_gen++;
            for (int j = 0; j < i; j++) {
                int u = state.stack_P[p_offset + j];
                if (state.gen[u] == state.current_gen) {
                    state.color_mark[state.stack_colors[current_offset + j]] = state.color_mark_gen;
                }
            }
            
            int c = 1;
            while (state.color_mark[c] == state.color_mark_gen) c++;
            state.stack_colors[current_offset + i] = c;
            if (c > max_color) max_color = c;
        }

        Array.Clear(state.color_count, 1, max_color);
        for (int i = 0; i < p_len; i++) {
            state.color_count[state.stack_colors[current_offset + i]]++;
        }
        state.color_start[1] = 0;
        for (int c = 2; c <= max_color; c++) {
            state.color_start[c] = state.color_start[c - 1] + state.color_count[c - 1];
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < p_len; i++) {
            int v = state.stack_P[p_offset + i];
            int c = state.stack_colors[current_offset + i];
            int pos = current_offset + state.color_start[c]++;
            state.stack_P_sorted[pos] = v;
            state.stack_colors_sorted[pos] = c;
        }

        for (int i = p_len - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (timeout) return;
            int v = state.stack_P_sorted[current_offset + i];
            int c = state.stack_colors_sorted[current_offset + i];

            if (c_len + c <= best_clique_size) {
                break;
            }

            if (state.current_gen >= 2000000000) {
                Array.Clear(state.gen, 0, state.gen.Length);
                state.current_gen = 0;
            }
            state.current_gen++;
            foreach (int u in adj[v]) {
                state.gen[u] = state.current_gen;
            }
            
            int p_next_len = 0;
            int next_p_offset = current_offset + p_len;
            state.EnsureCapacity(next_p_offset + i);
            
            for (int j = 0; j < i; j++) {
                int u = state.stack_P_sorted[current_offset + j];
                if (state.gen[u] == state.current_gen) {
                    state.stack_P[next_p_offset + p_next_len++] = u;
                }
            }

            C[c_len] = v;
            Search(C, c_len + 1, next_p_offset, p_next_len, state, next_p_offset + p_next_len);
        }
    }

    static void Main(string[] args) {
        Thread timerThread = new Thread(() => {
            while (sw.ElapsedMilliseconds < 290000) {
                Thread.Sleep(100);
            }
            timeout = true;
        });
        timerThread.IsBackground = true;
        timerThread.Start();

        FastIO.Init(Console.OpenStandardInput());
        N = FastIO.NextInt();
        if (N == -1) return;
        M = FastIO.NextInt();

        if (N == 0) {
            Console.WriteLine(0);
            Console.WriteLine();
            return;
        }

        int[] U = new int[M];
        int[] V = new int[M];
        int[] deg = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < M; i++) {
            U[i] = FastIO.NextInt();
            V[i] = FastIO.NextInt();
            deg[U[i]]++;
            deg[V[i]]++;
        }

        adj = new int[N][];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) adj[i] = new int[deg[i]];
        int[] count = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < M; i++) {
            int u = U[i], v = V[i];
            adj[u][count[u]++] = v;
            adj[v][count[v]++] = u;
        }
        U = null; V = null; GC.Collect();

        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
            if (adj[i].Length > 0) {
                Array.Sort(adj[i]);
                int unique = 1;
                for (int j = 1; j < adj[i].Length; j++) {
                    if (adj[i][j] != adj[i][j - 1]) adj[i][unique++] = adj[i][j];
                }
                int final_len = 0;
                for (int j = 0; j < unique; j++) {
                    if (adj[i][j] != i) adj[i][final_len++] = adj[i][j];
                }
                if (final_len != adj[i].Length) Array.Resize(ref adj[i], final_len);
                deg[i] = adj[i].Length;
            }
        }

        int[] head = new int[N];
        int[] next = new int[N];
        int[] prev = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) head[i] = -1;

        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
            int d = deg[i];
            next[i] = head[d];
            if (head[d] != -1) prev[head[d]] = i;
            prev[i] = -1;
            head[d] = i;
        }

        int min_deg = 0;
        int[] degeneracy_order = new int[N];
        int order_idx = 0;
        bool[] removed = new bool[N];
        int[] new_deg = new int[N];
        Array.Copy(deg, new_deg, N);

        for (int step = 0; step < N; step++) {
            while (min_deg < N && head[min_deg] == -1) min_deg++;
            if (min_deg == N) break;
            int v = head[min_deg];
            
            head[min_deg] = next[v];
            if (head[min_deg] != -1) prev[head[min_deg]] = -1;
            
            degeneracy_order[order_idx++] = v;
            removed[v] = true;
            
            foreach (int u in adj[v]) {
                if (!removed[u]) {
                    int d = new_deg[u];
                    if (prev[u] != -1) next[prev[u]] = next[u];
                    else head[d] = next[u];
                    if (next[u] != -1) prev[next[u]] = prev[u];
                    
                    new_deg[u]--;
                    d--;
                    
                    next[u] = head[d];
                    if (head[d] != -1) prev[head[d]] = u;
                    prev[u] = -1;
                    head[d] = u;
                    
                    if (d < min_deg) min_deg = d;
                }
            }
        }

        int[] oldToNew = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) oldToNew[degeneracy_order[i]] = i;

        int[][] new_adj = new int[N][];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
            int u = degeneracy_order[i]; 
            int[] neighbors = adj[u];
            new_adj[i] = new int[neighbors.Length];
            for (int j = 0; j < neighbors.Length; j++) {
                new_adj[i][j] = oldToNew[neighbors[j]];
            }
            Array.Sort(new_adj[i]);
        }
        adj = new_adj;

        int h_count = Math.Min(N, 1000);
        int[] h_gen = new int[N];
        int h_current_gen = 0;
        for (int start = N - 1; start >= N - h_count; start--) {
            int[] C = new int[N];
            int c_len = 0;
            C[c_len++] = start;
            
            h_current_gen++;
            foreach (int u in adj[start]) h_gen[u] = h_current_gen;

            for (int i = N - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (i == start) continue;
                int v = i;
                if (h_gen[v] == h_current_gen) {
                    bool ok = true;
                    for (int j = 1; j < c_len; j++) {
                        if (Array.BinarySearch(adj[v], C[j]) < 0) {
                            ok = false;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    if (ok) C[c_len++] = v;
                }
            }
            if (c_len > best_clique_size) {
                best_clique_size = c_len;
                best_clique = new int[c_len];
                Array.Copy(C, best_clique, c_len);
            }
        }

        int[] P_top = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) P_top[i] = i;

        ThreadState topState = new ThreadState(N);
        int max_color_top = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
            int v = P_top[i];
            topState.current_gen++;
            foreach (int u in adj[v]) topState.gen[u] = topState.current_gen;

            topState.color_mark_gen++;
            for (int j = 0; j < i; j++) {
                int u = P_top[j];
                if (topState.gen[u] == topState.current_gen) {
                    topState.color_mark[topState.stack_colors[j]] = topState.color_mark_gen;
                }
            }
            int c = 1;
            while (topState.color_mark[c] == topState.color_mark_gen) c++;
            topState.stack_colors[i] = c;
            if (c > max_color_top) max_color_top = c;
        }

        Array.Clear(topState.color_count, 1, max_color_top);
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) topState.color_count[topState.stack_colors[i]]++;
        topState.color_start[1] = 0;
        for (int c = 2; c <= max_color_top; c++) topState.color_start[c] = topState.color_start[c - 1] + topState.color_count[c - 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
            int v = P_top[i];
            int c = topState.stack_colors[i];
            int pos = topState.color_start[c]++;
            topState.stack_P_sorted[pos] = v;
            topState.stack_colors_sorted[pos] = c;
        }

        int active_threads = Environment.ProcessorCount;
        if (active_threads < 1) active_threads = 1;
        Thread[] threads = new Thread[active_threads];
        int top_idx = N;

        for (int t = 0; t < active_threads; t++) {
            threads[t] = new Thread(() => {
                ThreadState state = new ThreadState(N);
                int[] C = new int[N]; 

                while (!timeout) {
                    int i = Interlocked.Decrement(ref top_idx);
                    if (i < 0) break;

                    int v = topState.stack_P_sorted[i];
                    int c = topState.stack_colors_sorted[i];

                    if (1 + c <= best_clique_size) {
                        Interlocked.Exchange(ref top_idx, -1);
                        break;
                    }

                    if (state.current_gen >= 2000000000) {
                        Array.Clear(state.gen, 0, state.gen.Length);
                        state.current_gen = 0;
                    }
                    state.current_gen++;
                    foreach (int u in adj[v]) state.gen[u] = state.current_gen;

                    int p_next_len = 0;
                    state.EnsureCapacity(i);
                    
                    for (int j = 0; j < i; j++) {
                        int u = topState.stack_P_sorted[j];
                        if (state.gen[u] == state.current_gen) {
                            state.stack_P[p_next_len++] = u;
                        }
                    }

                    C[0] = v;
                    Search(C, 1, 0, p_next_len, state, p_next_len);
                }
            }, 1024 * 1024 * 64);
            threads[t].Start();
        }

        foreach (var t in threads) t.Join();

        int[] final_clique = new int[best_clique_size];
        for (int i = 0; i < best_clique_size; i++) {
            final_clique[i] = degeneracy_order[best_clique[i]];
        }
        Array.Sort(final_clique);
        Console.WriteLine(best_clique_size);
        Console.WriteLine(string.Join(" ", final_clique));
    }
}
Subpass 11
Subpass configurationView exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought
 0.0000
Runtime error:
Unhandled Exception: System.IndexOutOfRangeException: Index was outside the bounds of the array.
at Program.Main(String[] args)

Maximum Clique - 5K vertices (~625K edges)

View C# Code (14826 chars)
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Threading;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;

class Program {
    static volatile bool timeout = false;
    static Stopwatch sw = Stopwatch.StartNew();
    
    static int N, M;
    static int[][] adj;
    
    static volatile int best_clique_size = 0;
    static int[] best_clique = new int[0];
    static object best_clique_lock = new object();

    static class FastIO {
        static byte[] buffer = new byte[1024 * 1024];
        static int pos = 0;
        static int len = 0;
        static Stream stream;

        public static void Init(Stream s) {
            stream = s;
        }

        [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
        static void ReadMore() {
            if (pos >= len) {
                len = stream.Read(buffer, 0, buffer.Length);
                pos = 0;
            }
        }

        [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
        public static int NextInt() {
            ReadMore();
            if (len == 0) return -1;
            while (buffer[pos] < '0' || buffer[pos] > '9') {
                pos++;
                ReadMore();
                if (len == 0) return -1;
            }
            int res = 0;
            while (pos < len && buffer[pos] >= '0' && buffer[pos] <= '9') {
                res = res * 10 + (buffer[pos] - '0');
                pos++;
                if (pos >= len) ReadMore();
            }
            return res;
        }
    }

    class ThreadState {
        public int[] gen;
        public int current_gen;
        public int[] color_mark;
        public int color_mark_gen;
        public int[] color_count;
        public int[] color_start;
        public int[] stack_P;
        public int[] stack_colors;
        public int[] stack_P_sorted;
        public int[] stack_colors_sorted;

        public ThreadState(int N) {
            gen = new int[N];
            color_mark = new int[N + 2];
            color_count = new int[N + 2];
            color_start = new int[N + 2];
            stack_P = new int[1024];
            stack_colors = new int[1024];
            stack_P_sorted = new int[1024];
            stack_colors_sorted = new int[1024];
        }

        public void EnsureCapacity(int required) {
            if (stack_P.Length < required) {
                int newSize = Math.Max(required, stack_P.Length * 2);
                Array.Resize(ref stack_P, newSize);
                Array.Resize(ref stack_colors, newSize);
                Array.Resize(ref stack_P_sorted, newSize);
                Array.Resize(ref stack_colors_sorted, newSize);
            }
        }
    }

    static void Search(int[] C, int c_len, int p_offset, int p_len, ThreadState state, int current_offset) {
        if (timeout) return;
        if (c_len > best_clique_size) {
            lock (best_clique_lock) {
                if (c_len > best_clique_size) {
                    best_clique_size = c_len;
                    best_clique = new int[c_len];
                    Array.Copy(C, best_clique, c_len);
                }
            }
        }
        if (p_len == 0) return;

        state.EnsureCapacity(current_offset + p_len);

        int max_color = 0;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < p_len; i++) {
            int v = state.stack_P[p_offset + i];
            
            if (state.current_gen >= 2000000000) {
                Array.Clear(state.gen, 0, state.gen.Length);
                state.current_gen = 0;
            }
            state.current_gen++;
            foreach (int u in adj[v]) {
                state.gen[u] = state.current_gen;
            }

            if (state.color_mark_gen >= 2000000000) {
                Array.Clear(state.color_mark, 0, state.color_mark.Length);
                state.color_mark_gen = 0;
            }
            state.color_mark_gen++;
            for (int j = 0; j < i; j++) {
                int u = state.stack_P[p_offset + j];
                if (state.gen[u] == state.current_gen) {
                    state.color_mark[state.stack_colors[current_offset + j]] = state.color_mark_gen;
                }
            }
            
            int c = 1;
            while (state.color_mark[c] == state.color_mark_gen) c++;
            state.stack_colors[current_offset + i] = c;
            if (c > max_color) max_color = c;
        }

        Array.Clear(state.color_count, 1, max_color);
        for (int i = 0; i < p_len; i++) {
            state.color_count[state.stack_colors[current_offset + i]]++;
        }
        state.color_start[1] = 0;
        for (int c = 2; c <= max_color; c++) {
            state.color_start[c] = state.color_start[c - 1] + state.color_count[c - 1];
        }
        for (int i = 0; i < p_len; i++) {
            int v = state.stack_P[p_offset + i];
            int c = state.stack_colors[current_offset + i];
            int pos = current_offset + state.color_start[c]++;
            state.stack_P_sorted[pos] = v;
            state.stack_colors_sorted[pos] = c;
        }

        for (int i = p_len - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            if (timeout) return;
            int v = state.stack_P_sorted[current_offset + i];
            int c = state.stack_colors_sorted[current_offset + i];

            if (c_len + c <= best_clique_size) {
                break;
            }

            if (state.current_gen >= 2000000000) {
                Array.Clear(state.gen, 0, state.gen.Length);
                state.current_gen = 0;
            }
            state.current_gen++;
            foreach (int u in adj[v]) {
                state.gen[u] = state.current_gen;
            }
            
            int p_next_len = 0;
            int next_p_offset = current_offset + p_len;
            state.EnsureCapacity(next_p_offset + i);
            
            for (int j = 0; j < i; j++) {
                int u = state.stack_P_sorted[current_offset + j];
                if (state.gen[u] == state.current_gen) {
                    state.stack_P[next_p_offset + p_next_len++] = u;
                }
            }

            C[c_len] = v;
            Search(C, c_len + 1, next_p_offset, p_next_len, state, next_p_offset + p_next_len);
        }
    }

    static void Main(string[] args) {
        Thread timerThread = new Thread(() => {
            while (sw.ElapsedMilliseconds < 290000) {
                Thread.Sleep(100);
            }
            timeout = true;
        });
        timerThread.IsBackground = true;
        timerThread.Start();

        FastIO.Init(Console.OpenStandardInput());
        N = FastIO.NextInt();
        if (N == -1) return;
        M = FastIO.NextInt();

        if (N == 0) {
            Console.WriteLine(0);
            Console.WriteLine();
            return;
        }

        int[] U = new int[M];
        int[] V = new int[M];
        int[] deg = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < M; i++) {
            U[i] = FastIO.NextInt();
            V[i] = FastIO.NextInt();
            deg[U[i]]++;
            deg[V[i]]++;
        }

        adj = new int[N][];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) adj[i] = new int[deg[i]];
        int[] count = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < M; i++) {
            int u = U[i], v = V[i];
            adj[u][count[u]++] = v;
            adj[v][count[v]++] = u;
        }
        U = null; V = null; GC.Collect();

        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
            if (adj[i].Length > 0) {
                Array.Sort(adj[i]);
                int unique = 1;
                for (int j = 1; j < adj[i].Length; j++) {
                    if (adj[i][j] != adj[i][j - 1]) adj[i][unique++] = adj[i][j];
                }
                int final_len = 0;
                for (int j = 0; j < unique; j++) {
                    if (adj[i][j] != i) adj[i][final_len++] = adj[i][j];
                }
                if (final_len != adj[i].Length) Array.Resize(ref adj[i], final_len);
                deg[i] = adj[i].Length;
            }
        }

        int[] head = new int[N];
        int[] next = new int[N];
        int[] prev = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) head[i] = -1;

        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
            int d = deg[i];
            next[i] = head[d];
            if (head[d] != -1) prev[head[d]] = i;
            prev[i] = -1;
            head[d] = i;
        }

        int min_deg = 0;
        int[] degeneracy_order = new int[N];
        int order_idx = 0;
        bool[] removed = new bool[N];
        int[] new_deg = new int[N];
        Array.Copy(deg, new_deg, N);

        for (int step = 0; step < N; step++) {
            while (min_deg < N && head[min_deg] == -1) min_deg++;
            if (min_deg == N) break;
            int v = head[min_deg];
            
            head[min_deg] = next[v];
            if (head[min_deg] != -1) prev[head[min_deg]] = -1;
            
            degeneracy_order[order_idx++] = v;
            removed[v] = true;
            
            foreach (int u in adj[v]) {
                if (!removed[u]) {
                    int d = new_deg[u];
                    if (prev[u] != -1) next[prev[u]] = next[u];
                    else head[d] = next[u];
                    if (next[u] != -1) prev[next[u]] = prev[u];
                    
                    new_deg[u]--;
                    d--;
                    
                    next[u] = head[d];
                    if (head[d] != -1) prev[head[d]] = u;
                    prev[u] = -1;
                    head[d] = u;
                    
                    if (d < min_deg) min_deg = d;
                }
            }
        }

        int[] oldToNew = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) oldToNew[degeneracy_order[i]] = i;

        int[][] new_adj = new int[N][];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
            int u = degeneracy_order[i]; 
            int[] neighbors = adj[u];
            new_adj[i] = new int[neighbors.Length];
            for (int j = 0; j < neighbors.Length; j++) {
                new_adj[i][j] = oldToNew[neighbors[j]];
            }
            Array.Sort(new_adj[i]);
        }
        adj = new_adj;

        int h_count = Math.Min(N, 1000);
        int[] h_gen = new int[N];
        int h_current_gen = 0;
        for (int start = N - 1; start >= N - h_count; start--) {
            int[] C = new int[N];
            int c_len = 0;
            C[c_len++] = start;
            
            h_current_gen++;
            foreach (int u in adj[start]) h_gen[u] = h_current_gen;

            for (int i = N - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (i == start) continue;
                int v = i;
                if (h_gen[v] == h_current_gen) {
                    bool ok = true;
                    for (int j = 1; j < c_len; j++) {
                        if (Array.BinarySearch(adj[v], C[j]) < 0) {
                            ok = false;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    if (ok) C[c_len++] = v;
                }
            }
            if (c_len > best_clique_size) {
                best_clique_size = c_len;
                best_clique = new int[c_len];
                Array.Copy(C, best_clique, c_len);
            }
        }

        int[] P_top = new int[N];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) P_top[i] = i;

        ThreadState topState = new ThreadState(N);
        int max_color_top = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
            int v = P_top[i];
            topState.current_gen++;
            foreach (int u in adj[v]) topState.gen[u] = topState.current_gen;

            topState.color_mark_gen++;
            for (int j = 0; j < i; j++) {
                int u = P_top[j];
                if (topState.gen[u] == topState.current_gen) {
                    topState.color_mark[topState.stack_colors[j]] = topState.color_mark_gen;
                }
            }
            int c = 1;
            while (topState.color_mark[c] == topState.color_mark_gen) c++;
            topState.stack_colors[i] = c;
            if (c > max_color_top) max_color_top = c;
        }

        Array.Clear(topState.color_count, 1, max_color_top);
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) topState.color_count[topState.stack_colors[i]]++;
        topState.color_start[1] = 0;
        for (int c = 2; c <= max_color_top; c++) topState.color_start[c] = topState.color_start[c - 1] + topState.color_count[c - 1];
        for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {
            int v = P_top[i];
            int c = topState.stack_colors[i];
            int pos = topState.color_start[c]++;
            topState.stack_P_sorted[pos] = v;
            topState.stack_colors_sorted[pos] = c;
        }

        int active_threads = Environment.ProcessorCount;
        if (active_threads < 1) active_threads = 1;
        Thread[] threads = new Thread[active_threads];
        int top_idx = N;

        for (int t = 0; t < active_threads; t++) {
            threads[t] = new Thread(() => {
                ThreadState state = new ThreadState(N);
                int[] C = new int[N]; 

                while (!timeout) {
                    int i = Interlocked.Decrement(ref top_idx);
                    if (i < 0) break;

                    int v = topState.stack_P_sorted[i];
                    int c = topState.stack_colors_sorted[i];

                    if (1 + c <= best_clique_size) {
                        Interlocked.Exchange(ref top_idx, -1);
                        break;
                    }

                    if (state.current_gen >= 2000000000) {
                        Array.Clear(state.gen, 0, state.gen.Length);
                        state.current_gen = 0;
                    }
                    state.current_gen++;
                    foreach (int u in adj[v]) state.gen[u] = state.current_gen;

                    int p_next_len = 0;
                    state.EnsureCapacity(i);
                    
                    for (int j = 0; j < i; j++) {
                        int u = topState.stack_P_sorted[j];
                        if (state.gen[u] == state.current_gen) {
                            state.stack_P[p_next_len++] = u;
                        }
                    }

                    C[0] = v;
                    Search(C, 1, 0, p_next_len, state, p_next_len);
                }
            }, 1024 * 1024 * 64);
            threads[t].Start();
        }

        foreach (var t in threads) t.Join();

        int[] final_clique = new int[best_clique_size];
        for (int i = 0; i < best_clique_size; i++) {
            final_clique[i] = degeneracy_order[best_clique[i]];
        }
        Array.Sort(final_clique);
        Console.WriteLine(best_clique_size);
        Console.WriteLine(string.Join(" ", final_clique));
    }
}

Test 30: 3-SAT Solver (Python) Score: 1.00 / 17
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Python code to solve the 3-SAT (Boolean Satisfiability) problem, which is NP-Complete.

**What is 3-SAT?**
You have N boolean variables (x1, x2, ..., xN), each of which is either True or False.
You are given M "clauses". Each clause is a constraint containing exactly 3 "literals".
A literal is either:
- A positive integer (e.g. 5) meaning "variable 5 must be True", or
- A negative integer (e.g. -5) meaning "variable 5 must be False".

A clause is **satisfied** if ANY of its 3 literals evaluates to True.
The formula is **satisfiable** if ALL clauses can be satisfied simultaneously
by some assignment of True/False to the variables.

**Example:**
Variables: x1, x2, x3
Clause "1 -2 3" means: x1=True OR x2=False OR x3=True.
If x1=True, x2=True, x3=False → clause satisfied (x1=True is enough).

Your task: find an assignment of True/False to every variable that satisfies
every clause. All test instances are guaranteed to be satisfiable.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
num_variables num_clauses
lit1 lit2 lit3
lit1 lit2 lit3
...
```
Variables are 1-indexed. Negative literals mean negation.

**Output format (stdout):**
```
SAT
v1 v2 v3 ... vN
```
Where each vi is 1 (True) or 0 (False) for variable i, space-separated.

**Grading:**
- Output "SAT" on the first line, then the assignment on the second line.
- Every clause must be satisfied by your assignment.
- Timeouts, crashes, wrong format, or unsatisfied clauses all score 0.

**Requirements:**
1. Read from stdin, write to stdout.
2. Handle up to 20M variables and 85M clauses.
3. Complete within 5 minutes.

Write complete, runnable Python code.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)

View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Given a logic puzzle made of true/false variables — where each rule says “at least one of these three things must be true” and all rules must hold simultaneously — find an assignment that satisfies every rule.

This is the classic 3-SAT problem, one of the first problems proven to be NP-complete. Every test instance has a hidden satisfying assignment the AI must discover. Subpasses increase the number of variables and clauses.

 1.0000
[20 vars, 85 clauses] All 85 clauses satisfied, 0.40s

3-SAT Solver - 20 vars, 85 clauses

View Python Code (6099 chars)
import sys

def solve():
    def get_ints():
        for line in sys.stdin:
            for token in line.split():
                yield int(token)
    
    tokens = get_ints()
    try:
        num_vars = next(tokens)
        num_clauses = next(tokens)
    except StopIteration:
        return

    try:
        clauses = memoryview(bytearray(num_clauses * 3 * 4)).cast('i')
    except MemoryError:
        print("UNSAT")
        return
        
    idx = 0
    for _ in range(num_clauses):
        clauses[idx] = next(tokens)
        clauses[idx+1] = next(tokens)
        clauses[idx+2] = next(tokens)
        idx += 3

    watch_head = memoryview(bytearray((2 * num_vars + 1) * 4)).cast('i')
    for i in range(2 * num_vars + 1):
        watch_head[i] = -1
        
    watch_next = memoryview(bytearray(num_clauses * 2 * 4)).cast('i')
    watch_clause = memoryview(bytearray(num_clauses * 2 * 4)).cast('i')
    
    watch_alloc = 0
    
    for i in range(num_clauses):
        l0 = clauses[3*i]
        idx0 = l0 if l0 > 0 else num_vars - l0
        watch_clause[watch_alloc] = i
        watch_next[watch_alloc] = watch_head[idx0]
        watch_head[idx0] = watch_alloc
        watch_alloc += 1
        
        l1 = clauses[3*i + 1]
        idx1 = l1 if l1 > 0 else num_vars - l1
        watch_clause[watch_alloc] = i
        watch_next[watch_alloc] = watch_head[idx1]
        watch_head[idx1] = watch_alloc
        watch_alloc += 1

    assignment = bytearray(num_vars + 1)
    
    trail = memoryview(bytearray((num_vars + 1) * 4)).cast('i')
    trail_len = 0
    
    trail_lim = memoryview(bytearray((num_vars + 1) * 4)).cast('i')
    trail_lim_len = 0
    
    q = memoryview(bytearray((num_vars + 1) * 4)).cast('i')
    q_len = 0
    q_head = 0

    def add_assignment(lit):
        nonlocal trail_len, q_len
        var = abs(lit)
        val = 1 if lit > 0 else 2
        
        curr = assignment[var]
        if curr == val:
            return True
        if curr != 0:
            return False
            
        assignment[var] = val
        trail[trail_len] = lit
        trail_len += 1
        
        q[q_len] = lit
        q_len += 1
        return True

    def propagate():
        nonlocal q_head
        while q_head < q_len:
            p = q[q_head]
            q_head += 1
            
            false_lit = -p
            idx_false = false_lit if false_lit > 0 else num_vars - false_lit
            
            curr_watch = watch_head[idx_false]
            watch_head[idx_false] = -1
            
            conflict = False
            
            while curr_watch != -1:
                c_idx = watch_clause[curr_watch]
                next_w = watch_next[curr_watch]
                
                if conflict:
                    watch_next[curr_watch] = watch_head[idx_false]
                    watch_head[idx_false] = curr_watch
                    curr_watch = next_w
                    continue

                l0 = clauses[3*c_idx]
                l1 = clauses[3*c_idx + 1]
                l2 = clauses[3*c_idx + 2]
                
                if l0 == false_lit:
                    l0, l1 = l1, l0
                    clauses[3*c_idx] = l0
                    clauses[3*c_idx + 1] = l1
                    
                v0 = abs(l0)
                if assignment[v0] == (1 if l0 > 0 else 2):
                    watch_next[curr_watch] = watch_head[idx_false]
                    watch_head[idx_false] = curr_watch
                    curr_watch = next_w
                    continue
                    
                v2 = abs(l2)
                if assignment[v2] != (2 if l2 > 0 else 1):
                    clauses[3*c_idx + 1] = l2
                    clauses[3*c_idx + 2] = l1
                    
                    idx2 = l2 if l2 > 0 else num_vars - l2
                    watch_next[curr_watch] = watch_head[idx2]
                    watch_head[idx2] = curr_watch
                    curr_watch = next_w
                    continue
                    
                watch_next[curr_watch] = watch_head[idx_false]
                watch_head[idx_false] = curr_watch
                
                if assignment[v0] == 0:
                    add_assignment(l0)
                else:
                    conflict = True
                
                curr_watch = next_w
                
            if conflict:
                return False
        return True

    decision_var = 1
    is_sat = False
    
    while True:
        if not propagate():
            can_backtrack = False
            while trail_lim_len > 0:
                trail_lim_len -= 1
                limit = trail_lim[trail_lim_len]
                decision_lit = trail[limit]
                
                while trail_len > limit:
                    trail_len -= 1
                    lit = trail[trail_len]
                    assignment[abs(lit)] = 0
                    
                q_len = 0
                q_head = 0
                
                flipped_lit = -decision_lit
                add_assignment(flipped_lit)
                can_backtrack = True
                break
                
            if not can_backtrack:
                is_sat = False
                break
        else:
            while decision_var <= num_vars and assignment[decision_var] != 0:
                decision_var += 1
                
            if decision_var > num_vars:
                is_sat = True
                break
                
            trail_lim[trail_lim_len] = trail_len
            trail_lim_len += 1
            
            add_assignment(decision_var)
            
    if is_sat:
        print("SAT")
        chunk = []
        for i in range(1, num_vars + 1):
            chunk.append("1" if assignment[i] == 1 else "0")
            if len(chunk) >= 50000:
                sys.stdout.write(" ".join(chunk) + " ")
                chunk.clear()
        if chunk:
            sys.stdout.write(" ".join(chunk))
        sys.stdout.write("\n")
    else:
        print("UNSAT")

if __name__ == '__main__':
    solve()

Test 31: Subset Sum (Rust) Score: 0.00 / 17
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Rust code to solve the Subset Sum problem.

Your Rust subset sum solver will be tested with instances ranging from simple to very
complex sets. The same algorithm must work efficiently across ALL problem complexities.

Given a set of integers and a target value, determine if there exists a subset
that sums to exactly the target value. Simple sets (<100 numbers) you can probably
brute force, however this code will also need to run on sets with millions of
numbers. This is NP-Complete and requires sophisticated algorithms for larger instances:
additionally; threading, memory optimization, vectorization and parallelization are all
strongly suggested.

**Input format (stdin, space seperated decimal integers):**
```
num_numbers target
num1 num2 ... numN
```

**Output format (stdout):**
```
YES or NO
[index1 index2 ... indexK] (only if YES, 0-indexed indices of subset elements)
```

**Implementation Hints:**
- Detect set complexity and choose appropriate algorithm
- Use efficient data structures: bitsets, hash sets for DP
- Implement adaptive quality vs speed tradeoffs
- For very large sets, focus on approximation algorithms
- Handle edge cases: empty set, zero target, all numbers add to target.
- Use fast I/O as the input size can approach 1gb.

**Success Criteria:**
- Correctly determine if subset sum exists
- If YES, provide valid subset indices
- Complete within time limit

**Failure Criteria:**
- Incorrect subset sum determination
- Invalid subset indices
- Timeout without conclusion

**Requirements:**
1. Program must compile with rustc
2. Read from stdin, write to stdout
3. Handle variable set sizes and target values
4. Complete within 5 minutes
5. Must handle varying subset sum complexities efficiently

**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: AMD64 Family 23 Model 8 Stepping 2, AuthenticAMD
Core count: 64
Memory: 127.87 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**Rust Compiler:**
rustc 1.92.0 (ded5c06cf 2025-12-08) | edition=2024 | host: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc

Be aware that default warnings are enabled and will cause a compilation failure,
so ensure that you write warning-free code.

Write complete, compilable Rust code with a main() function.

Given a list of numbers and a target total, find a subset of those numbers that adds up to exactly the target. It sounds simple, but with large lists the number of possible subsets is astronomical.

This is a classic NP-hard problem. The test uses planted instances with a known solution for strict pass/fail grading. Subpasses increase the list size and target magnitude.

 0.0000
[20 numbers, small values] Error: invalid literal for int() with base 10: '[2'

Subset Sum - 20 numbers, small values

Approach: ![allow(warnings)]

View Rust Code (16509 chars)
use std::io::Read;
use std::time::{Instant, Duration};
use std::hash::{BuildHasherDefault, Hasher};

struct FastRng {
    state: u64,
}

impl FastRng {
    fn new(seed: u64) -> Self {
        FastRng { state: seed }
    }
    fn next(&mut self) -> u32 {
        self.state ^= self.state << 13;
        self.state ^= self.state >> 7;
        self.state ^= self.state << 17;
        self.state as u32
    }
}

#[derive(Default)]
struct FastHasher {
    hash: u64,
}

impl Hasher for FastHasher {
    fn write(&mut self, bytes: &[u8]) {
        for &b in bytes {
            self.hash = self.hash.rotate_left(5) ^ (b as u64);
        }
    }
    fn write_i64(&mut self, i: i64) {
        let mut x = i as u64;
        x ^= x >> 30;
        x = x.wrapping_mul(0xbf58476d1ce4e5b9);
        x ^= x >> 27;
        x = x.wrapping_mul(0x94d049bb133111eb);
        x ^= x >> 31;
        self.hash = x;
    }
    fn finish(&self) -> u64 { self.hash }
}

type FastBuildHasher = BuildHasherDefault<FastHasher>;
type FastHashMap<K, V> = std::collections::HashMap<K, V, FastBuildHasher>;

fn read_all_fast() -> (usize, i64, Vec<i64>) {
    let mut buffer = Vec::new();
    std::io::stdin().read_to_end(&mut buffer).unwrap();
    
    let mut pos = 0;
    
    let next_i64 = |buf: &[u8], pos: &mut usize| -> Option<i64> {
        while *pos < buf.len() && buf[*pos] <= b' ' {
            *pos += 1;
        }
        if *pos >= buf.len() { return None; }
        let mut sign = 1;
        if buf[*pos] == b'-' {
            sign = -1;
            *pos += 1;
        } else if buf[*pos] == b'+' {
            *pos += 1;
        }
        let mut res: i64 = 0;
        while *pos < buf.len() && buf[*pos] > b' ' {
            res = res * 10 + (buf[*pos] - b'0') as i64;
            *pos += 1;
        }
        Some(res * sign)
    };
    
    let n = next_i64(&buffer, &mut pos).unwrap_or(0) as usize;
    let target = next_i64(&buffer, &mut pos).unwrap_or(0);
    
    let mut nums = Vec::with_capacity(n);
    while let Some(x) = next_i64(&buffer, &mut pos) {
        nums.push(x);
    }
    
    (n, target, nums)
}

fn print_ans(ans: &[usize], zeroes: &[usize]) {
    println!("YES");
    let mut final_ans = ans.to_vec();
    final_ans.extend_from_slice(zeroes);
    final_ans.sort_unstable();
    
    print!("[");
    for (i, &idx) in final_ans.iter().enumerate() {
        if i > 0 { print!(" "); }
        print!("{}", idx);
    }
    println!("]");
}

fn print_subset<F>(items: &[(i64, usize)], zeroes: &[usize], filter: F) 
where F: Fn(i64) -> bool 
{
    let mut ans = Vec::new();
    for &(v, idx) in items {
        if filter(v) { ans.push(idx); }
    }
    print_ans(&ans, zeroes);
}

fn meet_in_the_middle(items: &[(i64, usize)], target: i64) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    let mid = items.len() / 2;
    let left = &items[..mid];
    let right = &items[mid..];

    let mut left_sums = Vec::with_capacity(1 << left.len());
    for mask in 0..(1u32 << left.len()) {
        let mut s = 0;
        for i in 0..left.len() {
            if (mask & (1 << i)) != 0 {
                s += left[i].0;
            }
        }
        left_sums.push((s, mask));
    }
    left_sums.sort_unstable_by_key(|k| k.0);

    for mask in 0..(1u32 << right.len()) {
        let mut s = 0;
        for i in 0..right.len() {
            if (mask & (1 << i)) != 0 {
                s += right[i].0;
            }
        }
        let rem = target - s;
        if let Ok(idx) = left_sums.binary_search_by_key(&rem, |k| k.0) {
            let left_mask = left_sums[idx].1;
            let mut ans = Vec::new();
            for i in 0..left.len() {
                if (left_mask & (1 << i)) != 0 {
                    ans.push(left[i].1);
                }
            }
            for i in 0..right.len() {
                if (mask & (1 << i)) != 0 {
                    ans.push(right[i].1);
                }
            }
            return Some(ans);
        }
    }
    None
}

enum DpResult {
    Found(Vec<usize>),
    NoSolution,
    Aborted,
}

fn hashmap_dp(items: &[(i64, usize)], target: i64, max_states: usize, start_time: Instant, time_limit: Duration) -> DpResult {
    let mut first_achieved: FastHashMap<i64, usize> = FastHashMap::default();
    let mut states = Vec::new();
    states.push(0i64);
    
    let mut rem_pos = vec![0; items.len()];
    let mut rem_neg = vec![0; items.len()];
    let mut p_sum = 0;
    let mut n_sum = 0;
    for i in (0..items.len()).rev() {
        if items[i].0 > 0 { p_sum += items[i].0; }
        else { n_sum += items[i].0; }
        rem_pos[i] = p_sum;
        rem_neg[i] = n_sum;
    }

    for (i, &(v, orig_idx)) in items.iter().enumerate() {
        if start_time.elapsed() > time_limit { return DpResult::Aborted; }
        
        let mut new_states = Vec::new();
        for &s in &states {
            let nxt = s + v;
            if nxt == target {
                let mut path = vec![orig_idx];
                let mut curr = s;
                while curr != 0 {
                    let prev_i = first_achieved[&curr];
                    path.push(items[prev_i].1);
                    curr -= items[prev_i].0;
                }
                return DpResult::Found(path);
            }
            if nxt + rem_pos[i] < target { continue; }
            if nxt + rem_neg[i] > target { continue; }
            
            if nxt != 0 && !first_achieved.contains_key(&nxt) {
                new_states.push(nxt);
            }
        }
        
        for &ns in &new_states {
            first_achieved.insert(ns, i);
            states.push(ns);
        }
        
        if states.len() > max_states {
            return DpResult::Aborted;
        }
    }
    DpResult::NoSolution
}

fn solve_bb_exact(
    items: &[(i64, usize)],
    target: i64,
    node_limit: usize,
    start_time: Instant,
    time_limit: Duration
) -> DpResult {
    let mut rem_pos = vec![0; items.len()];
    let mut rem_neg = vec![0; items.len()];
    let mut p_sum = 0;
    let mut n_sum = 0;
    for i in (0..items.len()).rev() {
        if items[i].0 > 0 { p_sum += items[i].0; }
        else { n_sum += items[i].0; }
        rem_pos[i] = p_sum;
        rem_neg[i] = n_sum;
    }

    let mut path = Vec::new();
    let mut ans = None;
    let mut nodes = 0;
    
    fn dfs(
        idx: usize,
        current_sum: i64,
        target: i64,
        items: &[(i64, usize)],
        rem_pos: &[i64],
        rem_neg: &[i64],
        path: &mut Vec<usize>,
        ans: &mut Option<Vec<usize>>,
        nodes: &mut usize,
        max_nodes: usize,
        start_time: Instant,
        time_limit: Duration
    ) -> bool {
        *nodes += 1;
        if *nodes > max_nodes || start_time.elapsed() > time_limit {
            return true;
        }
        if current_sum == target {
            *ans = Some(path.clone());
            return true;
        }
        if idx == items.len() { return false; }
        
        if current_sum + rem_pos[idx] < target { return false; }
        if current_sum + rem_neg[idx] > target { return false; }

        let try_include_first = if items[idx].0 > 0 { current_sum < target } else { current_sum > target };

        if try_include_first {
            path.push(items[idx].1);
            if dfs(idx + 1, current_sum + items[idx].0, target, items, rem_pos, rem_neg, path, ans, nodes, max_nodes, start_time, time_limit) {
                return true;
            }
            path.pop();
            
            if ans.is_some() { return true; }

            if dfs(idx + 1, current_sum, target, items, rem_pos, rem_neg, path, ans, nodes, max_nodes, start_time, time_limit) {
                return true;
            }
        } else {
            if dfs(idx + 1, current_sum, target, items, rem_pos, rem_neg, path, ans, nodes, max_nodes, start_time, time_limit) {
                return true;
            }
            if ans.is_some() { return true; }

            path.push(items[idx].1);
            if dfs(idx + 1, current_sum + items[idx].0, target, items, rem_pos, rem_neg, path, ans, nodes, max_nodes, start_time, time_limit) {
                return true;
            }
            path.pop();
        }
        false
    }

    let aborted = dfs(0, 0, target, items, &rem_pos, &rem_neg, &mut path, &mut ans, &mut nodes, node_limit, start_time, time_limit);
    
    if let Some(p) = ans {
        DpResult::Found(p)
    } else if aborted {
        DpResult::Aborted
    } else {
        DpResult::NoSolution
    }
}

fn bb_search_closest(
    idx: usize,
    current_pool_sum: i64,
    sub_target: i64,
    items: &[(i64, usize)],
    rem_pos: &[i64],
    rem_neg: &[i64],
    path: &mut Vec<usize>,
    best_path: &mut Vec<usize>,
    best_diff: &mut i64,
    nodes: &mut usize,
    max_nodes: usize
) {
    *nodes += 1;
    let diff = (current_pool_sum - sub_target).abs();
    if diff < *best_diff {
        *best_diff = diff;
        *best_path = path.clone();
        if diff == 0 { return; }
    }
    if *nodes > max_nodes { return; }
    if idx == items.len() { return; }
    
    let min_possible = current_pool_sum + rem_neg[idx];
    let max_possible = current_pool_sum + rem_pos[idx];
    
    if min_possible > sub_target {
        let d = min_possible - sub_target;
        if d >= *best_diff { return; }
    }
    if max_possible < sub_target {
        let d = sub_target - max_possible;
        if d >= *best_diff { return; }
    }

    let try_include_first = if items[idx].0 > 0 { current_pool_sum < sub_target } else { current_pool_sum > sub_target };

    if try_include_first {
        path.push(idx);
        bb_search_closest(idx + 1, current_pool_sum + items[idx].0, sub_target, items, rem_pos, rem_neg, path, best_path, best_diff, nodes, max_nodes);
        path.pop();
        if *best_diff == 0 { return; }

        bb_search_closest(idx + 1, current_pool_sum, sub_target, items, rem_pos, rem_neg, path, best_path, best_diff, nodes, max_nodes);
    } else {
        bb_search_closest(idx + 1, current_pool_sum, sub_target, items, rem_pos, rem_neg, path, best_path, best_diff, nodes, max_nodes);
        if *best_diff == 0 { return; }

        path.push(idx);
        bb_search_closest(idx + 1, current_pool_sum + items[idx].0, sub_target, items, rem_pos, rem_neg, path, best_path, best_diff, nodes, max_nodes);
        path.pop();
    }
}

fn local_search(items: &[(i64, usize)], target: i64, time_limit: Duration, global_start: Instant) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    let mut rng = FastRng::new(42);
    let mut current_sum = 0;
    let mut in_subset = vec![false; items.len()];
    
    for (i, &(v, _)) in items.iter().enumerate() {
        if (target > current_sum && v > 0) || (target < current_sum && v < 0) {
            in_subset[i] = true;
            current_sum += v;
        }
    }
    
    if current_sum == target {
        let mut ans = Vec::new();
        for i in 0..items.len() {
            if in_subset[i] { ans.push(items[i].1); }
        }
        return Some(ans);
    }
    
    let mut best_diff_overall = (current_sum - target).abs();
    let mut stuck_count = 0;
    
    while global_start.elapsed() < time_limit {
        let diff = target - current_sum;
        
        let pool_size = 40.min(items.len());
        let mut pool = Vec::with_capacity(pool_size);
        
        let num_biased = pool_size / 2;
        for _ in 0..num_biased {
            let mut best_idx = rng.next() as usize % items.len();
            for _ in 0..5 {
                let idx = rng.next() as usize % items.len();
                let benefit = if in_subset[idx] { -items[idx].0 } else { items[idx].0 };
                let best_benefit = if in_subset[best_idx] { -items[best_idx].0 } else { items[best_idx].0 };
                
                if (diff > 0 && benefit > best_benefit) || (diff < 0 && benefit < best_benefit) {
                    best_idx = idx;
                }
            }
            pool.push(best_idx);
        }
        while pool.len() < pool_size {
            pool.push(rng.next() as usize % items.len());
        }
        pool.sort_unstable();
        pool.dedup();
        
        let mut pool_items = Vec::new();
        let mut base_sum = current_sum;
        for &idx in &pool {
            if in_subset[idx] {
                base_sum -= items[idx].0;
            }
            pool_items.push((items[idx].0, idx));
        }
        
        let sub_target = target - base_sum;
        
        let mut rem_pos = vec![0; pool_items.len()];
        let mut rem_neg = vec![0; pool_items.len()];
        let mut p_sum = 0;
        let mut n_sum = 0;
        for i in (0..pool_items.len()).rev() {
            if pool_items[i].0 > 0 { p_sum += pool_items[i].0; }
            else { n_sum += pool_items[i].0; }
            rem_pos[i] = p_sum;
            rem_neg[i] = n_sum;
        }
        
        let mut path = Vec::new();
        let mut best_path = Vec::new();
        let mut best_diff = i64::MAX;
        let mut nodes = 0;
        
        bb_search_closest(0, 0, sub_target, &pool_items, &rem_pos, &rem_neg, &mut path, &mut best_path, &mut best_diff, &mut nodes, 2000);
        
        for &idx in &pool {
            in_subset[idx] = false;
        }
        let mut new_pool_sum = 0;
        for &idx_in_pool in &best_path {
            let orig_idx = pool_items[idx_in_pool].1;
            in_subset[orig_idx] = true;
            new_pool_sum += pool_items[idx_in_pool].0;
        }
        current_sum = base_sum + new_pool_sum;
        
        if current_sum == target {
            let mut ans = Vec::new();
            for i in 0..items.len() {
                if in_subset[i] { ans.push(items[i].1); }
            }
            return Some(ans);
        }
        
        let current_diff = (current_sum - target).abs();
        if current_diff == best_diff_overall {
            stuck_count += 1;
        } else if current_diff < best_diff_overall {
            best_diff_overall = current_diff;
            stuck_count = 0;
        } else {
            stuck_count += 1;
        }
        
        if stuck_count > 50 {
            let perturb_size = 10.min(items.len());
            for _ in 0..perturb_size {
                let idx = rng.next() as usize % items.len();
                if in_subset[idx] {
                    in_subset[idx] = false;
                    current_sum -= items[idx].0;
                } else {
                    in_subset[idx] = true;
                    current_sum += items[idx].0;
                }
            }
            stuck_count = 0;
            best_diff_overall = (current_sum - target).abs();
        }
    }
    None
}

fn main() {
    let start_time = Instant::now();
    let (_n, target, raw_nums) = read_all_fast();
    
    let mut zeroes = Vec::new();
    let mut items = Vec::new();
    let mut total_pos = 0i64;
    let mut total_neg = 0i64;
    
    for (i, &v) in raw_nums.iter().enumerate() {
        if v == 0 {
            zeroes.push(i);
        } else {
            items.push((v, i));
            if v > 0 { total_pos += v; }
            else { total_neg += v; }
        }
    }
    
    if target == 0 {
        print_ans(&[], &zeroes);
        return;
    }
    if target > total_pos || target < total_neg {
        println!("NO");
        return;
    }
    if target == total_pos {
        print_subset(&items, &zeroes, |v| v > 0);
        return;
    }
    if target == total_neg {
        print_subset(&items, &zeroes, |v| v < 0);
        return;
    }
    
    items.sort_unstable_by_key(|&(v, _)| std::cmp::Reverse(v.abs()));
    
    let n_items = items.len();
    if n_items <= 45 {
        if let Some(ans) = meet_in_the_middle(&items, target) {
            print_ans(&ans, &zeroes);
        } else {
            println!("NO");
        }
        return;
    }
    
    match hashmap_dp(&items, target, 2_000_000, start_time, Duration::from_secs(5)) {
        DpResult::Found(ans) => { print_ans(&ans, &zeroes); return; }
        DpResult::NoSolution => { println!("NO"); return; }
        DpResult::Aborted => {}
    }

    match solve_bb_exact(&items, target, 10_000_000, start_time, Duration::from_secs(10)) {
        DpResult::Found(ans) => { print_ans(&ans, &zeroes); return; }
        DpResult::NoSolution => { println!("NO"); return; }
        DpResult::Aborted => {}
    }

    if let Some(ans) = local_search(&items, target, Duration::from_secs(280), start_time) {
        print_ans(&ans, &zeroes);
    } else {
        println!("NO");
    }
}

Test 32: Steiner Tree (C++) Score: 11.40 / 15
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C++ code to solve the Steiner Tree problem (NP-Hard).

**Problem:**
Given a weighted undirected graph and a set of terminal vertices, find a minimum-weight
tree that connects all terminals. The tree may include non-terminal (Steiner) vertices.

**Input (stdin):**
```
num_vertices num_edges num_terminals
u v weight (one edge per line, 0-indexed)
terminal_1 terminal_2 ... terminal_K
```

**Output (stdout):**
```
total_weight edge_count
u1 v1
u2 v2
...
```
Edges listed must form a connected, acyclic subgraph that includes all terminals.


**Environment:**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: AMD64 Family 23 Model 8 Stepping 2, AuthenticAMD
Core count: 64
Memory: 127.87 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**C++ Compiler:**
MSVC cl 19.50.35730 | std=c++20 (/std:c++20)

Be sure that any deviation from the C++ standard library is supported by the given compiler,
as referencing the wrong intrinsics or non-standard header like 'bits/stdc++.h' could fail your submission.

**Hints (not required):**
- Exact DP (Dreyfus-Wagner) for small terminal sets.
- MST / shortest-path heuristics for large graphs.
- Use adjacency lists and fast I/O.

Write complete, compilable C++ code with a main() function.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Connect a set of important nodes in a weighted graph using the cheapest possible tree of edges. Unlike a minimum spanning tree, the solution may pass through intermediate nodes that aren’t in the required set if doing so saves cost — like building a road network that connects key cities via junctions.

This is NP-hard. The test uses planted instances with a known optimal tree for strict grading. Subpasses increase the graph size.

 1.0000
[20V, 5 terminals] Weight 14 (MST bound: 14), 0.03s

Steiner Tree - 20V, 5 terminals

View C++ Code (10303 chars)
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <queue>
#include <set>
#include <algorithm>
#include <numeric>

using namespace std;

const long long INF = 1e18;

struct Edge {
    int to;
    long long weight;
    int id;
};

struct OriginalEdge {
    int u, v;
    long long weight;
    int id;
};

struct DSU {
    vector<int> parent;
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
    }
    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }
    bool unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            parent[root_i] = root_j;
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
};

// global for tracing exact DP
vector<int> prev_mask_arr;
vector<int> prev_u_arr;
vector<int> prev_edge_arr;
int V_global;
set<int> candidate_edges_set;

void trace(int mask, int u) {
    int offset = mask * V_global + u;
    if (prev_mask_arr[offset] == -1) return;

    if (prev_mask_arr[offset] == mask) {
        candidate_edges_set.insert(prev_edge_arr[offset]);
        trace(mask, prev_u_arr[offset]);
    } else {
        trace(prev_mask_arr[offset], u);
        trace(mask ^ prev_mask_arr[offset], u);
    }
}

int main() {
    ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(NULL);

    int V, E, raw_K;
    if (!(cin >> V >> E >> raw_K)) return 0;
    
    V_global = V;

    vector<OriginalEdge> edge_list(E);
    vector<vector<Edge>> adj(V);

    for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        long long w;
        cin >> u >> v >> w;
        edge_list[i] = {u, v, w, i};
        adj[u].push_back({v, w, i});
        adj[v].push_back({u, w, i});
    }

    vector<int> temp_terminals(raw_K);
    for (int i = 0; i < raw_K; ++i) {
        cin >> temp_terminals[i];
    }
    sort(temp_terminals.begin(), temp_terminals.end());
    temp_terminals.erase(unique(temp_terminals.begin(), temp_terminals.end()), temp_terminals.end());
    
    int K = temp_terminals.size();
    vector<int> terminals = temp_terminals;
    vector<bool> is_terminal(V, false);
    for(int t : terminals) is_terminal[t] = true;

    if (K == 0 || K == 1) {
        cout << "0 0\n";
        return 0;
    }

    bool use_dp = false;
    if (K <= 15) {
        long long states = (long long)(1 << K) * V;
        long long memory = states * 20LL; // approx 20 bytes per state
        long long ops = 1;
        for (int i = 0; i < K; ++i) ops *= 3;
        ops /= 2;
        if (memory <= 2048LL * 1024 * 1024 && ops * V <= 500000000LL) {
            use_dp = true;
        }
    }

    if (use_dp) {
        int states_count = (1 << K) * V;
        vector<long long> dp(states_count, INF);
        prev_mask_arr.assign(states_count, -1);
        prev_u_arr.assign(states_count, -1);
        prev_edge_arr.assign(states_count, -1);

        for (int i = 0; i < K; ++i) {
            dp[(1 << i) * V + terminals[i]] = 0;
        }

        for (int mask = 1; mask < (1 << K); ++mask) {
            if ((mask & (mask - 1)) != 0) {
                int lsb = mask & -mask;
                int rem_mask = mask ^ lsb;
                for (int sub = (rem_mask - 1) & rem_mask; sub > 0; sub = (sub - 1) & rem_mask) {
                    int actual_sub = sub | lsb;
                    int actual_rem = mask ^ actual_sub;

                    int sub_offset = actual_sub * V;
                    int rem_offset = actual_rem * V;
                    int mask_offset = mask * V;

                    for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
                        long long val = dp[sub_offset + i] + dp[rem_offset + i];
                        if (val < dp[mask_offset + i]) {
                            dp[mask_offset + i] = val;
                            prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + i] = actual_sub;
                            prev_u_arr[mask_offset + i] = i;
                            prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + i] = -1;
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                int actual_sub = lsb;
                int actual_rem = rem_mask;
                int sub_offset = actual_sub * V;
                int rem_offset = actual_rem * V;
                int mask_offset = mask * V;

                for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
                    long long val = dp[sub_offset + i] + dp[rem_offset + i];
                    if (val < dp[mask_offset + i]) {
                        dp[mask_offset + i] = val;
                        prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + i] = actual_sub;
                        prev_u_arr[mask_offset + i] = i;
                        prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + i] = -1;
                    }
                }
            }

            int mask_offset = mask * V;
            priority_queue<pair<long long, int>, vector<pair<long long, int>>, greater<pair<long long, int>>> pq;
            for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
                if (dp[mask_offset + i] != INF) {
                    pq.push({dp[mask_offset + i], i});
                }
            }

            while (!pq.empty()) {
                auto [d, u] = pq.top();
                pq.pop();

                if (d > dp[mask_offset + u]) continue;

                for (auto& edge : adj[u]) {
                    int v = edge.to;
                    long long w = edge.weight;
                    if (d + w < dp[mask_offset + v]) {
                        dp[mask_offset + v] = d + w;
                        prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + v] = mask;
                        prev_u_arr[mask_offset + v] = u;
                        prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + v] = edge.id;
                        pq.push({dp[mask_offset + v], v});
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        long long min_cost = INF;
        int best_u = -1;
        int final_mask = (1 << K) - 1;
        int final_offset = final_mask * V;
        for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
            if (dp[final_offset + i] < min_cost) {
                min_cost = dp[final_offset + i];
                best_u = i;
            }
        }

        if (min_cost < INF) {
            trace(final_mask, best_u);
        }

    } else {
        vector<long long> dist(V, INF);
        vector<int> source(V, -1);
        vector<int> parent_edge(V, -1);
        vector<int> parent_node(V, -1);

        priority_queue<pair<long long, int>, vector<pair<long long, int>>, greater<pair<long long, int>>> pq;
        for (int t : terminals) {
            dist[t] = 0;
            source[t] = t;
            pq.push({0, t});
        }

        while (!pq.empty()) {
            auto [d, u] = pq.top();
            pq.pop();
            if (d > dist[u]) continue;

            for (auto& e : adj[u]) {
                int v = e.to;
                if (d + e.weight < dist[v]) {
                    dist[v] = d + e.weight;
                    source[v] = source[u];
                    parent_edge[v] = e.id;
                    parent_node[v] = u;
                    pq.push({dist[v], v});
                }
            }
        }

        struct Bridge {
            int u, v;
            long long weight;
            int original_u, original_v;
            int edge_id;
        };
        vector<Bridge> bridges;
        for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
            int u = edge_list[i].u;
            int v = edge_list[i].v;
            if (source[u] != -1 && source[v] != -1 && source[u] != source[v]) {
                bridges.push_back({source[u], source[v], dist[u] + edge_list[i].weight + dist[v], u, v, i});
            }
        }

        sort(bridges.begin(), bridges.end(), [](const Bridge& a, const Bridge& b) {
            return a.weight < b.weight;
        });

        DSU dsu_terminals(V);
        vector<Bridge> mst_bridges;
        for (auto& b : bridges) {
            if (dsu_terminals.unite(b.u, b.v)) {
                mst_bridges.push_back(b);
            }
        }

        for (auto& b : mst_bridges) {
            candidate_edges_set.insert(b.edge_id);
            int curr = b.original_u;
            while (curr != b.u) {
                candidate_edges_set.insert(parent_edge[curr]);
                curr = parent_node[curr];
            }
            curr = b.original_v;
            while (curr != b.v) {
                candidate_edges_set.insert(parent_edge[curr]);
                curr = parent_node[curr];
            }
        }
    }

    vector<OriginalEdge> candidate_edges;
    for (int id : candidate_edges_set) {
        candidate_edges.push_back(edge_list[id]);
    }

    sort(candidate_edges.begin(), candidate_edges.end(), [](const OriginalEdge& a, const OriginalEdge& b) {
        return a.weight < b.weight;
    });

    DSU dsu_final(V);
    vector<int> tree_edges;
    for (auto& e : candidate_edges) {
        if (dsu_final.unite(e.u, e.v)) {
            tree_edges.push_back(e.id);
        }
    }

    vector<int> degree(V, 0);
    vector<vector<pair<int, int>>> tree_adj(V);
    for (int id : tree_edges) {
        int u = edge_list[id].u;
        int v = edge_list[id].v;
        tree_adj[u].push_back({v, id});
        tree_adj[v].push_back({u, id});
        degree[u]++;
        degree[v]++;
    }

    queue<int> leaves;
    for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] == 1 && !is_terminal[i]) {
            leaves.push(i);
        }
    }

    vector<bool> keep_edge(E, false);
    for (int id : tree_edges) keep_edge[id] = true;

    while (!leaves.empty()) {
        int u = leaves.front();
        leaves.pop();
        for (auto& edge : tree_adj[u]) {
            if (keep_edge[edge.second]) {
                keep_edge[edge.second] = false;
                degree[edge.first]--;
                if (degree[edge.first] == 1 && !is_terminal[edge.first]) {
                    leaves.push(edge.first);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    long long final_weight = 0;
    vector<int> final_edges;
    for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
        if (keep_edge[i]) {
            final_weight += edge_list[i].weight;
            final_edges.push_back(i);
        }
    }

    cout << final_weight << " " << final_edges.size() << "\n";
    for (int id : final_edges) {
        cout << edge_list[id].u << " " << edge_list[id].v << "\n";
    }

    return 0;
}

Subpass 1
Subpass configurationView exact prompt
