#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <queue>
#include <set>
#include <algorithm>
#include <numeric>

using namespace std;

const long long INF = 1e18;

struct Edge {
    int to;
    long long weight;
    int id;
};

struct OriginalEdge {
    int u, v;
    long long weight;
    int id;
};

struct DSU {
    vector<int> parent;
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
    }
    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }
    bool unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            parent[root_i] = root_j;
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
};

// global for tracing exact DP
vector<int> prev_mask_arr;
vector<int> prev_u_arr;
vector<int> prev_edge_arr;
int V_global;
set<int> candidate_edges_set;

void trace(int mask, int u) {
    int offset = mask * V_global + u;
    if (prev_mask_arr[offset] == -1) return;

    if (prev_mask_arr[offset] == mask) {
        candidate_edges_set.insert(prev_edge_arr[offset]);
        trace(mask, prev_u_arr[offset]);
    } else {
        trace(prev_mask_arr[offset], u);
        trace(mask ^ prev_mask_arr[offset], u);
    }
}

int main() {
    ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(NULL);

    int V, E, raw_K;
    if (!(cin >> V >> E >> raw_K)) return 0;
    
    V_global = V;

    vector<OriginalEdge> edge_list(E);
    vector<vector<Edge>> adj(V);

    for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        long long w;
        cin >> u >> v >> w;
        edge_list[i] = {u, v, w, i};
        adj[u].push_back({v, w, i});
        adj[v].push_back({u, w, i});
    }

    vector<int> temp_terminals(raw_K);
    for (int i = 0; i < raw_K; ++i) {
        cin >> temp_terminals[i];
    }
    sort(temp_terminals.begin(), temp_terminals.end());
    temp_terminals.erase(unique(temp_terminals.begin(), temp_terminals.end()), temp_terminals.end());
    
    int K = temp_terminals.size();
    vector<int> terminals = temp_terminals;
    vector<bool> is_terminal(V, false);
    for(int t : terminals) is_terminal[t] = true;

    if (K == 0 || K == 1) {
        cout << "0 0\n";
        return 0;
    }

    bool use_dp = false;
    if (K <= 15) {
        long long states = (long long)(1 << K) * V;
        long long memory = states * 20LL; // approx 20 bytes per state
        long long ops = 1;
        for (int i = 0; i < K; ++i) ops *= 3;
        ops /= 2;
        if (memory <= 2048LL * 1024 * 1024 && ops * V <= 500000000LL) {
            use_dp = true;
        }
    }

    if (use_dp) {
        int states_count = (1 << K) * V;
        vector<long long> dp(states_count, INF);
        prev_mask_arr.assign(states_count, -1);
        prev_u_arr.assign(states_count, -1);
        prev_edge_arr.assign(states_count, -1);

        for (int i = 0; i < K; ++i) {
            dp[(1 << i) * V + terminals[i]] = 0;
        }

        for (int mask = 1; mask < (1 << K); ++mask) {
            if ((mask & (mask - 1)) != 0) {
                int lsb = mask & -mask;
                int rem_mask = mask ^ lsb;
                for (int sub = (rem_mask - 1) & rem_mask; sub > 0; sub = (sub - 1) & rem_mask) {
                    int actual_sub = sub | lsb;
                    int actual_rem = mask ^ actual_sub;

                    int sub_offset = actual_sub * V;
                    int rem_offset = actual_rem * V;
                    int mask_offset = mask * V;

                    for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
                        long long val = dp[sub_offset + i] + dp[rem_offset + i];
                        if (val < dp[mask_offset + i]) {
                            dp[mask_offset + i] = val;
                            prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + i] = actual_sub;
                            prev_u_arr[mask_offset + i] = i;
                            prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + i] = -1;
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                int actual_sub = lsb;
                int actual_rem = rem_mask;
                int sub_offset = actual_sub * V;
                int rem_offset = actual_rem * V;
                int mask_offset = mask * V;

                for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
                    long long val = dp[sub_offset + i] + dp[rem_offset + i];
                    if (val < dp[mask_offset + i]) {
                        dp[mask_offset + i] = val;
                        prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + i] = actual_sub;
                        prev_u_arr[mask_offset + i] = i;
                        prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + i] = -1;
                    }
                }
            }

            int mask_offset = mask * V;
            priority_queue<pair<long long, int>, vector<pair<long long, int>>, greater<pair<long long, int>>> pq;
            for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
                if (dp[mask_offset + i] != INF) {
                    pq.push({dp[mask_offset + i], i});
                }
            }

            while (!pq.empty()) {
                auto [d, u] = pq.top();
                pq.pop();

                if (d > dp[mask_offset + u]) continue;

                for (auto& edge : adj[u]) {
                    int v = edge.to;
                    long long w = edge.weight;
                    if (d + w < dp[mask_offset + v]) {
                        dp[mask_offset + v] = d + w;
                        prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + v] = mask;
                        prev_u_arr[mask_offset + v] = u;
                        prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + v] = edge.id;
                        pq.push({dp[mask_offset + v], v});
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        long long min_cost = INF;
        int best_u = -1;
        int final_mask = (1 << K) - 1;
        int final_offset = final_mask * V;
        for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
            if (dp[final_offset + i] < min_cost) {
                min_cost = dp[final_offset + i];
                best_u = i;
            }
        }

        if (min_cost < INF) {
            trace(final_mask, best_u);
        }

    } else {
        vector<long long> dist(V, INF);
        vector<int> source(V, -1);
        vector<int> parent_edge(V, -1);
        vector<int> parent_node(V, -1);

        priority_queue<pair<long long, int>, vector<pair<long long, int>>, greater<pair<long long, int>>> pq;
        for (int t : terminals) {
            dist[t] = 0;
            source[t] = t;
            pq.push({0, t});
        }

        while (!pq.empty()) {
            auto [d, u] = pq.top();
            pq.pop();
            if (d > dist[u]) continue;

            for (auto& e : adj[u]) {
                int v = e.to;
                if (d + e.weight < dist[v]) {
                    dist[v] = d + e.weight;
                    source[v] = source[u];
                    parent_edge[v] = e.id;
                    parent_node[v] = u;
                    pq.push({dist[v], v});
                }
            }
        }

        struct Bridge {
            int u, v;
            long long weight;
            int original_u, original_v;
            int edge_id;
        };
        vector<Bridge> bridges;
        for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
            int u = edge_list[i].u;
            int v = edge_list[i].v;
            if (source[u] != -1 && source[v] != -1 && source[u] != source[v]) {
                bridges.push_back({source[u], source[v], dist[u] + edge_list[i].weight + dist[v], u, v, i});
            }
        }

        sort(bridges.begin(), bridges.end(), [](const Bridge& a, const Bridge& b) {
            return a.weight < b.weight;
        });

        DSU dsu_terminals(V);
        vector<Bridge> mst_bridges;
        for (auto& b : bridges) {
            if (dsu_terminals.unite(b.u, b.v)) {
                mst_bridges.push_back(b);
            }
        }

        for (auto& b : mst_bridges) {
            candidate_edges_set.insert(b.edge_id);
            int curr = b.original_u;
            while (curr != b.u) {
                candidate_edges_set.insert(parent_edge[curr]);
                curr = parent_node[curr];
            }
            curr = b.original_v;
            while (curr != b.v) {
                candidate_edges_set.insert(parent_edge[curr]);
                curr = parent_node[curr];
            }
        }
    }

    vector<OriginalEdge> candidate_edges;
    for (int id : candidate_edges_set) {
        candidate_edges.push_back(edge_list[id]);
    }

    sort(candidate_edges.begin(), candidate_edges.end(), [](const OriginalEdge& a, const OriginalEdge& b) {
        return a.weight < b.weight;
    });

    DSU dsu_final(V);
    vector<int> tree_edges;
    for (auto& e : candidate_edges) {
        if (dsu_final.unite(e.u, e.v)) {
            tree_edges.push_back(e.id);
        }
    }

    vector<int> degree(V, 0);
    vector<vector<pair<int, int>>> tree_adj(V);
    for (int id : tree_edges) {
        int u = edge_list[id].u;
        int v = edge_list[id].v;
        tree_adj[u].push_back({v, id});
        tree_adj[v].push_back({u, id});
        degree[u]++;
        degree[v]++;
    }

    queue<int> leaves;
    for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] == 1 && !is_terminal[i]) {
            leaves.push(i);
        }
    }

    vector<bool> keep_edge(E, false);
    for (int id : tree_edges) keep_edge[id] = true;

    while (!leaves.empty()) {
        int u = leaves.front();
        leaves.pop();
        for (auto& edge : tree_adj[u]) {
            if (keep_edge[edge.second]) {
                keep_edge[edge.second] = false;
                degree[edge.first]--;
                if (degree[edge.first] == 1 && !is_terminal[edge.first]) {
                    leaves.push(edge.first);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    long long final_weight = 0;
    vector<int> final_edges;
    for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
        if (keep_edge[i]) {
            final_weight += edge_list[i].weight;
            final_edges.push_back(i);
        }
    }

    cout << final_weight << " " << final_edges.size() << "\n";
    for (int id : final_edges) {
        cout << edge_list[id].u << " " << edge_list[id].v << "\n";
    }

    return 0;
}
Subpass 10
Subpass configurationView exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought
 1.0000
[50KV, 100 terminals] Weight 351 (MST bound: 367), 1.21s

Steiner Tree - 50KV, 100 terminals

View C++ Code (10303 chars)
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <queue>
#include <set>
#include <algorithm>
#include <numeric>

using namespace std;

const long long INF = 1e18;

struct Edge {
    int to;
    long long weight;
    int id;
};

struct OriginalEdge {
    int u, v;
    long long weight;
    int id;
};

struct DSU {
    vector<int> parent;
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
    }
    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }
    bool unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            parent[root_i] = root_j;
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
};

// global for tracing exact DP
vector<int> prev_mask_arr;
vector<int> prev_u_arr;
vector<int> prev_edge_arr;
int V_global;
set<int> candidate_edges_set;

void trace(int mask, int u) {
    int offset = mask * V_global + u;
    if (prev_mask_arr[offset] == -1) return;

    if (prev_mask_arr[offset] == mask) {
        candidate_edges_set.insert(prev_edge_arr[offset]);
        trace(mask, prev_u_arr[offset]);
    } else {
        trace(prev_mask_arr[offset], u);
        trace(mask ^ prev_mask_arr[offset], u);
    }
}

int main() {
    ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(NULL);

    int V, E, raw_K;
    if (!(cin >> V >> E >> raw_K)) return 0;
    
    V_global = V;

    vector<OriginalEdge> edge_list(E);
    vector<vector<Edge>> adj(V);

    for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        long long w;
        cin >> u >> v >> w;
        edge_list[i] = {u, v, w, i};
        adj[u].push_back({v, w, i});
        adj[v].push_back({u, w, i});
    }

    vector<int> temp_terminals(raw_K);
    for (int i = 0; i < raw_K; ++i) {
        cin >> temp_terminals[i];
    }
    sort(temp_terminals.begin(), temp_terminals.end());
    temp_terminals.erase(unique(temp_terminals.begin(), temp_terminals.end()), temp_terminals.end());
    
    int K = temp_terminals.size();
    vector<int> terminals = temp_terminals;
    vector<bool> is_terminal(V, false);
    for(int t : terminals) is_terminal[t] = true;

    if (K == 0 || K == 1) {
        cout << "0 0\n";
        return 0;
    }

    bool use_dp = false;
    if (K <= 15) {
        long long states = (long long)(1 << K) * V;
        long long memory = states * 20LL; // approx 20 bytes per state
        long long ops = 1;
        for (int i = 0; i < K; ++i) ops *= 3;
        ops /= 2;
        if (memory <= 2048LL * 1024 * 1024 && ops * V <= 500000000LL) {
            use_dp = true;
        }
    }

    if (use_dp) {
        int states_count = (1 << K) * V;
        vector<long long> dp(states_count, INF);
        prev_mask_arr.assign(states_count, -1);
        prev_u_arr.assign(states_count, -1);
        prev_edge_arr.assign(states_count, -1);

        for (int i = 0; i < K; ++i) {
            dp[(1 << i) * V + terminals[i]] = 0;
        }

        for (int mask = 1; mask < (1 << K); ++mask) {
            if ((mask & (mask - 1)) != 0) {
                int lsb = mask & -mask;
                int rem_mask = mask ^ lsb;
                for (int sub = (rem_mask - 1) & rem_mask; sub > 0; sub = (sub - 1) & rem_mask) {
                    int actual_sub = sub | lsb;
                    int actual_rem = mask ^ actual_sub;

                    int sub_offset = actual_sub * V;
                    int rem_offset = actual_rem * V;
                    int mask_offset = mask * V;

                    for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
                        long long val = dp[sub_offset + i] + dp[rem_offset + i];
                        if (val < dp[mask_offset + i]) {
                            dp[mask_offset + i] = val;
                            prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + i] = actual_sub;
                            prev_u_arr[mask_offset + i] = i;
                            prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + i] = -1;
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                int actual_sub = lsb;
                int actual_rem = rem_mask;
                int sub_offset = actual_sub * V;
                int rem_offset = actual_rem * V;
                int mask_offset = mask * V;

                for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
                    long long val = dp[sub_offset + i] + dp[rem_offset + i];
                    if (val < dp[mask_offset + i]) {
                        dp[mask_offset + i] = val;
                        prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + i] = actual_sub;
                        prev_u_arr[mask_offset + i] = i;
                        prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + i] = -1;
                    }
                }
            }

            int mask_offset = mask * V;
            priority_queue<pair<long long, int>, vector<pair<long long, int>>, greater<pair<long long, int>>> pq;
            for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
                if (dp[mask_offset + i] != INF) {
                    pq.push({dp[mask_offset + i], i});
                }
            }

            while (!pq.empty()) {
                auto [d, u] = pq.top();
                pq.pop();

                if (d > dp[mask_offset + u]) continue;

                for (auto& edge : adj[u]) {
                    int v = edge.to;
                    long long w = edge.weight;
                    if (d + w < dp[mask_offset + v]) {
                        dp[mask_offset + v] = d + w;
                        prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + v] = mask;
                        prev_u_arr[mask_offset + v] = u;
                        prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + v] = edge.id;
                        pq.push({dp[mask_offset + v], v});
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        long long min_cost = INF;
        int best_u = -1;
        int final_mask = (1 << K) - 1;
        int final_offset = final_mask * V;
        for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
            if (dp[final_offset + i] < min_cost) {
                min_cost = dp[final_offset + i];
                best_u = i;
            }
        }

        if (min_cost < INF) {
            trace(final_mask, best_u);
        }

    } else {
        vector<long long> dist(V, INF);
        vector<int> source(V, -1);
        vector<int> parent_edge(V, -1);
        vector<int> parent_node(V, -1);

        priority_queue<pair<long long, int>, vector<pair<long long, int>>, greater<pair<long long, int>>> pq;
        for (int t : terminals) {
            dist[t] = 0;
            source[t] = t;
            pq.push({0, t});
        }

        while (!pq.empty()) {
            auto [d, u] = pq.top();
            pq.pop();
            if (d > dist[u]) continue;

            for (auto& e : adj[u]) {
                int v = e.to;
                if (d + e.weight < dist[v]) {
                    dist[v] = d + e.weight;
                    source[v] = source[u];
                    parent_edge[v] = e.id;
                    parent_node[v] = u;
                    pq.push({dist[v], v});
                }
            }
        }

        struct Bridge {
            int u, v;
            long long weight;
            int original_u, original_v;
            int edge_id;
        };
        vector<Bridge> bridges;
        for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
            int u = edge_list[i].u;
            int v = edge_list[i].v;
            if (source[u] != -1 && source[v] != -1 && source[u] != source[v]) {
                bridges.push_back({source[u], source[v], dist[u] + edge_list[i].weight + dist[v], u, v, i});
            }
        }

        sort(bridges.begin(), bridges.end(), [](const Bridge& a, const Bridge& b) {
            return a.weight < b.weight;
        });

        DSU dsu_terminals(V);
        vector<Bridge> mst_bridges;
        for (auto& b : bridges) {
            if (dsu_terminals.unite(b.u, b.v)) {
                mst_bridges.push_back(b);
            }
        }

        for (auto& b : mst_bridges) {
            candidate_edges_set.insert(b.edge_id);
            int curr = b.original_u;
            while (curr != b.u) {
                candidate_edges_set.insert(parent_edge[curr]);
                curr = parent_node[curr];
            }
            curr = b.original_v;
            while (curr != b.v) {
                candidate_edges_set.insert(parent_edge[curr]);
                curr = parent_node[curr];
            }
        }
    }

    vector<OriginalEdge> candidate_edges;
    for (int id : candidate_edges_set) {
        candidate_edges.push_back(edge_list[id]);
    }

    sort(candidate_edges.begin(), candidate_edges.end(), [](const OriginalEdge& a, const OriginalEdge& b) {
        return a.weight < b.weight;
    });

    DSU dsu_final(V);
    vector<int> tree_edges;
    for (auto& e : candidate_edges) {
        if (dsu_final.unite(e.u, e.v)) {
            tree_edges.push_back(e.id);
        }
    }

    vector<int> degree(V, 0);
    vector<vector<pair<int, int>>> tree_adj(V);
    for (int id : tree_edges) {
        int u = edge_list[id].u;
        int v = edge_list[id].v;
        tree_adj[u].push_back({v, id});
        tree_adj[v].push_back({u, id});
        degree[u]++;
        degree[v]++;
    }

    queue<int> leaves;
    for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] == 1 && !is_terminal[i]) {
            leaves.push(i);
        }
    }

    vector<bool> keep_edge(E, false);
    for (int id : tree_edges) keep_edge[id] = true;

    while (!leaves.empty()) {
        int u = leaves.front();
        leaves.pop();
        for (auto& edge : tree_adj[u]) {
            if (keep_edge[edge.second]) {
                keep_edge[edge.second] = false;
                degree[edge.first]--;
                if (degree[edge.first] == 1 && !is_terminal[edge.first]) {
                    leaves.push(edge.first);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    long long final_weight = 0;
    vector<int> final_edges;
    for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
        if (keep_edge[i]) {
            final_weight += edge_list[i].weight;
            final_edges.push_back(i);
        }
    }

    cout << final_weight << " " << final_edges.size() << "\n";
    for (int id : final_edges) {
        cout << edge_list[id].u << " " << edge_list[id].v << "\n";
    }

    return 0;
}

View C++ Code (10303 chars)
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <queue>
#include <set>
#include <algorithm>
#include <numeric>

using namespace std;

const long long INF = 1e18;

struct Edge {
    int to;
    long long weight;
    int id;
};

struct OriginalEdge {
    int u, v;
    long long weight;
    int id;
};

struct DSU {
    vector<int> parent;
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
    }
    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }
    bool unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            parent[root_i] = root_j;
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
};

// global for tracing exact DP
vector<int> prev_mask_arr;
vector<int> prev_u_arr;
vector<int> prev_edge_arr;
int V_global;
set<int> candidate_edges_set;

void trace(int mask, int u) {

    if (prev_mask_arr[offset] == mask) {
        candidate_edges_set.insert(prev_edge_arr[offset]);
        trace(mask, prev_u_arr[offset]);
    } else {
        trace(prev_mask_arr[offset], u);
        trace(mask ^ prev_mask_arr[offset], u);
    }
}

                            prev_u_arr[mask_offset + i] = i;
                            prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + i] = -1;
                        }
                    }
                }

                int actual_rem = rem_mask;
                int sub_offset = actual_sub * V;
                int rem_offset = actual_rem * V;
                int mask_offset = mask * V;

                for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {

                        prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + i] = actual_sub;
                        prev_u_arr[mask_offset + i] = i;
                        prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + i] = -1;
                    }

            int mask_offset = mask * V;

            for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
                if (dp[mask_offset + i] != INF) {
                    pq.push({dp[mask_offset + i], i});
                }
            }

            while (!pq.empty()) {
                auto [d, u] = pq.top();
                pq.pop();

                if (d > dp[mask_offset + u]) continue;

                for (auto& edge : adj[u]) {

                    long long w = edge.weight;

                        prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + v] = mask;
                        prev_u_arr[mask_offset + v] = u;
                        prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + v] = edge.id;
                        pq.push({dp[mask_offset + v], v});

        }

        long long min_cost = INF;
        int best_u = -1;
        int final_mask = (1 << K) - 1;
        int final_offset = final_mask * V;
        for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
            if (dp[final_offset + i] < min_cost) {
                min_cost = dp[final_offset + i];
                best_u = i;
            }
        }

        if (min_cost < INF) {
            trace(final_mask, best_u);
        }

    } else {
        vector<long long> dist(V, INF);
        vector<int> source(V, -1);
        vector<int> parent_edge(V, -1);
        vector<int> parent_node(V, -1);

        priority_queue<pair<long long, int>, vector<pair<long long, int>>, greater<pair<long long, int>>> pq;
        for (int t : terminals) {
            dist[t] = 0;
            source[t] = t;
            pq.push({0, t});
        }

        while (!pq.empty()) {
            auto [d, u] = pq.top();
            pq.pop();
            if (d > dist[u]) continue;

            for (auto& e : adj[u]) {
                int v = e.to;
                if (d + e.weight < dist[v]) {
                    dist[v] = d + e.weight;
                    source[v] = source[u];
                    parent_edge[v] = e.id;
                    parent_node[v] = u;
                    pq.push({dist[v], v});
                }
            }
        }

        struct Bridge {
            int u, v;
            long long weight;
            int original_u, original_v;
            int edge_id;
        };
        vector<Bridge> bridges;
        for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
            int u = edge_list[i].u;
            int v = edge_list[i].v;
            if (source[u] != -1 && source[v] != -1 && source[u] != source[v]) {
                bridges.push_back({source[u], source[v], dist[u] + edge_list[i].weight + dist[v], u, v, i});
            }
        }

        sort(bridges.begin(), bridges.end(), [](const Bridge& a, const Bridge& b) {
            return a.weight < b.weight;
        });

        DSU dsu_terminals(V);
        vector<Bridge> mst_bridges;
        for (auto& b : bridges) {
            if (dsu_terminals.unite(b.u, b.v)) {
                mst_bridges.push_back(b);
            }
        }

        for (auto& b : mst_bridges) {
            candidate_edges_set.insert(b.edge_id);
            int curr = b.original_u;
            while (curr != b.u) {
                candidate_edges_set.insert(parent_edge[curr]);
                curr = parent_node[curr];
            }
            curr = b.original_v;
            while (curr != b.v) {
                candidate_edges_set.insert(parent_edge[curr]);
                curr = parent_node[curr];
            }
        }
    }

    vector<OriginalEdge> candidate_edges;
    for (int id : candidate_edges_set) {
        candidate_edges.push_back(edge_list[id]);
    }

    sort(candidate_edges.begin(), candidate_edges.end(), [](const OriginalEdge& a, const OriginalEdge& b) {
        return a.weight < b.weight;
    });

    DSU dsu_final(V);
    vector<int> tree_edges;
    for (auto& e : candidate_edges) {
        if (dsu_final.unite(e.u, e.v)) {
            tree_edges.push_back(e.id);
        }
    }

    vector<int> degree(V, 0);
    vector<vector<pair<int, int>>> tree_adj(V);
    for (int id : tree_edges) {
        int u = edge_list[id].u;
        int v = edge_list[id].v;
        tree_adj[u].push_back({v, id});
        tree_adj[v].push_back({u, id});
        degree[u]++;
        degree[v]++;
    }

    queue<int> leaves;
    for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] == 1 && !is_terminal[i]) {
            leaves.push(i);
        }
    }

    vector<bool> keep_edge(E, false);
    for (int id : tree_edges) keep_edge[id] = true;

    while (!leaves.empty()) {
        int u = leaves.front();
        leaves.pop();
        for (auto& edge : tree_adj[u]) {
            if (keep_edge[edge.second]) {
                keep_edge[edge.second] = false;
                degree[edge.first]--;
                if (degree[edge.first] == 1 && !is_terminal[edge.first]) {
                    leaves.push(edge.first);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    long long final_weight = 0;
    vector<int> final_edges;
    for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
        if (keep_edge[i]) {
            final_weight += edge_list[i].weight;
            final_edges.push_back(i);
        }
    }

    cout << final_weight << " " << final_edges.size() << "\n";
    for (int id : final_edges) {
        cout << edge_list[id].u << " " << edge_list[id].v << "\n";
    }

    return 0;
}
Subpass 12
Subpass configurationView exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought
 0.2000
[500KV, 10M edges] Weight mismatch

Steiner Tree - 500KV, 10M edges

View C++ Code (10303 chars)
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <queue>
#include <set>
#include <algorithm>
#include <numeric>

using namespace std;

const long long INF = 1e18;

struct Edge {
    int to;
    long long weight;
    int id;
};

struct OriginalEdge {
    int u, v;
    long long weight;
    int id;
};

struct DSU {
    vector<int> parent;
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
    }
    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }
    bool unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            parent[root_i] = root_j;
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
};

// global for tracing exact DP
vector<int> prev_mask_arr;
vector<int> prev_u_arr;
vector<int> prev_edge_arr;
int V_global;
set<int> candidate_edges_set;

void trace(int mask, int u) {
    int offset = mask * V_global + u;
    if (prev_mask_arr[offset] == -1) return;

    if (prev_mask_arr[offset] == mask) {
        candidate_edges_set.insert(prev_edge_arr[offset]);
        trace(mask, prev_u_arr[offset]);
    } else {
        trace(prev_mask_arr[offset], u);
        trace(mask ^ prev_mask_arr[offset], u);
    }
}

int main() {
    ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(NULL);

    int V, E, raw_K;
    if (!(cin >> V >> E >> raw_K)) return 0;
    
    V_global = V;

    vector<OriginalEdge> edge_list(E);
    vector<vector<Edge>> adj(V);

    for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        long long w;
        cin >> u >> v >> w;
        edge_list[i] = {u, v, w, i};
        adj[u].push_back({v, w, i});
        adj[v].push_back({u, w, i});
    }

    vector<int> temp_terminals(raw_K);
    for (int i = 0; i < raw_K; ++i) {
        cin >> temp_terminals[i];
    }
    sort(temp_terminals.begin(), temp_terminals.end());
    temp_terminals.erase(unique(temp_terminals.begin(), temp_terminals.end()), temp_terminals.end());
    
    int K = temp_terminals.size();
    vector<int> terminals = temp_terminals;
    vector<bool> is_terminal(V, false);
    for(int t : terminals) is_terminal[t] = true;

    if (K == 0 || K == 1) {
        cout << "0 0\n";
        return 0;
    }

    bool use_dp = false;
    if (K <= 15) {
        long long states = (long long)(1 << K) * V;
        long long memory = states * 20LL; // approx 20 bytes per state
        long long ops = 1;
        for (int i = 0; i < K; ++i) ops *= 3;
        ops /= 2;
        if (memory <= 2048LL * 1024 * 1024 && ops * V <= 500000000LL) {
            use_dp = true;
        }
    }

    if (use_dp) {
        int states_count = (1 << K) * V;
        vector<long long> dp(states_count, INF);
        prev_mask_arr.assign(states_count, -1);
        prev_u_arr.assign(states_count, -1);
        prev_edge_arr.assign(states_count, -1);

        for (int i = 0; i < K; ++i) {
            dp[(1 << i) * V + terminals[i]] = 0;
        }

        for (int mask = 1; mask < (1 << K); ++mask) {
            if ((mask & (mask - 1)) != 0) {
                int lsb = mask & -mask;
                int rem_mask = mask ^ lsb;
                for (int sub = (rem_mask - 1) & rem_mask; sub > 0; sub = (sub - 1) & rem_mask) {
                    int actual_sub = sub | lsb;
                    int actual_rem = mask ^ actual_sub;

                    int sub_offset = actual_sub * V;
                    int rem_offset = actual_rem * V;
                    int mask_offset = mask * V;

                    for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
                        long long val = dp[sub_offset + i] + dp[rem_offset + i];
                        if (val < dp[mask_offset + i]) {
                            dp[mask_offset + i] = val;
                            prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + i] = actual_sub;
                            prev_u_arr[mask_offset + i] = i;
                            prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + i] = -1;
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                int actual_sub = lsb;
                int actual_rem = rem_mask;
                int sub_offset = actual_sub * V;
                int rem_offset = actual_rem * V;
                int mask_offset = mask * V;

                for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
                    long long val = dp[sub_offset + i] + dp[rem_offset + i];
                    if (val < dp[mask_offset + i]) {
                        dp[mask_offset + i] = val;
                        prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + i] = actual_sub;
                        prev_u_arr[mask_offset + i] = i;
                        prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + i] = -1;
                    }
                }
            }

            int mask_offset = mask * V;
            priority_queue<pair<long long, int>, vector<pair<long long, int>>, greater<pair<long long, int>>> pq;
            for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
                if (dp[mask_offset + i] != INF) {
                    pq.push({dp[mask_offset + i], i});
                }
            }

            while (!pq.empty()) {
                auto [d, u] = pq.top();
                pq.pop();

                if (d > dp[mask_offset + u]) continue;

                for (auto& edge : adj[u]) {
                    int v = edge.to;
                    long long w = edge.weight;
                    if (d + w < dp[mask_offset + v]) {
                        dp[mask_offset + v] = d + w;
                        prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + v] = mask;
                        prev_u_arr[mask_offset + v] = u;
                        prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + v] = edge.id;
                        pq.push({dp[mask_offset + v], v});
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        long long min_cost = INF;
        int best_u = -1;
        int final_mask = (1 << K) - 1;
        int final_offset = final_mask * V;
        for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
            if (dp[final_offset + i] < min_cost) {
                min_cost = dp[final_offset + i];
                best_u = i;
            }
        }

        if (min_cost < INF) {
            trace(final_mask, best_u);
        }

    } else {
        vector<long long> dist(V, INF);
        vector<int> source(V, -1);
        vector<int> parent_edge(V, -1);
        vector<int> parent_node(V, -1);

        priority_queue<pair<long long, int>, vector<pair<long long, int>>, greater<pair<long long, int>>> pq;
        for (int t : terminals) {
            dist[t] = 0;
            source[t] = t;
            pq.push({0, t});
        }

        while (!pq.empty()) {
            auto [d, u] = pq.top();
            pq.pop();
            if (d > dist[u]) continue;

            for (auto& e : adj[u]) {
                int v = e.to;
                if (d + e.weight < dist[v]) {
                    dist[v] = d + e.weight;
                    source[v] = source[u];
                    parent_edge[v] = e.id;
                    parent_node[v] = u;
                    pq.push({dist[v], v});
                }
            }
        }

        struct Bridge {
            int u, v;
            long long weight;
            int original_u, original_v;
            int edge_id;
        };
        vector<Bridge> bridges;
        for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
            int u = edge_list[i].u;
            int v = edge_list[i].v;
            if (source[u] != -1 && source[v] != -1 && source[u] != source[v]) {
                bridges.push_back({source[u], source[v], dist[u] + edge_list[i].weight + dist[v], u, v, i});
            }
        }

        sort(bridges.begin(), bridges.end(), [](const Bridge& a, const Bridge& b) {
            return a.weight < b.weight;
        });

        DSU dsu_terminals(V);
        vector<Bridge> mst_bridges;
        for (auto& b : bridges) {
            if (dsu_terminals.unite(b.u, b.v)) {
                mst_bridges.push_back(b);
            }
        }

        for (auto& b : mst_bridges) {
            candidate_edges_set.insert(b.edge_id);
            int curr = b.original_u;
            while (curr != b.u) {
                candidate_edges_set.insert(parent_edge[curr]);
                curr = parent_node[curr];
            }
            curr = b.original_v;
            while (curr != b.v) {
                candidate_edges_set.insert(parent_edge[curr]);
                curr = parent_node[curr];
            }
        }
    }

    vector<OriginalEdge> candidate_edges;
    for (int id : candidate_edges_set) {
        candidate_edges.push_back(edge_list[id]);
    }

    sort(candidate_edges.begin(), candidate_edges.end(), [](const OriginalEdge& a, const OriginalEdge& b) {
        return a.weight < b.weight;
    });

    DSU dsu_final(V);
    vector<int> tree_edges;
    for (auto& e : candidate_edges) {
        if (dsu_final.unite(e.u, e.v)) {
            tree_edges.push_back(e.id);
        }
    }

    vector<int> degree(V, 0);
    vector<vector<pair<int, int>>> tree_adj(V);
    for (int id : tree_edges) {
        int u = edge_list[id].u;
        int v = edge_list[id].v;
        tree_adj[u].push_back({v, id});
        tree_adj[v].push_back({u, id});
        degree[u]++;
        degree[v]++;
    }

    queue<int> leaves;
    for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] == 1 && !is_terminal[i]) {
            leaves.push(i);
        }
    }

    vector<bool> keep_edge(E, false);
    for (int id : tree_edges) keep_edge[id] = true;

    while (!leaves.empty()) {
        int u = leaves.front();
        leaves.pop();
        for (auto& edge : tree_adj[u]) {
            if (keep_edge[edge.second]) {
                keep_edge[edge.second] = false;
                degree[edge.first]--;
                if (degree[edge.first] == 1 && !is_terminal[edge.first]) {
                    leaves.push(edge.first);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    long long final_weight = 0;
    vector<int> final_edges;
    for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
        if (keep_edge[i]) {
            final_weight += edge_list[i].weight;
            final_edges.push_back(i);
        }
    }

    cout << final_weight << " " << final_edges.size() << "\n";
    for (int id : final_edges) {
        cout << edge_list[id].u << " " << edge_list[id].v << "\n";
    }

    return 0;
}

#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <queue>
#include <set>
#include <algorithm>
#include <numeric>

using namespace std;

const long long INF = 1e18;

struct Edge {
    int to;
    long long weight;
    int id;
};

struct OriginalEdge {
    int u, v;
    long long weight;
    int id;
};

struct DSU {
    vector<int> parent;
    DSU(int n) {
        parent.resize(n);
        iota(parent.begin(), parent.end(), 0);
    }
    int find(int i) {
        if (parent[i] == i) return i;
        return parent[i] = find(parent[i]);
    }
    bool unite(int i, int j) {
        int root_i = find(i);
        int root_j = find(j);
        if (root_i != root_j) {
            parent[root_i] = root_j;
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
};

// global for tracing exact DP
vector<int> prev_mask_arr;
vector<int> prev_u_arr;
vector<int> prev_edge_arr;
int V_global;
set<int> candidate_edges_set;

void trace(int mask, int u) {

        candidate_edges_set.insert(prev_edge_arr[offset]);
        trace(mask, prev_u_arr[offset]);
    } else {
        trace(prev_mask_arr[offset], u);
        trace(mask ^ prev_mask_arr[offset], u);
    }
}

                            prev_u_arr[mask_offset + i] = i;
                            prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + i] = -1;
                        }

                        prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + i] = -1;
                    }

            int mask_offset = mask * V;

            for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {

                    pq.push({dp[mask_offset + i], i});
                }
            }

            while (!pq.empty()) {

                pq.pop();

                        prev_mask_arr[mask_offset + v] = mask;
                        prev_u_arr[mask_offset + v] = u;
                        prev_edge_arr[mask_offset + v] = edge.id;
                        pq.push({dp[mask_offset + v], v});

        long long min_cost = INF;
        int best_u = -1;

        int final_offset = final_mask * V;
        for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
            if (dp[final_offset + i] < min_cost) {

        vector<long long> dist(V, INF);
        vector<int> source(V, -1);

        priority_queue<pair<long long, int>, vector<pair<long long, int>>, greater<pair<long long, int>>> pq;
        for (int t : terminals) {

            source[t] = t;
            pq.push({0, t});
        }

        while (!pq.empty()) {
            auto [d, u] = pq.top();
            pq.pop();
            if (d > dist[u]) continue;

            for (auto& e : adj[u]) {
                int v = e.to;
                if (d + e.weight < dist[v]) {
                    dist[v] = d + e.weight;
                    source[v] = source[u];
                    parent_edge[v] = e.id;
                    parent_node[v] = u;
                    pq.push({dist[v], v});
                }
            }
        }

        struct Bridge {
            int u, v;
            long long weight;
            int original_u, original_v;
            int edge_id;
        };
        vector<Bridge> bridges;
        for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
            int u = edge_list[i].u;
            int v = edge_list[i].v;
            if (source[u] != -1 && source[v] != -1 && source[u] != source[v]) {
                bridges.push_back({source[u], source[v], dist[u] + edge_list[i].weight + dist[v], u, v, i});
            }
        }

        sort(bridges.begin(), bridges.end(), [](const Bridge& a, const Bridge& b) {
            return a.weight < b.weight;
        });

        DSU dsu_terminals(V);
        vector<Bridge> mst_bridges;
        for (auto& b : bridges) {
            if (dsu_terminals.unite(b.u, b.v)) {
                mst_bridges.push_back(b);
            }
        }

        for (auto& b : mst_bridges) {
            candidate_edges_set.insert(b.edge_id);
            int curr = b.original_u;
            while (curr != b.u) {
                candidate_edges_set.insert(parent_edge[curr]);
                curr = parent_node[curr];
            }
            curr = b.original_v;
            while (curr != b.v) {
                candidate_edges_set.insert(parent_edge[curr]);
                curr = parent_node[curr];
            }
        }
    }

    vector<OriginalEdge> candidate_edges;
    for (int id : candidate_edges_set) {
        candidate_edges.push_back(edge_list[id]);
    }

    sort(candidate_edges.begin(), candidate_edges.end(), [](const OriginalEdge& a, const OriginalEdge& b) {
        return a.weight < b.weight;
    });

    DSU dsu_final(V);
    vector<int> tree_edges;
    for (auto& e : candidate_edges) {
        if (dsu_final.unite(e.u, e.v)) {
            tree_edges.push_back(e.id);
        }
    }

    vector<int> degree(V, 0);
    vector<vector<pair<int, int>>> tree_adj(V);
    for (int id : tree_edges) {
        int u = edge_list[id].u;
        int v = edge_list[id].v;
        tree_adj[u].push_back({v, id});
        tree_adj[v].push_back({u, id});
        degree[u]++;
        degree[v]++;
    }

    queue<int> leaves;
    for (int i = 0; i < V; ++i) {
        if (degree[i] == 1 && !is_terminal[i]) {
            leaves.push(i);
        }
    }

    vector<bool> keep_edge(E, false);
    for (int id : tree_edges) keep_edge[id] = true;

    while (!leaves.empty()) {
        int u = leaves.front();
        leaves.pop();
        for (auto& edge : tree_adj[u]) {
            if (keep_edge[edge.second]) {
                keep_edge[edge.second] = false;
                degree[edge.first]--;
                if (degree[edge.first] == 1 && !is_terminal[edge.first]) {
                    leaves.push(edge.first);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    long long final_weight = 0;
    vector<int> final_edges;
    for (int i = 0; i < E; ++i) {
        if (keep_edge[i]) {
            final_weight += edge_list[i].weight;
            final_edges.push_back(i);
        }
    }

    cout << final_weight << " " << final_edges.size() << "\n";
    for (int id : final_edges) {
        cout << edge_list[id].u << " " << edge_list[id].v << "\n";
    }

    return 0;
}

Test 33: Quadratic Assignment Problem (C#) Score: 0.00 / 17
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C# code to solve the Quadratic Assignment Problem (QAP), which is NP-hard.

**Problem:**
You have N facilities and N locations. You must assign each facility to exactly one
location (a permutation). The cost of assigning facility i to location p[i] is:

sum over all pairs (i, j): flow[i][j] * distance[p[i]][p[j]]

Your goal is to minimize this total cost.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
N
flow[0][0] flow[0][1] ... flow[0][N-1]
...
flow[N-1][0] ... flow[N-1][N-1]
dist[0][0] dist[0][1] ... dist[0][N-1]
...
dist[N-1][0] ... dist[N-1][N-1]
```
All values are integers. Matrices are N×N. Indices are 0-based in the output.

**Output format (stdout):**
```
total_cost
p0 p1 p2 ... p(N-1)
```
Where p is a permutation of 0..N-1 and p[i] is the location assigned to facility i.

**Requirements:**
1. Read from stdin, write to stdout.
2. Output a valid permutation.
3. Handle N from very small up to ~2000 within 5 minutes.
4. Heuristics are acceptable for large N; lower cost scores higher.

Write complete, compilable C# code with a Main method. Assume only the standard library.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Assign N facilities to N locations so that the total cost is minimised, where cost depends on how much material flows between each pair of facilities multiplied by the distance between their assigned locations. Think of arranging departments in an office to minimise how far people walk between them.

This is the Quadratic Assignment Problem, one of the hardest combinatorial optimisation problems. The test uses planted instances with a known optimum for strict grading. Subpasses increase the problem size.

 0.0000
[8 facilities] Error: Execution timed out after 30 seconds

Quadratic Assignment - 8 facilities

View C# Code (7873 chars)
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Diagnostics;

class Program
{
    static void Main()
    {
        Stopwatch sw = Stopwatch.StartNew();
        
        using (Stream s = Console.OpenStandardInput())
        {
            Scanner sc = new Scanner(s);
            int n = sc.NextInt();
            if (n <= 0) return;
            if (n == 1) 
            {
                int f0 = sc.NextInt();
                int d0 = sc.NextInt();
                Console.WriteLine((long)f0 * d0);
                Console.WriteLine("0");
                return;
            }
            
            int[][] flow = new int[n][];
            int[][] flow_t = new int[n][];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            {
                flow[i] = new int[n];
                flow_t[i] = new int[n];
            }
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            {
                for (int j = 0; j < n; j++)
                {
                    flow[i][j] = sc.NextInt();
                }
            }
            
            int[][] dist = new int[n][];
            int[][] dist_t = new int[n][];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            {
                dist[i] = new int[n];
                dist_t[i] = new int[n];
            }
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            {
                for (int j = 0; j < n; j++)
                {
                    dist[i][j] = sc.NextInt();
                }
            }
            
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            {
                for (int j = 0; j < n; j++)
                {
                    flow_t[j][i] = flow[i][j];
                    dist_t[j][i] = dist[i][j];
                }
            }
            
            int[] p = GenerateInitialSolution(n, flow, dist);
            long currentCost = CalculateTotalCost(p, flow, dist);
            long bestCost = currentCost;
            int[] bestP = (int[])p.Clone();
            
            int L = Math.Max(100, Math.Min(100000, n * n / 2));
            long[] f = new long[L];
            for (int i = 0; i < L; i++) f[i] = currentCost;
            
            int k = 0;
            FastRandom rnd = new FastRandom(42);
            long timeLimit = 290000;
            
            while (true)
            {
                if ((k & 16383) == 0) 
                {
                    if (sw.ElapsedMilliseconds >= timeLimit) break;
                }

                int u = rnd.Next(n);
                int v = rnd.Next(n);
                while (u == v)
                {
                    v = rnd.Next(n);
                }
                
                long delta = ComputeDelta(u, v, p, flow, flow_t, dist, dist_t);
                long newCost = currentCost + delta;
                
                int v_idx = k % L;
                if (newCost <= f[v_idx] || newCost <= currentCost)
                {
                    int temp = p[u];
                    p[u] = p[v];
                    p[v] = temp;
                    currentCost = newCost;
                    
                    if (currentCost < bestCost)
                    {
                        bestCost = currentCost;
                        Array.Copy(p, bestP, n);
                    }
                }
                f[v_idx] = currentCost;
                k++;
            }
            
            Console.WriteLine(bestCost);
            Console.WriteLine(string.Join(" ", bestP));
        }
    }
    
    static int[] GenerateInitialSolution(int n, int[][] flow, int[][] dist)
    {
        long[] flowSum = new long[n];
        long[] distSum = new long[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < n; j++)
            {
                flowSum[i] += flow[i][j] + flow[j][i];
                distSum[i] += dist[i][j] + dist[j][i];
            }
        }

        int[] f_idx = new int[n];
        int[] d_idx = new int[n];
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++) { f_idx[i] = i; d_idx[i] = i; }

        Array.Sort(f_idx, (a, b) => flowSum[b].CompareTo(flowSum[a]));
        Array.Sort(d_idx, (a, b) => distSum[a].CompareTo(distSum[b]));

        int[] p = new int[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            p[f_idx[i]] = d_idx[i];
        }
        return p;
    }
    
    static long CalculateTotalCost(int[] p, int[][] flow, int[][] dist)
    {
        long cost = 0;
        int n = p.Length;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < n; j++)
            {
                cost += (long)flow[i][j] * dist[p[i]][p[j]];
            }
        }
        return cost;
    }

    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    static long ComputeDelta(int u, int v, int[] p, int[][] flow, int[][] flow_t, int[][] dist, int[][] dist_t)
    {
        long delta = 0;
        int pu = p[u], pv = p[v];
        int n = p.Length;
        int[] flow_u = flow[u];
        int[] flow_v = flow[v];
        int[] flow_t_u = flow_t[u];
        int[] flow_t_v = flow_t[v];
        
        int[] dist_pu = dist[pu];
        int[] dist_pv = dist[pv];
        int[] dist_t_pu = dist_t[pu];
        int[] dist_t_pv = dist_t[pv];

        int min_uv = u < v ? u : v;
        int max_uv = u > v ? u : v;

        for (int i = 0; i < min_uv; i++)
        {
            int pi = p[i];
            int A = dist_pv[pi] - dist_pu[pi];
            int B = dist_t_pv[pi] - dist_t_pu[pi];
            delta += ((long)flow_u[i] - flow_v[i]) * A
                   + ((long)flow_t_u[i] - flow_t_v[i]) * B;
        }

        for (int i = min_uv + 1; i < max_uv; i++)
        {
            int pi = p[i];
            int A = dist_pv[pi] - dist_pu[pi];
            int B = dist_t_pv[pi] - dist_t_pu[pi];
            delta += ((long)flow_u[i] - flow_v[i]) * A
                   + ((long)flow_t_u[i] - flow_t_v[i]) * B;
        }

        for (int i = max_uv + 1; i < n; i++)
        {
            int pi = p[i];
            int A = dist_pv[pi] - dist_pu[pi];
            int B = dist_t_pv[pi] - dist_t_pu[pi];
            delta += ((long)flow_u[i] - flow_v[i]) * A
                   + ((long)flow_t_u[i] - flow_t_v[i]) * B;
        }
        
        int C = dist_pv[pv] - dist_pu[pu];
        int D = dist_pv[pu] - dist_pu[pv];
        delta += ((long)flow_u[u] - flow_v[v]) * C
               + ((long)flow_u[v] - flow_v[u]) * D;
               
        return delta;
    }
}

public class FastRandom
{
    private uint x, y, z, w;

    public FastRandom(uint seed)
    {
        x = seed;
        y = 362436069;
        z = 521288629;
        w = 88675123;
    }

    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public int Next(int max)
    {
        uint t = x ^ (x << 11);
        x = y; y = z; z = w;
        w = (w ^ (w >> 19)) ^ (t ^ (t >> 8));
        return (int)((w * (ulong)max) >> 32);
    }
}

public class Scanner
{
    private Stream s;
    private byte[] buf = new byte[8192];
    private int head = 0;
    private int tail = 0;

    public Scanner(Stream s)
    {
        this.s = s;
    }

    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public int NextInt()
    {
        int c = Read();
        while (c < '-') 
        {
            if (c == -1) return 0;
            c = Read();
        }
        bool sign = false;
        if (c == '-')
        {
            sign = true;
            c = Read();
        }
        int res = 0;
        while (c >= '0' && c <= '9')
        {
            res = res * 10 + c - '0';
            c = Read();
        }
        return sign ? -res : res;
    }

    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    private int Read()
    {
        if (head >= tail)
        {
            head = 0;
            tail = s.Read(buf, 0, buf.Length);
            if (tail <= 0) return -1;
        }
        return buf[head++];
    }
}

Test 34: Vehicle Routing Problem (Python) Score: 1.00 / 17
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Python code to solve the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP).

**Problem:**
You have a depot and N customers with coordinates and demands. You must create up to K vehicle
routes starting and ending at the depot. Each customer must be visited exactly once and the sum
of demands on any route must not exceed the vehicle capacity. Minimize total travel distance.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
N K CAPACITY
depot_x depot_y
x1 y1 demand1
x2 y2 demand2
...
xN yN demandN
```

**Output format (stdout):**
```
total_distance
num_routes
route_1
route_2
...
```
Each route line should list customer indices (0-based) in visit order.

**Requirements:**
1. Read from stdin, write to stdout.
2. Output valid routes that cover all customers exactly once.
3. Respect vehicle capacity on every route.
4. Heuristics are acceptable for large instances; shorter distance scores higher.

Write complete, runnable Python code.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Plan delivery routes for a fleet of vehicles so that every customer is visited and the total distance travelled is minimised. Each vehicle has a capacity limit, so the AI must decide which customers go on which truck and in what order.

This is the Vehicle Routing Problem, a generalisation of the Travelling Salesman Problem. Subpasses increase the number of customers and vehicles. The baseline uses a simple nearest-neighbour heuristic.

 1.0000
[15 customers, 3 vehicles] Distance 545.6 (NN: 678.6), 0.40s

Vehicle Routing - 15 customers, 3 vehicles

View Python Code (3143 chars)
import sys
import math

def calculate_distance(p1, p2):
    return math.sqrt((p1[0] - p2[0])**2 + (p1[1] - p2[1])**2)

def solve():
    input_data = sys.stdin.read().split()
    if not input_data:
        return
    
    ptr = 0
    N = int(input_data[ptr])
    K = int(input_data[ptr+1])
    CAPACITY = int(input_data[ptr+2])
    ptr += 3
    
    depot = (float(input_data[ptr]), float(input_data[ptr+1]))
    ptr += 2
    
    customers = []
    for i in range(N):
        customers.append({
            'id': i,
            'pos': (float(input_data[ptr]), float(input_data[ptr+1])),
            'demand': int(input_data[ptr+2])
        })
        ptr += 3
        
    savings = []
    for i in range(N):
        for j in range(i + 1, N):
            dist_i0 = calculate_distance(customers[i]['pos'], depot)
            dist_0j = calculate_distance(depot, customers[j]['pos'])
            dist_ij = calculate_distance(customers[i]['pos'], customers[j]['pos'])
            s = dist_i0 + dist_0j - dist_ij
            savings.append((s, i, j))
    
    savings.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    
    routes = [[i] for i in range(N)]
    route_demands = [customers[i]['demand'] for i in range(N)]
    route_map = {i: i for i in range(N)}
    route_ends = {i: (i, i) for i in range(N)}
    
    for s, i, j in savings:
        r1 = route_map[i]
        r2 = route_map[j]
        
        if r1 == r2:
            continue
            
        if route_demands[r1] + route_demands[r2] > CAPACITY:
            continue
            
        start1, end1 = route_ends[r1]
        start2, end2 = route_ends[r2]
        
        merged = False
        if end1 == i and start2 == j:
            new_route = routes[r1] + routes[r2]
            new_ends = (start1, end2)
            merged = True
        elif end1 == i and end2 == j:
            new_route = routes[r1] + routes[r2][::-1]
            new_ends = (start1, start2)
            merged = True
        elif start1 == i and start2 == j:
            new_route = routes[r1][::-1] + routes[r2]
            new_ends = (end1, end2)
            merged = True
        elif start1 == i and end2 == j:
            new_route = routes[r2] + routes[r1]
            new_ends = (start2, end1)
            merged = True
            
        if merged:
            routes[r1] = new_route
            route_demands[r1] += route_demands[r2]
            route_ends[r1] = new_ends
            routes[r2] = []
            route_demands[r2] = 0
            for node in new_route:
                route_map[node] = r1
            
    final_routes = [r for r in routes if r]
    
    total_dist = 0
    for route in final_routes:
        total_dist += calculate_distance(depot, customers[route[0]]['pos'])
        for k in range(len(route) - 1):
            total_dist += calculate_distance(customers[route[k]]['pos'], customers[route[k+1]]['pos'])
        total_dist += calculate_distance(customers[route[-1]]['pos'], depot)
        
    print(f"{total_dist:.4f}")
    print(len(final_routes))
    for route in final_routes:
        print(" ".join(map(str, route)))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()
VRP Visualization — VALID (distance 545.6)
Valid

View Python Code (3143 chars)
import sys
import math

def calculate_distance(p1, p2):
    return math.sqrt((p1[0] - p2[0])**2 + (p1[1] - p2[1])**2)

def solve():
    input_data = sys.stdin.read().split()
    if not input_data:
        return
    
    ptr = 0
    N = int(input_data[ptr])
    K = int(input_data[ptr+1])
    CAPACITY = int(input_data[ptr+2])
    ptr += 3
    
    depot = (float(input_data[ptr]), float(input_data[ptr+1]))
    ptr += 2
    
    customers = []
    for i in range(N):
        customers.append({
            'id': i,
            'pos': (float(input_data[ptr]), float(input_data[ptr+1])),
            'demand': int(input_data[ptr+2])
        })
        ptr += 3
        
    savings = []
    for i in range(N):
        for j in range(i + 1, N):
            dist_i0 = calculate_distance(customers[i]['pos'], depot)
            dist_0j = calculate_distance(depot, customers[j]['pos'])
            dist_ij = calculate_distance(customers[i]['pos'], customers[j]['pos'])
            s = dist_i0 + dist_0j - dist_ij
            savings.append((s, i, j))
    
    savings.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    
    routes = [[i] for i in range(N)]
    route_demands = [customers[i]['demand'] for i in range(N)]
    route_map = {i: i for i in range(N)}
    route_ends = {i: (i, i) for i in range(N)}
    
    for s, i, j in savings:
        r1 = route_map[i]
        r2 = route_map[j]
        
        if r1 == r2:
            continue
            
        if route_demands[r1] + route_demands[r2] > CAPACITY:
            continue
            
        start1, end1 = route_ends[r1]
        start2, end2 = route_ends[r2]
        
        merged = False
        if end1 == i and start2 == j:
            new_route = routes[r1] + routes[r2]
            new_ends = (start1, end2)
            merged = True
        elif end1 == i and end2 == j:
            new_route = routes[r1] + routes[r2][::-1]
            new_ends = (start1, start2)
            merged = True
        elif start1 == i and start2 == j:
            new_route = routes[r1][::-1] + routes[r2]
            new_ends = (end1, end2)
            merged = True
        elif start1 == i and end2 == j:
            new_route = routes[r2] + routes[r1]
            new_ends = (start2, end1)
            merged = True
            
        if merged:
            routes[r1] = new_route
            route_demands[r1] += route_demands[r2]
            route_ends[r1] = new_ends
            routes[r2] = []
            route_demands[r2] = 0
            for node in new_route:
                route_map[node] = r1
            
    final_routes = [r for r in routes if r]
    
    total_dist = 0
    for route in final_routes:
        total_dist += calculate_distance(depot, customers[route[0]]['pos'])
        for k in range(len(route) - 1):
            total_dist += calculate_distance(customers[route[k]]['pos'], customers[route[k+1]]['pos'])
        total_dist += calculate_distance(customers[route[-1]]['pos'], depot)
        
    print(f"{total_dist:.4f}")
    print(len(final_routes))
    for route in final_routes:
        print(" ".join(map(str, route)))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()

Test 35: Minimum Dominating Set (Rust) Score: 14.00 / 21
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Rust code to solve the Minimum Dominating Set problem (NP-hard).

**Problem:**
Given an undirected graph, find a small set of vertices S such that every vertex is
either in S or adjacent to at least one vertex in S. Smaller sets score better.

**Input format (stdin):**
```
num_vertices num_edges
u1 v1
u2 v2
...
```
Vertices are 0-indexed.

**Output format (stdout):**
```
set_size
v1 v2 v3 ...
```
Where the second line lists the vertices in the dominating set (0-indexed).

**Requirements:**
1. Read from stdin, write to stdout.
2. Output a valid dominating set.
3. Heuristics are acceptable for large graphs; smaller sets score higher.
4. Must run within 5 minutes.

**Target environment specs**
Platform: Windows 11 (build 10.0.26200)
Architecture: AMD64
CPU: AMD64 Family 23 Model 8 Stepping 2, AuthenticAMD
Core count: 64
Memory: 127.87 GB
SIMD: AVX, AVX2, SSE, SSE2, SSE3, SSE4.1, SSE4.2, SSSE3
SIMD detail: AVX=yes, AVX-512F=no, AVX2=yes, SSE=yes, SSE2=yes, SSE3=yes, SSE4.1=yes, SSE4.2=yes, SSSE3=yes

**Rust Compiler information**
rustc 1.92.0 (ded5c06cf 2025-12-08) | edition=2024 | host: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc


Write complete, compilable Rust code with a main() function.
 Prompt Changes:

View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Find the smallest set of nodes such that every node in the graph is either in the set or directly connected to a node in the set. Think of placing Wi-Fi routers so that every room is within range of at least one router.

This is NP-hard. The test uses planted instances with a known optimal set for strict pass/fail grading. Subpasses increase the graph size.

 1.0000
[20 vertices] Size 3 (greedy: 3), 0.03s

Minimum Dominating Set - 20 vertices

Approach: The greedy algorithm implemented provides a valid dominating set for the given undirected graph. The code reads the number of vertices and edges from `stdin`, constructs an adjacency list, and iteratively adds the vertex that covers the maximum number of currently uncovered vertices to the set until all vertices are covered. The resulting size of the set and the vertices themselves are printed to ...

View Rust Code (2059 chars)
use std::io::{self, BufRead};

fn main() {
    let stdin = io::stdin();
    let mut lines = stdin.lock().lines();

    let first_line = match lines.next() {
        Some(Ok(l)) => l,
        _ => return,
    };
    let parts: Vec<usize> = first_line.split_whitespace().map(|s| s.parse().unwrap()).collect();
    if parts.len() < 2 { return; }
    let num_vertices = parts[0];
    let num_edges = parts[1];

    let mut adj = vec![Vec::new(); num_vertices];
    for _ in 0..num_edges {
        if let Some(Ok(line)) = lines.next() {
            let edge: Vec<usize> = line.split_whitespace().map(|s| s.parse().unwrap()).collect();
            if edge.len() >= 2 {
                adj[edge[0]].push(edge[1]);
                adj[edge[1]].push(edge[0]);
            }
        }
    }

    let mut covered = vec![false; num_vertices];
    let mut dominating_set = Vec::new();
    let mut num_covered = 0;

    while num_covered < num_vertices {
        let mut best_v = None;
        let mut max_cover_count = 0;

        for v in 0..num_vertices {
            let mut cover_count = 0;
            if !covered[v] {
                cover_count += 1;
            }
            for &neighbor in &adj[v] {
                if !covered[neighbor] {
                    cover_count += 1;
                }
            }

            if cover_count > max_cover_count {
                max_cover_count = cover_count;
                best_v = Some(v);
            }
        }

        if let Some(v) = best_v {
            dominating_set.push(v);
            if !covered[v] {
                covered[v] = true;
                num_covered += 1;
            }
            for &neighbor in &adj[v] {
                if !covered[neighbor] {
                    covered[neighbor] = true;
                    num_covered += 1;
                }
            }
        } else {
            break;
        }
    }

    println!("{}", dominating_set.len());
    let output: Vec<String> = dominating_set.iter().map(|v| v.to_string()).collect();
    println!("{}", output.join(" "));
}

Test 36: Maximum Independent Set (C++) Score: 1.00 / 13
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C++ code to solve the **Maximum Independent Set** problem.

Given an undirected graph, find the largest set of vertices such that no two chosen vertices share an edge.

The evaluator is strict: only an exact maximum independent set is accepted.

**Input format (stdin)**
```
n m
u v
u v
... (m lines total)
```
- `n` = number of vertices (0-indexed: 0..n-1)
- `m` = number of undirected edges
- each edge appears as two integers `u v`

**Output format (stdout)**
```
k
v1 v2 v3 ... vk
```
- `k` = size of your independent set
- second line lists exactly `k` distinct vertex indices (space-separated)
- vertices may be printed in any order

**What will be checked**
1. Output format is valid.
2. Every printed vertex is in range.
3. No edge exists between any two printed vertices.
4. `k` is the true maximum for the input graph.

**Requirements**
1. Use standard C++ (C++17-compatible).
2. Read from stdin and write to stdout.
3. Handle small and very large graphs.
4. Finish within the test timeout.

**Environment**

Architecture: AMD64
CPU: AMD64 Family 23 Model 8 Stepping 2, AuthenticAMD
Core count: 64
Memory: 127.87 GB

Write complete, compilable C++ code with `main()`.
 Prompt Changes:

Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Find the largest group of nodes in a graph such that no two nodes in the group are connected by an edge. Think of seating people at a dinner party where certain pairs don’t get along — seat as many guests as possible with no feuding neighbours at the same table.

This is NP-hard. The test uses planted instances with a known optimal answer for strict pass/fail grading. Subpasses increase the graph size.

 1.0000
[tiny (60 vertices), planted MIS=20] PASS: maximum independent set size 20 in 0.05s

Maximum Independent Set - tiny (60 vertices), planted MIS=20

Graph: 60 vertices, ~200 edges, planted optimum size = 20

Approach: The Maximum Independent Set problem is NP-hard. The provided C++ solution uses a backtracking algorithm with pruning (via a bitset for efficient set operations and a degree-based heuristic) to find the exact maximum independent set.

View C++ Code (1951 chars)
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
#include <bitset>

using namespace std;

// Maximum number of vertices for the problem constraints.
// Using a bitset for the adjacency matrix and sets.
const int MAXN = 100;
bitset<MAXN> adj[MAXN];
bitset<MAXN> best_set;
int max_k = 0;

void solve(bitset<MAXN> P, bitset<MAXN> current_set, int k) {
    if (P.none()) {
        if (k > max_k) {
            max_k = k;
            best_set = current_set;
        }
        return;
    }

    // Pruning: if current k + remaining possible vertices <= max_k, return.
    if (k + (int)P.count() <= max_k) {
        return;
    }

    // Heuristic: pick the vertex with the highest degree in the subgraph P.
    int v = -1;
    int max_degree = -1;
    for (int i = 0; i < MAXN; ++i) {
        if (P.test(i)) {
            int degree = (int)(adj[i] & P).count();
            if (degree > max_degree) {
                max_degree = degree;
                v = i;
            }
        }
    }

    if (v == -1) return;

    // Branch 1: include v in the independent set
    bitset<MAXN> next_P = P & ~adj[v];
    next_P.reset(v);
    solve(next_P, current_set | bitset<MAXN>().set(v), k + 1);

    // Branch 2: exclude v
    P.reset(v);
    solve(P, current_set, k);
}

int main() {
    ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(NULL);

    int n, m;
    if (!(cin >> n >> m)) return 0;

    for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        cin >> u >> v;
        if (u >= 0 && u < n && v >= 0 && v < n && u != v) {
            adj[u].set(v);
            adj[v].set(u);
        }
    }

    bitset<MAXN> P;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) P.set(i);

    solve(P, bitset<MAXN>(), 0);

    cout << max_k << "\n";
    bool first = true;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        if (best_set.test(i)) {
            if (!first) cout << " ";
            cout << i;
            first = false;
        }
    }
    cout << endl;

    return 0;
}

Vertices: 60 | Solution vertices: 20 | Chosen: 20 | Missed: 0 | Extras: 0 | Conflicts: 0

View C++ Code (1951 chars)
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
#include <bitset>

using namespace std;

// Maximum number of vertices for the problem constraints.
// Using a bitset for the adjacency matrix and sets.
const int MAXN = 100;
bitset<MAXN> adj[MAXN];
bitset<MAXN> best_set;
int max_k = 0;

void solve(bitset<MAXN> P, bitset<MAXN> current_set, int k) {
    if (P.none()) {
        if (k > max_k) {
            max_k = k;
            best_set = current_set;
        }
        return;
    }

    // Pruning: if current k + remaining possible vertices <= max_k, return.
    if (k + (int)P.count() <= max_k) {
        return;
    }

    // Heuristic: pick the vertex with the highest degree in the subgraph P.
    int v = -1;
    int max_degree = -1;
    for (int i = 0; i < MAXN; ++i) {
        if (P.test(i)) {
            int degree = (int)(adj[i] & P).count();
            if (degree > max_degree) {
                max_degree = degree;
                v = i;
            }
        }
    }

    if (v == -1) return;

    // Branch 1: include v in the independent set
    bitset<MAXN> next_P = P & ~adj[v];
    next_P.reset(v);
    solve(next_P, current_set | bitset<MAXN>().set(v), k + 1);

    // Branch 2: exclude v
    P.reset(v);
    solve(P, current_set, k);
}

int main() {
    ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    cin.tie(NULL);

    int n, m;
    if (!(cin >> n >> m)) return 0;

    for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        cin >> u >> v;
        if (u >= 0 && u < n && v >= 0 && v < n && u != v) {
            adj[u].set(v);
            adj[v].set(u);
        }
    }

    bitset<MAXN> P;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) P.set(i);

    solve(P, bitset<MAXN>(), 0);

    cout << max_k << "\n";
    bool first = true;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        if (best_set.test(i)) {
            if (!first) cout << " ";
            cout << i;
            first = false;
        }
    }
    cout << endl;

    return 0;
}
