Test 39: Graph Bisection (Rust) Score: 5.00 / 13
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Rust code to solve the **Graph Bisection** problem.

Given an undirected graph with an even number of vertices, split the vertices into two equal-size parts to minimize cut edges (edges with endpoints in different parts).

The evaluator is strict: only a minimum-cut valid bisection is accepted.

**Input format (stdin)**
```
n m
u v
u v
... (m lines total)
```
- `n` vertices labeled `0..n-1` (n is even)
- `m` undirected edges

**Output format (stdout)**
```
cut_size
v1 v2 v3 ... v(n/2)
```
- first line: reported cut size
- second line: vertices in partition A (exactly n/2 distinct indices)
- partition B is all remaining vertices

**What is checked**
1. Output format is valid.
2. Partition size is exactly `n/2` and vertices are valid/distinct.
3. Reported cut matches the actual cut.
4. The cut is minimum for the instance.

Write complete Rust code with `main` that reads stdin and writes stdout.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Split a graph’s nodes into two equally-sized groups so that as few edges as possible cross between the groups. Think of dividing a school into two teams where friends want to stay together — minimise the number of friendships that get split.

The test uses planted graphs that can be perfectly bisected with zero crossing edges, so grading is strict pass/fail. Subpasses increase the graph size.

 1.0000
[tiny: 40 vertices] PASS: minimum cut 0 in 0.09s

Graph Bisection - tiny: 40 vertices

Vertices: 40 | Edges: ~108 | Target partition size: 20 | Known optimum cut: 0

View Rust Code (12702 chars)
use std::io::{self, Read};
use std::time::Instant;

struct XorShift {
    state: u64,
}

impl XorShift {
    fn new(seed: u64) -> Self {
        Self { state: seed.max(1) }
    }
    
    fn next(&mut self) -> u64 {
        let mut x = self.state;
        x ^= x << 13;
        x ^= x >> 7;
        x ^= x << 17;
        self.state = x;
        x
    }
    
    fn next_usize(&mut self, max: usize) -> usize {
        (self.next() % (max as u64)) as usize
    }
}

fn shuffle(arr: &mut [usize], rng: &mut XorShift) {
    let n = arr.len();
    if n <= 1 { return; }
    for i in (1..n).rev() {
        let j = rng.next_usize(i + 1);
        arr.swap(i, j);
    }
}

struct SolverState {
    best_cut: u32,
    best_part: Vec<u8>,
    start_time: Instant,
    call_count: u32,
    timeout: bool,
}

fn kernighan_lin(
    graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>,
    adj: &Vec<u16>,
    use_adj: bool,
    n: usize,
    iterations: usize,
) -> (u32, Vec<u8>) {
    if n == 0 { return (0, vec![]); }
    
    let mut best_overall_cut = u32::MAX;
    let mut best_overall_part = vec![];
    let mut rng = XorShift::new(123456789);

    for _ in 0..iterations {
        let mut part = vec![0u8; n];
        let mut nodes: Vec<usize> = (0..n).collect();
        shuffle(&mut nodes, &mut rng);
        for i in 0..n/2 {
            part[nodes[i]] = 1;
        }

        let mut current_cut = 0;
        for u in 0..n {
            for &v in &graph[u] {
                if u < v && part[u] != part[v] {
                    current_cut += 1;
                }
            }
        }

        let mut improved = true;
        while improved {
            improved = false;
            
            let mut d = vec![0i32; n];
            for u in 0..n {
                for &v in &graph[u] {
                    if part[u] != part[v] {
                        d[u] += 1;
                    } else {
                        d[u] -= 1;
                    }
                }
            }

            let mut unvisited = vec![true; n];
            let mut max_gains = Vec::with_capacity(n / 2);
            let mut swaps = Vec::with_capacity(n / 2);

            for _ in 0..n/2 {
                let mut valid_u = Vec::with_capacity(n/2);
                let mut valid_v = Vec::with_capacity(n/2);
                for i in 0..n {
                    if unvisited[i] {
                        if part[i] == 0 {
                            valid_u.push(i);
                        } else {
                            valid_v.push(i);
                        }
                    }
                }

                if valid_u.is_empty() || valid_v.is_empty() {
                    break;
                }

                let mut best_gain = i32::MIN;
                let mut best_pair = (n, n);

                for &u in &valid_u {
                    let du = d[u];
                    for &v in &valid_v {
                        let is_edge = if use_adj {
                            adj[u * n + v] as i32
                        } else {
                            let mut cnt = 0;
                            for &neighbor in &graph[u] {
                                if neighbor == v { cnt += 1; }
                            }
                            cnt
                        };
                        
                        let gain = du + d[v] - 2 * is_edge;
                        if gain > best_gain {
                            best_gain = gain;
                            best_pair = (u, v);
                        }
                    }
                }

                if best_pair.0 == n { break; }
                
                let (u, v) = best_pair;
                unvisited[u] = false;
                unvisited[v] = false;
                max_gains.push(best_gain);
                swaps.push((u, v));
                
                for &w in &graph[u] {
                    if unvisited[w] {
                        if part[w] == part[u] {
                            d[w] += 2;
                        } else {
                            d[w] -= 2;
                        }
                    }
                }
                for &w in &graph[v] {
                    if unvisited[w] {
                        if part[w] == part[v] {
                            d[w] += 2;
                        } else {
                            d[w] -= 2;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            let mut max_prefix_sum = 0i32;
            let mut current_sum = 0i32;
            let mut best_k = 0;
            
            for k in 0..max_gains.len() {
                current_sum += max_gains[k];
                if current_sum > max_prefix_sum {
                    max_prefix_sum = current_sum;
                    best_k = k + 1;
                }
            }

            if max_prefix_sum > 0 {
                improved = true;
                for k in 0..best_k {
                    let (u, v) = swaps[k];
                    part[u] = 1;
                    part[v] = 0;
                }
                current_cut = (current_cut as i32 - max_prefix_sum) as u32;
            }
        }

        if current_cut < best_overall_cut {
            best_overall_cut = current_cut;
            best_overall_part = part;
        }
    }

    (best_overall_cut, best_overall_part)
}

fn get_mas_order(graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>, n: usize) -> Vec<usize> {
    if n == 0 { return vec![]; }
    let mut order = Vec::with_capacity(n);
    let mut added = vec![false; n];
    let mut degrees = vec![0; n];
    for u in 0..n {
        degrees[u] = graph[u].len();
    }
    
    let mut first = 0;
    let mut max_deg = 0;
    for u in 0..n {
        if degrees[u] > max_deg {
            max_deg = degrees[u];
            first = u;
        }
    }
    
    order.push(first);
    added[first] = true;
    
    let mut connected = vec![0; n];
    for &v in &graph[first] {
        connected[v] += 1;
    }
    
    for _ in 1..n {
        let mut best_node = 0;
        let mut best_conn = -1;
        let mut best_deg = -1;
        
        for u in 0..n {
            if !added[u] {
                if connected[u] as i32 > best_conn || (connected[u] as i32 == best_conn && degrees[u] as i32 > best_deg) {
                    best_conn = connected[u] as i32;
                    best_deg = degrees[u] as i32;
                    best_node = u;
                }
            }
        }
        
        order.push(best_node);
        added[best_node] = true;
        for &v in &graph[best_node] {
            connected[v] += 1;
        }
    }
    
    order
}

fn dfs(
    idx: usize,
    count0: usize,
    count1: usize,
    current_cut: u32,
    lb_extra: u32,
    edges_to_0: &mut [u32],
    edges_to_1: &mut [u32],
    part: &mut [u8],
    state: &mut SolverState,
    graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>,
    order: &[usize],
    n: usize,
) {
    if state.timeout {
        return;
    }
    
    state.call_count += 1;
    if state.call_count & 4095 == 0 {
        if state.start_time.elapsed().as_millis() > 1900 {
            state.timeout = true;
            return;
        }
    }

    if count0 == n / 2 {
        let mut final_cut = current_cut;
        for i in idx..n {
            let u = order[i];
            final_cut += edges_to_0[u];
        }
        if final_cut < state.best_cut {
            state.best_cut = final_cut;
            state.best_part = part.to_vec();
            for i in idx..n {
                let u = order[i];
                state.best_part[u] = 1;
            }
        }
        return;
    }
    
    if count1 == n / 2 {
        let mut final_cut = current_cut;
        for i in idx..n {
            let u = order[i];
            final_cut += edges_to_1[u];
        }
        if final_cut < state.best_cut {
            state.best_cut = final_cut;
            state.best_part = part.to_vec();
            for i in idx..n {
                let u = order[i];
                state.best_part[u] = 0;
            }
        }
        return;
    }

    if current_cut + lb_extra >= state.best_cut {
        return;
    }

    let u = order[idx];
    let cost0 = edges_to_1[u];
    let cost1 = edges_to_0[u];
    
    let try_0_first = cost0 <= cost1;

    macro_rules! assign_0 {
        () => {
            let added_cut = edges_to_1[u];
            let mut new_lb_extra = lb_extra - std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[u], edges_to_1[u]);
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    let old_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    edges_to_0[w] += 1;
                    let new_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    new_lb_extra += new_min - old_min;
                }
            }
            
            part[u] = 0;
            dfs(idx + 1, count0 + 1, count1, current_cut + added_cut, new_lb_extra, edges_to_0, edges_to_1, part, state, graph, order, n);
            part[u] = 2;
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    edges_to_0[w] -= 1;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    macro_rules! assign_1 {
        () => {
            let added_cut = edges_to_0[u];
            let mut new_lb_extra = lb_extra - std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[u], edges_to_1[u]);
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    let old_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    edges_to_1[w] += 1;
                    let new_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    new_lb_extra += new_min - old_min;
                }
            }
            
            part[u] = 1;
            dfs(idx + 1, count0, count1 + 1, current_cut + added_cut, new_lb_extra, edges_to_0, edges_to_1, part, state, graph, order, n);
            part[u] = 2;
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    edges_to_1[w] -= 1;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if try_0_first {
        assign_0!();
        assign_1!();
    } else {
        assign_1!();
        assign_0!();
    }
}

fn solve(graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>, adj: &Vec<u16>, use_adj: bool, n: usize) -> (u32, Vec<u8>) {
    if n == 0 { return (0, vec![]); }
    
    let kl_iters = if n <= 50 {
        2000
    } else if n <= 100 {
        1000
    } else if n <= 200 {
        400
    } else if n <= 500 {
        100
    } else {
        20
    };
    
    let (best_cut, best_part) = kernighan_lin(graph, adj, use_adj, n, kl_iters);
    
    let order = get_mas_order(graph, n);
    
    let mut state = SolverState {
        best_cut,
        best_part: best_part.clone(),
        start_time: Instant::now(),
        call_count: 0,
        timeout: false,
    };
    
    let mut edges_to_0 = vec![0; n];
    let mut edges_to_1 = vec![0; n];
    let mut part = vec![2u8; n];
    
    let u = order[0];
    part[u] = 0;
    for &w in &graph[u] {
        edges_to_0[w] += 1;
    }
    
    let mut initial_lb_extra = 0;
    for w in 0..n {
        if part[w] == 2 {
            initial_lb_extra += std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
        }
    }
    
    dfs(1, 1, 0, 0, initial_lb_extra, &mut edges_to_0, &mut edges_to_1, &mut part, &mut state, graph, &order, n);
    
    (state.best_cut, state.best_part)
}

fn main() {
    let mut input = String::new();
    if let Err(_) = io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input) {
        return;
    }
    let mut tokens = input.split_whitespace();

    let n_str = tokens.next();
    if n_str.is_none() { return; }
    let n: usize = n_str.unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let m: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();

    let mut graph = vec![vec![]; n];
    let use_adj = n <= 5000;
    let mut adj = if use_adj { vec![0u16; n * n] } else { vec![] };

    for _ in 0..m {
        let u: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
        let v: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
        if u != v {
            graph[u].push(v);
            graph[v].push(u);
            if use_adj {
                adj[u * n + v] = adj[u * n + v].saturating_add(1);
                adj[v * n + u] = adj[v * n + u].saturating_add(1);
            }
        }
    }

    let (best_cut, best_part) = solve(&graph, &adj, use_adj, n);

    println!("{}", best_cut);
    let mut part_a = vec![];
    for i in 0..n {
        if best_part[i] == 0 {
            part_a.push(i);
        }
    }
    
    for i in 0..part_a.len() {
        if i > 0 {
            print!(" ");
        }
        print!("{}", part_a[i]);
    }
    println!();
}

View Rust Code (12702 chars)
use std::io::{self, Read};
use std::time::Instant;

struct XorShift {
    state: u64,
}

impl XorShift {
    fn new(seed: u64) -> Self {
        Self { state: seed.max(1) }
    }
    
    fn next(&mut self) -> u64 {
        let mut x = self.state;
        x ^= x << 13;
        x ^= x >> 7;
        x ^= x << 17;
        self.state = x;
        x
    }
    
    fn next_usize(&mut self, max: usize) -> usize {
        (self.next() % (max as u64)) as usize
    }
}

fn shuffle(arr: &mut [usize], rng: &mut XorShift) {
    let n = arr.len();
    if n <= 1 { return; }
    for i in (1..n).rev() {
        let j = rng.next_usize(i + 1);
        arr.swap(i, j);
    }
}

struct SolverState {
    best_cut: u32,
    best_part: Vec<u8>,
    start_time: Instant,
    call_count: u32,
    timeout: bool,
}

fn kernighan_lin(
    graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>,
    adj: &Vec<u16>,
    use_adj: bool,
    n: usize,
    iterations: usize,
) -> (u32, Vec<u8>) {
    if n == 0 { return (0, vec![]); }
    
    let mut best_overall_cut = u32::MAX;
    let mut best_overall_part = vec![];
    let mut rng = XorShift::new(123456789);

    for _ in 0..iterations {
        let mut part = vec![0u8; n];
        let mut nodes: Vec<usize> = (0..n).collect();
        shuffle(&mut nodes, &mut rng);
        for i in 0..n/2 {
            part[nodes[i]] = 1;
        }

        let mut current_cut = 0;
        for u in 0..n {
            for &v in &graph[u] {
                if u < v && part[u] != part[v] {
                    current_cut += 1;
                }
            }
        }

        let mut improved = true;
        while improved {
            improved = false;
            
            let mut d = vec![0i32; n];
            for u in 0..n {
                for &v in &graph[u] {
                    if part[u] != part[v] {
                        d[u] += 1;
                    } else {
                        d[u] -= 1;
                    }
                }
            }

            let mut unvisited = vec![true; n];
            let mut max_gains = Vec::with_capacity(n / 2);
            let mut swaps = Vec::with_capacity(n / 2);

            for _ in 0..n/2 {
                let mut valid_u = Vec::with_capacity(n/2);
                let mut valid_v = Vec::with_capacity(n/2);
                for i in 0..n {
                    if unvisited[i] {
                        if part[i] == 0 {
                            valid_u.push(i);
                        } else {
                            valid_v.push(i);
                        }
                    }
                }

                if valid_u.is_empty() || valid_v.is_empty() {
                    break;
                }

                let mut best_gain = i32::MIN;
                let mut best_pair = (n, n);

                for &u in &valid_u {
                    let du = d[u];
                    for &v in &valid_v {
                        let is_edge = if use_adj {
                            adj[u * n + v] as i32
                        } else {
                            let mut cnt = 0;
                            for &neighbor in &graph[u] {
                                if neighbor == v { cnt += 1; }
                            }
                            cnt
                        };
                        
                        let gain = du + d[v] - 2 * is_edge;
                        if gain > best_gain {
                            best_gain = gain;
                            best_pair = (u, v);
                        }
                    }
                }

                if best_pair.0 == n { break; }
                
                let (u, v) = best_pair;
                unvisited[u] = false;
                unvisited[v] = false;
                max_gains.push(best_gain);
                swaps.push((u, v));
                
                for &w in &graph[u] {
                    if unvisited[w] {
                        if part[w] == part[u] {
                            d[w] += 2;
                        } else {
                            d[w] -= 2;
                        }
                    }
                }
                for &w in &graph[v] {
                    if unvisited[w] {
                        if part[w] == part[v] {
                            d[w] += 2;
                        } else {
                            d[w] -= 2;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            let mut max_prefix_sum = 0i32;
            let mut current_sum = 0i32;
            let mut best_k = 0;
            
            for k in 0..max_gains.len() {
                current_sum += max_gains[k];
                if current_sum > max_prefix_sum {
                    max_prefix_sum = current_sum;
                    best_k = k + 1;
                }
            }

            if max_prefix_sum > 0 {
                improved = true;
                for k in 0..best_k {
                    let (u, v) = swaps[k];
                    part[u] = 1;
                    part[v] = 0;
                }
                current_cut = (current_cut as i32 - max_prefix_sum) as u32;
            }
        }

        if current_cut < best_overall_cut {
            best_overall_cut = current_cut;
            best_overall_part = part;
        }
    }

    (best_overall_cut, best_overall_part)
}

fn get_mas_order(graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>, n: usize) -> Vec<usize> {
    if n == 0 { return vec![]; }
    let mut order = Vec::with_capacity(n);
    let mut added = vec![false; n];
    let mut degrees = vec![0; n];
    for u in 0..n {
        degrees[u] = graph[u].len();
    }
    
    let mut first = 0;
    let mut max_deg = 0;
    for u in 0..n {
        if degrees[u] > max_deg {
            max_deg = degrees[u];
            first = u;
        }
    }
    
    order.push(first);
    added[first] = true;
    
    let mut connected = vec![0; n];
    for &v in &graph[first] {
        connected[v] += 1;
    }
    
    for _ in 1..n {
        let mut best_node = 0;
        let mut best_conn = -1;
        let mut best_deg = -1;
        
        for u in 0..n {
            if !added[u] {
                if connected[u] as i32 > best_conn || (connected[u] as i32 == best_conn && degrees[u] as i32 > best_deg) {
                    best_conn = connected[u] as i32;
                    best_deg = degrees[u] as i32;
                    best_node = u;
                }
            }
        }
        
        order.push(best_node);
        added[best_node] = true;
        for &v in &graph[best_node] {
            connected[v] += 1;
        }
    }
    
    order
}

fn dfs(
    idx: usize,
    count0: usize,
    count1: usize,
    current_cut: u32,
    lb_extra: u32,
    edges_to_0: &mut [u32],
    edges_to_1: &mut [u32],
    part: &mut [u8],
    state: &mut SolverState,
    graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>,
    order: &[usize],
    n: usize,
) {
    if state.timeout {
        return;
    }
    
    state.call_count += 1;
    if state.call_count & 4095 == 0 {
        if state.start_time.elapsed().as_millis() > 1900 {
            state.timeout = true;
            return;
        }
    }

    if count0 == n / 2 {
        let mut final_cut = current_cut;
        for i in idx..n {
            let u = order[i];
            final_cut += edges_to_0[u];
        }
        if final_cut < state.best_cut {
            state.best_cut = final_cut;
            state.best_part = part.to_vec();
            for i in idx..n {
                let u = order[i];
                state.best_part[u] = 1;
            }
        }
        return;
    }
    
    if count1 == n / 2 {
        let mut final_cut = current_cut;
        for i in idx..n {
            let u = order[i];
            final_cut += edges_to_1[u];
        }
        if final_cut < state.best_cut {
            state.best_cut = final_cut;
            state.best_part = part.to_vec();
            for i in idx..n {
                let u = order[i];
                state.best_part[u] = 0;
            }
        }
        return;
    }

    if current_cut + lb_extra >= state.best_cut {
        return;
    }

    let u = order[idx];
    let cost0 = edges_to_1[u];
    let cost1 = edges_to_0[u];
    
    let try_0_first = cost0 <= cost1;

    macro_rules! assign_0 {
        () => {
            let added_cut = edges_to_1[u];
            let mut new_lb_extra = lb_extra - std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[u], edges_to_1[u]);
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    let old_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    edges_to_0[w] += 1;
                    let new_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    new_lb_extra += new_min - old_min;
                }
            }
            
            part[u] = 0;
            dfs(idx + 1, count0 + 1, count1, current_cut + added_cut, new_lb_extra, edges_to_0, edges_to_1, part, state, graph, order, n);
            part[u] = 2;
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    edges_to_0[w] -= 1;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    macro_rules! assign_1 {
        () => {
            let added_cut = edges_to_0[u];
            let mut new_lb_extra = lb_extra - std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[u], edges_to_1[u]);
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    let old_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    edges_to_1[w] += 1;
                    let new_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    new_lb_extra += new_min - old_min;
                }
            }
            
            part[u] = 1;
            dfs(idx + 1, count0, count1 + 1, current_cut + added_cut, new_lb_extra, edges_to_0, edges_to_1, part, state, graph, order, n);
            part[u] = 2;
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    edges_to_1[w] -= 1;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if try_0_first {
        assign_0!();
        assign_1!();
    } else {
        assign_1!();
        assign_0!();
    }
}

fn solve(graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>, adj: &Vec<u16>, use_adj: bool, n: usize) -> (u32, Vec<u8>) {
    if n == 0 { return (0, vec![]); }
    
    let kl_iters = if n <= 50 {
        2000
    } else if n <= 100 {
        1000
    } else if n <= 200 {
        400
    } else if n <= 500 {
        100
    } else {
        20
    };
    
    let (best_cut, best_part) = kernighan_lin(graph, adj, use_adj, n, kl_iters);
    
    let order = get_mas_order(graph, n);
    
    let mut state = SolverState {
        best_cut,
        best_part: best_part.clone(),
        start_time: Instant::now(),
        call_count: 0,
        timeout: false,
    };
    
    let mut edges_to_0 = vec![0; n];
    let mut edges_to_1 = vec![0; n];
    let mut part = vec![2u8; n];
    
    let u = order[0];
    part[u] = 0;
    for &w in &graph[u] {
        edges_to_0[w] += 1;
    }
    
    let mut initial_lb_extra = 0;
    for w in 0..n {
        if part[w] == 2 {
            initial_lb_extra += std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
        }
    }
    
    dfs(1, 1, 0, 0, initial_lb_extra, &mut edges_to_0, &mut edges_to_1, &mut part, &mut state, graph, &order, n);
    
    (state.best_cut, state.best_part)
}

fn main() {
    let mut input = String::new();
    if let Err(_) = io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input) {
        return;
    }
    let mut tokens = input.split_whitespace();

    let n_str = tokens.next();
    if n_str.is_none() { return; }
    let n: usize = n_str.unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let m: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();

    let mut graph = vec![vec![]; n];
    let use_adj = n <= 5000;
    let mut adj = if use_adj { vec![0u16; n * n] } else { vec![] };

    for _ in 0..m {
        let u: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
        let v: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
        if u != v {
            graph[u].push(v);
            graph[v].push(u);
            if use_adj {
                adj[u * n + v] = adj[u * n + v].saturating_add(1);
                adj[v * n + u] = adj[v * n + u].saturating_add(1);
            }
        }
    }

    let (best_cut, best_part) = solve(&graph, &adj, use_adj, n);

    println!("{}", best_cut);
    let mut part_a = vec![];
    for i in 0..n {
        if best_part[i] == 0 {
            part_a.push(i);
        }
    }
    
    for i in 0..part_a.len() {
        if i > 0 {
            print!(" ");
        }
        print!("{}", part_a[i]);
    }
    println!();
}

Graph Bisection - 160 vertices

Vertices: 160 | Edges: ~468 | Target partition size: 80 | Known optimum cut: 0

View Rust Code (12702 chars)
use std::io::{self, Read};
use std::time::Instant;

struct XorShift {
    state: u64,
}

impl XorShift {
    fn new(seed: u64) -> Self {
        Self { state: seed.max(1) }
    }
    
    fn next(&mut self) -> u64 {
        let mut x = self.state;
        x ^= x << 13;
        x ^= x >> 7;
        x ^= x << 17;
        self.state = x;
        x
    }
    
    fn next_usize(&mut self, max: usize) -> usize {
        (self.next() % (max as u64)) as usize
    }
}

fn shuffle(arr: &mut [usize], rng: &mut XorShift) {
    let n = arr.len();
    if n <= 1 { return; }
    for i in (1..n).rev() {
        let j = rng.next_usize(i + 1);
        arr.swap(i, j);
    }
}

struct SolverState {
    best_cut: u32,
    best_part: Vec<u8>,
    start_time: Instant,
    call_count: u32,
    timeout: bool,
}

fn kernighan_lin(
    graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>,
    adj: &Vec<u16>,
    use_adj: bool,
    n: usize,
    iterations: usize,
) -> (u32, Vec<u8>) {
    if n == 0 { return (0, vec![]); }
    
    let mut best_overall_cut = u32::MAX;
    let mut best_overall_part = vec![];
    let mut rng = XorShift::new(123456789);

    for _ in 0..iterations {
        let mut part = vec![0u8; n];
        let mut nodes: Vec<usize> = (0..n).collect();
        shuffle(&mut nodes, &mut rng);
        for i in 0..n/2 {
            part[nodes[i]] = 1;
        }

        let mut current_cut = 0;
        for u in 0..n {
            for &v in &graph[u] {
                if u < v && part[u] != part[v] {
                    current_cut += 1;
                }
            }
        }

        let mut improved = true;
        while improved {
            improved = false;
            
            let mut d = vec![0i32; n];
            for u in 0..n {
                for &v in &graph[u] {
                    if part[u] != part[v] {
                        d[u] += 1;
                    } else {
                        d[u] -= 1;
                    }
                }
            }

            let mut unvisited = vec![true; n];
            let mut max_gains = Vec::with_capacity(n / 2);
            let mut swaps = Vec::with_capacity(n / 2);

            for _ in 0..n/2 {
                let mut valid_u = Vec::with_capacity(n/2);
                let mut valid_v = Vec::with_capacity(n/2);
                for i in 0..n {
                    if unvisited[i] {
                        if part[i] == 0 {
                            valid_u.push(i);
                        } else {
                            valid_v.push(i);
                        }
                    }
                }

                if valid_u.is_empty() || valid_v.is_empty() {
                    break;
                }

                let mut best_gain = i32::MIN;
                let mut best_pair = (n, n);

                for &u in &valid_u {
                    let du = d[u];
                    for &v in &valid_v {
                        let is_edge = if use_adj {
                            adj[u * n + v] as i32
                        } else {
                            let mut cnt = 0;
                            for &neighbor in &graph[u] {
                                if neighbor == v { cnt += 1; }
                            }
                            cnt
                        };
                        
                        let gain = du + d[v] - 2 * is_edge;
                        if gain > best_gain {
                            best_gain = gain;
                            best_pair = (u, v);
                        }
                    }
                }

                if best_pair.0 == n { break; }
                
                let (u, v) = best_pair;
                unvisited[u] = false;
                unvisited[v] = false;
                max_gains.push(best_gain);
                swaps.push((u, v));
                
                for &w in &graph[u] {
                    if unvisited[w] {
                        if part[w] == part[u] {
                            d[w] += 2;
                        } else {
                            d[w] -= 2;
                        }
                    }
                }
                for &w in &graph[v] {
                    if unvisited[w] {
                        if part[w] == part[v] {
                            d[w] += 2;
                        } else {
                            d[w] -= 2;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            let mut max_prefix_sum = 0i32;
            let mut current_sum = 0i32;
            let mut best_k = 0;
            
            for k in 0..max_gains.len() {
                current_sum += max_gains[k];
                if current_sum > max_prefix_sum {
                    max_prefix_sum = current_sum;
                    best_k = k + 1;
                }
            }

            if max_prefix_sum > 0 {
                improved = true;
                for k in 0..best_k {
                    let (u, v) = swaps[k];
                    part[u] = 1;
                    part[v] = 0;
                }
                current_cut = (current_cut as i32 - max_prefix_sum) as u32;
            }
        }

        if current_cut < best_overall_cut {
            best_overall_cut = current_cut;
            best_overall_part = part;
        }
    }

    (best_overall_cut, best_overall_part)
}

fn get_mas_order(graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>, n: usize) -> Vec<usize> {
    if n == 0 { return vec![]; }
    let mut order = Vec::with_capacity(n);
    let mut added = vec![false; n];
    let mut degrees = vec![0; n];
    for u in 0..n {
        degrees[u] = graph[u].len();
    }
    
    let mut first = 0;
    let mut max_deg = 0;
    for u in 0..n {
        if degrees[u] > max_deg {
            max_deg = degrees[u];
            first = u;
        }
    }
    
    order.push(first);
    added[first] = true;
    
    let mut connected = vec![0; n];
    for &v in &graph[first] {
        connected[v] += 1;
    }
    
    for _ in 1..n {
        let mut best_node = 0;
        let mut best_conn = -1;
        let mut best_deg = -1;
        
        for u in 0..n {
            if !added[u] {
                if connected[u] as i32 > best_conn || (connected[u] as i32 == best_conn && degrees[u] as i32 > best_deg) {
                    best_conn = connected[u] as i32;
                    best_deg = degrees[u] as i32;
                    best_node = u;
                }
            }
        }
        
        order.push(best_node);
        added[best_node] = true;
        for &v in &graph[best_node] {
            connected[v] += 1;
        }
    }
    
    order
}

fn dfs(
    idx: usize,
    count0: usize,
    count1: usize,
    current_cut: u32,
    lb_extra: u32,
    edges_to_0: &mut [u32],
    edges_to_1: &mut [u32],
    part: &mut [u8],
    state: &mut SolverState,
    graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>,
    order: &[usize],
    n: usize,
) {
    if state.timeout {
        return;
    }
    
    state.call_count += 1;
    if state.call_count & 4095 == 0 {
        if state.start_time.elapsed().as_millis() > 1900 {
            state.timeout = true;
            return;
        }
    }

    if count0 == n / 2 {
        let mut final_cut = current_cut;
        for i in idx..n {
            let u = order[i];
            final_cut += edges_to_0[u];
        }
        if final_cut < state.best_cut {
            state.best_cut = final_cut;
            state.best_part = part.to_vec();
            for i in idx..n {
                let u = order[i];
                state.best_part[u] = 1;
            }
        }
        return;
    }
    
    if count1 == n / 2 {
        let mut final_cut = current_cut;
        for i in idx..n {
            let u = order[i];
            final_cut += edges_to_1[u];
        }
        if final_cut < state.best_cut {
            state.best_cut = final_cut;
            state.best_part = part.to_vec();
            for i in idx..n {
                let u = order[i];
                state.best_part[u] = 0;
            }
        }
        return;
    }

    if current_cut + lb_extra >= state.best_cut {
        return;
    }

    let u = order[idx];
    let cost0 = edges_to_1[u];
    let cost1 = edges_to_0[u];
    
    let try_0_first = cost0 <= cost1;

    macro_rules! assign_0 {
        () => {
            let added_cut = edges_to_1[u];
            let mut new_lb_extra = lb_extra - std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[u], edges_to_1[u]);
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    let old_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    edges_to_0[w] += 1;
                    let new_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    new_lb_extra += new_min - old_min;
                }
            }
            
            part[u] = 0;
            dfs(idx + 1, count0 + 1, count1, current_cut + added_cut, new_lb_extra, edges_to_0, edges_to_1, part, state, graph, order, n);
            part[u] = 2;
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    edges_to_0[w] -= 1;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    macro_rules! assign_1 {
        () => {
            let added_cut = edges_to_0[u];
            let mut new_lb_extra = lb_extra - std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[u], edges_to_1[u]);
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    let old_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    edges_to_1[w] += 1;
                    let new_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    new_lb_extra += new_min - old_min;
                }
            }
            
            part[u] = 1;
            dfs(idx + 1, count0, count1 + 1, current_cut + added_cut, new_lb_extra, edges_to_0, edges_to_1, part, state, graph, order, n);
            part[u] = 2;
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    edges_to_1[w] -= 1;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if try_0_first {
        assign_0!();
        assign_1!();
    } else {
        assign_1!();
        assign_0!();
    }
}

fn solve(graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>, adj: &Vec<u16>, use_adj: bool, n: usize) -> (u32, Vec<u8>) {
    if n == 0 { return (0, vec![]); }
    
    let kl_iters = if n <= 50 {
        2000
    } else if n <= 100 {
        1000
    } else if n <= 200 {
        400
    } else if n <= 500 {
        100
    } else {
        20
    };
    
    let (best_cut, best_part) = kernighan_lin(graph, adj, use_adj, n, kl_iters);
    
    let order = get_mas_order(graph, n);
    
    let mut state = SolverState {
        best_cut,
        best_part: best_part.clone(),
        start_time: Instant::now(),
        call_count: 0,
        timeout: false,
    };
    
    let mut edges_to_0 = vec![0; n];
    let mut edges_to_1 = vec![0; n];
    let mut part = vec![2u8; n];
    
    let u = order[0];
    part[u] = 0;
    for &w in &graph[u] {
        edges_to_0[w] += 1;
    }
    
    let mut initial_lb_extra = 0;
    for w in 0..n {
        if part[w] == 2 {
            initial_lb_extra += std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
        }
    }
    
    dfs(1, 1, 0, 0, initial_lb_extra, &mut edges_to_0, &mut edges_to_1, &mut part, &mut state, graph, &order, n);
    
    (state.best_cut, state.best_part)
}

fn main() {
    let mut input = String::new();
    if let Err(_) = io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input) {
        return;
    }
    let mut tokens = input.split_whitespace();

    let n_str = tokens.next();
    if n_str.is_none() { return; }
    let n: usize = n_str.unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let m: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();

    let mut graph = vec![vec![]; n];
    let use_adj = n <= 5000;
    let mut adj = if use_adj { vec![0u16; n * n] } else { vec![] };

    for _ in 0..m {
        let u: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
        let v: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
        if u != v {
            graph[u].push(v);
            graph[v].push(u);
            if use_adj {
                adj[u * n + v] = adj[u * n + v].saturating_add(1);
                adj[v * n + u] = adj[v * n + u].saturating_add(1);
            }
        }
    }

    let (best_cut, best_part) = solve(&graph, &adj, use_adj, n);

    println!("{}", best_cut);
    let mut part_a = vec![];
    for i in 0..n {
        if best_part[i] == 0 {
            part_a.push(i);
        }
    }
    
    for i in 0..part_a.len() {
        if i > 0 {
            print!(" ");
        }
        print!("{}", part_a[i]);
    }
    println!();
}

use std::io::{self, Read};
use std::time::Instant;

struct XorShift {
    state: u64,
}

impl XorShift {
    fn new(seed: u64) -> Self {
        Self { state: seed.max(1) }
    }
    
    fn next(&mut self) -> u64 {
        let mut x = self.state;
        x ^= x << 13;
        x ^= x >> 7;
        x ^= x << 17;
        self.state = x;
        x
    }
    
    fn next_usize(&mut self, max: usize) -> usize {
        (self.next() % (max as u64)) as usize
    }
}

fn shuffle(arr: &mut [usize], rng: &mut XorShift) {
    let n = arr.len();
    if n <= 1 { return; }
    for i in (1..n).rev() {
        let j = rng.next_usize(i + 1);
        arr.swap(i, j);
    }
}

struct SolverState {
    best_cut: u32,
    best_part: Vec<u8>,
    start_time: Instant,
    call_count: u32,
    timeout: bool,
}

fn kernighan_lin(
    graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>,
    adj: &Vec<u16>,
    use_adj: bool,
    n: usize,
    iterations: usize,
) -> (u32, Vec<u8>) {
    if n == 0 { return (0, vec![]); }
    
    let mut best_overall_cut = u32::MAX;
    let mut best_overall_part = vec![];
    let mut rng = XorShift::new(123456789);

    for _ in 0..iterations {
        let mut part = vec![0u8; n];
        let mut nodes: Vec<usize> = (0..n).collect();
        shuffle(&mut nodes, &mut rng);
        for i in 0..n/2 {
            part[nodes[i]] = 1;
        }

        let mut current_cut = 0;
        for u in 0..n {
            for &v in &graph[u] {
                if u < v && part[u] != part[v] {
                    current_cut += 1;
                }
            }
        }

        let mut improved = true;
        while improved {
            improved = false;
            
            let mut d = vec![0i32; n];
            for u in 0..n {
                for &v in &graph[u] {
                    if part[u] != part[v] {
                        d[u] += 1;
                    } else {
                        d[u] -= 1;
                    }
                }
            }

            let mut unvisited = vec![true; n];
            let mut max_gains = Vec::with_capacity(n / 2);
            let mut swaps = Vec::with_capacity(n / 2);

            for _ in 0..n/2 {
                let mut valid_u = Vec::with_capacity(n/2);
                let mut valid_v = Vec::with_capacity(n/2);
                for i in 0..n {
                    if unvisited[i] {
                        if part[i] == 0 {
                            valid_u.push(i);
                        } else {
                            valid_v.push(i);
                        }
                    }
                }

                if valid_u.is_empty() || valid_v.is_empty() {
                    break;
                }

                let mut best_gain = i32::MIN;
                let mut best_pair = (n, n);

                for &u in &valid_u {
                    let du = d[u];
                    for &v in &valid_v {
                        let is_edge = if use_adj {
                            adj[u * n + v] as i32
                        } else {
                            let mut cnt = 0;
                            for &neighbor in &graph[u] {
                                if neighbor == v { cnt += 1; }
                            }
                            cnt
                        };
                        
                        let gain = du + d[v] - 2 * is_edge;
                        if gain > best_gain {
                            best_gain = gain;
                            best_pair = (u, v);
                        }
                    }
                }

                if best_pair.0 == n { break; }
                
                let (u, v) = best_pair;
                unvisited[u] = false;
                unvisited[v] = false;
                max_gains.push(best_gain);
                swaps.push((u, v));
                
                for &w in &graph[u] {
                    if unvisited[w] {
                        if part[w] == part[u] {
                            d[w] += 2;
                        } else {
                            d[w] -= 2;
                        }
                    }
                }
                for &w in &graph[v] {
                    if unvisited[w] {
                        if part[w] == part[v] {
                            d[w] += 2;
                        } else {
                            d[w] -= 2;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            let mut max_prefix_sum = 0i32;
            let mut current_sum = 0i32;
            let mut best_k = 0;
            
            for k in 0..max_gains.len() {
                current_sum += max_gains[k];
                if current_sum > max_prefix_sum {
                    max_prefix_sum = current_sum;
                    best_k = k + 1;
                }
            }

            if max_prefix_sum > 0 {
                improved = true;
                for k in 0..best_k {
                    let (u, v) = swaps[k];
                    part[u] = 1;
                    part[v] = 0;
                }
                current_cut = (current_cut as i32 - max_prefix_sum) as u32;
            }
        }

        if current_cut < best_overall_cut {
            best_overall_cut = current_cut;
            best_overall_part = part;
        }
    }

    (best_overall_cut, best_overall_part)
}

fn get_mas_order(graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>, n: usize) -> Vec<usize> {
    if n == 0 { return vec![]; }
    let mut order = Vec::with_capacity(n);
    let mut added = vec![false; n];
    let mut degrees = vec![0; n];
    for u in 0..n {
        degrees[u] = graph[u].len();
    }
    
    let mut first = 0;
    let mut max_deg = 0;
    for u in 0..n {
        if degrees[u] > max_deg {
            max_deg = degrees[u];
            first = u;
        }
    }
    
    order.push(first);
    added[first] = true;
    
    let mut connected = vec![0; n];
    for &v in &graph[first] {
        connected[v] += 1;
    }
    
    for _ in 1..n {
        let mut best_node = 0;
        let mut best_conn = -1;
        let mut best_deg = -1;
        
        for u in 0..n {
            if !added[u] {
                if connected[u] as i32 > best_conn || (connected[u] as i32 == best_conn && degrees[u] as i32 > best_deg) {
                    best_conn = connected[u] as i32;
                    best_deg = degrees[u] as i32;
                    best_node = u;
                }
            }
        }
        
        order.push(best_node);
        added[best_node] = true;
        for &v in &graph[best_node] {
            connected[v] += 1;
        }
    }
    
    order
}

fn dfs(
    idx: usize,
    count0: usize,
    count1: usize,
    current_cut: u32,
    lb_extra: u32,
    edges_to_0: &mut [u32],
    edges_to_1: &mut [u32],
    part: &mut [u8],
    state: &mut SolverState,
    graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>,
    order: &[usize],
    n: usize,
) {
    if state.timeout {
        return;
    }
    
    state.call_count += 1;
    if state.call_count & 4095 == 0 {
        if state.start_time.elapsed().as_millis() > 1900 {
            state.timeout = true;
            return;
        }
    }

    if count0 == n / 2 {
        let mut final_cut = current_cut;
        for i in idx..n {
            let u = order[i];
            final_cut += edges_to_0[u];
        }
        if final_cut < state.best_cut {
            state.best_cut = final_cut;
            state.best_part = part.to_vec();
            for i in idx..n {
                let u = order[i];
                state.best_part[u] = 1;
            }
        }
        return;
    }
    
    if count1 == n / 2 {
        let mut final_cut = current_cut;
        for i in idx..n {
            let u = order[i];
            final_cut += edges_to_1[u];
        }
        if final_cut < state.best_cut {
            state.best_cut = final_cut;
            state.best_part = part.to_vec();
            for i in idx..n {
                let u = order[i];
                state.best_part[u] = 0;
            }
        }
        return;
    }

    if current_cut + lb_extra >= state.best_cut {
        return;
    }

    let u = order[idx];
    let cost0 = edges_to_1[u];
    let cost1 = edges_to_0[u];
    
    let try_0_first = cost0 <= cost1;

    macro_rules! assign_0 {
        () => {
            let added_cut = edges_to_1[u];
            let mut new_lb_extra = lb_extra - std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[u], edges_to_1[u]);
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    let old_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    edges_to_0[w] += 1;
                    let new_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    new_lb_extra += new_min - old_min;
                }
            }
            
            part[u] = 0;
            dfs(idx + 1, count0 + 1, count1, current_cut + added_cut, new_lb_extra, edges_to_0, edges_to_1, part, state, graph, order, n);
            part[u] = 2;
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    edges_to_0[w] -= 1;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    macro_rules! assign_1 {
        () => {
            let added_cut = edges_to_0[u];
            let mut new_lb_extra = lb_extra - std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[u], edges_to_1[u]);
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    let old_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    edges_to_1[w] += 1;
                    let new_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    new_lb_extra += new_min - old_min;
                }
            }
            
            part[u] = 1;
            dfs(idx + 1, count0, count1 + 1, current_cut + added_cut, new_lb_extra, edges_to_0, edges_to_1, part, state, graph, order, n);
            part[u] = 2;
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    edges_to_1[w] -= 1;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if try_0_first {
        assign_0!();
        assign_1!();
    } else {
        assign_1!();
        assign_0!();
    }
}

fn solve(graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>, adj: &Vec<u16>, use_adj: bool, n: usize) -> (u32, Vec<u8>) {
    if n == 0 { return (0, vec![]); }
    
    let kl_iters = if n <= 50 {
        2000
    } else if n <= 100 {
        1000
    } else if n <= 200 {
        400
    } else if n <= 500 {
        100
    } else {
        20
    };
    
    let (best_cut, best_part) = kernighan_lin(graph, adj, use_adj, n, kl_iters);
    
    let order = get_mas_order(graph, n);
    
    let mut state = SolverState {
        best_cut,
        best_part: best_part.clone(),
        start_time: Instant::now(),
        call_count: 0,
        timeout: false,
    };
    
    let mut edges_to_0 = vec![0; n];
    let mut edges_to_1 = vec![0; n];
    let mut part = vec![2u8; n];
    
    let u = order[0];
    part[u] = 0;
    for &w in &graph[u] {
        edges_to_0[w] += 1;
    }
    
    let mut initial_lb_extra = 0;
    for w in 0..n {
        if part[w] == 2 {
            initial_lb_extra += std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
        }
    }
    
    dfs(1, 1, 0, 0, initial_lb_extra, &mut edges_to_0, &mut edges_to_1, &mut part, &mut state, graph, &order, n);
    
    (state.best_cut, state.best_part)
}

fn main() {
    let mut input = String::new();
    if let Err(_) = io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input) {
        return;
    }
    let mut tokens = input.split_whitespace();

    let n_str = tokens.next();
    if n_str.is_none() { return; }
    let n: usize = n_str.unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let m: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();

    let mut graph = vec![vec![]; n];
    let use_adj = n <= 5000;
    let mut adj = if use_adj { vec![0u16; n * n] } else { vec![] };

    for _ in 0..m {
        let u: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
        let v: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
        if u != v {
            graph[u].push(v);
            graph[v].push(u);
            if use_adj {
                adj[u * n + v] = adj[u * n + v].saturating_add(1);
                adj[v * n + u] = adj[v * n + u].saturating_add(1);
            }
        }
    }

    let (best_cut, best_part) = solve(&graph, &adj, use_adj, n);

    println!("{}", best_cut);
    let mut part_a = vec![];
    for i in 0..n {
        if best_part[i] == 0 {
            part_a.push(i);
        }
    }
    
    for i in 0..part_a.len() {
        if i > 0 {
            print!(" ");
        }
        print!("{}", part_a[i]);
    }
    println!();
}

 0.0000

View Rust Code (12702 chars)
use std::io::{self, Read};
use std::time::Instant;

struct XorShift {
    state: u64,
}

impl XorShift {
    fn new(seed: u64) -> Self {
        Self { state: seed.max(1) }
    }
    
    fn next(&mut self) -> u64 {
        let mut x = self.state;
        x ^= x << 13;
        x ^= x >> 7;
        x ^= x << 17;
        self.state = x;
        x
    }
    
    fn next_usize(&mut self, max: usize) -> usize {
        (self.next() % (max as u64)) as usize
    }
}

fn shuffle(arr: &mut [usize], rng: &mut XorShift) {
    let n = arr.len();
    if n <= 1 { return; }
    for i in (1..n).rev() {
        let j = rng.next_usize(i + 1);
        arr.swap(i, j);
    }
}

struct SolverState {
    best_cut: u32,
    best_part: Vec<u8>,
    start_time: Instant,
    call_count: u32,
    timeout: bool,
}

fn kernighan_lin(
    graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>,
    adj: &Vec<u16>,
    use_adj: bool,
    n: usize,
    iterations: usize,
) -> (u32, Vec<u8>) {
    if n == 0 { return (0, vec![]); }
    
    let mut best_overall_cut = u32::MAX;
    let mut best_overall_part = vec![];
    let mut rng = XorShift::new(123456789);

    for _ in 0..iterations {
        let mut part = vec![0u8; n];
        let mut nodes: Vec<usize> = (0..n).collect();
        shuffle(&mut nodes, &mut rng);
        for i in 0..n/2 {
            part[nodes[i]] = 1;
        }

        let mut current_cut = 0;
        for u in 0..n {
            for &v in &graph[u] {
                if u < v && part[u] != part[v] {
                    current_cut += 1;
                }
            }
        }

        let mut improved = true;
        while improved {
            improved = false;
            
            let mut d = vec![0i32; n];
            for u in 0..n {
                for &v in &graph[u] {
                    if part[u] != part[v] {
                        d[u] += 1;
                    } else {
                        d[u] -= 1;
                    }
                }
            }

            let mut unvisited = vec![true; n];
            let mut max_gains = Vec::with_capacity(n / 2);
            let mut swaps = Vec::with_capacity(n / 2);

            for _ in 0..n/2 {
                let mut valid_u = Vec::with_capacity(n/2);
                let mut valid_v = Vec::with_capacity(n/2);
                for i in 0..n {
                    if unvisited[i] {
                        if part[i] == 0 {
                            valid_u.push(i);
                        } else {
                            valid_v.push(i);
                        }
                    }
                }

                if valid_u.is_empty() || valid_v.is_empty() {
                    break;
                }

                let mut best_gain = i32::MIN;
                let mut best_pair = (n, n);

                for &u in &valid_u {
                    let du = d[u];
                    for &v in &valid_v {
                        let is_edge = if use_adj {
                            adj[u * n + v] as i32
                        } else {
                            let mut cnt = 0;
                            for &neighbor in &graph[u] {
                                if neighbor == v { cnt += 1; }
                            }
                            cnt
                        };
                        
                        let gain = du + d[v] - 2 * is_edge;
                        if gain > best_gain {
                            best_gain = gain;
                            best_pair = (u, v);
                        }
                    }
                }

                if best_pair.0 == n { break; }
                
                let (u, v) = best_pair;
                unvisited[u] = false;
                unvisited[v] = false;
                max_gains.push(best_gain);
                swaps.push((u, v));
                
                for &w in &graph[u] {
                    if unvisited[w] {
                        if part[w] == part[u] {
                            d[w] += 2;
                        } else {
                            d[w] -= 2;
                        }
                    }
                }
                for &w in &graph[v] {
                    if unvisited[w] {
                        if part[w] == part[v] {
                            d[w] += 2;
                        } else {
                            d[w] -= 2;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            let mut max_prefix_sum = 0i32;
            let mut current_sum = 0i32;
            let mut best_k = 0;
            
            for k in 0..max_gains.len() {
                current_sum += max_gains[k];
                if current_sum > max_prefix_sum {
                    max_prefix_sum = current_sum;
                    best_k = k + 1;
                }
            }

            if max_prefix_sum > 0 {
                improved = true;
                for k in 0..best_k {
                    let (u, v) = swaps[k];
                    part[u] = 1;
                    part[v] = 0;
                }
                current_cut = (current_cut as i32 - max_prefix_sum) as u32;
            }
        }

        if current_cut < best_overall_cut {
            best_overall_cut = current_cut;
            best_overall_part = part;
        }
    }

    (best_overall_cut, best_overall_part)
}

fn get_mas_order(graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>, n: usize) -> Vec<usize> {
    if n == 0 { return vec![]; }
    let mut order = Vec::with_capacity(n);
    let mut added = vec![false; n];
    let mut degrees = vec![0; n];
    for u in 0..n {
        degrees[u] = graph[u].len();
    }
    
    let mut first = 0;
    let mut max_deg = 0;
    for u in 0..n {
        if degrees[u] > max_deg {
            max_deg = degrees[u];
            first = u;
        }
    }
    
    order.push(first);
    added[first] = true;
    
    let mut connected = vec![0; n];
    for &v in &graph[first] {
        connected[v] += 1;
    }
    
    for _ in 1..n {
        let mut best_node = 0;
        let mut best_conn = -1;
        let mut best_deg = -1;
        
        for u in 0..n {
            if !added[u] {
                if connected[u] as i32 > best_conn || (connected[u] as i32 == best_conn && degrees[u] as i32 > best_deg) {
                    best_conn = connected[u] as i32;
                    best_deg = degrees[u] as i32;
                    best_node = u;
                }
            }
        }
        
        order.push(best_node);
        added[best_node] = true;
        for &v in &graph[best_node] {
            connected[v] += 1;
        }
    }
    
    order
}

fn dfs(
    idx: usize,
    count0: usize,
    count1: usize,
    current_cut: u32,
    lb_extra: u32,
    edges_to_0: &mut [u32],
    edges_to_1: &mut [u32],
    part: &mut [u8],
    state: &mut SolverState,
    graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>,
    order: &[usize],
    n: usize,
) {
    if state.timeout {
        return;
    }
    
    state.call_count += 1;
    if state.call_count & 4095 == 0 {
        if state.start_time.elapsed().as_millis() > 1900 {
            state.timeout = true;
            return;
        }
    }

    if count0 == n / 2 {
        let mut final_cut = current_cut;
        for i in idx..n {
            let u = order[i];
            final_cut += edges_to_0[u];
        }
        if final_cut < state.best_cut {
            state.best_cut = final_cut;
            state.best_part = part.to_vec();
            for i in idx..n {
                let u = order[i];
                state.best_part[u] = 1;
            }
        }
        return;
    }
    
    if count1 == n / 2 {
        let mut final_cut = current_cut;
        for i in idx..n {
            let u = order[i];
            final_cut += edges_to_1[u];
        }
        if final_cut < state.best_cut {
            state.best_cut = final_cut;
            state.best_part = part.to_vec();
            for i in idx..n {
                let u = order[i];
                state.best_part[u] = 0;
            }
        }
        return;
    }

    if current_cut + lb_extra >= state.best_cut {
        return;
    }

    let u = order[idx];
    let cost0 = edges_to_1[u];
    let cost1 = edges_to_0[u];
    
    let try_0_first = cost0 <= cost1;

    macro_rules! assign_0 {
        () => {
            let added_cut = edges_to_1[u];
            let mut new_lb_extra = lb_extra - std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[u], edges_to_1[u]);
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    let old_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    edges_to_0[w] += 1;
                    let new_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    new_lb_extra += new_min - old_min;
                }
            }
            
            part[u] = 0;
            dfs(idx + 1, count0 + 1, count1, current_cut + added_cut, new_lb_extra, edges_to_0, edges_to_1, part, state, graph, order, n);
            part[u] = 2;
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    edges_to_0[w] -= 1;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    macro_rules! assign_1 {
        () => {
            let added_cut = edges_to_0[u];
            let mut new_lb_extra = lb_extra - std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[u], edges_to_1[u]);
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    let old_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    edges_to_1[w] += 1;
                    let new_min = std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
                    new_lb_extra += new_min - old_min;
                }
            }
            
            part[u] = 1;
            dfs(idx + 1, count0, count1 + 1, current_cut + added_cut, new_lb_extra, edges_to_0, edges_to_1, part, state, graph, order, n);
            part[u] = 2;
            
            for &w in &graph[u] {
                if part[w] == 2 {
                    edges_to_1[w] -= 1;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    if try_0_first {
        assign_0!();
        assign_1!();
    } else {
        assign_1!();
        assign_0!();
    }
}

fn solve(graph: &Vec<Vec<usize>>, adj: &Vec<u16>, use_adj: bool, n: usize) -> (u32, Vec<u8>) {
    if n == 0 { return (0, vec![]); }
    
    let kl_iters = if n <= 50 {
        2000
    } else if n <= 100 {
        1000
    } else if n <= 200 {
        400
    } else if n <= 500 {
        100
    } else {
        20
    };
    
    let (best_cut, best_part) = kernighan_lin(graph, adj, use_adj, n, kl_iters);
    
    let order = get_mas_order(graph, n);
    
    let mut state = SolverState {
        best_cut,
        best_part: best_part.clone(),
        start_time: Instant::now(),
        call_count: 0,
        timeout: false,
    };
    
    let mut edges_to_0 = vec![0; n];
    let mut edges_to_1 = vec![0; n];
    let mut part = vec![2u8; n];
    
    let u = order[0];
    part[u] = 0;
    for &w in &graph[u] {
        edges_to_0[w] += 1;
    }
    
    let mut initial_lb_extra = 0;
    for w in 0..n {
        if part[w] == 2 {
            initial_lb_extra += std::cmp::min(edges_to_0[w], edges_to_1[w]);
        }
    }
    
    dfs(1, 1, 0, 0, initial_lb_extra, &mut edges_to_0, &mut edges_to_1, &mut part, &mut state, graph, &order, n);
    
    (state.best_cut, state.best_part)
}

fn main() {
    let mut input = String::new();
    if let Err(_) = io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut input) {
        return;
    }
    let mut tokens = input.split_whitespace();

    let n_str = tokens.next();
    if n_str.is_none() { return; }
    let n: usize = n_str.unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let m: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();

    let mut graph = vec![vec![]; n];
    let use_adj = n <= 5000;
    let mut adj = if use_adj { vec![0u16; n * n] } else { vec![] };

    for _ in 0..m {
        let u: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
        let v: usize = tokens.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
        if u != v {
            graph[u].push(v);
            graph[v].push(u);
            if use_adj {
                adj[u * n + v] = adj[u * n + v].saturating_add(1);
                adj[v * n + u] = adj[v * n + u].saturating_add(1);
            }
        }
    }

    let (best_cut, best_part) = solve(&graph, &adj, use_adj, n);

    println!("{}", best_cut);
    let mut part_a = vec![];
    for i in 0..n {
        if best_part[i] == 0 {
            part_a.push(i);
        }
    }
    
    for i in 0..part_a.len() {
        if i > 0 {
            print!(" ");
        }
        print!("{}", part_a[i]);
    }
    println!();
}

Test 40: Integer Linear Programming (C++) Score: 1.00 / 14
Typical Prompt:
You are writing C++ code to solve a **0/1 Integer Linear Program**.

Maximize:
sum(c_i * x_i)

Subject to:
x_u + x_v <= 1 (for each constraint pair u, v)
x_i in {0, 1}

**Input format (stdin)**
```
n m
c_0 c_1 ... c_(n-1)
u_0 v_0
u_1 v_1
... (m lines total)
```
- `n` = number of binary variables
- `m` = number of pair constraints

**Output format (stdout)**
```
objective_value
x_0 x_1 ... x_(n-1)
```

**What is checked**
1. Output format is valid.
2. `x_i` are binary and satisfy all constraints.
3. Reported objective matches the assignment.
4. Assignment achieves the true optimum for the instance.

Write complete C++17 code with `main()` that reads stdin and writes stdout.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Maximise a score by choosing which items to switch “on” or “off”, subject to a set of rules that restrict certain combinations. Each item has a value, and the rules say things like “you can’t pick both A and B”.

This is 0/1 Integer Linear Programming, a fundamental NP-hard optimisation problem. The test uses planted instances with a known unique optimum for strict pass/fail grading. Subpasses increase the number of variables and constraints.

 1.0000
[20 vars, 10 constraints] PASS: objective 133 (optimal) in 0.03s

Integer Linear Programming - 20 vars, 10 constraints

Binary variables: 20 | Pair constraints: 10 | Planted optimum is unique

Approach: The implementation provides a correct and efficient C++17 solution using a backtracking approach to solve the Maximum Weight Independent Set problem, which is equivalent to the requested 0/1 Integer Linear Program under the given constraints.

View C++ Code (2358 chars)
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>

/**
 * The problem is equivalent to the Maximum Weight Independent Set problem.
 * Given n variables and constraints (x_u + x_v <= 1), we can view this
 * as a graph where each constraint is an edge between u and v.
 * We want to select a subset of vertices such that no two are connected
 * by an edge, maximizing the sum of their weights.
 */

struct Solver {
    int n;
    std::vector<long long> weights;
    std::vector<std::vector<int>> adj;
    
    long long max_weight = -1;
    std::vector<int> best_assignment;
    std::vector<int> current_assignment;

    Solver(int n, std::vector<long long> weights, int m) : n(n), weights(weights) {
        adj.resize(n);
        current_assignment.assign(n, 0);
        best_assignment.assign(n, 0);
    }

    void add_constraint(int u, int v) {
        adj[u].push_back(v);
        adj[v].push_back(u);
    }

    bool is_safe(int v) {
        for (int neighbor : adj[v]) {
            if (current_assignment[neighbor] == 1) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        return true;
    }

    void solve(int idx, long long current_weight) {
        if (idx == n) {
            if (current_weight > max_weight) {
                max_weight = current_weight;
                best_assignment = current_assignment;
            }
            return;
        }

        // Try excluding variable idx
        current_assignment[idx] = 0;
        solve(idx + 1, current_weight);

        // Try including variable idx if safe
        if (is_safe(idx)) {
            current_assignment[idx] = 1;
            solve(idx + 1, current_weight + weights[idx]);
            current_assignment[idx] = 0; // backtrack
        }
    }
};

int main() {
    std::ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(NULL);

    int n, m;
    if (!(std::cin >> n >> m)) return 0;

    std::vector<long long> c(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) std::cin >> c[i];

    Solver solver(n, c, m);
    for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        std::cin >> u >> v;
        solver.add_constraint(u, v);
    }

    solver.solve(0, 0);

    std::cout << solver.max_weight << std::endl;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        std::cout << solver.best_assignment[i] << (i == n - 1 ? "" : " ");
    }
    std::cout << std::endl;

    return 0;
}
Constraint Pair Visualization — Valid optimal assignment
Pairs: 10 | Reported obj: 133 | Actual obj: 133 | Optimum: 133 | Mismatched vars: 0 | Violated pairs: 0
Green nodes match planted optimum (selected). Gray are correctly unselected. Amber/Red indicate wrong variable decisions. Red pair lines mark violated constraints.

Integer Linear Programming - 40 vars, 20 constraints

Binary variables: 40 | Pair constraints: 20 | Planted optimum is unique

Approach: The implementation provides a correct and efficient C++17 solution using a backtracking approach to solve the Maximum Weight Independent Set problem, which is equivalent to the requested 0/1 Integer Linear Program under the given constraints.

View C++ Code (2358 chars)
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>

/**
 * The problem is equivalent to the Maximum Weight Independent Set problem.
 * Given n variables and constraints (x_u + x_v <= 1), we can view this
 * as a graph where each constraint is an edge between u and v.
 * We want to select a subset of vertices such that no two are connected
 * by an edge, maximizing the sum of their weights.
 */

struct Solver {
    int n;
    std::vector<long long> weights;
    std::vector<std::vector<int>> adj;
    
    long long max_weight = -1;
    std::vector<int> best_assignment;
    std::vector<int> current_assignment;

    Solver(int n, std::vector<long long> weights, int m) : n(n), weights(weights) {
        adj.resize(n);
        current_assignment.assign(n, 0);
        best_assignment.assign(n, 0);
    }

    void add_constraint(int u, int v) {
        adj[u].push_back(v);
        adj[v].push_back(u);
    }

    bool is_safe(int v) {
        for (int neighbor : adj[v]) {
            if (current_assignment[neighbor] == 1) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        return true;
    }

    void solve(int idx, long long current_weight) {
        if (idx == n) {
            if (current_weight > max_weight) {
                max_weight = current_weight;
                best_assignment = current_assignment;
            }
            return;
        }

        // Try excluding variable idx
        current_assignment[idx] = 0;
        solve(idx + 1, current_weight);

        // Try including variable idx if safe
        if (is_safe(idx)) {
            current_assignment[idx] = 1;
            solve(idx + 1, current_weight + weights[idx]);
            current_assignment[idx] = 0; // backtrack
        }
    }
};

int main() {
    std::ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(NULL);

    int n, m;
    if (!(std::cin >> n >> m)) return 0;

    std::vector<long long> c(n);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) std::cin >> c[i];

    Solver solver(n, c, m);
    for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        int u, v;
        std::cin >> u >> v;
        solver.add_constraint(u, v);
    }

    solver.solve(0, 0);

    std::cout << solver.max_weight << std::endl;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        std::cout << solver.best_assignment[i] << (i == n - 1 ? "" : " ");
    }
    std::cout << std::endl;

    return 0;
}

Test 41: Fragment Shaders (SPIR-V Assembly) Score: 19.76 / 20
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a SPIR-V assembly text fragment shader. The shader will be assembled
with spirv-as (Vulkan 1.0 target) and rendered on a unit sphere.

**Available inputs (from vertex shader):**
```
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos; ; world-space position
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal; ; world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
layout(location = 2) in vec2 uv; ; texture coordinates in [0,1]
layout(location = 3) in vec3 tangent; ; tangent vector
layout(location = 4) in vec3 color; ; per-vertex color (smoothly varies: typical value: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
```

**Available uniform buffer (DescriptorSet 0, Binding 0):**
```
struct UBO { // std140 layout
mat4 model; // offset 0 (column-major)
mat4 view; // offset 64
mat4 projection; // offset 128
vec4 lightPos; // offset 192 -- typical value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
vec4 cameraPos; // offset 208 -- typical value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
vec4 params; // offset 224 -- typical value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};
```

**Required output:**
```
layout(location = 0) out vec4 outColor; RGBA float, will be stored as rgba8unorm
```

**SPIR-V requirements:**
- Start with `; SPIR-V` header comment and version
- Use `OpCapability Shader` and `OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450`
- Use `OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main"` listing ALL input/output variables used
- Use `OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft`
- Declare all necessary decorations (Location, DescriptorSet, Binding, Block, Offsets)
- All input variables are `Input` storage class, output is `Output` storage class
- The uniform buffer variable is `Uniform` storage class
- Entry point function name must be "main"

**Write ONLY the complete SPIR-V assembly text.** Do not include any other text or explanation
outside the SPIR-V text.


**Task:** Output a solid red color (vec4(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0)).
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Write raw SPIR-V assembly for Vulkan fragment shaders. The task is to reproduce a series of target visual effects on a shaded sphere: simple colors, instruction set that graphics cards actually execute. Each subpass asks for a different visual effect (lighting, patterns, fractals) rendered onto a 3D sphere, and the output image is compared pixel-by-pixel against a reference.

This is the hardest shader-language test because SPIR-V assembly is essentially GPU machine code: every operation, type declaration, and memory access must be

1.0000
[Solid Red] Perfect match (tol: color=2, spatial=1)

SPIR-V Shader - Solid Red

View SPIR-V (888 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
               OpCapability Shader
          %1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %outColor
               OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft
               OpSource GLSL 450
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
       %void = OpTypeVoid
         %14 = OpTypeFunction %void
      %float = OpTypeFloat 32
    %v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
   %outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
     %float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
     %float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
         %22 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_1 %float_0 %float_0 %float_1
       %main = OpFunction %void None %14
         %25 = OpLabel
               OpStore %outColor %22
               OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

View SPIR-V (2756 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0

               OpCapability Shader
          %1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %normal %outColor
               OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

               OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
               OpDecorate %normal Location 1
               OpDecorate %uv Location 2
               OpDecorate %tangent Location 3
               OpDecorate %color Location 4
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

               OpDecorate %UBO Block
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 ColMajor
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 MatrixStride 16
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 ColMajor
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 MatrixStride 16
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 ColMajor
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 MatrixStride 16
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
               OpDecorate %ubo_var DescriptorSet 0
               OpDecorate %ubo_var Binding 0

       %void = OpTypeVoid
          %3 = OpTypeFunction %void
      %float = OpTypeFloat 32
    %v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
    %v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
    %v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
    %mat4v4float = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

        %UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4v4float %mat4v4float %mat4v4float %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
    %ubo_var = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

%_ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float

   %worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
     %normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
         %uv = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v2float Input
    %tangent = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
      %color = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input

%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
   %outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output

  %float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%v3float_0_5 = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_5 %float_0_5 %float_0_5
    %float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0

       %main = OpFunction %void None %3
          %5 = OpLabel
         %10 = OpLoad %v3float %normal
         %11 = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %10
         %12 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %11 %float_0_5
         %13 = OpFAdd %v3float %12 %v3float_0_5
         %14 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %13 %float_1
               OpStore %outColor %14
               OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

OpCapability Shader
%1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

OpDecorate %normal Location 1

OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 ColMajor

OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
